80e7ef4a.title: Technical Delivery Manager – Microsoft Technologies (.NET)
80e7ef4a.description:
**Technical Delivery Manager (.NET Background)** 




 Experience : 18 – 22 years
 



 Location Bengaluru
 



  





 About the Role
 



 We are seeking an experienced Technical Delivery Manager – Project Management to lead the delivery of large\-scale Application Development \& Maintenance (ADM) engagements for a strategic global client. This leadership role is responsible for driving end\-to\-end delivery excellence, managing offshore operations, leading engineering teams of over 100 professionals, and building long\-term client relationships.
 



 The ideal candidate will have 18\+ years of experience in technology delivery, with a strong background in Microsoft technology\-based application development and support, combined with exceptional leadership, stakeholder management, and delivery governance capabilities.
 



 This role requires a strategic leader who can drive engineering excellence, foster AI adoption, build high\-performing teams, and contribute to account growth while ensuring consistent delivery quality.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 


* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of large\-scale Application Development \& Maintenance (ADM) programs using Microsoft technologies.
* Manage and mentor offshore delivery teams of 100\+ engineers, technical leads, architects, and project managers.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with client stakeholders, ensuring high customer satisfaction and trusted advisor status.
* Drive delivery governance through effective planning, execution, risk management, quality assurance, and reporting.
* Champion engineering excellence by implementing modern software engineering practices, automation, DevOps, and continuous improvement initiatives.
* Lead AI adoption initiatives across engineering teams and promote a culture of innovation and operational excellence.
* Establish Agile delivery frameworks and ensure adherence to Agile best practices across programs.
* Provide technical and engineering leadership by driving architecture discussions, innovation, productivity improvements, and technology modernization.
* Develop high\-performing teams through coaching, mentoring, succession planning, and employee engagement initiatives.
* Manage project financials, including budgeting, forecasting, profitability, resource planning, and delivery metrics across both Time \& Material and Fixed Price engagements.
* Identify business growth opportunities within existing accounts, contribute to solution proposals, and support account expansion initiatives.
* Prepare and present executive\-level dashboards, delivery reviews, and strategic updates to senior client leadership.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure successful project execution and continuous customer success.



  





 Required Qualifications
 


* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related discipline.
* 18\+ years of experience in IT services, application development, and delivery management.
* Extensive experience managing large\-scale ADM engagements within the Microsoft technology ecosystem.
* Proven experience leading global delivery teams comprising 100\+ professionals.
* Strong expertise in Agile delivery methodologies, project governance, delivery excellence, and program management.
* Demonstrated success in managing senior client stakeholders and executive\-level communications.
* Experience managing both Fixed Price and Time \& Material engagement models.
* Strong financial management skills, including budgeting, forecasting, revenue management, and resource planning.
* Experience driving engineering best practices, innovation, automation, and AI adoption initiatives.
* Excellent leadership, decision\-making, conflict resolution, and stakeholder management skills.
* Strong presentation, storytelling, negotiation, and communication skills.



  





 Preferred Skills \& Certifications
 


* PMP (Project Management Professional) certification preferred.
* Agile certifications such as Certified ScrumMaster (CSM), PMI\-ACP, SAFe Agilist, or equivalent are preferred.
* Exposure to AI\-enabled software engineering practices and delivery transformation initiatives.
* Experience in proposal development, solutioning, and account growth strategies.

145d2527.title: Associate Program Manager
145d2527.description:
**The Mission: Build the operating system for the future of AI\-powered entertainment.** 




  





**About Us** 




 Our journey at Dashverse began with a simple question: What if AI could power the next generation of entertainment? As a Series A technology company backed by leading Indian investors like Peak XV, Matrix, and Stellaris, we began our journey with Dashtoon, revolutionizing AI comics. Now, with Dashreels, we are creating a new universe of short\-form video, curating addictive short dramas while also launching our own game\-changing AI\-generated originals.
 



  





 We offer a personalized, binge\-worthy viewing experience that's captivating Indian audiences. Our mission is to become the go\-to destination for compelling, short\-form narrative content around the world. Are you ready to build the future of storytelling?
 



  





  





  





**About the Role** 




 We are looking for a highly analytical and content\-obsessed
 **Associate Program Manager – Content Strategy \& Insights** 
 to help shape the future of storytelling at Dashverse. This role sits at the intersection of
 **content strategy, market intelligence, and programming insights** 
 , with a strong focus on
 **micro\-drama trends** 
 and emerging entertainment formats.
 



 You will play a key role in identifying
 **what content works, why it works, and what we should build next** 
 . From decoding winning tropes, genres, and storytelling patterns across global microdrama platforms to conducting deep market and competitive research, you will help define Dashverse’s
 **content slate strategy** 
 .
 



 You will work closely with
 **Content, Licensing, Growth, Product, and Leadership teams** 
 to translate insights into actionable decisions—helping us build highly engaging, commercially successful, and culturally relevant content.
 



  





  





  





**Your Part** 




  





**Content Strategy \& Slate Development** 



* Conduct deep analysis of
 **micro\-drama ecosystems globally** 
 to identify winning content patterns, genres, themes, formats, and storytelling mechanics.
* Study
 **what’s working across competing platforms** 
 , including title performance, narrative structures, hooks, pacing, cliffhangers, character archetypes, and engagement trends.
* Recommend
 **content slate priorities** 
 based on market trends, whitespace opportunities, and content performance signals.
* Identify emerging themes, underserved genres, and content gaps to inform
 **future greenlighting and commissioning decisions** 
 .
* Build structured recommendations around
 **what types of stories, themes, and genres Dashverse should invest in** 
 .



  





**Market Intelligence \& Competitive Research** 



* Conduct extensive
 **primary and secondary market research** 
 to understand content trends across micro\-drama, OTT, and digital entertainment ecosystems.
* Track and analyze
 **top\-performing titles across platforms** 
 to identify repeatable success patterns.
* Study
 **genre evolution, content saturation, and whitespace opportunities** 
 to support strategic decision\-making.
* Monitor emerging storytelling trends, content formats, and entertainment shifts relevant to Dashverse.



  





**Cross\-Functional Influence** 



* Partner with
 **Content and Creative teams** 
 to share actionable insights around genres, tropes, storytelling patterns, pacing, and character archetypes.
* Work closely with
 **Licensing teams** 
 to evaluate external content opportunities and prioritize acquisitions based on market signals and trend potential.
* Collaborate with
 **Growth teams** 
 to align content priorities with platform growth opportunities and market demand.
* Partner with
 **Product teams** 
 to share insights on content trends, discovery opportunities, and category\-level demand signals.



  





**Insights \& Strategic Reporting** 



* Develop recurring reports and intelligence frameworks on
 **what is trending, what is saturating, and what is emerging** 
 in the micro\-drama ecosystem.
* Build internal knowledge systems to continuously track
 **competitive platforms, title performance, genre shifts, and storytelling trends** 
 .
* Synthesize complex research into
 **clear, actionable recommendations for leadership and cross\-functional teams** 
 .



  





  





  





**Mandatory Skills** 



* Strong understanding of
 **content strategy, programming, and digital entertainment trends** 
 .
* Deep curiosity about
 **storytelling, micro\-drama, OTT, short\-form entertainment, and emerging content formats** 
 .
* Strong analytical ability with experience translating
 **market intelligence into actionable content recommendations** 
 .
* Strong research and synthesis skills across
 **competitive analysis, market research, and content intelligence** 
 .
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to influence cross\-functional teams.
* Strong structured thinking and ability to derive insights from large sets of qualitative and quantitative information.



  





  





  





**Qualifications** 



* **MBA from a Tier 1 or Tier 2 institute (preferred)**
* **Bachelor’s degree from a Tier 1 institute (preferred)**
* **2–8 years of professional experience** 
 in consulting, strategy, media, OTT, content intelligence, consumer internet, research, or related domains
* Strong passion for
 **content, storytelling, media, and the entertainment industry**



  





  





  





**Good to Have Skills** 



* Experience in
 **content strategy, content programming, media research, or entertainment analytics** 
 .
* Familiarity with
 **micro\-drama, OTT ecosystems, creator economy, or short\-form video platforms** 
 .
* Exposure to
 **market intelligence, competitive benchmarking, or trend forecasting** 
 .
* Understanding of
 **AI\-driven entertainment trends and evolving digital content ecosystems** 
 .
* Strong interest in
 **pop culture, storytelling archetypes, and entertainment trends** 
 .



  





  





  





**What Success Looks Like** 



* You can clearly articulate
 **what content Dashverse should double down on—and why** 
 .
* Your insights directly influence
 **content slate decisions, licensing priorities, growth strategies, and product thinking** 
 .
* You become the internal expert on
 **“what’s working in micro\-drama.”**



  





  





  





**Why You Should Join Us?** 



* **Build from the Ground Up:** 
 This is a rare opportunity to shape the growth story of a breakout product from its early days.
* **Unprecedented Impact:** 
 Your work will directly influence our success and visibility in a key market.
* **Work with the Best:** 
 Join a dynamic and innovative team that is passionate about the future of storytelling and technology.
* **Accelerate Your Career:** 
 This role offers immense potential for personal and professional growth in a fast\-scaling company.



  





  





  





**Ready to take the lead? Apply Now and let's build the future of storytelling together.**

3a01676c.title: T&T- Customer | CS&D | Technical program manager | Pune | Manager
3a01676c.description:
Job requisition ID :: 108594
Date: Jul 13, 2026
Location: Pune
Designation: Manager
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**The team**

  



Customer is about much more than just the numbers. It’s about attesting to accomplishments and challenges and helping to assure strong foundations for future aspirations. Deloitte exemplifies the what, how, and why of change so you’re always ready to act ahead. Learn more about Customer


**Role Overview**
-----------------



We are seeking an experienced and results\-driven **Technical Program Manager (TPM)** to lead complex technology initiatives and drive cross\-functional programs across engineering, product, operations, security, and business teams. The TPM will be responsible for planning, executing, governing, and delivering large\-scale technology programs while ensuring alignment with business objectives and technical strategy.



The ideal candidate will possess strong program management expertise, technical acumen, stakeholder management skills, and a proven track record of delivering enterprise\-scale technology solutions in an Agile environment.


**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

  


### **Program Leadership**


* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of strategic technology programs from initiation through deployment and operational transition.
* Define program scope, objectives, roadmaps, timelines, milestones, and success metrics.
* Drive alignment across multiple teams and stakeholders to ensure successful execution of program goals.
* Identify and manage risks, dependencies, issues, and mitigation plans.


### **Technical Delivery Management**


* Partner with engineering, architecture, product, and infrastructure teams to deliver scalable and secure technology solutions.
* Translate business objectives into actionable technical execution plans.
* Monitor program progress, delivery metrics, and resource utilization.
* Ensure adherence to technology, security, and compliance standards.


### **Stakeholder Management**


* Communicate program status, risks, dependencies, and decisions to senior leadership and executive stakeholders.
* Facilitate governance meetings, steering committees, and executive reviews.
* Build strong partnerships across global teams and external stakeholders.


### **Agile Program Execution**


* Champion Agile, Scrum, and SAFe methodologies.
* Coordinate multiple Agile teams and manage release planning activities.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance delivery excellence and operational efficiency.


### **Risk \& Compliance Management**


* Ensure compliance with regulatory, security, privacy, and operational requirements.
* Collaborate with cybersecurity, risk, legal, and compliance teams as needed.
* Establish and track mitigation plans for business and technology risks.


### **Financial \& Resource Management**


* Support budget planning, forecasting, and resource allocation activities.
* Track program costs, delivery commitments, and resource utilization.
* Manage vendor and third\-party engagements when applicable.


**Required Qualifications**
---------------------------


* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field.
* 8\+ years of experience in Program Management, Project Management, or Technical Delivery roles.
* 5\+ years of experience managing large\-scale, cross\-functional technology programs.
* Strong understanding of Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC).
* Experience working with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud.
* Experience leading Agile delivery teams.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.
* Proven ability to manage globally distributed teams.
* Strong analytical, organizational, and problem\-solving abilities.


**Preferred Qualifications**
----------------------------


* Master's degree (MBA or relevant technical discipline).
* PMP, PgMP, PMI\-ACP, SAFe, Scrum Master, or equivalent certifications.
* Experience in Payments, Financial Services, Banking, FinTech, E\-commerce, or Digital Transformation programs.
* Familiarity with APIs, Microservices, Data Platforms, Cybersecurity, and Enterprise Architecture.
* Experience leading digital modernization or cloud transformation initiatives.


**Technical Skills**
--------------------


* Program \& Portfolio Management
* Agile / Scrum / SAFe
* SDLC \& Release Management
* Cloud Technologies (AWS, Azure, GCP)
* API \& Microservices Architecture
* Jira, Confluence, Azure DevOps
* Data Analytics \& Reporting
* Risk \& Compliance Management
* Vendor Management
* Executive Reporting \& Governance


**Core Competencies**
---------------------


* Strategic Thinking
* Leadership \& Influence
* Executive Communication
* Stakeholder Management
* Problem Solving
* Decision Making
* Risk Management
* Change Management
* Collaboration \& Teamwork
* Customer\-Centric Mindset


**Success Metrics**
-------------------


* On\-time and within\-budget program delivery
* Achievement of business and technology objectives
* Effective management of risks and dependencies
* Stakeholder satisfaction and engagement
* Improved delivery efficiency and operational excellence
* Compliance with security, regulatory, and governance standards

d972b907.title: Senior Technical Program Manager, Amazon Now, Supply Chain
d972b907.description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Come build the supply chain brain for Amazon's fastest\-growing quick commerce business.  

  

Amazon Now's SCOPE (Supply Chain Operations, Planning \& Efficiency) team is looking for a Technical Program Manager who wants to own two of the most foundational pillars of our supply chain — Buying and Forecasting. This isn't a "track and report" TPM role. You'll be the strategic anchor connecting AI/ML\-powered demand intelligence with automated procurement systems, directly shaping how thousands of dark stores across India stay stocked, efficient, and ready for customers in under 15 minutes.  

  

Here's why this role is different:  

  

You'll own the full lifecycle — from roadmap planning to GTM adoption — across programs that touch 20\+ stakeholders, 10\+ external systems, and thousands of stores  

You'll drive a forecasting accuracy leap from 55% MAPE to under 20% — a transformation that directly impacts instock rates, cost efficiency, and customer experience  

You'll take buying automation from baseline to 95%\+ PO automation, fundamentally changing how Amazon Now procures at scale  

You'll operate at the rare intersection of program rigor, technical depth (ML/Science systems, distributed pipelines), and business acumen — all three matter here  

You'll build lasting institutional muscle — governance frameworks, adoption playbooks, and review mechanisms that become the operating system for how we scale supply chain programs  

This is a high\-ambiguity, high\-impact space. If you thrive on connecting dots across complex systems, influencing without authority across worldwide teams, and turning chaos into repeatable execution — This is for you.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

End\-to\-End Program Ownership \& Delivery  

  

Own full lifecycle delivery of complex, cross\-organizational supply chain programs across Buying and Forecasting charters  

Drive roadmap \& OKR planning with 2\-month rolling cycles  

Co\-own P0/P1 metrics and establish program health mechanisms  

Cross\-Org Alignment \& Dependency Governance  

  

Manage 20\+ internal and external stakeholders across Tech, Product, Ops, Science, Seller Managers, and WW Teams  

Govern 10\+ external system dependencies concurrently (forecasting pipelines, vendor portals, WW platforms)  

Drive alignment across organizations including AFT, SCOT, Wombat, GPI, Category, ISMs, and Ops  

GTM Strategy \& Adoption Execution  

  

Design and execute multi\-phase Go\-to\-Market rollouts across DG and P3 hubs  

Drive adoption across thousands of dark stores in India and emerging markets  

Achieve 100% adoption within 30 days post\-launch (current baseline: 60\+ days)  

Buying Charter — Procurement Systems  

  

Drive automated PO generation \& optimization toward 95%\+ automation  

Own Multi Hub ASIN sourcing strategy and MOQ/MOV configuration  

Enable vendor ordering intelligence and Manual Buying UI tools  

Forecasting Charter — Demand Intelligence  

  

Drive MAPE improvement from 55% to Scale ASIN automation rate from 35% to \>90%  

Own S\&OP integrated planning framework, seasonal/high\-velocity event forecast models, and forecast tools (View/Download, Override, Explainability \& Analytics)  

Stakeholder Management \& Leadership Representation  

  

Serve as the program anchor and strategic voice for Buying \& Forecasting in leadership reviews  

Focus on strategic alignments, external dependencies, and GTM/adoption strategies while SDMs handle project execution and internal alignment  

  

About the team  

Amazon Now is Amazon's quick commerce business, delivering essentials to customers in under 15 minutes across India and emerging markets. At the heart of this promise is our Supply Chain Operations, Planning \& Efficiency (SCOPE) organization — the team that ensures thousands of dark stores stay optimally stocked, cost\-efficient, and ready to serve. We build AI/ML\-powered forecasting systems, automated procurement engines, and intelligent sourcing strategies that operate at massive scale. From demand prediction to purchase order generation to multi\-hub fulfillment, our supply chain systems are the backbone that turns speed into a sustainable, repeatable customer experience.

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 3\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 5\+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience
* 3\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* 5\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

87357239.title: Technical Program Manager
87357239.description:
**Technical Program Manager** 




**Location: Remote** 




**Experience: 4 to 8 years** 




**Education: Tier 1 preferred** 




  





**About the role and the client:** 




  





 The client builds the safety and alignment layer for frontier AI systems. They work with leading AI labs to make advanced models deployment\-ready — across red teaming, vulnerability discovery, safety evaluations, agent\-behavior testing, and the datasets and frameworks that make it measurable. If capability asks "what can the model do?", we ask "what happens when it fails, and how do we prevent it?"
 



  





 Every technology cycle begins with capability and matures through trust. AI is crossing that threshold now, and the assurance layer is becoming foundational. They are building the firm that does it to a benchmark standard.
 



  





 They are hiring a TPM to own delivery across both sides of our work: the client engagements we run for labs, and the proactive eval datasets we build, publish, and use to drive outreach and credibility.
 



  





**What you'll own** 




  





 Client delivery
 



 ● Own end\-to\-end delivery on active lab engagements — scoping, timelines, milestones, quality bar, and handoffs
 



 ● Translate lab safety team requirements into clear briefs for our researchers and engineers, and communicate our work back to technical counterparts at frontier labs
 



 ● Be the primary point of contact for clients through an engagement — someone who can hold a substantive conversation about what we're building and why
 



  





 Proactive eval and research work
 



 ● Drive our pipeline of self\-initiated eval datasets — work we build ahead of any client request, publish externally, and use to open conversations with labs
 



 ● Coordinate across research and engineering to keep this work moving alongside client commitments — scoping, tracking progress, managing publication and release
 



 ● Help shape which proactive bets we take: which failure modes are timely, which categories have the best opening for us, what the outreach story should be
 



  





 Operations
 



 ● Build delivery infrastructure as we scale — how we scope, how we QA, how we improve across engagements
 



 ● Track the full pipeline across client and proactive work, and surface risks early
 



  





**What we're looking for** 




  





 ● Working knowledge of how frontier models are trained — what kinds of datasets, evaluation environments, and RL setups labs actually use, and what makes each of them useful or not. You don't need to have built these yourself, but you should have been close enough to the work to have opinions about it
 



 ● Strong enough technical fluency to engage with our researchers and engineers on substance — understanding what makes an eval rigorous, when a scope is too broad, when a dataset is actually solving the problem it's meant to solve
 



 ● Comfortable in client\-facing conversations with technical stakeholders — safety researchers and engineers at frontier labs
 



 ● Ownership orientation that goes beyond coordination — you notice what needs to happen and make it happen

42b2bec7.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
42b2bec7.description:
**Responsibilities**
* Own end\-to\-end program management for mission\-critical initiatives, starting with our automation and quality programme.
* Build visibility across systems, dashboards, monitoring, alerting, health metrics, and escalation workflows.
* Drive rapid root\-cause analysis and coordinate incident resolution across engineering, ML, data, clinical, and CS teams.
* Build process frameworks, runbooks, and scalable operational models that allow teams to execute predictably.
* Establish proactive risk management, quality gates, and cross\-team checkpoints before major releases.
* Lead complex multi\-team launches and rollouts (currently 6\-8 weeks) and streamline them for predictability and speed.
* Run program reviews, track dependencies, and maintain clear ownership across stakeholders.
* Champion operational excellence, continuous improvement, tighter SLAs, better tooling, and consistent execution.


**Requirements**
* Skills: Quality assurance, SQL, Looker, program management, project management, Tableau, machine learning, and NLP.
* 5\+ years of technical programme management experience, ideally in ML/AI, healthcare tech, or other quality\-critical domains.
* Proven track record managing multi\-team programmes involving engineering and non\-engineering stakeholders.
* Experience building operational systems such as monitoring, alerting, quality frameworks, and incident response.
* Strong ability to drive results without formal authority and work effectively in high\-ambiguity environments.
* Background working with regulated or quality\-sensitive workloads is strongly preferred.


**Technical And Analytical**
* Ability to understand system architecture and map which components are impacted by changes.
* Strong analytical skills: SQL proficiency, comfort with dashboards, and trend analysis.
* Experience with BI tools such as Looker, Tableau, Metabase, etc.
* Comfortable having technical conversations with engineers and understanding trade\-offs.
* Familiarity with modern data/ML stacks: we use GCP and BigQuery.


**Leadership And Communication**
* Exceptional communicator who brings clarity, structure, and urgency.
* Low\-ego, high\-empathy leader who can influence without authority.
* Comfortable running war rooms, driving decision\-making, and managing incidents end\-to\-end.
* Builds processes that scale without creating unnecessary overhead.


**Nice To Have**
* Experience in healthcare AI, medical coding, RCM workflows, or quality engineering.
* Experience scaling programmes at a fast\-growing startup.
* Exposure to pod\-based org structures.
* Prior background in operational excellence or reliability engineering.

90b45bfe.title: Program Manager
90b45bfe.description:
**About Ascendion**
 Ascendion is a leader in AI\-powered software engineering, helping businesses innovate faster, smarter, and with greater impact. We partner with Global 2000 clients across North America, UK, Europe, and APAC to solve complex challenges in data, experience design, software product engineering, and workforce transformation. Powered by expert engineers, thousands of AI agents, and our Engineering to the Power of AI™ (EngineeringAI) method, we deliver measurable outcomes that build trust, unlock value, and accelerate growth. Learn more at ascendion.com Ascendion \| Engineering to elevate life
   

  

 We have a culture built on opportunity, inclusion, and a spirit of partnership. Come, change the world with us:
   

  

* Build the coolest tech for world’s leading brands
* Solve complex problems – and learn new skills
* Experience the power of transforming digital engineering for Fortune 500 clients
* Master your craft with leading training programs and hands\-on experience


 Experience a community of change makers!
   

  

 Join a culture of high\-performing innovators with endless ideas and a passion for tech. Our culture is the fabric of our company, and it is what makes us unique and diverse. The way we share ideas, learning, experiences, successes, and joy allows everyone to be their best at Ascendion.
   

  

**Technical Program Manager (TPM)**
**Job Title:** 
 Technical Program Manager (TPM)
   

  

**Department:** 
 Engineering / Product
   

  

**Job Summary**
 We are seeking an experienced Technical Program Manager (TPM) to lead and coordinate cross\-functional technical programs from planning through execution. The TPM will work closely with engineering, product, design, QA, operations, and business stakeholders to ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, and aligned with business objectives.
   

  

**Program Manager Employment Type: Full\-Time Experience:**
* Seeking two exceptional Technical Program Managers (TPMs) to help accelerate its transformation into an AI\-native, engineering\-led technology company. This is not a traditional Project Manager role.
* We are looking for highly technical leaders who can partner with engineering organizations to drive large\-scale technology transformation, AI adoption, and platform modernization.
* The ideal candidate brings the mindset and execution style commonly found in leading technology companies such as Google, Meta, Amazon, Apple, Netflix, Microsoft, OpenAI, Anthropic, or similar engineering\-driven organizations.
* They are comfortable working in ambiguous environments, influencing senior technical leaders, and driving execution across complex cross\-functional initiatives.


**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead complex, cross\-functional technical programs involving AI, cloud, platform engineering, and software modernization. Partner closely with Engineering Directors, Distinguished Engineers, Product Management, Architecture, Security, and Data Science teams. Drive AI\-first strategy by identifying opportunities to leverage Generative AI and Agentic AI across engineering workflows and business processes.
* Build execution frameworks for large\-scale engineering initiatives from concept through production. Establish technical roadmaps, program milestones, dependency management, risk mitigation, and executive reporting. Drive adoption of engineering best practices including: AI\-assisted software development Developer productivity Platform engineering Cloud\-native architectures Automation DevSecOps Translate executive vision into actionable engineering programs with measurable business outcomes.
* Facilitate technical design discussions while understanding architecture trade\-offs and engineering constraints.
* Remove organizational blockers and align multiple engineering organizations toward common objectives.
* Develop metrics and dashboards to measure engineering efficiency, AI adoption, and program success. Influence without authority across geographically distributed engineering teams.

**Manager \| Infor LN \| Across Locations \| Emerging ERP Solutions**
  

* **Job requisition ID** : 108618
* **Location**: Ahmedabad
* **Entity**: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP

**The team**



Enterprise technology must do much more than keep the wheels turning; it is the engine that drives functional excellence and the enabler of innovation and long\-term growth. Learn more about ET\&P


**Your work profile**



Responsible for defining, designing, and governing end\-to\-end functional and technical architecture for Infor LN CloudSuite IE implementations, cloud transformations, integrations, extensions, and enterprise business process optimization. Leads solution strategy across Manufacturing, Supply Chain, Finance, Projects, Service, Planning, Quality, Procurement, Sales, and Warehousing while ensuring alignment with business objectives, industry best practices, and enterprise architecture standards. Provides leadership throughout the ERP lifecycle, from discovery and solution blueprinting to deployment, go\-live, and continuous improvement.


**Key Responsibilities**


* Lead business discovery workshops, requirement gathering, and stakeholder engagement sessions.
* Conduct business process assessments, Fit\-Gap analysis, and solution blueprinting.
* Define Target Operating Model (TOM) and enterprise solution architecture.
* Design and optimize cross\-functional business processes across Manufacturing, Supply Chain, Finance, Projects, Service, and Planning.
* Configure and govern Infor LN CloudSuite IE functional solutions aligned with standard product capabilities.

**This role is for one of our clients**

Seniority level: Mid\-Senior level  



Min Experience: 8\+ years



Location: Noida



JobType: full\-time



We are seeking an experienced and customer\-focused Presales \&Implementation resource with valid OEM certifications (CCIE preferred) to support Enterprise Networking business. The ideal candidate will possess strong expertise in enterprise networking technologies, solution design, customer engagement, and hands\-on implementation \& troubleshooting of enterprise network infrastructure solutions.



**Requirements**
----------------



**Key Responsibilities**



Presales \& Solution Consulting  

* Engage with enterprise customers to understand business and technical requirements.
* Design scalable, secure, and high\-performance network solutions across switching, routing, wireless, and SD\-WAN environments.
* Prepare technical proposals, solution architectures, BOMs, SOWs, and RFP/RFI responses.
* Conduct customer presentations, workshops, solution demonstrations, and proof\-of\- concepts (POCs).
* Collaborate with OEMs, distributors, and internal sales teams to develop winning solutions.
  


**Implementation \& Delivery**  

* Lead deployment, migration, and implementation of enterprise networking solutions.
* Configure and troubleshoot enterprise switching, routing, wireless, SD\-WAN, and security technologies.
* Perform network assessments, health checks, optimization, and upgrade activities.
* Develop implementation plans, migration strategies, and rollback procedures.
* Support managed services and provide technical guidance to operations teams.
  


**Technical Skills**


* Valid certification from OEMs like HPe, Juniper, Cisco to name a few in switching, routing, security is a must.
* Strong hands\-on experience with switching, routing, Wireless, and SD\-WAN technologies.
* Expertise in BGP, OSPF, EIGRP, MPLS, VLAN, STP, HSRP/VRRP, QoS, and Multicast.
* Experience in enterprise networking architecture and solution design.
* Knowledge of network security, SASE, and Zero Trust architectures is desirable.

  


**Experience and Qualifications**  

* Bachelor;s degree in Engineering or related field.
* 8\-15 years of experience in enterprise networking presales and implementation.
* Strong customer\-facing, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.
* Experience working with system integrators, OEMs, consultants, and enterprise customers in pre\-sales \& post\-sales environments preferred.
  


### **Must\-have skills**



Presales, Enterprise Networking


### **Good\-to\-have skills**



SD\-WAN, BGP, SASE

2908ca80.title: Solution Architect
2908ca80.description:
**About Sarvam**
 Sarvam is building the bedrock of Sovereign AI for India. The company is developing India's full\-stack sovereign AI platform, building across research, models, infrastructure and applications with a singular focus on making AI genuinely work for India. Sarvam works with leading enterprises and public institutions and is backed by Lightspeed, Peak XV, and Khosla Ventures. Sarvam partners with India's leading brands, including Tata Capital, SBI Life, CRED, IDFC, and LIC.
   

  

**About The Role**
 The Solution Architect is the trusted technical advisor who bridges what Sarvam builds and what the client needs. You will work alongside the sales and GTM team to understand prospect requirements, translate them into compelling technical narratives, and ensure every deal moves forward with clarity and momentum. You own the technical relationship with the customer's technology decision maker, end\-to\-end through the pre\-sales cycle.
   

  

 This is not a support role. You will be in client meetings from day one, shaping how enterprises understand and evaluate Sarvam's AI platform. You will build demos, craft proposals, run pilots, and work directly with product and engineering teams to close the gap between what a client asks for and what Sarvam can deliver. The problems you work on will span voice AI, document intelligence, multilingual agents, and enterprise\-grade API platforms.
   

  

 If you are someone who can hold a technical conversation with an engineering lead and a business conversation with a CXO in the same meeting, this role is for you.
   

  

****What You'll Do****
* Own the pre\-sales cycle for assigned accounts: from discovery and qualification through to technical proposal and pilot design
* Build and deliver compelling product demos tailored to each prospect's industry, use case, and technical environment
* Create proposals, RFP/RFI responses, solution architecture documents, and commercial models in collaboration with the sales lead
* Work with Forward Deployed Software Engineers (FDSEs) and product teams to scope technical feasibility and define pilot success criteria
* Develop a deep understanding of Sarvam's full product stack: Samvaad, Studio, Akshar, and the API platform (TTS, STT, document digitisation)
* Build reusable demos, case studies, battlecards, and proposal templates that scale across accounts and lift the rest of the team
* Track and communicate client feedback and feature gaps back to product teams with clarity and context
* Support deal reviews and pipeline discussions with data, timelines, and risk flags


****What We're Looking For****
* 3\-5 years in a pre\-sales, solutions consulting, technical sales, or product\-facing GTM role, ideally in B2B SaaS or enterprise technology
* Strong communication skills: you can explain complex technical products in simple, outcome\-oriented language
* Comfort with technical concepts: APIs, cloud infrastructure, AI/ML workflows. You don't need to write code, but you need to understand how systems connect
* Experience building proposals, decks, or solution documents for enterprise buyers
* High attention to detail: proposals go out clean, demos run without surprises, timelines are tracked
* Willingness to learn fast and go deep on Sarvam's product and technology stack


****Bonus Points****
* Prior exposure to AI/ML products, conversational AI, or language technology
* Experience working with Indian enterprise or government clients
* Familiarity with Indian language ecosystems and the specific challenges of multilingual AI deployment
* Background in consulting, business analysis, or solutions engineering


**Note:** 
 We are looking for people who can own the outcomes described here, not people who match every line of this specification. If this problem excites you and you believe you can do this work, we want to hear from you.
   

  

****Why Sarvam?****
 Sarvam is a fast\-moving, high talent\-density team building full\-stack AI for India, working on problems that push the frontiers of AI with real population\-scale impact.
   

  

* Work alongside researchers, engineers, builders, and business leaders who move fast and hold each other to a very high bar
* High ownership and high impact, from day one
* Everything we do is AI\-first, from the way we build and ship to the way we think about problems
* You can work on problems that could change how an entire country learns, works, and communicates


 If you want to work on problems at the frontier of AI in India, Sarvam is the place to be.

619c19e0.title: Pre-Sales Engineer
619c19e0.description:
Date: Jun 22, 2026
   

  

 Location:
   

  

 Hyderabad, TG, IN, 500032
   

  

 Functional Area: Remote
   

  

 Syntax is a leading Managed Cloud Provider for Mission Critical Enterprise Applications and has been providing comprehensive technology solutions to businesses of all sizes since 1972\. Syntax has undisputed strength to implement and manage ERP deployments (Oracle, SAP) in a secure and resilient private, public or hybrid cloud. With strong technical and functional consulting services, and world\-class monitoring and automation, Syntax serves some of North America’s largest corporations across a diverse range of industries. Syntax has offices worldwide, and partners with Oracle, SAP, AWS, Microsoft, IBM and other global technology leaders.
   

  

**Job Title:** 
 Entry\-Level Pre\-Sales Engineer
   

  

**Location:** 
 Hybrid/Remote In\-Office
   

  

**Job Type:** 
 Full\-Time \| Entry\-Level
   

  

***About the Role***
 We are seeking a highly motivated Entry\-Level Pre\-Sales Engineer to join our growing team. This role is designed for recent graduates eager to apply their technical and analytical skills in a customer\-facing environment. The Pre\-Sales Engineer will support Pre\-Sales Solution Architects by conducting technology research, assisting with services and cloud pricing, and performing configuration item and contract reconciliation. This position offers the unique opportunity to be mentored by the most senior technical resources in the company, providing a solid foundation for career growth in pre\-sales engineering, solution architecture, and enterprise IT consulting.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities** 
 Conduct technology research to support solution design and customer requirements.Assist in pricing and configuration of IT services and cloud solutions by analyzing vendor pricing models and cost structures.Support cloud pricing analysis and configuration for customer proposals.Perform configuration item and contract reconciliation to ensure accuracy in customer agreements and solution designs.Collaborate with Solution Architects to build technology solutions that align with customer needs.Develop a strong understanding of enterprise computing concepts, including ERP, databases, networking, operating systems, data centers, and cloud computing.Prepare and maintain documentation related to solution designs, pricing, and configurations.Work with cross\-functional teams, including sales, operations, and finance, to ensure accurate and competitive solutions.Participate in training and mentorship programs led by senior engineers and solution architects.
   

  

**Required Qualifications \& Skills** 
 Bachelor’s degree in Management Information Systems (MIS), Computer Science, Accounting, Finance, or a related business function with relevant computer science coursework.Strong analytical and research skills with the ability to interpret and present technical information.Basic knowledge of enterprise IT environments, including ERP systems, networking, operating systems, databases, data centers, and cloud computing platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud).Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel and other financial or pricing analysis tools.Ability to learn quickly and adapt to new technologies and business models.Excellent verbal and written communication skills.Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a team\-oriented environment.No prior work experience required; internships or academic projects related to enterprise IT, cloud computing, or technology research are a plus.
   

  

**What We Offer** 
 Hands\-on mentorship from senior technical leaders.Exposure to cutting\-edge enterprise technologies and cloud solutions.A structured career development path in pre\-sales engineering and solution architecture.A dynamic and supportive work environment with opportunities to engage in real\-world IT solution development.Competitive salary and benefits package.If you are a recent graduate with a passion for technology, enterprise IT, and business solutions, we encourage you to apply and start your journey with us!
   

  

**Why Syntax?**
 Become a part of our success story and work in a company with exciting innovation projects that are causing a stir across the industry. We recently launched one of the world's most advanced manufacturing facilities based on SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP Digital Manufacturing Cloud for Execution \- for Smart Press Shop, a pioneering joint venture between Porsche and forming specialist Schuler.
   

  

* Competitive, above\-average compensation
* Global tourist: With us, you can also work from abroad from time to time
* Flexible working time models, home office
* Attractive benefits, e.g. company pension scheme or various health offers
* A modern environment in which the "you" is part of it
* Open feedback culture, flat hierarchies and a motivated team
* Individual career planning with continuous training and coaching on the job


 You see a personal challenge in this responsible task? Apply now \- and become part of the SYNTAX team!

f3f9c9a0.title: Senior Solutions Architect
f3f9c9a0.description:
We are looking for passionate technologists to join our Pre\-Sales organization to ensure that our growth is grounded and guided by strong technical alignment with our platform and the needs of our customers.
   

  

 MongoDB Pre\-Sales Solution Architects are responsible for guiding our customers and users to design and build reliable, scalable systems using our data platform. Our team is made up of seasoned technical sales professionals, software architects, entrepreneurs, and developers who take direct responsibility for customer success, including the design of their software, deployment, and operations. You'll work closely with our sales executives, helping customers solve business problems by leveraging our solutions, playing a key role in winning deals and driving the business forward. You'll be a trusted advisor to a wide range of users from startups to the world's largest enterprise IT organizations.
   

  

 We are looking to speak to candidates who are based in Bengaluru for our hybrid working model.
   

  

 As an ideal candidate, you will have
   

  

* Ideally 8 to 11 years of related experience in a customer facing role, with 5 to 7 years of experience in pre\-sales with enterprise software
* Minimum of 3 years experience with modern scripting languages (e.g. Python, Node.js, SQL) and/or popular programming languages (e.g. C/C\+\+, Java, C\#) in a professional capacity
* Experience designing with scalable and highly available distributed systems in the cloud and on\-prem
* Demonstrated ability to work with customers to review complex architecture of existing applications, providing guidance on how to improve by leveraging technology
* Excellent presentation, communication, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to convey complex technical and business concepts in a clear and compelling manner to technology and business leadership
* Ability to strategize with sales teams and provide recommendations on how to drive a multi\-threaded account strategy, aligning other MongoDB and ecosystem resources to move towards a mutually beneficial account plan
* The ability to travel up to 25%
* A Bachelor’s degree or equivalent work experience


 You may also have
   

  

* Experience selling databases and/or deploying applications with any of the major cloud providers
* Experience with database programming and data models
* Experience in data engineering or AI/ML projects
* Experience in transforming legacy systems and platforms into modern, scalable, and efficient technology stacks
* Understanding of popular sales methodologies/ frameworks such as MEDDPICC/ Command of the Message
* A MongoDB Certification
* A Cloud Provider Certification


 What you do at MongoDB
   

  

 In this role, you will work on complex opportunities where analysis of situations or data requires an in\-depth evaluation of various factors. You will:
   

  

* Design and Architect: Design scalable and performant applications, systems and infrastructure for large software projects leveraging MongoDB
* Customer Advising and Value Articulation: Guide customers on architecture patterns and optimisation strategies for MongoDB, while clearly communicating its business value to the relevant stakeholders
* Sales Partnership: Collaborate with the sales team to drive account success through account planning, opportunity prioritization/qualification and pipeline generation strategy, while taking ownership of the technical aspects (including but not limited to technical discovery, demos, proof of value, presentations, sizing and documentation)
* Demand Generation: Proactively generate demand within the sales territory through self\-driven technical initiatives, participation in events such as industry trade shows and account\-based marketing events
* Customer Success: Foster strong customer relationships, build champions and ensure customer success and satisfaction
* Innovation and Improvement: Continuously seek opportunities to innovate and improve MongoDB solutions and processes (e.g. by relaying field feedback to the product team), as well as proactively mentor other Solutions Consulting team members
* Personal Training and Development: Engage in ongoing training and professional development to stay abreast of MongoDB product suite as well as industry trends


 What you will learn
   

  

 MongoDB Product Suite Mastery
   

  

* Core Database Server: Master the fundamentals and advanced features of MongoDB's core database
* Atlas and Advanced Services: Gain expertise in Atlas (fully managed cloud database service), Atlas Stream Processing, Atlas Data Lake, Atlas Full\-Text Search, Atlas Vector Search, and Charts
* Relational Migrator: Learn to migrate from relational databases seamlessly


 Market\-Relevant Technologies
   

  

* Hyperscaler Ecosystem: Gain expertise in designing complex systems utilizing cloud services on hyperscaler platforms
* Complementary Technologies: Enhance your skills with partner and complementary technologies such as Apache Kafka and Kubernetes


 Modern Architecture Design
   

  

* Design Patterns and Methodologies: Embrace best practices in microservices, DevOps, cloud, and security
* Cutting Edge RAG and AI Architectures: Help customers on their generative AI journeys and working with industry leading partners in the space


 Sales Techniques and Soft Skills
   

  

* Effective Communication: Master presentations, demonstrations, and whiteboarding
* Client Interaction: Develop strategies for discovery and objection handling


 Industry Insights
   

  

* Diverse Market Verticals: Gain exposure to a broad spectrum of interesting use cases across various industries


**About MongoDB**
 MongoDB is built for change, empowering our customers and our people to innovate at the speed of the market. We have redefined the data platform for the AI era, enabling builders to create, transform, and disrupt industries with software. MongoDB’s unified data platform, the most widely available, globally distributed data platform on the market, helps organizations modernize legacy workloads, embrace innovation, and unleash AI. Our cloud\-native platform, MongoDB Atlas, is the only globally distributed, multi\-cloud data platform and is available across AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure.
   

  

 With offices worldwide and over 67,000 customers, including 75% of the Fortune 100 and AI\-native startups, relying on MongoDB for their most important applications, we’re powering the next era of software.
   

  

 Our compass at MongoDB is our Leadership Commitment, guiding how and why we make decisions, show up for each other, and win. It’s what makes us MongoDB.
   

  

 To drive the personal growth and business impact of our employees, we’re committed to developing a supportive and enriching culture for everyone. From employee affinity groups, to fertility assistance and a generous parental leave policy, we value our employees’ wellbeing and want to support them along every step of their professional and personal journeys. Learn more about what it’s like to work at MongoDB, and help us make an impact on the world!
   

  

 MongoDB is committed to providing any necessary accommodations for individuals with disabilities within our application and interview process. To request an accommodation due to a disability, please inform your recruiter.
   

  

 MongoDB is an equal opportunities employer.
   

  

*Req ID \- 426325*

e5a0187b.title: Digital Solutions Engineer
e5a0187b.description:
At Vyn, we're reimagining how work gets done in the deskless world.
   

  

 Our platform enriches expertly\-curated short videos — captured before, during, and after work — with AI\-powered automated workflows. We own the world's largest dataset of this kind, enabling field users and customers to make smarter, more efficient decisions about their assets and operations.
   

  

 Our purpose is to deliver transformative commercial and environmental outcomes, helping global clients across utilities, telecoms, retail and energy improve pricing accuracy, speed up delivery, ensure safety, and maintain compliance.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Understand customer objectives, business processes, workflows and success criteria
* Translate customer requirements into solution storyboards and digital workflows
* Configure and deploy Vyn solutions for demonstrations, trials and production use
* Support solution implementation, testing, user acceptance and optimisation
* Build customer dashboards and provide data\-driven operational insights
* Work closely with Customer Success, Delivery, Product and Engineering, feeding customer feedback into the product roadmap


**What You’ll Need**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering or a related discipline (or equivalent experience)
* 3–4 years’ experience in solution engineering, software implementation, technical consulting or digital solutions
* Experience configuring/implementing SaaS, workflow or cloud\-based solutions, and creating process maps, user journeys or solution storyboards
* Familiarity with APIs, JSON, SQL and system integrations; exposure to Python, JavaScript, HTML or CSS
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving and communication skills, with a customer\-facing mindset
* Comfortable working UK/European business hours; experience with dashboarding tools like Amazon QuickSight is a plus


 We are an equal opportunity employer committed to creating a workplace where everyone feels empowered to bring their full, authentic selves to work.
   

  

 We celebrate diversity in all forms and make employment decisions based on merit, qualifications, and business needs.
   

  

 We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, national origin, ancestry, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, genetic information, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic.
   

  

 If you need accommodations at any point in the hiring process, we’re here to support you.

415cc622.title: Solution Strategy and Client Engagement Manager
415cc622.description:
**Who Are We?** 
  
 



 Millipixels Interactive is where creativity, technology, strategy, and innovation come together to build meaningful digital experiences. We partner with startups, growing businesses, and enterprise brands to create everything from immersive digital products and marketing ecosystems to transformation\-driven technology solutions.
 



 But beyond the work, we’re a team that thrives on ideas, ownership, experimentation, and execution. We like people who take initiative, think beyond the obvious, and bring energy into everything they do.
 



 If you’re someone who enjoys building, collaborating, and making a visible impact — you’ll probably enjoy being here.
 



  





**About the Role** 
  
 



 Every strong proposal has a moment where sales promise meet technical reality and someone has to make sure those two things actually match. At Millipixels, that's you.
 



 You'll own the entire technical pre\-sales journey: running discovery workshops that uncover what clients actually need, architecting solutions that hold up under real\-world conditions, and standing in front of clients to present, demo, and defend what Millipixels can build. You're the bridge between business development and delivery making sure nothing gets sold that can't be built, and nothing gets built that wasn't sold right.
 



  





 This role sits at the intersection of technical credibility and commercial instinct. You'll need to go deep enough into AI and tech solutioning to earn a room full of engineers' respect, while staying sharp enough on commercial viability to keep a deal moving forward.
 



  





**You’ll Be the Person Who** 



* **Leads Discovery That Actually Uncovers Something:** 
 Runs workshops that go beyond surface requirements to understand what clients really need and what they haven't said out loud yet.
* **Architects Solutions That Hold Up:** 
 Designs technical solutions that are robust enough to survive delivery, not just impressive enough to survive a pitch.
* **Owns the Client\-Facing Moment:** 
 Presents, demos, and fields tough technical questions in real time turning complexity into clarity for the people across the table.
* **Bridges Sales and Delivery:** 
 Makes sure what gets promised in a proposal is exactly what delivery can and will build.
* **Stress\-Tests Every Proposal:** 
 Ensures each solution is commercially viable, technically sound, and operationally realistic before it ever reaches a client's inbox.
* **Speaks Fluent AI:** 
 Understands AI solutions deeply enough to shape them, question them, and explain them not just reference them.
* **Solves in Real Time:** 
 Handles technical clarifications and objections on the spot, without needing to "get back to you."
* **Keeps Solutions Aligned to Reality:** 
 Ensures every proposed solution actually reflects what Millipixels can deliver not just what sounds good on paper.
* **Shapes the Proposal, Not Just Reviews It:** 
 Gets involved early in proposal solutioning, so technical thinking is baked in from the start, not bolted on at the end.



  





**You’ll Be a Great Fit If** 



* You come from a hardcore tech solutioning background hands\-on, not just adjacent to it.
* You have strong working knowledge of AI solutions and can architect around them, not just talk about them.
* You've operated in technical pre\-sales, solution architecture, or a similar client\-facing technical role.
* You have excellent communication skills; fluent enough with engineering heads to discuss what gets built and how, yet just as at ease making deep tech solutions digestible to non\-technical stakeholders
* You're equally comfortable in a whiteboard session with engineers and a boardroom pitch with executives.
* You can translate deep technical detail into a language that lands with non\-technical stakeholders.
* You think commercially, you know a great solution still has to make business sense.



  





**Benefits of Working at Millipixels** 



* **Flexible work, your way:** 
 Work where you do your best thinking. We measure outcomes, not hours at a desk.
* **Life admin handled:** 
 Regular expert\-led sessions on finance, tax, and healthcare, so the boring stuff doesn’t eat into your weekends.
* **Comprehensive Health Coverage:** 
  Company\-paid health insurance of ₹500,000, with options to extend to spouse.
* **Generous paid leave:** 
  Properly switch off and recharge. We’re in this for the long game, and so are you.
* **Room to grow:** 
  Continuous learning and real development in a global team, with space to grow your career as fast as you grow the pipeline.
* **Ground\-floor impact:** 
  Join early, help shape the GTM playbook, and put your mark on how we grow, including our AI platform, avirat.ai.
* **Ownership, not red tape:** 
  Small team, big trust. Bring the idea, run with it, and watch it ship.

90cd3f18.title: RUN Service Delivery Manager
90cd3f18.description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.


**Your Role**
-------------


* **Service Delivery Management** – Own end\-to\-end service operations, ensuring stable delivery, SLA compliance, and high service availability.
* **Incident \& Problem Management** – Lead major incidents, drive root cause analysis, problem resolution, post\-incident reviews, and preventive actions.
* **Stakeholder Management** – Act as the primary escalation point for clients and stakeholders, providing governance, communication, and service reporting.
* **perational Governance** – Monitor KPIs, service health, operational risks, compliance, and drive continuous service improvement initiatives.
* **Team \& Delivery Coordination** – Coordinate application, infrastructure, and support teams to ensure seamless operations and effective workload management.
**Your Profile**
----------------


* **Overall Experience in 12\-14 Years Needed.**
* **IT Service Management (ITIL)** – Strong knowledge of Incident, Problem, Change, Service Continuity, and SLA management; ITIL certification preferred.
* **Service Delivery \& Operations** – 8–12 years of experience in IT Operations, Service Delivery, Production Support, or Application Support environments.
* **Incident \& Escalation Management** – Proven experience handling critical incidents, major incident management, root cause analysis, and service restoration.
* **Stakeholder \& Communication Skills** – Strong client\-facing experience, escalation management, reporting, governance presentations, and customer relationship management.
* **Monitoring \& Reporting Tools** – Hands\-on exposure to ITSM/ticketing tools, service monitoring platforms, KPI dashboards, operational reporting, and trend analysis.
**What you'll love about working here**
---------------------------------------


* You can shape your career with us. We offer a range of career paths and internal opportunities within Capgemini group. You will also get personalized career guidance from our leaders.
* You will get comprehensive wellness benefits including health checks, telemedicine, insurance with top\-ups, elder care, partner coverage or new parent support via flexible work.
* At Capgemini, you can work on cutting\-edge projects in tech and engineering with industry leaders or create solutions to overcome societal and environmental challenges.
Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55\-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end\-to\-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

c860515f.description:

#### **Your Role**


* Design and define enterprise\-wide architecture solutions using Rocket Software and Micro Focus modernization platforms to support business transformation and legacy application modernization initiatives.
* Lead the assessment, migration, re\-platforming, and modernization of mainframe applications, ensuring alignment with business, technology, and operational goals.
* Develop architecture frameworks, standards, and best practices for COBOL, CICS, JCL, batch processing, middleware, and distributed enterprise environments.
* Collaborate with stakeholders, development teams, infrastructure teams, and solution architects to create scalable, secure, and high\-performance system architectures.
* Provide technical leadership, architecture governance, risk assessment, and strategic recommendations for application modernization, cloud adoption, and platform optimization programs.
#### **Your Profile**


* Experience in enterprise architecture, application modernization, and Micro Focus Enterprise Suite or Rocket Software solutions.
* Strong expertise in mainframe technologies including COBOL, CICS, JCL, VSAM, DB2, batch processing, and integration with distributed platforms.
* Proven experience in designing modernization strategies, migration roadmaps, re\-hosting, re\-platforming, and cloud transformation initiatives.
* Strong understanding of enterprise architecture principles, integration frameworks, security architecture, DevOps practices, and cloud technologies (Azure, AWS, or GCP).
* Excellent stakeholder management, leadership, analytical, and communication skills with the ability to drive architecture decisions across large\-scale enterprise programs.
