dd36ad77.title: Solution Architect – Digital Urban Governance
dd36ad77.description:
**Solution Architect – Digital Urban Governance (eGov)** 




 Office of the Additional Chief Secretary, Housing and Urban Development Department, Bhubaneswar, Odisha \| Full\-time Contract with eGov Foundation (2\-Year Term)
 



  





**About eGov** 




 eGov is a multi\-disciplinary team of systems thinkers, strategists, technologists, policy specialists, program designers, and problem solvers united by a shared mission \- to reimagine how essential public services are designed and delivered, making them equitable, accessible, and transparent for all.
 



 Over the past two decades, eGov has partnered with 10\+ countries and 2,600\+ towns and cities in India, improving the lives of over 2 billion people. We’ve helped power national missions, deliver billions of vaccine certificates, and support governments to design and sustain digital infrastructure needed to deliver public services at scale.
 



 You can read more about eGov here: www.egov.org.in
 



  





**The Role** 




 This role sits inside the Office of the Additional Chief Secretary, H\&UDD working as the technical counterpart to the Senior Advisor on urban governance and digital transformation. You'll spend as much time in government meeting rooms, understanding what officials and ULBs actually need, as you will designing the systems that deliver it. You'll shape how the department thinks about technology, and you'll be accountable for making sure that technology actually works on the ground.
 



 This means representing the technical point of view in policy and program discussions, while also rolling up your sleeves on architecture, standards, and vendor delivery. It's a role for someone who wants proximity to government decision\-making, backed by serious technical depth.
 



  





**What You'll Do** 



1. **Turn government priorities into working digital systems.** 
 Sit with officials and departmental teams to understand urban governance challenges, then architect scalable, secure, interoperable solutions that ULBs across Odisha can actually run.
2. **Govern vendors and technical delivery on behalf of the department.** 
 Set architecture standards, review vendor and system\-integrator output, and sign off on major changes so the government gets reliable, well\-built systems without getting locked into any single vendor.
3. **Bring AI and data into public service delivery.** 
 Partner with Odisha's AI Center of Excellence to identify where data and analytics can improve how the department serves citizens, and ensure the right data pipelines and platforms exist to support it.



  





**Technical Skills** 



* Hands\-on architecture background in Java/Spring Boot, microservices, and REST APIs — able to independently review designs, code quality, and technical claims.
* Proven ability to define and enforce API\-first, microservices\-based reference architectures for large\-scale citizen\-facing platforms, and to audit vendor deliverables against them.
* Strong database expertise (PostgreSQL or similar): schema review, performance tuning, data archival and retention policy, and capacity planning for government\-scale workloads.
* Expertise in resilience and continuity standards: disaster recovery architecture, backup/restore verification, high availability, and periodic DR drills — and can validate that vendors have actually implemented them, not just documented them.
* Deep grounding in security and data protection: security architecture review, VAPT/audit oversight, identity and access management, encryption at rest and in transit, and compliance with the DPDP Act and CERT\-In guidelines.
* Working fluency with Git, Jenkins/CI\-CD, OpenAPI/Swagger, containers, Kubernetes, and cloud environments (including MeghRaj/GI Cloud and empanelled CSPs) — enough to inspect pipelines, environments, and deployments directly.
* Familiarity with India's digital public infrastructure and e\-governance standards is a plus: IndEA framework, India Stack (Aadhaar, UPI, DigiLocker, API Setu), and MeitY interoperability and open\-standards mandates.
* Experience evaluating RFPs, technical bids, SLAs, and milestone deliverables; able to translate technical shortfalls into contractual and financial accountability.



  





**Who We're Looking For** 




 8\-12\+ years of experience in software architecture and technical leadership, with a Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field. You've mentored engineering teams before and you're comfortable working across distributed, multi\-vendor setups. Exposure to public\-sector, government, or large multi\-stakeholder environments is a strong plus. Above all, you should be equally at ease in a room with senior officials as you are reviewing a system design, someone who can translate between the two without losing precision on either side.
 



  





 Link to apply: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScRdUuofqw5HsQZzYOCrZmREArTJLaC6zap4Z5fCHI9zOGiXA/viewform

bf1f3cda.title: Enterprise Architect
bf1f3cda.description:
At Jacobs, we're challenging today to reinvent tomorrow by solving the world's most critical problems for thriving cities, resilient environments, mission\-critical outcomes, operational advancement, scientific discovery and cutting\-edge manufacturing, turning abstract ideas into realities that transform the world for good.
   

  

 Your impact
   

  

 We are seeking an exceptional Senior Technical Architect with 15\-20 years of experience to lead the design and implementation of complex, enterprise\-scale solutions. This role requires a seasoned professional who can architect robust, scalable systems across multiple technology stacks while providing technical leadership and strategic guidance to engineering teams.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Enterprise Architecture Development
* Lead the design and evolution of enterprise architecture blueprints, ensuring alignment between business strategy, operating modelsand technology investments.
* Define future\-state architecture models across business capabilities, applications, data platforms, integration ecosystems, cloud infrastructure, and security domains.
* Analyze current\-state architecture, identify technical debt, architectural deficiencies, and capability gaps, and develop actionable transition architectures and implementation roadmaps to achieve the desired target state
* Solution Architecture \& Design
* Design and architect end\-to\-end enterprise solutions across multiple technology platforms and domains
* Define technical strategies and roadmaps that align with business objectives and industry best practices
* Create comprehensive architectural blueprints, technical specifications, and design documentation
* Evaluate and recommend technology stacks, frameworks, and tools for optimal solution delivery
* Establish architectural standards, guidelines, and governance frameworks.
* Integration \& Data Architecture
* Design and implement complex integration patterns between Source systems(Engineering tools/Financial Systems) and proposed platforms
* Architect data pipelines, ETL processes, and real\-time streaming solutions .
* Design scalable data layer architectures including databases, data warehouses, and data lakes
* Implement API strategies, microservices architectures, and event\-driven systems
* Ensure data governance, security, and compliance across all architectural components
* Technology Leadership
* Lead cross\-functional teams through complex technical challenges and solution implementations.
* Provide technical mentorship and guidance to senior developers, and engineering teams.
* Drive architectural reviews, code reviews, and technical decision\-making processes.
* Champion engineering excellence through best practices in software development, testing, and deployment.


 Here's what you'll need
   

  

 Key Skills \& Competencies
   

  

* Expert knowledge of architectural patterns Microservices, SOA, Event\-Driven Architecture.
* Experience of atleast 5 years on various cloud platforms and offerings such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud.
* Deep understanding of distributed systems, scalability patterns, and performance optimization
* Experience with API design patterns (REST, GraphQL, gRPC) and integration architectures.
* Integrated secure auth systems across multiple distributed systems
* Integration patterns ESB, API Gateway, Event Sourcing, Messaging


 At Jacobs we value people. Having the right balance of belonging, career and lifestyle enables us to consistently deliver and exceed clients’ expectations.
   

  

 Working alongside industry leaders, you will have the opportunity to develop your career working on key projects in an environment which encourages collaboration, knowledge sharing and innovation. To support your professional growth, Jacobs flexible working arrangements, extended leave options and a host of social, health and wellbeing events and initiatives will underpin our commitment to you.
   

  

 At Jacobs it’s all about what you do, not where you are, which counts!
   

  

 We value collaboration and believe that in\-person interactions are crucial for both our culture and client delivery. We empower employees with our hybrid working policy, allowing them to split their work week between Jacobs offices/projects and remote locations enabling them to deliver their best work.
   

  

 Your application experience is important to us, and we’re keen to adapt to make every interaction even better. If you require further support or reasonable adjustments with regards to the recruitment process (for example, you require the application form in a different format), please contact the team via Careers Support.

fbc075f4.title: Architect
fbc075f4.description:
**Greetings from Linnk Group** 




  





**AI Architect – AI Platform \& Enterprise Architecture** 




**Location:** 
 Kochi, Kerala
 



**Department:** 
 Linnk Innovation Hub
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 Linnk is seeking an experienced
 **AI Architect** 
 to lead the architecture and design of its AI\-native enterprise SaaS ecosystem,
 



 The role will drive AI platform strategy, enterprise architecture, Generative AI solutions, cloud\-native infrastructure, AI governance, and secure scalable application design.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Define and lead the AI platform and enterprise architecture roadmap.
* Design and implement AI solutions using LLMs, AI Agents, RAG, Knowledge Graphs, and Vector Databases.
* Architect scalable SaaS platforms using Microservices, Event\-Driven Architecture, and API\-First principles.
* Build AI platform capabilities including AI orchestration, agent frameworks, model gateways, and observability.
* Design cloud\-native AI infrastructure on AWS, Azure, and GCP using Kubernetes and containerized workloads.
* Establish AI governance, security, compliance, and Responsible AI frameworks.
* Drive MLOps, CI/CD, model deployment, monitoring, and lifecycle management.
* Mentor engineering teams and evaluate emerging AI technologies.



  





**Required Skills \& Experience** 



* 12\+ years in Software Engineering, Solution Architecture, or Enterprise Architecture.
* 5\+ years in AI, Data, or Platform Architecture roles.
* Experience building enterprise\-scale SaaS products.



**AI \& Architecture** 



* Generative AI, LLMs, AI Agents, RAG, Prompt Engineering.
* LangChain, LlamaIndex, OpenAI, Anthropic, Open\-Source Models.
* Distributed Systems, Microservices, Event\-Driven Architecture.
* Enterprise Application and Data Architecture.



**Technology Stack** 




**Backend:** 
 Node.js, NestJS, Python
 



**Frontend:** 
 React, Next.js
 



**Databases:** 
 PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Vector Databases, Neo4j (preferred)
 



**Cloud:** 
 AWS, Azure, GCP
 



**Infrastructure:** 
 Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Infrastructure as Code
 



**Security \& Governance** 



* AI Security, OAuth2, OpenID Connect, IAM, RBAC.
* Responsible AI, Model Governance, SOC2, ISO 27001, GDPR.



**Preferred Profile** 



* AI Architect, GenAI Architect, Enterprise Architect, Principal Engineer, or Solution Architect.
* Strong leadership, systems\-thinking, and hands\-on engineering mindset.
* Passion for building AI\-native products and enterprise\-scale platforms.



  





 Please share your updated resume to ahammed.shabeen@linnk.com
 



 Click to know more: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/ahammed\-shabeen\-9a306017a\_hiring\-aiarchitect\-genai\-share\-7475787327467032576\-mL9F/?utm\_source\=share\&utm\_medium\=member\_desktop\&rcm\=ACoAACpdy4sBYApa3mxw2855qWLz3dA0F3i5VyY
 



  





 Regards,

405097dc.title: Sr. Application Architect
405097dc.description:
**Description**
 AWS Sales, Marketing, and Global Services (SMGS) is responsible for driving revenue, adoption, and growth from the largest and
   

  

 fastest growing small\- and mid\-market accounts to enterprise\-level customers including public sector.
   

  

 Are you an experienced cloud architect/developer who can assist customers in designing and developing cloud\-native, AI\-integrated applications and/or re\-engineering applications to fully leverage the AWS Cloud? Do you like working on game\-changing projects at the forefront of application development, AI Agents, and cloud technology adoption?
   

  

 AWS ProServe India LLP is looking for highly talented hands\-on technical architects to accelerate our growing Professional Services business in India. You'll join Amazon's world\-class technical teams, working on diverse projects including reimagining customer agent\-enabled applications, modernization, Generative AI adoption, and AI\-DLC application development.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
 Design and build well\-architected, cloud\-native applications leveraging AWS services (EC2, ECS, Elastic Beanstalk, Auto Scaling, etc.)
   

  

 Architect AI/ML solutions using AWS AI services (Bedrock, SageMaker, Amazon Q, Rekognition, Comprehend)
   

  

 Guide customers through the AI Development Life Cycle (AI\-DLC) — from data readiness and model development to deployment and continuous improvement
   

  

 Design Generative AI and Agentic AI architectures that are secure, scalable, and cost\-optimized
   

  

 Advise on responsible AI practices including governance, explainability, and bias detection
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 We are looking for hands\-on architects/developers who are passionate about:
   

  

* Help internal customers make decisions on their cloud and AI journey, define scalable architecture, highly available solutions that leverage AWS services and AI capabilities
* Assisting internal customers to architect and develop applications that are cloud\-optimized and AI\-integrated, including Generative AI and Agentic AI solutions
* Working as a technical leader alongside customer business, development, and infrastructure teams
* Guiding customers through the AI Development Life Cycle (AI\-DLC), from problem framing, data readiness, and model selection to deployment, evaluation, and continuous improvement
* Sharing deep software development knowledge with respect to cloud architecture, AI design patterns, and programming
* Advising and implementing AWS best practices for both cloud\-native and AI\-powered workloads
* Assisting internal customers in infrastructure, application development, and AI solution integration
* Assisting internal customers in agile software development and Implementation of DevOps practices
* Independently leading a team that delivers applications including AI\-enabled features spanning the full software lifecycle: design, implementation, testing, deployment, and maintenance strategy
* Scoping development efforts, identifying risks, and prioritizing deliverables to meet organizational goals; providing guidance so your team designs solutions making the right trade\-offs between innovation, speed, and operational excellence


**About The Team**
 Diverse Experiences
   

  

 Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance
   

  

 We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.
   

  

 Mentorship and Career Growth
   

  

 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 10\+ years of technical specialist, design and architecture experience
* 10\+ years of consulting, design and implementation of serverless distributed solutions experience
* 10\+ years of software development with object oriented language experience
* 10\+ years of external or internal customer facing, complex and large scale project management experience
* Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, mathematics or equivalent
* Travel up to 30% of the time


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 6\+ years of leading development of applications backed by AWS services or using other cloud based technologies and services experience
* Experience with designing and building application using AWS services such as Lambda, AWS Elastic Beanstalk, Kubernetes
* Experience in one of the following programming languages: Java, Python, Ruby, Node.js, C\#, or C
* Experience in professional, non\-internship software development, or experience in machine learning, data mining, information retrieval, statistics or natural language processing
* Experience with CloudFormation, Chef, Puppet, Salt, or Ansible in production environments
* Familiarity with AI\-DLC data preparation, prompt engineering, model evaluation, and deploying Generative/Agentic AI solutions


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- AWS ProServe IN \- Karnataka
   

  

 Job ID: A10454621

0ee26238.title: Solution Architect
0ee26238.description:
**Driven by the passion to improve quality of people’s lives, WSA continues to grow as market leader in the hearing aid industry. With our commitment to increase penetration in an underserved hearing care market, we want to accelerate our business transformation in order to reach more people, more effectively.**
 We are looking for a
 **Solution Architect** 
 to lead the design and implementation of scalable, secure, and maintainable enterprise solutions across our digital platforms. This role will provide architectural leadership across multiple products and engineering teams, ensuring that solutions align with enterprise standards, business objectives, and long\-term technology strategy.
   

  

 What you will do
   

  

* Design scalable, secure, resilient, and maintainable solution architectures across products and platforms.
* Produce architecture artifacts, technical specifications, solution design documents, and Architecture Decision Records (ADRs).
* Translate business and functional requirements into well\-defined technical solutions and implementation approaches.
* Lead architecture reviews and governance activities, ensuring alignment with enterprise architecture principles and technical standards.
* Identify, assess, and mitigate architectural risks across projects and workstreams.
* Collaborate closely with Product Managers, Engineering Managers, DevOps, Security teams, and business stakeholders to shape technology solutions.
* Provide technical guidance and mentorship to engineering teams, Technical Leads, and senior developers.
* Establish reusable architecture patterns, frameworks, reference implementations, and technical standards.
* Design cloud\-native solutions leveraging Microsoft Azure services and modern application architecture practices.
* Define application, data, integration, deployment, and API architectures.
* Support engineering teams in adopting best practices around scalability, security, observability, and maintainability.
* Drive technical modernization initiatives, architecture consistency, and reduction of technical debt.
* Contribute to engineering planning, roadmap development, and technical decision\-making processes.


 What you bring
   

  

**Experience**
* 12\+ years of software engineering experience.
* Minimum 5 years of experience in Solution Architecture or Technical Architecture roles.
* Proven experience designing enterprise\-scale applications using Microsoft technologies.
* Strong experience working in Agile software development environments.
* Experience providing architectural leadership across multiple engineering teams.


 Technical Skills
   

  

* Strong expertise in Microsoft Azure cloud architecture and modern application design.
* Experience designing solutions using:
+ C\#
+ .NET / ASP.NET Core
+ ReactJS
+ REST APIs
+ Microservices
+ Event\-driven architectures
+ Distributed systems

* Strong understanding of:
+ Domain\-Driven Design (DDD)
+ SOLID Principles
+ Clean Architecture
+ API\-first Design
+ High Availability and Disaster Recovery concepts

* Experience defining architecture standards, governance frameworks, and reusable design patterns.
* Knowledge of enterprise integration patterns and API governance.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Microsoft Azure certifications (AZ\-305, AZ\-204, AZ\-400\).
* Experience with Kubernetes and container orchestration platforms.
* Experience with SaaS platforms and multi\-tenant architectures.
* Familiarity with AI\-assisted development tools and cloud\-native modernization initiatives.


 Personal Competencies
   

  

* Strong architectural and strategic thinking abilities.
* Excellent analytical, problem\-solving, and decision\-making skills.
* Strong communication and stakeholder management capabilities.
* Proven mentoring and technical coaching skills.
* Ability to influence technical direction across multiple teams and functions.
* Customer\-focused mindset with a strong emphasis on quality, scalability, and continuous improvement.


 Who we are
   

  

 At WSA, we provide innovative hearing aids and hearing health services.
   

  

 Together with our 12,000 colleagues in 130 countries, we invite you to help unlock human potential by bringing back hearing for millions of people around the world.
   

  

 With us, you will become part of a truly global company where we care for one another, welcome diversity and celebrate our successes.
   

  

**Sounds wonderful? We can't wait to hear from you.**
 WSA is an equal\-opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive employee experience for all. Regardless of race, color, religion, national origin, age, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, marital status, medical condition, ancestry, disability, military or veteran status we firmly believe that our work is at its best when everyone feels free to be their most authentic self.

19de97c2.title: Senior Solutions Architect
19de97c2.description:
Cohesity is the leader in AI\-powered data security. Over 13,600 enterprise customers, including over 85 of the Fortune 100 and nearly 70% of the Global 500, rely on Cohesity to strengthen their resilience while providing Gen AI insights into their vast amounts of data. Formed from the combination of Cohesity with Veritas’ enterprise data protection business, the company’s solutions secure and protect data on\-premises, in the cloud, and at the edge. Backed by NVIDIA, IBM, HPE, Cisco, AWS, Google Cloud, and others, Cohesity is headquartered in Santa Clara, CA, with offices around the globe.
   

  

 We’ve been named a Leader by multiple analyst firms and have been globally recognized for Innovation, Product Strength, and Simplicity in Design , and our culture.
   

  

**Want to join the leader in AI\-powered data security?**
 An increasing share of Cohesity's growth runs through service providers and integrators. Through the Cohesity Aspire Partner Program and a portfolio that spans Cohesity Data Cloud, DataProtect, and NetBackup, our Managed Service Provider (MSP), Cloud Service Provider (CSP), and Global System Integrator (GSI) partners build differentiated, profitable, as\-a\-service offerings on top of our platform.
   

  

 We are looking for a
 **Solutions Architect** 
 , Multi\-tenancy, MSP \& GSI to be the deep technical lead for partners who deliver Cohesity\-powered services at scale. You will design secure multi\-tenant architectures, enable partners to build repeatable service catalogs such as Backup\-as\-a\-Service and Disaster\-Recovery\-as\-a\-Service, and act as the trusted technical advisor across the service provider and global system integrator ecosystem.
   

  

**HOW YOU'LL SPEND YOUR TIME HERE** 
 :
   

  

* Architect secure, scalable multi\-tenant deployments using Cohesity Helios and Data Cloud, including namespace isolation, per\-tenant encryption of data at rest and in flight, network and VLAN segmentation, role\-based access control, tenant self\-service, chargeback and showback reporting, and cross\-tenant deduplication.
* Multi\-tenant Architecture and Design
* Design Backup\-as\-a\-Service (BaaS) and Disaster\-Recovery\-as\-a\-Service (DRaaS) offerings that partners can productize and scale across many downstream customers.
* Guide partners on deployment topologies across on\-premises, colocation, partner\-owned data centers, and public cloud, in any combination.
* MSP, CSP and GSI Enablement
* Serve as the technical lead for MSPs, CSPs, and GSIs within the Cohesity Aspire Partner Program, enabling them to build, launch, and grow managed services practices.
* Help GSIs integrate Cohesity into their solution frameworks to deliver repeatable, market\-aligned offerings, and help MSPs and CSPs differentiate their service catalogs and customer experience.
* Support partner onboarding, codesign workshops, reference architectures, and operational readiness reviews.
* Customer and Field Engagement
* Support strategic partner\-led engagements, proof of concept, and executive briefings, representing Cohesity credibly across technical and business stakeholders.
* Partner with channel, alliances, and field teams to drive multi\-tenant and partner\-focused solution plays.
* Product and Cross\-Functional Collaboration
* Bring partner and service provider requirements back to product and engineering, influencing the multi\-tenancy, scale, and automation roadmap.


**WE’D LOVE TO TALK TO YOU IF YOU HAVE MANY OF THE FOLLOWING:**
* 10\+ years in solution architecture, systems engineering, or service provider and partner\-facing roles.
* Experience with Cohesity, NetBackup, or comparable data protection platforms in a multi\-tenant or managed services setting.
* Direct background working with or within an MSP, CSP, or GSI.
* Relevant cloud or architecture certifications.
* Exceptional storytelling and evangelism skills to engage both technical and executive stakeholders
* Experience with data protection platforms such as Cohesity DataProtect, NetBackup, or comparable solutions is a strong plus.
* Technical Expertise
* Strong hands\-on experience designing and operating multi\-tenant environments, ideally within or for a service provider, MSP, CSP, or GSI.
* Solid knowledge of data protection, backup and recovery, and disaster recovery at scale.
* A clear grasp of multi\-tenancy fundamentals, including isolation, segmentation, role\-based access control, encryption and key management, chargeback, and tenant self\-service.
* API\-first and automation skills (REST APIs, orchestration, infrastructure as code), with familiarity across VMware Cloud Director, ServiceNow, and related tooling.
* Familiarity with public cloud (AWS, Azure, GCP) and with as\-a\-service, consumption\-based commercial models.
* Evangelism \& Enablement
* Relevant, demonstrated experience managing or architecting for MSP, CSP, or GSI relationships and multi\-tenant service delivery.
* Strong customer\-facing and partner\-facing skills, with composure and credibility in complex, multi\-stakeholder engagements.
* Commercial awareness, including the ability to connect technical design to partner profitability, consumption economics, and faster time to value.
* A compelling communicator across both technical and executive audiences.
* Collaboration \& Leadership
* Ability to influence and lead across multiple teams—engineering, product, sales, and marketing.
* Strategic thinker who can balance deep technical expertise with business outcomes.
* Demonstrated ability to leverage AI tools to enhance productivity, streamline workflows, and support decision making


*Data Privacy Notice for Job Candidates:
   

  

 For information on personal data processing, please see our* 
*Privacy Policy* 
*.*
*Equal Employment Opportunity Employer (EEOE)
   

  

 Cohesity is an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin or nationality, ancestry, age, disability, gender identity or expression, marital status, veteran status or any other category protected by law.
   

  

 If you are an individual with a disability and require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are limited in the ability or unable to access or use this online application process and need an alternative method for applying, you may contact us at 1\-855\-9COHESITY or* 
*recruiting@cohesity.com* 
*for assistance.*
*In\-Office Expectations
   

  

 Cohesity employees who are within a reasonable commute (e.g. within a forty\-five (45\) minute average travel time) work out of our core offices 2\-3 days a week of their choosing.*
*Interested candidates based outside of the designated areas are welcome to apply, provided they have the right to work in the job location.*

97e1b752.title: Lead/Senior Solution Architect- Microsoft
97e1b752.description:
**Solution Architect (.NET, Azure \& Integration)**
**About The Role**
 Blueflame Labs is seeking an experienced Solution Architect to design and deliver scalable, secure, enterprise\-grade software solutions using Microsoft technologies, Azure, modern architecture patterns, enterprise integrations, and DevOps. The role collaborates with clients, stakeholders, product owners, and engineering teams to deliver cloud\-native solutions.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design end\-to\-end enterprise application architectures aligned with business objectives.
* Lead solution architecture discussions with clients and internal stakeholders.
* Translate business requirements into scalable technical solutions.
* Define application architecture, integration architecture, and deployment strategies.
* Drive architecture governance and technical decision\-making across projects.
* Design secure, scalable, cloud\-native applications using Microsoft Azure.
* Define microservices\-based architectures and API\-first solutions.
* Conduct architecture reviews, design reviews, and code reviews.
* Mentor development teams on architecture principles and best practices.
* Collaborate with DevOps teams to establish CI/CD pipelines and cloud deployment strategies.
* Evaluate new technologies, frameworks, and tools to improve solution quality.
* Ensure application scalability, availability, security, maintainability, and performance.


**Technical Skills**
**Microsoft Technology Stack**
* Languages \& Frameworks: C\#, .NET Framework, .NET Core, ASP.NET MVC, ASP.NET Core, Web API, Entity Framework, LINQ, Blazor (Preferred)


**Microsoft Azure**
* Azure App Services, Azure Functions, Azure API Management, Azure Service Bus, Azure Event Grid, Azure Event Hub, Azure Storage, Azure SQL, Azure Cosmos DB, Azure Key Vault, Azure Monitor, Azure Application Insights, Azure Logic Apps, Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS), Azure Container Registry (ACR), Azure Active Directory (Entra ID)


**Architecture \& Design**
* Enterprise Architecture, Solution Architecture, Domain\-Driven Design (DDD), Event\-Driven Architecture, Microservices Architecture, Clean Architecture, Onion Architecture, Hexagonal Architecture, CQRS, Event Sourcing, API\-first Architecture, RESTful APIs, GraphQL (Preferred)


**Design Patterns**
* SOLID Principles, Repository Pattern, Unit of Work, Factory Pattern, Strategy Pattern, Dependency Injection, Builder Pattern, Adapter Pattern, Observer Pattern, Singleton Pattern, Mediator Pattern


**Integration Technologies**
* MuleSoft, Boomi, REST APIs, SOAP Services, JSON, XML, Webhooks, OAuth, JWT, OpenID Connect, ERP Systems, CRM Systems, Third\-party SaaS Platforms, Payment Gateways


**Open Source \& Backend Technologies**
* Node.js, Python, Java, Spring Boot, Express.js, Docker, Kubernetes, Redis, RabbitMQ, Kafka


**Database Technologies**
* SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Cosmos DB, Database Optimization, Query Tuning, Indexing, Performance Optimization


**Web Application Development**
* Angular, React, Vue.js (Preferred), HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, TypeScript, Responsive UI Design


**Mobile Application Development**
* Xamarin, .NET MAUI, Flutter, React Native, Mobile Architecture, Offline Synchronization, Push Notifications, API Integration


**DevOps \& CI/CD**
* Azure DevOps, GitHub, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform (Preferred), ARM Templates/Bicep


**Security**
* OAuth 2\.0, OpenID Connect, JWT, Azure AD Authentication, RBAC, API Security, OWASP Top 10, Secure Coding Practices, Encryption, Secrets Management


**Performance \& Scalability**
* Performance Tuning, High Availability Architecture, Load Balancing, Horizontal Scaling, Caching Strategies, Distributed Systems


**Soft Skills**
* Strong client\-facing and stakeholder management skills.
* Excellent solution presentation and communication abilities.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Ability to lead architecture workshops and technical discussions.
* Experience mentoring development teams and conducting technical reviews.
* Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities in a fast\-paced environment.


**Preferred Experience**
* 8\+ years of software development experience.
* 3\+ years in a Solution Architect or Technical Architect role.
* Experience delivering enterprise\-scale digital transformation projects.
* Experience in cloud migration and modernization initiatives.
* Exposure to Agile/Scrum methodologies.
* Experience with enterprise integration platforms and API\-led connectivity.
* Experience designing scalable web, mobile, and cloud\-native applications.


**Preferred Certifications**
* Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert
* Microsoft Certified: Azure Developer Associate
* Microsoft Certified: Azure Administrator Associate
* MuleSoft Certified Developer/Architect (Preferred)
* Boomi Professional Developer/Architect (Preferred)
* Kubernetes Certification (Preferred)

f4d7a10a.title: Principal Data and Agentic Architect , Professional Services
f4d7a10a.description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


AWS Sales, Marketing, and Global Services (SMGS) is responsible for driving revenue, adoption, and growth from the largest and fastest growing small\- and mid\-market accounts to enterprise\-level customers including public sector.  

The Amazon Web Services Professional Services (ProServe) team is seeking a skilled Delivery  

Consultant to join our team at Amazon Web Services (AWS). In this role, you'll work closely  

with customers to design, implement, and manage AWS solutions that meet their technical  

requirements and business objectives. You'll be a key player in driving customer success  

through their cloud journey, providing technical expertise and best practices throughout the  

project lifecycle.  

Possessing a deep understanding of AWS products and services, as a Delivery Consultant  

you will be proficient in architecting complex, scalable, and secure solutions tailored to  

meet the specific needs of each customer. You'll work closely with stakeholders to gather  

requirements, assess current infrastructure, and propose effective migration strategies to  

AWS. As trusted advisors to our customers, providing guidance on industry trends, emerging  

technologies, and innovative solutions, you will be responsible for leading the  

implementation process, ensuring adherence to best practices, optimizing performance, and  

managing risks throughout the project.  

The AWS Professional Services organization is a global team of experts that help customers  

realize their desired business outcomes when using the AWS Cloud. We work together with  

customer teams and the AWS Partner Network (APN) to execute enterprise cloud  

computing initiatives. Our team provides assistance through a collection of offerings which  

help customers achieve specific outcomes related to enterprise cloud adoption. We also  

deliver focused guidance through our global specialty practices, which cover a variety of  

solutions, technologies, and industries.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

As an experienced technology professional, you will be responsible for:  

1\. Designing and implementing complex, scalable, and secure AWS solutions tailored to  

customer needs  

2\. Providing technical guidance and troubleshooting support throughout project  

delivery  

3\. Collaborating with stakeholders to gather requirements and propose effective  

migration strategies  

4\. Acting as a trusted advisor to customers on industry trends and emerging  

technologies  

5\. Sharing knowledge within the organization through mentoring, training, and creating  

reusable artifacts  

  

About the team  

Diverse Experiences  

AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.  

  

Why AWS?  

Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.  

  

Inclusive Team Culture  

Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.  

  

Mentorship \& Career Growth  

We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.  

  

Work/Life Balance  

We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Physics, Engineering or Math
* 5\+ years of practical work applying ML to solve complex problems for large\-scale applications experience
* 8\+ years of processing data with a massively parallel technology (such as Redshift, Teradata, Netezza, Spark or Hadoop based big data solution) experience
* Knowledge of at least one programming language such as Java, C\#, JavaScript, Python, Ruby or Perl
* Experience in written and verbal communication with the ability to present complex technical information in a clear and concise manner to executives and non\-technical leaders
* 7\+ years of IT platform implementation in a technical and analytical role experience

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Master's degree or equivalent in engineering, technology, computer science, machine learning, robotics, operations research, statistics, mathematics or equivalent quantitative field, or experience with AWS Solutions, including EC2, S3, Redshift, EMR (or Hadoop)
* Experience using managed ML/AI solutions
* Experience with Machine Learning and Large Language Model fundamentals, including architecture, training/inference lifecycles, and optimization of model execution, or experience with vLLM, SGLang, TensorRT or similar platforms in production environments
* AWS Professional level certification, or Bachelor's degree in business administration, finance, economics, computer science, data science, engineering, or other related field
* 4\+ years of professional work experience, or experience with AWS services or other cloud offerings
* Generative AI trends, patterns, anti\-patterns

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

f2f1162c.title: AWS Architect
f2f1162c.description: * Design and architect cloud‑native solutions using AWS services across compute, storage, networking, security, and integration layers. Lead end‑to‑end cloud solution architecture for legacy systems migrations, and modernization initiatives. Define reference architectures, patterns, and standards for AWS environments. Implement Infrastructure‑as‑Code (IaC) using Terraform/CloudFormation for provisioning and automation Ensure cloud architectures follow security, compliance, identity, and governance best practices. Collaborate with Development, DevOps, Security, and Infra teams throughout design, build, and deployment phases Optimize cost, scalability, resilience, and performance of cloud workloads. Troubleshoot complex cloud issues, guide root‑cause analysis, and implement corrective actions. Review application designs for cloud readiness, performance, and architectural alignment. Maintain documentation, architecture diagrams, and operational guidelines for cloud systems. Strong hands‑on experience with AWS services (EC2, Lambda, S3, RDS, VPC, IAM, API Gateway, Kong, CloudWatch, ALB/NLB, EKS/ECS). Minimum 10 years of AWS experience and 3\-4 years of Architect designing experience Expertise in distributed systems, microservices, networking (VPC, subnets, security groups), and cloud security. Proficiency with IaC tools such as Terraform or CloudFormation. Strong understanding of CI/CD, DevOps tools, Mobius and automation pipelines. Experience with containers (Docker, ECS/EKS), Helm and serverless architectures. Hands on experience with modernization (legacy to cloud), multi‑account setups. Ability to do the POC to try and test solutions before implementation Hands on experience in Amazon.

a8bfd59d.title: Cloud Security Architect
a8bfd59d.description:
**Description**
 AWS Sales, Marketing, and Global Services (SMGS) is responsible for driving revenue, adoption, and growth from the largest and
   

  

 fastest growing small\- and mid\-market accounts to enterprise\-level customers including public sector.
   

  

 At Amazon, Security is Top Priority. We are looking for security architects who are passionate about Cloud Security. Ideal candidates are those who have working experience with AWS Cloud, Cloud Security, Infrastructure Security, Network Security, Cloud Security Assessment, Penetration testing, Application security assessment, Compliance audits, Cryptography, and are interested in helping customers embrace cloud technologies. This role is ideal for security architects who have worked in regulated industries like Banks, Insurance Companies, PSUs or as security architects in System Integrators.
   

  

 AWS ProServe India is looking for a SRC (Security, Risk \& Compliance) Architect with a strong foundation in traditional cloud and infrastructure security, coupled with a forward\-looking focus on AI Security. This role will deliver end\-to\-end security engagements for customers in India and globally — spanning network security, identity management, encryption, compliance, and DevSecOps, while also helping customers secure their Generative AI, LLM, and agentic AI workloads against emerging threats such as prompt injection, model poisoning, and data exfiltration.
   

  

 This role is ideal for professionals who have built their careers on traditional security disciplines (infrastructure hardening, penetration testing, compliance audits, incident response) in regulated industries like Banking, Insurance, and Financial Services — and who are now extending that expertise into AI/ML security. Ideal candidates bring deep hands\-on experience with AWS Cloud Security, Network \& Infrastructure Security, Cryptography, and DevSecOps, alongside growing proficiency in securing AI workloads, LLM applications, RAG pipelines, and agentic systems. A passion for helping customers embrace both cloud and AI technologies securely is essential.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 Cloud Security Architecture \& Implementation
   

  

* Help customers implement core AWS security services including IAM, VPC, KMS, CloudHSM, AWS Organizations, WAF, AWS Network Firewall, and GWLB\-based Security Appliances.
* Deliver DevSecOps pipelines integrating IaC scanners, SAST, and DAST tools
* Develop end\-to\-end security automation solutions (using IaC, Python, application code) to reduce organizational risk
* Strong programming skills in at least one language: Python, Java, Go, C/C\+\+, or equivalent.


 AI \& Generative AI Security
   

  

* Assess and mitigate security risks associated with AI/ML workloads, including model poisoning, prompt injection, data leakage, and adversarial attacks
* Design security architectures for GenAI and LLM\-based applications (e.g., Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker, AgentCore) including guardrails, content filtering, and access controls.
* Implement responsible AI governance frameworks covering data privacy, model explainability, and bias detection.
* Advise customers on securing agentic AI systems, RAG pipelines, and AI supply chains against emerging threats


 Identity \& Access Management
   

  

* Design and implement robust IAM solutions with deep understanding of AWS IAM, service\-linked policies, SCPs, and IAM Identity Center (SSO).
* Understand cryptography (certificate management, encryption/decryption, PKI)


 Data Encryption \& Key Management
   

  

* Implement encryption mechanisms to protect data both in transit and at rest.
* Select and configure encryption tools and key management systems (KMS, CloudHSM).


**About The Team**
 Diverse Experiences
   

  

 Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance
   

  

 We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.
   

  

 Mentorship and Career Growth
   

  

 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in business administration, finance, economics, computer science, data science, engineering, or other related field
* 8\+ years of programming in Python, Ruby, Go, Swift, Java, .Net, C\+\+ or similar object oriented language experience
* Experience leading highly\-available and fault\-tolerant enterprise and web\-scale software deployments
* Knowledge of the primary aws services (ec2, elb, rds, route53 \& s3\)
* Experience with any combination of the following: application security frameworks, identity and access controls, incident response, mobile security, cloud computing and security, AI security, threat intelligence, and penetration testing


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with compliance \& security standards including PCI DSS, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and NIST
* Experience leading the design, development and deployment of business software at scale or recent hands\-on technology infrastructure, network, compute, storage, and virtualization experience
* Experience facilitating discussions with senior leadership regarding technical / architectural trade\-offs, best practices, and risk mitigation


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- AWS ProServe IN \- Karnataka
   

  

 Job ID: A10454627

 Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance
   

  

 We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.
   

  

 Mentorship and Career Growth
   

  

 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in business administration, finance, economics, computer science, data science, engineering, or other related field
* 8\+ years of programming in Python, Ruby, Go, Swift, Java, .Net, C\+\+ or similar object oriented language experience
* Experience leading highly\-available and fault\-tolerant enterprise and web\-scale software deployments
* Knowledge of the primary aws services (ec2, elb, rds, route53 \& s3\)
* Experience with any combination of the following: application security frameworks, identity and access controls, incident response, mobile security, cloud computing and security, AI security, threat intelligence, and penetration testing


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with compliance \& security standards including PCI DSS, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and NIST
* Experience leading the design, development and deployment of business software at scale or recent hands\-on technology infrastructure, network, compute, storage, and virtualization experience
* Experience facilitating discussions with senior leadership regarding technical / architectural trade\-offs, best practices, and risk mitigation


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. 3a8b7494.title: Solution Architect- Workday
3a8b7494.description:
Our client is looking for an experienced
 **Workday Solution Architect** 
 to lead enterprise\-wide Workday transformation initiatives and define scalable, secure, and future\-ready solutions across multiple Workday modules. This is a strategic role requiring strong expertise in architecture, integrations, governance, and stakeholder management, with the ability to drive large\-scale digital transformation programs.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Define end\-to\-end Workday solution architecture across multiple modules.
* Design scalable, secure, and high\-performing Workday solutions aligned with enterprise architecture standards.
* Lead large\-scale Workday implementations and transformation programs.
* Serve as a trusted advisor to business leaders and senior stakeholders.
* Drive architecture governance, design reviews, and solution quality.
* Define integration architecture using APIs, middleware, PECI, Core Connectors, and Workday Studio.
* Oversee data architecture, reporting frameworks, and Prism Analytics strategy.
* Establish standards, best practices, and governance models.
* Identify opportunities for AI, automation, and innovation within the Workday ecosystem.
* Review and approve solution configurations and technical deliverables.
* Mentor senior consultants and functional leads.
* Ensure security, compliance, and audit readiness across Workday solutions.



**Required Skills \& Experience** 



* 10\+ years of experience in Workday and enterprise HCM/ERP solutions.
* Deep expertise across multiple Workday modules including HCM, Integrations, Payroll, Talent, and Analytics.
* Strong experience in enterprise architecture and large\-scale implementations.
* Proven ability to lead complex transformation programs.
* Hands\-on expertise in integration architecture, APIs, middleware, and data frameworks.
* Strong client advisory and executive stakeholder management skills.
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Engineering, Information Technology, Business, or related discipline.



**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Workday certifications.
* Experience with global or multi\-country Workday deployments.
* Exposure to cloud and digital transformation initiatives.
* Understanding of AI, automation, and analytics within enterprise platforms.
* Experience with Workday Prism Analytics and advanced reporting frameworks.



**Core Competencies** 



* Enterprise Architecture \& Strategy
* Cross\-Module Workday Expertise
* Integration \& Data Architecture
* Strategic Thinking \& Innovation
* Executive Stakeholder Management
* Governance, Risk \& Compliance
* Leadership \& Team Development

862c0744.title: Senior Cloud/Infrastructure Consultant (Remote)
862c0744.description:
* **Job Title:** 
 Senior Cloud/Infrastructure Consultant (Remote)
* **Work Mode:** 
 Fully Remote
* **Schedule:** 
 Flexible (up to 40 hours per week, based on project availability)



  





**Role Overview:** 




 We are looking for Senior DevOps Engineers to join a paid remote AI training program focused on Infrastructure as Code (IaC). In this role, you will write realistic engineering\-ticket\-style prompts, configure LocalStack sandboxes, and build golden solutions with passing end\-to\-end tests to help AI models master Terraform, AWS CDK, and CloudFormation. This is a flexible, remote opportunity well\-suited for senior\-level DevOps, Cloud, or Infrastructure engineers seeking project\-based, asynchronous work.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* **Task Creation:** 
 Write natural language prompts that read like real engineering tickets, including realistic ambiguity and professional context, so AI can handle real\-world scenarios.
* **Environment Configuration:** 
 Set up and configure LocalStack sandboxes (local AWS mocks) to validate infrastructure tasks
* **Golden Solution Development:** 
 Craft the initial infrastructure state and a "golden solution" that includes passing automated end\-to\-end tests
* **Quality Benchmarking:** 
 Ensure tasks meet a high quality bar; simple or poorly formatted tasks will be rejected.
* **Response Evaluation:** 
 Choose the correct response between two AI\-generated answers to a given infrastructure question
* **Prompt Writing:** 
 Draft simple prompts that act as a starting point for AI models to build upon



  





**Qualifications** 



* **Seniority** 
 : Must be a Senior\-level practitioner in DevOps, Cloud, or Infrastructure Engineering
* **IaC Platform Expertise** 
 : Professional, hands\-on experience with at least one of the following — High Priority: AWS CDK, Terraform (HCL), or CloudFormation; Medium/Low Priority: Pulumi, AzureRM, Ansible, Chef, or Puppet
* **Programming Languages:** 
 Strong proficiency in at least one of the following for infrastructure scripting and testing: TypeScript, Python, JavaScript, or Java
* **Communication** 
 : Ability to articulate complex technical concepts fluently in written English, following strict style guidelines



  





**Eligibility Requirements** 



* Candidates must be legally authorised to work in one of the following locations: Argentina, Australia, Austria, Belgium, Brazil, Canada, Colombia, Denmark, Finland, France, Germany, India, Ireland, Italy, Japan, Luxembourg, Mexico, Netherlands, New Zealand, Norway, Peru, Puerto Rico, Singapore, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, United Arab Emirates, United Kingdom, United States



  





**Compensation** 



* Earn up to $50 USD/hr — plus additional incentives; rates vary based on expertise and project requirements
* Paid via PayPal and AirTM



  





**Work Arrangement** 



* Fully remote; choose your own schedule
* Flexible workload depending on project availability, most experts spend 5–10 hrs/week, up to 40 hours
* Free access to leading AI tools (GPT, Claude, and more) worth over $200/month included at no extra cost



  





**Equal Opportunity Statement** 




 Selection decisions are based solely on skills, qualifications, and project requirements. We are committed to inclusive and fair engagement practices and consider all qualified applicants without regard to legally protected characteristics.
 



  





*Ready to put your infrastructure expertise to work on AI? Apply now — interviews begin within days of application.*

c6e38fa9.title: Principal Data and Agentic Architect , Professional Services
c6e38fa9.description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


AWS Sales, Marketing, and Global Services (SMGS) is responsible for driving revenue, adoption, and growth from the largest and fastest growing small\- and mid\-market accounts to enterprise\-level customers including public sector.  

The Amazon Web Services Professional Services (ProServe) team is seeking a skilled Delivery  

Consultant to join our team at Amazon Web Services (AWS). In this role, you'll work closely  

with customers to design, implement, and manage AWS solutions that meet their technical  

requirements and business objectives. You'll be a key player in driving customer success  

through their cloud journey, providing technical expertise and best practices throughout the  

project lifecycle.  

Possessing a deep understanding of AWS products and services, as a Delivery Consultant  

you will be proficient in architecting complex, scalable, and secure solutions tailored to  

meet the specific needs of each customer. You'll work closely with stakeholders to gather  

requirements, assess current infrastructure, and propose effective migration strategies to  

AWS. As trusted advisors to our customers, providing guidance on industry trends, emerging  

technologies, and innovative solutions, you will be responsible for leading the  

implementation process, ensuring adherence to best practices, optimizing performance, and  

managing risks throughout the project.  

The AWS Professional Services organization is a global team of experts that help customers  

realize their desired business outcomes when using the AWS Cloud. We work together with  

customer teams and the AWS Partner Network (APN) to execute enterprise cloud  

computing initiatives. Our team provides assistance through a collection of offerings which  

help customers achieve specific outcomes related to enterprise cloud adoption. We also  

deliver focused guidance through our global specialty practices, which cover a variety of  

solutions, technologies, and industries.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

As an experienced technology professional, you will be responsible for:  

1\. Designing and implementing complex, scalable, and secure AWS solutions tailored to  

customer needs  

2\. Providing technical guidance and troubleshooting support throughout project  

delivery  

3\. Collaborating with stakeholders to gather requirements and propose effective  

migration strategies  

4\. Acting as a trusted advisor to customers on industry trends and emerging  

technologies  

5\. Sharing knowledge within the organization through mentoring, training, and creating  

reusable artifacts  

  

About the team  

Diverse Experiences  

AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.  

  

Why AWS?  

Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.  

  

Inclusive Team Culture  

Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.  

  

Mentorship \& Career Growth  

We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.  

  

Work/Life Balance  

We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Physics, Engineering or Math
* 5\+ years of practical work applying ML to solve complex problems for large\-scale applications experience
* 8\+ years of processing data with a massively parallel technology (such as Redshift, Teradata, Netezza, Spark or Hadoop based big data solution) experience
* Knowledge of at least one programming language such as Java, C\#, JavaScript, Python, Ruby or Perl
* Experience in written and verbal communication with the ability to present complex technical information in a clear and concise manner to executives and non\-technical leaders
* 7\+ years of IT platform implementation in a technical and analytical role experience

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Master's degree or equivalent in engineering, technology, computer science, machine learning, robotics, operations research, statistics, mathematics or equivalent quantitative field, or experience with AWS Solutions, including EC2, S3, Redshift, EMR (or Hadoop)
* Experience using managed ML/AI solutions
* Experience with Machine Learning and Large Language Model fundamentals, including architecture, training/inference lifecycles, and optimization of model execution, or experience with vLLM, SGLang, TensorRT or similar platforms in production environments
* AWS Professional level certification, or Bachelor's degree in business administration, finance, economics, computer science, data science, engineering, or other related field
* 4\+ years of professional work experience, or experience with AWS services or other cloud offerings
* Generative AI trends, patterns, anti\-patterns

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
