9b9590bd.title: Enterprise Architect
9b9590bd.description:
At Jacobs, we're challenging today to reinvent tomorrow by solving the world's most critical problems for thriving cities, resilient environments, mission\-critical outcomes, operational advancement, scientific discovery and cutting\-edge manufacturing, turning abstract ideas into realities that transform the world for good.
   

  

 Your impact
   

  

 We are seeking an exceptional Senior Technical Architect with 15\-20 years of experience to lead the design and implementation of complex, enterprise\-scale solutions. This role requires a seasoned professional who can architect robust, scalable systems across multiple technology stacks while providing technical leadership and strategic guidance to engineering teams.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Enterprise Architecture Development
* Lead the design and evolution of enterprise architecture blueprints, ensuring alignment between business strategy, operating modelsand technology investments.
* Define future\-state architecture models across business capabilities, applications, data platforms, integration ecosystems, cloud infrastructure, and security domains.
* Analyze current\-state architecture, identify technical debt, architectural deficiencies, and capability gaps, and develop actionable transition architectures and implementation roadmaps to achieve the desired target state
* Solution Architecture \& Design
* Design and architect end\-to\-end enterprise solutions across multiple technology platforms and domains
* Define technical strategies and roadmaps that align with business objectives and industry best practices
* Create comprehensive architectural blueprints, technical specifications, and design documentation
* Evaluate and recommend technology stacks, frameworks, and tools for optimal solution delivery
* Establish architectural standards, guidelines, and governance frameworks.
* Integration \& Data Architecture
* Design and implement complex integration patterns between Source systems(Engineering tools/Financial Systems) and proposed platforms
* Architect data pipelines, ETL processes, and real\-time streaming solutions .
* Design scalable data layer architectures including databases, data warehouses, and data lakes
* Implement API strategies, microservices architectures, and event\-driven systems
* Ensure data governance, security, and compliance across all architectural components
* Technology Leadership
* Lead cross\-functional teams through complex technical challenges and solution implementations.
* Provide technical mentorship and guidance to senior developers, and engineering teams.
* Drive architectural reviews, code reviews, and technical decision\-making processes.
* Champion engineering excellence through best practices in software development, testing, and deployment.


 Here's what you'll need
   

  

 Key Skills \& Competencies
   

  

* Expert knowledge of architectural patterns Microservices, SOA, Event\-Driven Architecture.
* Experience of atleast 5 years on various cloud platforms and offerings such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud.
* Deep understanding of distributed systems, scalability patterns, and performance optimization
* Experience with API design patterns (REST, GraphQL, gRPC) and integration architectures.
* Integrated secure auth systems across multiple distributed systems
* Integration patterns ESB, API Gateway, Event Sourcing, Messaging


 At Jacobs we value people. Having the right balance of belonging, career and lifestyle enables us to consistently deliver and exceed clients’ expectations.
   

  

 Working alongside industry leaders, you will have the opportunity to develop your career working on key projects in an environment which encourages collaboration, knowledge sharing and innovation. To support your professional growth, Jacobs flexible working arrangements, extended leave options and a host of social, health and wellbeing events and initiatives will underpin our commitment to you.
   

  

 At Jacobs it’s all about what you do, not where you are, which counts!
   

  

 We value collaboration and believe that in\-person interactions are crucial for both our culture and client delivery. We empower employees with our hybrid working policy, allowing them to split their work week between Jacobs offices/projects and remote locations enabling them to deliver their best work.
   

  

 Your application experience is important to us, and we’re keen to adapt to make every interaction even better. If you require further support or reasonable adjustments with regards to the recruitment process (for example, you require the application form in a different format), please contact the team via Careers Support.

aa58eac9.title: Sr. Software Architect
aa58eac9.description:
**Job Description Summary**
 The Enterprise Architect leads the architecture, build, and operation of High\-Performance Computing (HPC) platforms on AWS Cloud, driving deployment efficiency, platform reliability, and AI\-enabled optimization.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Roles and Responsibilities**
* Design, build and run HPC platforms on AWS Cloud.
* Engineer and maintain software configuration, deployment, and automation processes
* Troubleshoot and resolve recurring platform issues with scalable, long\-term solutions
* Drive continuous improvement in platform reliability, performance, and cost efficiency
* Use AI/ML\-driven approaches to optimize infrastructure utilization, workload performance, and operations
* Collaborate with engineering, cloud, and operations teams to deliver robust HPC solutions
* Deliver architecture roadmaps and projects to fulfill product rollout needs and business driven outcomes
* Contribute to long term architecture and implementation of GE Vernova Compute strategy.
* Participate in the domain technical and business discussions relative to future architect direction.
* Assist in the analysis, design and development of a roadmap and implementation based upon a current vs. future state in a cohesive architecture viewpoint.
* Research and evaluate emerging technology, industry and market trends to assist in project development and/or operational support activities.
* Coach and mentor team members.


**Education Qualification**
 Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science or “STEM” Majors (Science, Technology, Engineering and Math) with minimum years of experience6years
   

  

**Qualifications**
* 4\+ years of experience in cloud infrastructure, or systems architecture
* Hands\-on experience with AWS Cloud environments \- (EC2, EFS, S3, Networking)
* Strong background in Linux administration, automation, and software deployment
* Experience with Infrastructure as Code, CI/CD, and configuration management
* Knowledge of HPC schedulers, storage, and networking
* Proven ability to identify root causes and solve systemic technical issues
* Familiarity with applying AI/ML techniques for optimization and operational improvement
* Strong problem\-solving, communication, and collaboration skills


**Leadership**
* Demonstrated working knowledge of internal organization
* Foresee obstacles, identify workarounds, leverage resources, rally teammates.
* Demonstrated ability to work with and/or lead blended teams, including 3rd party partners and customer personnel.
* Demonstrated Change Management /Acceleration capabilities
* Strong interpersonal skills, including creativity and curiosity with ability to effectively communicate and influence across all organizational levels
* Proven analytical and problem resolution skills
* Ability to influence and build consensus with other Information Technology (IT) teams and leadership


******Additional Information******
**Relocation Assistance Provided:** 
 Yes

3c116174.title: Security Architect
3c116174.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Security Architect
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Define the cloud security framework and architecture, ensuring it meets the business requirements and performance goals. Document the implementation of the cloud security controls and transition to cloud security\-managed operations.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 Saviynt Identity Platform
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 5 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Security Lead, you will define the cloud security framework and architecture, ensuring it meets the business requirements and performance goals. You will also document the implementation of the cloud security controls and transition to cloud security\-managed operations.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:
   

  

* The candidate will be responsible for implementation of Saviynt IGA architecture
* The role also involves troubleshooting and resolving issues within the team and collaborating with Saviynt support to ensure seamless operations and system efficiency.
* Ensuring quality and efficiency throughout the project lifecycle is key.
* Engage with multiple teams and contribute on key decisions.
* Provide solutions to problems for their immediate team and across multiple teams.


 Professional \& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must Have Skills: Proficiency in Saviynt IGA.
* Strong knowledge of Saviynt IGA architecture, with hands\-on experience in application onboarding, connector configurations, and workflow implementation.
* Solid experience in design discussions, creating design documents, and performing unit testing
* Ability to troubleshoot and resolve technical issues within the team and in collaboration with Saviynt support.
* Proficiency in Segregation of Duties (SOD), certifications, and custom JARs.
* Familiarity with identity governance processes, role management, and security protocols is essential.
* Experience in troubleshooting and optimizing complex systems is a must.
* Detail\-oriented, strong problem\-solving abilities, excellent collaboration and communication skills, proactive, and able to work effectively in team\-oriented environments. Focused on delivering projects on time and to specification.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have a minimum of 4 years of experience in Saviynt IGA. Overall IT work experience should be 5 years or above
* A 15 years full time education is required.
* Bachelor s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field. Certifications are a plus.

12265929.title: Program Manager II, ATS Programs
12265929.description:
**Description**
 At Amazon, we are always exploring new opportunities to shape our global business. As a Programme Manager, you’ll be an essential part of innovating and transforming our processes. You’ll be taking the lead on the design and launch of new programmes for our customers. You’ll also oversee programmes that are already running and find ways to improve them. This is your opportunity to have a big impact on some of the most exciting new ideas that are shaping the future of Amazon.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 Launch programmes, monitor performance metrics, and report on the status of key objectives that affect deliverables
   

  

 Use data to understand operational challenges and create continuous improvement initiatives
   

  

 Work with a variety of other Amazon departments to identify and leverage best practices
   

  

 Within a programme environment, lead a multidisciplinary team in overcoming challenges and drive progress
   

  

 Manage stakeholders and internal processes, and define standards
   

  

 A day in the life
   

  

 As a Programme Manager, you will be responsible for planning, implementing, and improving initiatives that ensure smooth running of our operations. You’ll work closely with a range of Amazon colleagues to understand how they work, and what you and your teams can learn, as well as sharing your own expertise. Together, you’ll identify exciting new opportunities and will take the lead when it comes to designing their implementation.
   

  

 You’ll encourage and support your teams and colleagues to meet important deliverables, while proactively looking for new, data\-backed ways we could do things better.Your work will be integral to your team’s success.
   

  

**About The Team**
 Amazon couldn’t deliver at pace without the Amazon Transportation Service (ATS) team. As part of ATS, you’ll be welcomed into a diverse team that plays a central role in our success. Using air, sea and road transport, as well as sortation centres equipped with the latest technology, you’ll help Amazon’s transport run at maximum efficiency. Our team captures data and uses it to drive decisions.
   

  

 We put safety first as our people are our priority. And we use the expertise of our people to get packages to their destination – quickly, conveniently and sustainably.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 3\+ years of program or project management experience
* 3\+ years of working cross functionally with tech and non\-tech teams experience
* 3\+ years of defining and implementing process improvement initiatives using data and metrics experience
* Knowledge of Excel (Pivot Tables, VLookUps) at an advanced level and SQL
* Experience defining program requirements and using data and metrics to determine improvements


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 3\+ years of driving end to end delivery, and communicating results to senior leadership experience
* 3\+ years of driving process improvements experience
* Experience in stakeholder management, dealing with multiple stakeholders at varied levels of the organization
* Experience building processes, project management, and schedules


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ADCI HYD 13 SEZ
   

  

 Job ID: A10472276

4d26294a.title: Customer Program Manager- Husky (India)Chennai
4d26294a.description:
**Job Description**
**Title:** 
 Customer Program Manager\- Husky (India)Chennai
   

  

**Id:** 
 21045
   

  

**Type:** 
 FullTime
   

  

**Location:** 
 Chennai, India
   

  

 At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state\-of\-the\-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!
   

  

****Job Description****
 As a member of the Customer Success Management (CSM) SAARC team, you will be responsible for managing Advantage \+ Elite Contracts from order intake to delivery as well as to achieve the key performance indicators of the product. In this role, you will be a key contact for customers to ensure customer satisfaction and contract renewal.
   

  

****Responsibilities:****
* Implements and leads the Contract planning process, its implementation and sustainment, responsible to achieve the stated KPI (availability, cycle time, energy consumption, quality, resin usage)
* Work with key cross\-functional teams throughout the Organization with the goal of maintaining the Contract commitments on a continuous basis
* Project Manages all activities and services provided within the Contract, ensuring they are done on time, based on a predefined timetable, in an efficient way
* Ensures all services included in the Contract are well defined, properly documented (in the proper Husky systems), and properly scheduled
* Manages customer expectations to ensure complete alignment with the Contract objectives and goals
* Plan and schedule Contract timelines and milestones using the appropriate tools. Responsible for the milestones and deliverables.
* Develop and deliver progress reports, presentations, and other Contract documentation, internally and to the customer.
* Coordinate all activities related to the Contract implementation and ongoing activities.
* Focus should be in the involvement and awareness of the daily activities and issues related to the Contract. Key contact, both internally and customer.
* Ensure customer is satisfied with contract
* Manage and lead weekly call with customer
* Escalate issues when required
* Builds relationship with customers
* Schedule upcoming work with Field Service teams


****Qualifications:****
* Familiar with preform or plastics manufacturing environment. Understands plants KPI.
* Project Management experience
* Mechanical or electrical engineering or equivalent experience
* A minimum of 5 years’ work experience gained in a similar work environment
* Knowledge of injection molding machinery and related mechanical, hydraulic, and electronic technologies considered an asset
* Customer\-focused attitude
* Fluent in English and Hindi language will be an advantage
* Excellent communication and coordination skills
* Strong organizational and project management skills
* Strong negotiation, facilitation, conflict management skills and the ability to professionally interact with team members
* Experience or knowledge of CRM, ERP, CPQ systems
* Sales attitude and capacity to judge business requirements
* Good knowledge of all MS Office applications
* Logical thinking capabilities and continuous improvement attitude


 Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.

9dc2f70c.title: Wealth Management Solutions (Sales & Trading) — Specialists & Strategists Support Lead
9dc2f70c.description:
**JOB DESCRIPTION**  

  

  

You are a strategic thinker passionate about driving solutions in Wealth Management, capital markets, Equities, Fixed Income Private Equity, Hedge Funds, etc”. You have found the right team


As a Specialists \& Strategists Support Lead in the Wealth Management Solutions team, you will be in a player coach role on our Specialists \& Strategists teams within Sales \& Trading private Banking teams. You will get an opportunity to create an impact via your data analytics, communication, problem solving skills. The Specialists and Investor Relations team seeks to provide comprehensive coverage of our managed solutions (across core and thematic strategies, and different vehicle types \- separately managed accounts, mutual funds (J.P. Morgan and 3rd party where offered], and ETFs), in a coordinated way. Additionally, Private Bank (PB) Global Investment Strategy (GIS) team typically acts as the firm's central “house view” and portfolio guidance function—translating macro/market research into investable, client\-ready direction for advisors and clients.


You will lead an 8–9\-person team in Mumbai that supports our Specialists and Strategists by delivering high\-impact investor communications, scalable advisor/client content, and responsive coverage across managed solutions—while driving transformation through process excellence, metrics, and adoption of modern AI\-enabled workflows. This is a true player\-coach role: you will be hands\-on on priority deliverables while also developing and retaining talent and scaling a high\-performing team. You (VP) will serve as a primary point of contact for the India teams our internal partners and stakeholders. The team is primarily based in Mumbai and interacts with global counterparts based in New York and London.

**Job Responsibilities:**

* Build and deliver transparent, impactful communications (strategy launches, announcements, market/investment commentaries) for internal partners and client\-facing teams.
* Create highly leveraged advisor and client resources; respond to the advisor inquiries; support prospect materials and time\-sensitive requests.
* Develop strong fluency across managed solutions and how they are used in portfolios, so you can translate market and portfolio manager viewpoints into clear, client\-ready narratives and scalable messaging.
* Partner closely with investment strategy, portfolio construction, and related teams to align priorities, share insights, and improve the end\-to\-end advisor/client experience.
* set direction, raise quality standards, and build a high\-performing team—staying close to the work and stepping in on the most complex, visible, and time\-sensitive deliverables. Your leadership scope will include:
* Hire, develop, and retain a diverse team; set clear goals, manage performance, and provide ongoing coaching and career guidance.
* Drive strong partnerships and crisp, regular status reporting so priorities are aligned, work is understood, and outputs are decision\-ready.
* Provide strategic oversight of team coverage, structure, controls, and resiliency; establish mechanisms and metrics to measure operational effectiveness.
* Ensure consistency and efficiency across workflows; identify gaps and lead continuous improvement initiatives.
* Act as a catalyst for change as priorities shift from planning to execution, collaborating with local and global partners to improve integration, alignment, and end\-to\-end efficiency.
* Modernize execution through AI\-enabled tools and automation, upskilling the team on modern workflows to improve speed, quality, consistency, and scalability—while exercising strong judgment and discretion with sensitive information.




**Required qualifications, capabilities and skills:**

* Education \& experience: MBA/CFA (or equivalent) with 11\+ years of relevant experience in the investments domain.
* Markets expertise: Extensive knowledge of global markets and investment solutions; ability to apply this expertise to practical, client\-facing outcomes.
* People leadership: Proven people manager, effective in a matrixed organization and experienced leading dynamic, high\-performing teams.
* Execution \& operating rigor: Highly organized, hands\-on operator who can thrive in a fast\-paced environment, manage multiple concurrent deliverables, and maintain high standards of quality and timeliness.
* Stakeholder management: Excellent stakeholder engagement skills, with strong awareness of client and partner needs, sensitivities, and expectations.
* Strategic thinking \& communication: Confident, solutions\-oriented leader who can think strategically, develop recommendations, and influence business leaders with clear, concise communication.
* Judgment \& discretion: Demonstrated ability to handle confidential and sensitive information with superior judgment and integrity.
* Tools \& productivity: Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word, Outlook) and comfort learning new platforms, systems, and tools.
* Research tools \& workflows: Experience with market data/research tools (e.g., Bloomberg, FactSet) and comfort building tool\-assisted workflows to improve output quality and consistency.
* Technology \& AI mindset: Demonstrated interest in—and practical adoption of—investment technology and AI tools to scale insights, content, and operational efficiency.


**ABOUT US**  

  

  

JPMorganChase, one of the oldest financial institutions, offers innovative financial solutions to millions of consumers, small businesses and many of the world's most prominent corporate, institutional and government clients under the J.P. Morgan and Chase brands. Our history spans over 200 years and today we are a leader in investment banking, consumer and small business banking, commercial banking, financial transaction processing and asset management.  

  

We recognize that our people are our strength and the diverse talents they bring to our global workforce are directly linked to our success. We are an equal opportunity employer and place a high value on diversity and inclusion at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of any protected attribute, including race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, marital or veteran status, pregnancy or disability, or any other basis protected under applicable law. We also make reasonable accommodations for applicants' and employees' religious practices and beliefs, as well as mental health or physical disability needs. Visit our FAQs for more information about requesting an accommodation.

  

  

  

**ABOUT THE TEAM**
  

  

J.P. Morgan Asset \& Wealth Management delivers industry\-leading investment management and private banking solutions. Asset Management provides individuals, advisors and institutions with strategies and expertise that span the full spectrum of asset classes through our global network of investment professionals. Wealth Management helps individuals, families and foundations take a more intentional approach to their wealth or finances to better define, focus and realize their goals.

0f1afbf5.title: Senior Engagement Manager (Salesforce Pre-Sales Exp. Mandatory)
0f1afbf5.description:
**Description**
 We are looking for a Senior Engagement Manager to join India PS Pre\-Sales team in India. This is a senior individual contributor \+ team leadership role sitting at the intersection of pre\-sales, solution architecture, and delivery — you will own the scoping, solutioning, and commercialisation of complex Salesforce PS engagements across the India enterprise market.
   

  

 You will be the trusted technical advisor to customers and account teams during the pre\-sales cycle, responsible for shaping winning
   

  

 PS deals from qualification through to SPW/SOW signature.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Lead end\-to\-end PS pre\-sales engagements — from discovery and scoping through to effort estimation, SPW/proposal creation, and deal closure.
* Architect Agentforce\-led solutions for enterprise customers, designing agentic workflows, LLM orchestration, and AI automationpatterns on the Salesforce platform.
* Partner with AEs, Solution Engineers, and Customer Success to position PS as a strategic differentiator on complex, multi\-cloud opportunities.
* Own the effort estimation and resource planning process — producing credible, commercially sound PS proposals that balance customer value with delivery margin.
* Conduct executive\-level workshops and solution presentations with CXO stakeholders.
* Build reusable PS assets — solution blueprints, reference architectures, estimations, and proposal templates — to accelerate the team.
* Mentor junior team members and contribute to the PS Pre\-Sales practice capability agenda.


 What We're Looking For
   

  

**Must\-have**
* Overall 12 years of experience and 8\+ years of Salesforce experience, with at least 3–4 years in a pre\-sales or solution architecture role.
* Hands\-on Agentforce expertise — you have designed and scoped agentic solutions involving Einstein Bots, Agentforce, Prompt Builder, Model Builder, or equivalent AI orchestration on Salesforce
* Strong understanding of the Salesforce PS delivery model — you know how to scope, estimate, and price professional services engagements.
* Proven experience writing SPWs, proposals, and DDs — you can own a document end to end.
* Excellent executive communication and storytelling skills — you are credible in a boardroom.
* Salesforce certifications: minimum Application Architect or System Architect; Agentforce Specialist a strong plus.


**Good To Have**
* Experience across multiple Salesforce clouds — Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, MuleSoft, Data Cloud.
* Exposure to India enterprise market dynamics — FSI, Manufacturing, Hi\-Tech, or Public Sector.
* Prior experience managing or mentoring a pre\-sales team.


**Why This Role**
* Work on India's most complex and strategic Salesforce PS deals.
* Be at the forefront of Agentforce go\-to\-market in India — one of the highest\-priority growth areas globally.
* Direct exposure to senior leadership and a high\-visibility role within the PS organisation.
* Opportunity to shape how PS Pre\-Sales operates and scales in

40019895.title: Customer Experience Program Manager, Customer Recovery & Acceleration
40019895.description:
Job Title
   

  

 Customer Experience Program Manager, Customer Recovery \& Acceleration
   

  

 Role Overview
   

  

 The Customer Experience (CX) Program Manager is a strategic, customer\-facing leader within the Product Success Organization, responsible for stabilizing, recovering, and accelerating high\-risk or stalled customers.
   

  

 This role operates as a rapid\-response, outcome\-oriented engagement leader, partnering with customers who are blocked in adoption, at risk of churn, or struggling to realize value. The CX Program Manager orchestrates cross\-functional intervention plans to diagnose root causes, align stakeholders, and drive measurable turnaround outcomes.
   

  

 This role focuses on systemic adoption, value realization, and operational recovery. Engagements are structured as approximately 90\-day coordinated recovery cycles, primarily serving High Touch and Upper Growth customers. The position plays a critical role in protecting revenue, improving customer health, and building repeatable recovery playbooks across the customer base.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

 Customer Recovery \& Stabilization
   

  

* Lead targeted intervention engagements (approximately 90 days) for high\-risk, stalled, or underperforming customers
* Rapidly assess customer health across product usage, workflows, data quality, and organizational alignment
* Define and execute a structured Customer Recovery Plan with clear milestones and measurable success criteria


 Cross\-Functional Orchestration
   

  

* Mobilize and coordinate the right internal resources based on the customer’s specific recovery needs
* Ensure all teams are aligned to a single recovery strategy, timeline, and accountable owner
* Remove blockers, manage dependencies, and maintain execution momentum across workstreams


 Executive Alignment \& Communication
   

  

* Engage customer executives and senior stakeholders to align on recovery goals, reset accountability, and communicate progress
* Serve as the primary point of contact throughout the duration of the ICU engagement
* Deliver structured updates and executive\-level summaries on a regular cadence


 Playbook Development \& Scaling
   

  

* Build and refine CX playbooks, intervention frameworks, and engagement models
* Partner with Product Success and Insights teams to scale learnings and improve early risk detection
* Contribute to the broader Customer Success strategy through repeatable, data\-backed recovery frameworks


 Data\-Driven Insights
   

  

* Leverage usage data, health scores, and engagement signals to diagnose issues and track recovery progress
* Identify leading indicators of churn risk and recovery success to improve future intervention models
* Validate success outcomes against customer\-defined goals at engagement close


 Cross\-Functional Partnerships
   

  

* Customer Success: Handoff coordination, health monitoring, and post\-ICU continuity
* Functional Experts: Subject matter depth and product best\-practice guidance
* Product \& Engineering: Issue escalation, roadmap alignment, and product gap feedback
* Data \& Analytics / Insights: Usage analysis, health scoring, and performance insights
* Services \& Implementation: Re\-implementation support, configuration guidance, and workflow redesign


 Success Measures
   

  

* Reduction in churn risk and improvement in health scores across ICU\-managed accounts
* Measurable increase in product adoption and depth of usage
* Increased retention confidence and renewal rates
* Scalable recovery playbooks and repeatable intervention patterns


**Qualifications Required**
* 5\+ years of experience in Customer Success, Program Management, Consulting, or Services within SaaS
* Proven ability to turn around at\-risk customer situations and drive measurable outcomes
* Strong cross\-functional leadership and stakeholder management skills
* Experience working with enterprise or high\-touch customers in complex, multi\-stakeholder environments
* Excellent communication skills with demonstrated executive presence


**Preferred**
* Experience in renewal risk mitigation or churn prevention strategies
* Background in nonprofit, fundraising, or comparable mission\-driven verticals
* Familiarity with change management and adoption frameworks
* Experience leveraging data and product usage insights to drive decision\-making


 Core Competencies
   

  

* Outcome\-obsessed and relentlessly action\-oriented
* Strong problem\-solving and root cause analysis skills
* Ability to influence and lead without direct authority in complex environments
* Ability to simplify complexity into clear, executable plans


 Why This Role Matters
   

  

 The ICU Program Manager serves as a critical safeguard for customer success and retention. By stepping in at pivotal moments of risk, this role ensures customers are not lost due to misalignment, stalled adoption, or unrealized value.
   

  

 Through structured recovery, cross\-functional coordination, and relentless focus on outcomes, the ICU Program Manager transforms vulnerable customers into stable, successful, and growing advocates—while strengthening the organization’s overall customer success strategy.
   

  

 This is not a support role. It is not a break/fix function. It is a high\-impact, outcomes\-driven leadership engagement that directly protects revenue, accelerates adoption, and builds the repeatable systems that make every future customer engagement stronger.
   

  

 Stay up to date on everything Blackbaud, follow us on Linkedin, X, Instagram, Facebook and YouTube
   

  

 Blackbaud powers social impact through purpose‑driven technology and responsible AI. Guided by our
 *Intelligence for Good®* 
 vision, we’re building a culture where innovation, trust, and human expertise come together to help organizations make a greater difference in the world.
   

  

 Blackbaud is proud to be an equal opportunity employer and is committed to maintaining an inclusive work environment. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, physical or mental disability, age, or veteran status or any other basis protected by federal, state, or local law.

a207af5c.title: Sr Technical Program Manager, Transportation Financial Systems
a207af5c.description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Transportation Financial Systems (TFS) team is looking for a talented and highly motivated Sr. Technical Program Manager (TPM) who enjoy solving challenging and complex business problems at Amazon scale.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

The right candidate will possess a strong program management background, has experience leading large projects, and has a well\-rounded technical background in current technologies. As a Sr. Technical Program Manager, you will be Single Threaded Owner (STO) to lead and develop scalable solutions across multiple engineering teams, driving project schedules from design to release, stakeholder management and managing the production launch for large cross org programs. You will work directly with customers, disambiguate the requirements, anticipate bottlenecks and risks, make trade\-offs, provide escalation management and balance the business needs versus technical constraints. You must be able to thrive and succeed in an entrepreneurial environment, destroy limits to scale, and not be hindered by ambiguity or competing priorities. This means you are able to develop and drive high\-level strategic initiatives while rolling up your sleeves to get the job done. This role will require high judgement on how we can deliver for customers in both the short\- and long\-term.  

  

A day in the life  

TFS has over 150\+ engineers, and 15\+ product \& program managers. Each TPM is responsible for delivering large to medium programs; working closely with clients and product, building transformation roadmaps to deliver long term benefits for our customers.  

  

About the team  

Transportation Financial Systems (TFS) platform owns the technology components that perform the financial activities for Amazon’s transportation business. TFS systems are used across all Amazon’s transportation programs and retail expansion to new geographies. The platform provide financial document creation \& management, expense auditing, accounting, payments and cost allocation functions. Our new generation products are highly scalable and operate at finer level granularity to reconcile every dollar in transportation financial accounts with zero manual entries or corrections. The goal is to develop global product suite for all freight modes touching every single package movement across Amazon. Our mission is to abstract logistics complexities from financial world and financial complexities from logistics world. You will be part of one of the largest tech and program team with \~200 engineering organization with great growth and lateral opportunity.

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 5\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 7\+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience
* 3\+ years of software development experience
* 5\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* 5\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

c3fb35a8.title: Staff Technical Program Manager
c3fb35a8.description:
**Job Description Summary**
 The Enterprise Solutions team deploys, enhances and manages all ERP platforms in the GE Vernova Power segment. Our versatile team boasts unique expertise across enterprise technology platforms and business processes. As a key member of the Enterprise Solutions Fulfillment Initiatives team, you will help lead the charge in simplifying the ERP landscape, transforming with Cloud\-native technology and operationalizing AI within our systems. In this role you will lead projects related to digital transformation of our Plant maintenance, Quality and Production processes/applications across ERP platforms including but not limited to SAP PowerMax.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Roles and Responsibilities**
* Proactively and holistically lead, consult and/or oversee multiple engagements across the Power Enterprise Solutions IT organization in response to disruptive trends and execution of change toward the desired business vision and outcomes
* Interface with business process owners and functional leaders to map out existing and future processes/sub\-processes, data sources, data models, systems, and workflows into a common enterprise\-wide data model within application framework.
* Act as the subject matter expert for Plant maintenance, Production planning and Quality management related ERP processes and supporting applications functionality. Experience in Manufacturing execution systems is an advantage. Gather requirements and collaborate with functional partners for prioritizations to drive the business outcome.
* Ensure compliance with all application policies including HPA, security and code reviews across all applications and platforms within scope.
* Collaborate cross\-functionally, working with a variety of teams to identify and prioritize ways in which the product can support our internal processes, and our business users in more efficient and effective ways. Maintain relationships with key business users.
* Demonstrate ability to influence functional and development partners through credible knowledge and experience, persuasion and influencing skills.
* Lead the research and evaluation of emerging technology, including Agentic and Generative AI, industry and market trends to assist in project development for the Enterprise Solutions team.
* Organize project teams comprising from internal and external technical and functional experts. Manage program execution of multiple interdependent projects by working directly with global technical teams.
* Provide active participation in lean improvements across the whole landscape and balance execution of requirements with landscape simplification.
* Partner with local colleagues as we transition multiple manufacturing sites to SAP


**What You’ll Bring**
* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science or “STEM” Majors (Science, Technology, Engineering and Math) with 8 to 12 years of experience.
* Significant technical experience along with established leadership credentials across disciplines and functions within IT program/product areas.
* Prior SAP ERP implementation experience
* Bring good understanding of SAP S/4HANA concepts, process simplifications, and future\-state capabilities
* Demonstrated functional / technical experience in key SAP modules including PM, QM and PP
* Excellent program management skills; effectively mitigating risks to keep project schedules on\-time, on\-budget and with quality deliverables


**What Will Make You Stand Out**
* Passion for solving business problems using ERP and a passion for emerging technologies such as AI.  Innovates and integrates new processes and/or technology to significantly add value to GE Vernova. Proactively learns new solutions and processes to address seemingly unanswerable problems.
* Ability to understand, process, and interpret data to extract insights and communicate findings effectively to support business decisions.
* Experience with ERP processes in Sourcing and Warehouse environments and an understanding of ERP integrations with other satellite systems.
* Excellent influencing, interpersonal and communications skills (both written and verbal) with all levels of an organization. Influences and energizes others toward the common vision and goal.
* Maintains excitement for a process and drives to new directions of meeting the goal even when odds and setbacks render one path impassable.
* Strong global team player. Self\-starter \- requires minimal direction to accomplish goals.
* Strong track record of understanding and interest in current and emerging technologies and / or industry activities.
* Ability to manage third party partner teams to drive successful business outcomes.
* Proactively engages with cross\-functional teams to resolve issues and design solutions using critical thinking and analysis skills and best practices. Finds important patterns in seemingly unrelated information.


******Additional Information******
**Relocation Assistance Provided:** 
 Yes

198754a2.title: Program Manager
198754a2.description:
**About Signify**
 Through bold discovery and cutting\-edge innovation, we lead an industry that is vital for the future of our planet: lighting. Through our leadership in connected lighting and the Internet of Things, we're breaking new ground in data analytics, AI, and smart solutions for homes, offices, cities, and beyond.
   

  

 At Signify, you can shape tomorrow by building on our incredible 125\+ year legacy while working toward even bolder sustainability goals. Our culture of continuous learning, creativity, and commitment to diversity and inclusion empowers you to grow your skills and career.
   

  

 Join us, and together, we’ll transform our industry, making a lasting difference for brighter lives and a better world.
   

  

**More About The Role**
 Working as a Program Manager at Signify is dynamic. You‘ll be working closely with cross functional teams who are a highly experienced and quality driven. We’re greater together through peer learning in our globally diverse team, with different backgrounds and nationalities.
   

  

 We are seeking a Program Manager who drive the development and implementation of lighting products that enable the latest trending technologies. These connected projects involve mechanical, electrical, software, testing, and regulatory compliance.
   

  

 Responsible for the successful execution of multiple Projects by detailed program planning, tracking, scheduling, analysis of program performance \& financials, and reporting. Participation in implementing tools to enhance these tasks. Ideal candidates must show success in managing multi\-site projects and work effectively in a virtual team environment.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Manage project scope delivery and successful execution within technical, schedule, cost and quality commitments.
* Ensure standard program management processes are utilized and adequate support to the project team by coordinating PM reviews, preparing \& publishing PM metrics and reports.
* Maintain metrics for project for cost, quality, technical performance and delivery through all of the development phases.
* Coordinates all risks and requirements of the project.
* Provides periodic project updates of current situation relating to contractual milestones and problem/high risk areas (e.g., technical, cost, and schedule).


*Working at Signify: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v\=9Jbz6E1QQ2o\&list\=PLj9hU1O4UB00pjCsPYKv5TXJVQvcHhKGB\&index\=3*
**What You’ll Need**
* Bachelor’s Degree in Mechanical/ Electronics/Computers /Electronics \& Telecommunication/ Instrumentation/ Industrial Electronics engineering.
* 5\-7 years of work experience into product development preferred into lighting domain.
* Good communication and presentation skills – both verbal and written with ability to make necessary status reports and technical presentations to top management and customer
* Good analytical skills and business acumen
* Good knowledge of the electrical / industrial products used in residential and commercial applications.
* PMP certification is preferred.
* Computer skills: knowledge of Microsoft Office 365\.


**What You’ll Get In Return…**
* Learning while working with colleagues with strong product and technical knowledge
* Competitive salary depending on experience
* Extensive set of tools to drive your career, such as a personalized learning platform, free training and coaching
* Opportunity to buy Signify products with discount


**Everything we’ll do for you**
 You can grow a lasting career here. We’ll encourage you, support you, and challenge you. We’ll help you learn and progress in a way that’s right for you, with coaching and mentoring along the way. We’ll listen to you too, because we see and value every one of our 27,000\+ people. We believe that a diverse and inclusive workplace fosters creativity, innovation, and a full spectrum of bright ideas. With a global workforce present in 70\+ countries, we are dedicated to creating an inclusive environment where every voice is heard and valued, helping us all achieve more together.
   

  

 Come join us, and together we can light up the future.

532cea8c.title: Presales Executive
532cea8c.description:
Company Description

**TCB Infotech Pvt. Ltd.** is a leading ERP consulting and implementation company specializing in **ERPNext** and **Odoo**. We help businesses streamline operations, improve visibility, and drive growth through business process consulting, ERP implementation, automation, and AI\-powered solutions.

With expertise across Manufacturing, Distribution, Retail, Healthcare, Construction, and Service industries, we partner with organizations to transform their operations through technology and best practices.

As we continue to grow, we’re looking for professionals who enjoy solving business problems, working closely with clients, and delivering impactful ERP solutions.

Role Description

We are hiring an experienced **Presales Consultant** to join our Jaipur office. This is a client\-facing role where you’ll work closely with prospective customers to understand their business processes, identify operational challenges, and recommend the right ERP solution.

You will lead discovery sessions, conduct tailored product demonstrations, prepare solution proposals, and collaborate with sales, functional consultants, and technical teams throughout the pre\-sales lifecycle. The ideal candidate combines strong business acumen with ERP knowledge and enjoys engaging with business owners and decision\-makers.

Qualifications

· **4\+ years** of experience in ERP Pre\-Sales, Functional Consulting, Business Analysis, or ERP Implementation.

· Hands\-on experience with **ERPNext, Odoo**, or other leading ERP platforms.

· Strong understanding of business processes including Sales, CRM, Purchase, Inventory, Manufacturing, Finance, HR, and Project Management.

· Experience conducting discovery workshops, requirement gathering, solution design, and ERP demonstrations.

· Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.

· Ability to engage with CXOs, business owners, and department heads in a consultative manner.

· Experience preparing solution documents, proposals, and project scope.

· Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Applications, Business, Commerce, or a related field.

· ERP certifications or implementation experience will be an added advantage.

If you’re passionate about helping businesses transform through ERP and enjoy working in a fast\-growing consulting environment, we’d love to hear from you.

Pay: ₹20,000\.00 \- ₹40,000\.00 per month

Work Location: In person

e88e03d6.title: Sr Advisory Solution Consultant
e88e03d6.description:
**Company Description**
 It all started when engineer Fred Luddy wrote code that automated a tedious task for his coworker, Phyllis. She cried tears of joy. That moment inspired Fred to build a company that could do that for everyone—freeing people from busywork so they could focus on meaningful work. Today, ServiceNow is the AI control tower for business reinvention. Our ServiceNow AI platform brings together any AI, any data, and any workflow— helping 85% of the Fortune 500® work smarter, faster, and better. We're building an AI\-native culture where technology and talent are unstoppable together. And we're just getting started.
   

  

 Join us to put AI to work for people.
   

  

**Job Description**
 As a member of our Solution Consulting team, you will have a major impact on our future success by supporting \[Employee Experience, Customer Workflow, ITX] Solution Sales. You will guide revenue for one of our products with the support and partnership of Sales, Product Management, and the executive team. This is a hands\-on technical consultant who can go wide and deep on solution delivery and solution positioning during sales cycles.
   

  

**What You Get To Do In This Role**
 The Solution Consultant is a technical consultant with the advanced ability to develop, position and provide product\-specific solutions during sales cycles while achieving quarterly and annual sales goals for an assigned territory.
   

  

* Support product sales as a technical and domain expert of a client\-facing sales team that pursues customers and prospects across multiple industry markets
* Lead discovery workshops to determine customers' challenges and give product demonstrations to align our solution with customer needs
* Develop client partner relationships
* Guide strategic programs in top accounts such as customer journey sessions for roadmap and outcome agreement
* Provide feedback to product management about product enhancements that can address customer needs and provide additional value
* Share and learn best practices and re\-usable assets with other Solution Consultants to enhance the quality and efficiency of the team
* Stay current on competitive analysis and market differentiation
* Support marketing events including executive briefings, conferences, user groups, and trade shows


**Qualifications**
**To be successful in this role you have:**
* Experience in leveraging or critically thinking about how to integrate AI into work processes, decision\-making, or problem\-solving. This may include using AI\-powered tools, automating workflows, analyzing AI\-driven insights, or exploring AI's potential impact on the function or industry.
* 10\+ years of pre\-sales solution consulting or sales engineering experience
* Proficiency with the ServiceNow platform or technical expertise with cloud software solutions
* Experience working collaboratively with product management, product marketing, partners, and professional services
* Territory management skills, including pipeline building and working with Sales counterpart to promote execution excellence
* Travel, as necessary


 Additional Information
   

  

**Work Personas**
 We approach our distributed world of work with flexibility and trust. Work personas (flexible, remote, or required in office) are categories that are assigned to ServiceNow employees depending on the nature of their work and their assigned work location. Learn more here. To determine eligibility for a work persona, ServiceNow may confirm the distance between your primary residence and the closest ServiceNow office using a third\-party service.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 ServiceNow is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, gender identity, veteran status, or any other category protected by law. In addition, all qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with legal requirements.
   

  

**Accommodations**
 We strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are unable to use this online application and need an alternative method to apply, please contact globaltalentss@servicenow.com for assistance.
   

  

**Export Control Regulations**
 For positions requiring access to controlled technology subject to export control regulations, including the U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR), ServiceNow may be required to obtain export control approval from government authorities for certain individuals. All employment is contingent upon ServiceNow obtaining any export license or other approval that may be required by relevant export control authorities.
   

  

 From Fortune. ©2026 Fortune Media IP Limited. All rights reserved. Used under license.

9f28c0ed.title: Pre Sales Enterprise Manager
9f28c0ed.description:
Job Title: Pre\-Sales Manager – Enterprise Solutions
 



**Department:** 
 Enterprise Sales
 



**Location:** 
 Noida (Work from Office)
 



**Employment Type:** 
 Full\-Time
 



  





**About the Role** 




 We are looking for a dynamic and customer\-focused
 **Pre\-Sales Manager – Enterprise Solutions** 
 to bridge the gap between our sales and product teams. The ideal candidate will understand enterprise customer requirements, conduct product demonstrations, prepare technical proposals, and collaborate with internal stakeholders to deliver tailored AI and SaaS solutions.
 



 This role requires excellent communication skills, strong business acumen, and the ability to articulate technical concepts to both technical and non\-technical audiences.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Engage with enterprise prospects to understand business challenges, technical requirements, and solution expectations.
* Work closely with the Enterprise Sales team throughout the sales cycle.
* Conduct product demonstrations, solution presentations, and discovery workshops.
* Prepare customized solution proposals, presentations, RFPs, RFIs, and RFQs.
* Collaborate with Product, Engineering, and Customer Success teams to design solution architectures.
* Create Proof of Concepts (POCs) and assist in pilot implementations where required.
* Respond to technical and functional queries from prospective customers.
* Identify customer pain points and recommend suitable AI/SaaS solutions.
* Assist in solution pricing discussions and commercial proposal preparation.
* Support contract discussions by providing functional and technical clarifications.
* Maintain documentation related to client requirements, solution designs, and implementation plans.
* Keep updated with industry trends, competitors, and emerging technologies.
* Participate in client meetings, webinars, exhibitions, and enterprise events.



  





**Required Skills** 



* Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
* Strong presentation and stakeholder management abilities.
* Experience in Enterprise SaaS, AI, CRM, Automation, Cloud, or Digital Transformation solutions.
* Ability to understand business processes and translate them into solution requirements.
* Knowledge of APIs, integrations, cloud platforms, and enterprise software is preferred.
* Familiarity with CRM tools such as Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho CRM, or similar.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Ability to prepare proposals, business cases, and solution documentation.
* Comfortable interacting with CXOs, business leaders, and technical teams.



  





**Qualifications** 



* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, or a related field.
* MBA is an added advantage.



  





**Experience** 



* 2–5 years of experience in Pre\-Sales, Solution Consulting, Sales Engineering, or Enterprise Solution Consulting.
* Experience in AI, SaaS, CRM, Cloud, or Enterprise Software companies is preferred.



  





**Preferred Skills** 



* Experience handling enterprise accounts.
* Knowledge of AI, Generative AI, Automation, WhatsApp Business APIs, CRM platforms, and Digital Transformation solutions.
* Experience in preparing technical documentation, proposals, and POCs.
* Understanding of enterprise procurement processes and RFP responses.



  





**What We Offer** 



* Opportunity to work on cutting\-edge AI and SaaS products.
* Exposure to enterprise customers across multiple industries.
* Collaborative and innovative work environment.
* Career growth opportunities with high\-impact projects.
* Competitive salary and performance\-based incentives.

94d4d797.title: Data Platform Cloud Presales, Solution Engineer
94d4d797.description:
**About the Role** 




 We're looking for a customer\-focused
 **Data Platform Cloud/ multicloud Presales, Solution Engineer** 
 to help enterprise customers design, evaluate, and adopt modern data, analytics, AI, and cloud solutions on
 **Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI)** 
 .
 



  





 You'll bring strong technical knowledge across data warehousing, databases, data lakes/lakehouse architectures, data integration, analytics, and AI — and be comfortable leading customer\-facing workshops, demos, PoCs, and architecture reviews using Oracle technologies such as
 **Autonomous Database, Exadata, OCI GoldenGate, OCI Data Lakehouse, OCI AI Services, and Oracle Analytics Cloud** 
 . You'll partner closely with customers, sales, product specialists, engineering, and partners to position and design these solutions.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  





**Solution Architecture \& Presales Consulting** 



* Understand customer business goals, data challenges, and modernization priorities, and translate them into scalable, secure, high\-performing OCI architectures
* Lead architecture discussions spanning Autonomous Database, Exadata, warehouse modernization, lakehouse, analytics, AI/ML, and data integration
* Support opportunity qualification, technical discovery, proposals, and RFP responses



**Customer Engagement \& Advisory** 



* Act as a trusted advisor to CIOs, CDOs, data leaders, architects, and business stakeholders
* Lead workshops, whiteboarding sessions, executive briefings, and technical deep dives
* Guide customers on cloud adoption, database modernization, analytics transformation, AI readiness, and data governance



**Demonstrations, PoCs \& Technical Validation** 



* Deliver demos of Oracle data platform capabilities (Autonomous Database, Oracle Analytics, GoldenGate, Data Integration, Data Lakehouse, AI Services)
* Define and lead PoCs — scope, success criteria, workload sizing, evaluation metrics — to validate architecture, performance, and business value
* Present findings and recommendations to technical and business decision\-makers



**Data Platform, AI \& Analytics Expertise** 



* Advise on modern architecture patterns: cloud data warehouses, data lakes/lakehouse, real\-time replication, streaming, and AI\-enabled platforms
* Guide customers on ingestion, migration, replication, transformation, governance, security, performance, and cost optimization
* Stay current on trends in data platforms, AI/generative AI, analytics, and competitive technologies



  





**Required Qualifications** 



* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, IT, Data Science, or related field
* Experience in presales, solution engineering, solution architecture, or technical consulting for data platforms
* Strong understanding of databases, data warehousing, data lakes, data integration, analytics, AI/ML, and cloud architecture
* Hands\-on or architectural experience with cloud data platforms and enterprise data solutions
* Proven ability to lead technical discussions and translate business needs into solutions
* Experience delivering customer workshops, demos, and PoC engagements
* Strong communication, consultative selling, and stakeholder management skills



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience with Oracle technologies: Autonomous Database, Exadata, OCI GoldenGate, Oracle Analytics Cloud, OCI Data Integration/Data Flow/Object Storage, OCI AI Services
* Knowledge of data lakehouse, data mesh, real\-time analytics, and hybrid cloud data platforms
* Understanding of generative AI use cases, vector search, MLOps, and AI\-powered analytics
* Experience with BI tools (Oracle Analytics Cloud, Power BI, Tableau, Looker)
* Familiarity with competitive platforms (Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift, Synapse)
* Relevant certifications in cloud, database, data engineering, analytics, or AI/ML
* Experience with large enterprise and strategic accounts



  





 Why Join Us?
 



 Help enterprise customers modernize their data landscape and adopt AI\-driven innovation using OCI, Autonomous Database, Exadata, GoldenGate, Data Lakehouse, and Oracle Analytics — shaping customer data strategy and driving cloud adoption across strategic accounts.
