d9197e62.title: Program Manager - Last Mile
d9197e62.description:
**Program Manager – Last Mile** 




**Location:** 
 Bangalore (HSR Office)
 



**Department:** 
 SriMandir.Store – Fulfilment \& Logistics
 



  





**About AppsForBharat** 




 AppsForBharat (Sri Mandir App) is building beautifully crafted, AI\-first consumer experiences that help millions of Indians connect with spirituality and culture. We're backed by Peak XV Partners, Elevation, Fundamentum, and other top\-tier investors, and are one of India's fastest\-growing Series C consumer\-tech companies.
 



 Our flagship product,
 **Sri Mandir** 
 , is the world's largest platform for Hindu devotees, powering rituals, teachings, personalized recommendations, and a thriving devotional community.
 



 India's $44B devotion economy is still largely offline, and we're bringing structure, accessibility, and meaning to this massive market through technology, logistics, and seamless customer experiences.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 We are looking for a
 **Program Manager – Last Mile** 
 to own the complete post\-order customer journey; from order dispatch to successful doorstep delivery. This role is responsible for improving delivery success, reducing Return to Origin (RTO), optimizing courier performance, and building scalable, data\-driven operational processes.
 



 The ideal candidate has strong experience in e\-commerce last\-mile operations, thrives in a high\-volume environment, and enjoys solving complex operational problems using data, technology, and cross\-functional collaboration.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities \-** 




**Last Mile Operations** 



* Own the complete post\-order journey from dispatch to successful customer delivery.
* Drive improvements in first\-attempt delivery success and overall delivery experience.
* Monitor dispatch timelines and ensure SLA adherence across warehouse and courier operations.



  





**RTO Reduction** 



* Own and continuously improve Return to Origin (RTO) metrics.
* Analyze key drivers such as COD orders, address quality, courier performance, delivery timelines, and regional trends.
* Design and implement initiatives to proactively reduce RTO.



  





**Courier Management** 



* Manage relationships with courier partners including onboarding, performance reviews, SLA tracking, and escalations.
* Optimize courier allocation based on serviceability, cost, delivery performance, and RTO trends.
* Build courier scorecards and recommend continuous improvements.



  





**Process Excellence \& Program Management** 



* Design scalable operational processes using data\-driven insights.
* Improve pick\-pack\-manifest workflows, dispatch SLAs, and operational efficiency.
* Partner with Warehouse, Tech, Product, Customer Support, and Data teams to drive cross\-functional initiatives.



  





**NDR \& Recovery Management** 



* Own Non\-Delivery Report (NDR) operations and recovery processes.
* Drive customer re\-attempts through calls, WhatsApp, IVR, address corrections, and COD reconfirmation.
* Improve recovery rates before shipments are returned.



  





**Data \& Analytics** 



* Build dashboards and track operational KPIs including:
* RTO %
* First Attempt Delivery Rate
* Dispatch TAT
* Courier SLA
* NDR Resolution Rate
* Cost per Shipment
* Generate actionable insights and recommend process improvements based on data.



  





**Ideal Candidate Profile** 




**Must Have** 



* 4–7 years of experience in E\-commerce Operations, Last Mile Operations, Supply Chain, or Program Management.
* Strong understanding of last\-mile logistics and courier operations.
* Experience managing RTO, NDR, COD workflows, and delivery SLAs.
* Hands\-on experience working with courier partners such as Delhivery, Shadowfax, XpressBees, Ekart, Ecom Express, or Blue Dart.
* Strong analytical skills with advanced Excel and basic SQL.
* Experience driving cross\-functional projects across Operations, Product, Tech, and Customer Support teams.



  





**Good to Have** 



* Experience with OMS/WMS platforms such as Shiprocket, ClickPost, or Unicommerce.
* Experience building courier allocation frameworks or RTO prediction models.
* Exposure to D2C or COD\-heavy businesses.
* Knowledge of Python or advanced analytics tools.



  





**Success Metrics** 



* Reduction in overall RTO %
* Improvement in First Attempt Delivery Rate
* Higher NDR recovery and successful re\-delivery rates
* Improved courier SLA adherence
* Reduced logistics cost as a percentage of revenue
* Successful implementation of data\-driven courier allocation and operational improvements



  





**Why This Role Matters** 



* Own one of the most critical levers impacting customer experience and profitability.
* Drive operational excellence at scale through technology and process innovation.
* Partner closely with Product, Tech, Data, and Operations teams.
* Build scalable systems that directly improve margins and customer satisfaction.



  





**Apply Now** 




 Join us in building India's most trusted devotional commerce platform and help deliver meaningful experiences to millions of devotees.
 



**Email:** 
**jasmine@appsforbharat.com**

9a7ce46f.title: Information Technology Delivery Manager
9a7ce46f.description:
**About the Company** 




  





 We are looking for an IT Delivery Manager to lead end\-to\-end delivery of life insurance initiatives across new product launches, UW (underwriting) \& policy admin workflows, customer/partner portals, and claims—with hands\-on depth across Java (microservices) and Angular.
 



  





**About the Role** 




  





 You will own planning, execution, quality, compliance, and production stability, partnering with Business, PMO, Architecture, QA, SecOps, and Infra.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 




  




* Delivery \& Execution
* 
* Own end\-to\-end delivery (scope → plan → build → test → release → hypercare) for multiple streams, aligning to quarterly OKRs and regulatory timelines.
* Translate BRDs/FRDs into tech delivery plans; maintain detailed JIRA roadmaps, sprint plans, and release calendars.
* Lead Scrum of Scrums across Java/Angular squads; unblock teams, manage dependencies, and drive credible ETAs.
* Enforce Definition of Ready/Done, coding standards, branch strategy, and release checklists.
* 
* Engineering Leadership (Java \+ Angular)
* 
* Guide design of Java 17\+ microservices (Spring Boot/Spring Cloud), REST/gRPC APIs, eventing (Kafka), and data stores (PostgreSQL/MySQL; Redis).
* Oversee Angular 14\+ SPA development (state management, reactive forms, RxJS, route guards), responsive UX, accessibility.
* Ensure API contracts (OpenAPI/Swagger), versioning, backward compatibility, and performance budgets are met.
* Review critical PRs, architecture decisions (ADR), and non\-functional test strategy (performance, resiliency, security).
* 
* Life Insurance Domain Delivery
* 
* Orchestrate changes across Product, UW rules, Pricing, Illustration/quote, Proposal/issuance, Endorsements, Renewals, and Claims/FNOL.
* Integrate with ecosystem partners: KYC/AML (PAN/Aadhaar/OCR), Payment gateways, Aggregator portals, Bureau services, IVR/video MER, and Docs/e\-sign.
* Manage data quality and data masking/tokenization for PII/PHI in lower environments.
* Ensure IRDAI and internal audit compliance for releases, logs, access, and data handling.
* 
* Quality, Risk \& Compliance
* 
* Drive shift\-left testing; align unit/integration/e2e/UAT entry/exit criteria and triage defects to closure.
* Define and track SLOs/SLIs (latency, error rate, throughput) and CFRs (security, reliability, operability).
* Run risk registers, mitigation plans, and formal go\-live readiness (runbooks, rollback, observability).
* 
* DevOps \& Operations
* 
* Partner with DevOps for CI/CD (Git, pipelines), containerization (Docker), orchestration (Kubernetes), and IaC (Terraform).
* Enforce environment strategy (dev/test/UAT/pre\-prod/prod), feature flags, blue/green or canary releases.
* Own incident/problem management, post\-incident reviews, and capacity planning.
* 
* Stakeholder Management \& Governance
* 
* Single\-threaded owner for Business, PMO, and Compliance; provide weekly status, burn\-up/burn\-down, risk/issue logs.
* Manage vendor/SI deliverables and SLAs; align with Enterprise Architecture \& Security on standards.



  





  





**Qualifications** 




  




* Technical (must\-have)
* 
* 15–20 years total experience with 3–5\+ years in delivery/engg management for web\-scale systems.
* Strong hands\-on depth and code\-review ability in:
* 
* Java 17\+, Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, JPA/Hibernate, REST/gRPC, Kafka.
* Angular 14\+, TypeScript, RxJS, Angular Material; Jest/Jasmine/Cypress or Playwright.
* RDBMS (PostgreSQL/MySQL), caching (Redis), messaging (Kafka/RabbitMQ).
* CI/CD (GitHub/GitLab/Azure DevOps), Docker/Kubernetes, observability (Grafana/Prometheus/ELK/OpenTelemetry).
* AI copilots \& prompt engineering for delivery productivity: practical use of Microsoft 365 Copilot (status synthesis, risk logs, stakeholder updates), GitHub Copilot (code suggestions, test scaffolding), and creation of reusable prompts/guardrails for JIRA/Confluence updates; ability to measure impact with throughput/lead\-time metrics.
* Security \& compliance: OAuth2/OIDC, mTLS, secrets management (Vault/Key Vault), PII masking, OWASP, API security.
* 
* Domain (Optional)
* 
* Solid delivery experience in Life Insurance (any of: Product setup, UW rules, Quote/Illustration, Proposal \& Issuance, Endorsements, Renewal, Claims, Partner integrations).
* Familiarity with IRDAI guidelines, audit readiness, and regulated release processes.
* 
* Delivery \& Leadership
* 
* Proven track record managing multi\-team Agile programs, complex dependencies, and fixed regulatory timelines.
* Strong vendor management, budgeting, and KPIs ownership (on\-time, on\-scope, quality, cost).
* 
* Nice\-to\-have
* 
* Exposure to pricing engines, rules engines (Drools/ODM), BPMN workflows (Camunda/Flowable).
* Cloud experience (AWS/Azure managed services), feature flagging (LaunchDarkly/Unleash).
* Experience with performance engineering (JMeter/k6\), chaos testing, and blue/green strategies.

b25a0d6b.title: SRE Architect
b25a0d6b.description:
**Make an impact with NTT DATA**  

Join a company that is pushing the boundaries of what is possible. We are renowned for our technical excellence and leading innovations, and for making a difference to our clients and society. Our workplace embraces diversity and inclusion – it’s a place where you can grow, belong and thrive.

**Your day at NTT DATA**  

The Architecture Consultant is a seasoned level expert who is responsible for participating in the delivery of multi\-technology consulting services to clients by providing strategies and solutions on all aspects of infrastructure and related technology components.  

  

This role collaborates with other stakeholders on the development of the architectural approach for one or more layer of a solution. This role has the primary objective is to work on strategic projects that ensure the optimal functioning of the client’s technology infrastructure. **Key responsibilities:*** Brings subject matter expertise related multi\-technology infrastructure design best practice.
* Works in partnership with internal stakeholders on the development of the architectural approach for one or more layer of a solution.
* Participates in the investigation, planning, coordination, and preparation of feasibility studies relative to new computer\-based systems and modifications to existing systems.
* Works on strategies and solutions that define meta\-architectural designs for solutions, addressing the styles, mechanisms and principles that combine to formulate the architectural vision for a specific environment.
* Collaborates with stakeholders on the development of new services to take to market, information on relevant vertical markets and keep up to date on developments in specific technology domains.
* Participates in the pre\-sales process.
* Engages with clients directly and collaborates with sales on selling solutions and services.
* Participates in the delivery of business development processes including opportunity identification, presales, scoping, deal closing and driving delivery.
* Designs principal methodologies to perform a detailed analysis of the client requirements.
* Presents clients with solutions and convinces and persuades internal and external stakeholders of the right course of action.
 **To thrive in this role, you need to have:*** Ability to focus on detail with an understanding of how it impacts the business strategically.
* Excellent client service orientation.
* Ability to work in high\-pressure situations.
* Ability to establish and manage processes and practices through collaboration and the understanding of business.
* Ability to create new and repeat business for the organization.
* Ability to contribute information on relevant vertical markets
* Ability to contribute to the improvement of internal effectiveness by contributing to the improvement of current methodologies, processes and tools.
 **Academic qualifications and certifications:*** Bachelor's degree or equivalent in Information Technology and/or Business Management or a related field.
* Scaled Agile certification desirable.
* Relevant consulting and technical certifications preferred, for example TOGAF.
 **Required experience:*** Seasoned demonstrable experience in a similar role within a large scale (preferably multi\- national) technology services environment.
* Seasoned multi\-technology infrastructure design experience.
* Seasoned demonstrable level of expertise coupled with consulting and client engagement experience, demonstrating good experience in client needs assessment and change management.
**Workplace type****:**

Hybrid Working **About NTT DATA**  

NTT DATA is a $30\+ billion business and technology services leader, serving 75% of the Fortune


Global 100\. We are committed to accelerating client success and positively impacting society through


responsible innovation. We are one of the world’s leading AI and digital infrastructure providers, with


unmatched capabilities in enterprise\-scale AI, cloud, security, connectivity, data centers and


application services. Our consulting and industry solutions help organizations and society move


confidently and sustainably into the digital future. As a Global Top Employer, we have experts in more


than 70 countries. We also offer clients access to a robust ecosystem of innovation centers as well as


established and start\-up partners. NTT DATA is part of NTT Group, which invests over $3 billion each


year in R\&D.

 **Equal Opportunity Employer**  

NTT DATA is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer with a global culture that embraces diversity. We are committed to providing an environment free of unfair discrimination and harassment. We do not discriminate based on age, race, colour, gender, sexual orientation, religion, nationality, disability, pregnancy, marital status, veteran status, or any other protected category. Join our growing global team and accelerate your career with us. Apply today.

 **Third parties fraudulently posing as NTT DATA recruiters**


NTT DATA recruiters will never ask job seekers or candidates for payment or banking information during the recruitment process, for any reason. Please remain vigilant of third parties who may attempt to impersonate NTT DATA recruiters whether in writing or by phone in order to deceptively obtain personal data or money from you. All email communications from an NTT DATA recruiter will come from an **@nttdata.com** email address. If you suspect any fraudulent activity, please *contact us*.

c1aa8872.title: Delivery Lead
c1aa8872.description:
**Job Description**

**About Persistent**

  

We are an AI\-led, platform\-driven Digital Engineering and Enterprise Modernization partner, combining deep technical expertise and industry experience to help our clients anticipate what’s next. Our offerings and proven solutions create a unique competitive advantage for our clients by giving them the power to see beyond and rise above. We work with many industry\-leading organizations across the world, including 20 Fortune 50 companies and 4 of the 5 top banks in both the US and India, and numerous innovators across the healthcare ecosystem.

  

Our disruptor’s mindset, commitment to client success, and agility to thrive in the dynamic environment have enabled us to sustain our growth momentum. Persistent has been recognized across top industry platforms for innovation, leadership, and inclusion. We reported $1,654\.4M FY26 revenue with 17\.4% Y\-o\-Y growth. We have delivered 24 sequential quarters of growth with $436\.0M in Q4 FY26 revenue, up 3\.2% Q\-o\-Q and 16\.2% Y\-o\-Y growth. Our 27,500\+ global team members, located in 18 countries, have been instrumental in helping the market leaders transform their industries. We have been recognized as the Fastest Growing IT Services Brand Globally in the 2026 Brand Finance IT Services 25 Report. We named a Leader in the Everest Group Private Equity (PE) Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2026 and Software Product Engineering PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2026\.

 **About Position:**

  

The Delivery Leader for Concert leads client engagements from opportunity qualification through delivery execution. The role combines consulting, presales, and delivery leadership to help clients maximize the value of Concert solutions through discovery, assessments, and transformation planning.

* **Role: Delivery Lead**
* **Location: All Persistent Location**
* **Experience: 12\+ Years**
* **Job Type: Full\-Time Employment**

 **What You'll Do:**

  

* Facilitate executive workshops and business discovery sessions.
* Assess current operating models, processes, technology landscape, and business priorities.
* Identify use cases and opportunities for Concert capabilities.
* Develop current\-state and future\-state assessments.
* Create business cases and transformation roadmaps.
* Produce executive POVs that demonstrate measurable business value.
* Partner with Sales and Client Partners during pursuits.
* Support demos, solution presentations, and proposal development.
* Define delivery approach, scope, resource plans, and implementation strategy.
* Participate in executive presentations and deal reviews.
* Lead implementation programs from initiation through production.
* Manage scope, schedule, budget, quality, and stakeholder expectations.
* Drive governance, risk management, and executive reporting.
* Ensure successful adoption and realization of business outcomes.
* Develop repeatable assessment methodologies.
* Create reusable implementation assets.
* Mentor consultants and project managers.
* Support capability development across the practice.
* 12\+ years leading enterprise consulting and delivery engagements.
* Strong consulting and stakeholder management skills.
* Experience supporting complex technology sales cycles.
* Ability to translate business challenges into implementation strategies.
* Strong executive presentation skills.
* Delivery success
* Customer adoption
* Presales support and pipeline contribution
* Executive stakeholder satisfaction

 **Expertise You'll Bring:**

  

* Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Operations, or Business
* Strong executive communication and stakeholder management skills
* Exceptional negotiation and influencing abilities
* Structured problem\-solving and strategic thinking
* Ability to lead transformation in ambiguous and fast\-paced environments

 **Benefits:**

  

* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Culture focused on talent development with quarterly growth opportunities and company\-sponsored higher education and certifications
* Opportunity to work with cutting\-edge technologies
* Employee engagement initiatives such as project parties, flexible work hours, and Long Service awards
* Annual health check\-ups
* Insurance coverage: group term life, personal accident, and Mediclaim hospitalization for self, spouse, two children, and parents

 **Values\-Driven, People\-Centric \& Inclusive Work Environment:**

  

Persistent is dedicated to fostering diversity and inclusion in the workplace. We invite applications from all qualified individuals, including those with disabilities, and regardless of gender or gender preference. We welcome diverse candidates from all backgrounds.

  

* We support hybrid work and flexible hours to fit diverse lifestyles.
* Our office is accessibility\-friendly, with ergonomic setups and assistive technologies to support employees with physical disabilities.
* If you are a person with disabilities and have specific requirements, please inform us during the application process or at any time during your employment

 **Let’s unleash your full potential at Persistent \-** **persistent.com/careers**

 ***“Persistent is an Equal Opportunity Employer and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any kind.”***

3927a8af.description:
**Cybersecurity Presales Consultant**  
Mumbai \| Full\-time \| Cybersecurity / IT Security Solutions

**About the Role**  
We're hiring an experienced Cybersecurity Presales Consultant skilled in Discovery, Design, and Demonstration (3D). You'll work directly with enterprise customers to understand their security challenges, design tailored solutions, run POCs, and support the sales team in closing deals.

**What You'll Do**

* Understand customer security requirements and business risks
* Design solutions across Firewalls, EDR, SIEM, SOC, IAM, and Cloud Security
* Translate business needs into technical architectures and BOMs
* Run product demos, workshops, and Proof of Concepts (POCs)
* Own technical responses for RFPs, RFIs, and RFQs
* Prepare solution proposals, architecture diagrams, and technical documentation
* Partner with sales to position solutions against competitors
* Act as a trusted technical advisor to CISOs, IT Heads, and Security Teams

**What We're Looking For**

* 5\+ years in Cybersecurity Presales or Solution Consulting
* Strong knowledge of Network Security, Firewalls, EDR/XDR, SIEM, SOC, Cloud Security, IAM
* Hands\-on experience with POC setups and technical demos
* Experience with technical bidding, RFPs, and solution design
* Strong presentation, communication, and stakeholder management skills

**Good to Have (Certifications)**  
CISSP, CISM, CEH, CCNP Security, Fortinet NSE, Palo Alto, Microsoft Security, or AWS/Azure Security certifications

Pay: ₹500,000\.00 \- ₹900,000\.00 per year

Work Location: In person

84245f43.description:
### **Job Information**


Date Opened


07/13/2026
Job Type


Full time
Industry


IT Services

7\-9

Gurgaon

### **Job Description**


**Position Summary**

  

The Presales Consultant is responsible for understanding customer business requirements, positioning Warehouse Management System (WMS) and Manufacturing Execution System (MES) solutions, preparing solution proposals, conducting product demonstrations, supporting RFP/RFQ responses, and assisting the sales team throughout the sales lifecycle.

  

The role requires strong knowledge of warehouse operations, manufacturing processes, supply chain digitization, barcode/RFID technologies, and software solution architecture. The consultant acts as the technical and functional advisor to customers while ensuring that proposed solutions are feasible, scalable, and aligned with business objectives.

 **Key Responsibilities**

 **1\. Customer Requirement Analysis**

* Engage with prospective customers to understand business objectives and operational challenges.
* Conduct discovery workshops and requirement gathering sessions.
* Analyze warehouse, manufacturing, and material flow processes.
* Document As\-Is and To\-Be business processes.
* Identify opportunities for process optimization and automation.

 **2\. Solution Design**

* Design end\-to\-end WMS and MES solutions based on customer requirements.
* Recommend suitable software modules, hardware components, and system architecture.
* Define solution workflows covering:

  

o Inbound logistics

  

o Warehouse operations

  

o Inventory management

  

o Production planning

  

o Shop floor execution

  

o Traceability

  

o Quality management

  

o Finished goods management

* Recommend appropriate technologies including:

  

o Barcode, RFID

  

o Mobile Computing, IoT

  

o Vision Systems

  

o PLC/Machine Integration

  

o Industrial Automation

 **3\. Product Positioning**

* Demonstrate WMS and MES products to customers.
* Explain product capabilities and business benefits.
* Map customer pain points to product features.
* Highlight ROI, productivity improvements, compliance, and traceability benefits.
* Position product roadmap and future capabilities including AI\-driven analytics.

 **4\. Proposal Development**

  

Prepare:

* Technical proposals
* Functional solution documents
* Scope of work
* Architecture diagrams
* Process flow diagrams
* Bill of Materials (Software \& Hardware)
* Effort estimations
* Project assumptions
* Risk analysis
* Commercial inputs

  

Support RFP/RFQ submissions with complete technical responses.

 **5\. Customer Presentations**

* Conduct technical presentations.
* Present solution architecture.
* Lead product demonstrations.
* Participate in proof\-of\-concept activities.
* Support customer workshops and technical discussions.

 **7\. Solution Estimation**

  

Collaborate with Delivery and Product teams to:

* Estimate implementation effort
* Define project timelines
* Identify implementation risks
* Recommend deployment architecture
* Prepare implementation approach

 **8\. Cross Functional Collaboration**

  

Work closely with:

* Sales Team
* Product Management
* Solution Architects
* Delivery Team
* QA Team
* Development Team
* Project Managers
* Hardware Team

  

Ensure smooth transition from Presales to Project Delivery.

 **9\. Market Intelligence**

* Study competitors.
* Track industry trends.
* Identify emerging technologies.
* Analyze customer requirements across industries.
* Provide inputs for product enhancements.

 **Key Deliverables**

* Solution Design Document,

  

o Technical Architecture

  

o Process Flow Diagrams

* Demo Environment
* Product Presentations
* Technical Proposal
* Effort Estimation
* BOM
* RFP Responses
* Customer Workshop Reports
* Handover Documents / KT to Delivery

 **Preferred Industry Experience**

  

Experience in one or more of:

* Automotive Manufacturing
* Electronics Manufacturing
* Pharmaceutical Manufacturing
* FMCG
* Food Processing
* Warehousing \& Logistics
* Third Party Logistics (3PL)
* Retail Distribution

 **Required Skills**

 **Functional Skills**

* Business Process Analysis
* Solution Design
* Requirement Gathering
* Process Mapping
* Proposal Writing
* Presentation Skills
* Customer Engagement
* Consulting
* Analytical Thinking

 **Technical Skills**

* WMS, MES
* ERP Integration, SQL, API Integration
* Manufacturing Processes, Warehouse Operations

 **Soft Skills**

* Excellent communication
* Presentation and demonstration skills
* Problem solving
* Negotiation support
* Customer relationship management
* Documentation
* Time management
* Stakeholder management

 **Education**

  

Bachelor's Degree in:

* Computer Science
* Information Technology
* Electronics
* Industrial Engineering

  

MBA (Operations/Supply Chain) is an added advantage.

 **Experience**

* 5–10 years in Presales, Solution Consulting, or Business Consulting.
* Experience with enterprise software solutions in Manufacturing or Supply Chain.
* Hands\-on exposure to WMS, MES, ERP integration, or Industrial Automation projects.
* Experience in customer\-facing consulting and solution presentations.

633e509e.title: Presales Engineer
633e509e.description:
This role has been designed as ‘Hybrid’ with an expectation that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge\-to\-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Aruba** 
 is an HPE Company, and a leading provider of next\-generation network access solutions for the mobile enterprise. Helping some of the largest companies in the world modernize their networks to meet the demands of a digital future, Aruba is redefining the “Intelligent Edge” – and creating new customer experiences across intelligent spaces and digital workspaces. Join us redefine what’s next for you.
   

  

**Job Family Definition**
 Responsible for providing technical support and/or leadership in the creation and delivery of technology solutions designed to meet a customer’s business needs. Creates and maintains effective customer relationships to secure customer satisfaction. Provides the deepest level of product\- and technology\-specific expertise available to customers from anyone in the sales organization in deal pursuit situations. Aligned to specific products or product\-lines.
   

  

 The Consulting Systems Engineer is also a subject matter expert in their area of specialization (i.e., Mobility, Security, Branch, etc), responsible for consulting customers on end to end technical designs to meet their business need.
   

  

 These jobs focus on selling to customers, typically through work that occurs outside HPE offices.
   

  

**Management Level Definition**
 Contributions include applying intermediate level of subject matter expertise to solve common technical problems. Acts as an informed team member providing analysis of information and recommendations for appropriate action. Works independently within an established framework and with moderate supervision.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Provide technical guidance and leadership in designing networking solutions aligned to customer business needs.
* Act as a trusted technical advisor in deal pursuits, offering the deepest product and technology expertise within the sales organization.
* Design end\-to\-end network architectures across domains such as AIOps, Campus (Wired/Wireless), SASE, Data Center, or Routing.
* Deliver technical presentations, demos, and customer workshops to create value throughout the sales cycle.
* Partner with Account Managers and cross\-functional stakeholders to translate customer problem statements into impactful solutions.
* Influence long\-term customer network transformation aligned with business outcomes.
* Support RFP/RFI responses, solution positioning, competitive differentiation, and proof\-of\-concept engagements.
* Build and maintain strong customer relationships to drive technology thought leadership.
* Mentor junior team members and contribute to cross\-functional initiatives where required.


**What You Need To Bring**
* 4\-7 years of experience in Networking, Presales, or Solution Consulting roles.
* Experience working with Government, BFSI and Enterprise customers is mandatory.
* Must have hands\-on experience in handling and managing tenders.
* Strong expertise in at least one or more networking domains:
+ AIOps
+ Campus Networking (Wired/Wireless)
+ SASE
+ Data Center Networking
+ Routing \& Switching

* Proven experience designing end\-to\-end enterprise network architectures.
* Strong customer\-facing experience with executive\-level communication skills.
* Ability to translate complex technical concepts into business outcomes.
* Experience supporting large enterprise deal pursuits and working alongside sales teams.
* Demonstrated ability to operate independently and exercise sound technical judgment.
* Strong problem\-solving skills with the ability to handle complex business scenarios.
* Preferred: Relevant industry certifications (Aruba, Cisco, SASE, Cloud, etc.).


**What We Can Offer You**
**Health \& Wellbeing**
 We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
   

  

**Personal \& Professional Development**
 We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
   

  

**Unconditional Inclusion**
 We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.
   

  

**Let's Stay Connected**
 Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.

 HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.
   

  

**Hewlett Packard Enterprise is EEO Protected Veteran/ Individual with Disabilities.**
 HPE will comply with all applicable laws related to employer use of arrest and conviction records, including laws requiring employers to consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories.
   

  

**Recruitment Fraud Alert**
 We have become aware of an increase in fraudulent recruitment activities in which individuals impersonate our company or authorized recruitment agencies to offer fake employment opportunities. These scams may occur through false websites, emails, social media, or chat\-based applications and often aim to obtain personal information or money. Please note that Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), its direct and indirect subsidiaries and affiliated companies, and its authorized recruitment agencies/vendors will never charge a candidate a registration fee, hiring fee, or any other fee in connection with its recruitment and hiring process. We also never request personal information such as back account details, Social Security numbers, or national IDs via social media or chat applications.
   

  

 All legitimate job opportunities will come through official company channels, and candidates are responsible for verifying the credentials of any third party claiming to represent the company. Any reliance on fraudulent communication is at the individual’s own risk, and HPE disclaims legal liability for any resulting damages. If you suspect recruitment fraud, do not share personal information or make any payments and report the incident to your local authorities immediately.

d1346b13.title: Jr. Solution Engineer – Pre-Sales
d1346b13.description:
**Job Description** 




  





 Are you energized by helping customers understand how modern retail and supply‑chain technology can transform their operations? At Kensium, our product suite – including Kensium POS, Kensium WMS, and the unified‑commerce platform, OmnifiCX, helps retailers and distributors improve inventory accuracy, accelerate fulfillment, streamline store operations, and deliver exceptional customer experiences. This role is perfect for someone who loves simplifying complexity, excels at product‑focused storytelling, and can translate operational challenges into clear product demonstrations and solution designs. You will work closely with Sales, Product, and Delivery teams to support the entire sales cycle from discovery to demos to documentation, while ensuring prospects fully understand the value and impact of Kensium’s product ecosystem. You will become a subject‑matter expert across our POS, WMS, and OmnifiCX platforms, learning how they solve real‑world challenges across retail, distribution, and omnichannel commerce.
 



  





**Roles \& Responsibilities** 




  





**Discovery \& Scoping** 




 • Lead structured discovery calls/workshops to understand store operations, warehouse workflows, omnichannel use‑cases, fulfillment models, inventory processes, and pain points.
 



 • Map prospect requirements to capabilities within Kensium POS, Kensium WMS, and OmnifiCX, identifying configuration options, integrations, and gaps.
 



 • Translate findings into clear discovery summaries, requirement matrices, and scoping inputs (assumptions, risks, dependencies, and business goals).
 



 • Understand upstream/downstream systems such as ERP, ecommerce, and 3PL apps to ensure alignment with the end‑to‑end architecture.
 



**Product\-Focused Solution Design** 
 • Create high‑level solution outlines across POS workflows, warehouse processes, and unified commerce data flows (orders, inventory, fulfillment, returns).
 



 • Recommend best practices based on product capabilities, release roadmap, and accelerators.
 



 • Build narratives that connect product features to customer outcomes like inventory accuracy, pick/pack efficiency, omnichannel speed, store performance, and customer experience metrics.
 



**Demos \& PoCs** 




 • Configure demo environments for POS, WMS, and OmnifiCX based on prospect industry (retail, distribution, hybrid B2B/B2C).
 



 • Deliver clear, engaging product demonstrations that speak to operational, IT, and executive audiences.
 



 • Support product trial environments or lightweight PoC setups when required.
 



 • Address questions around feature behavior, integration options, data flows, extensibility, mobile/handheld devices, offline behavior, and reporting.
 



**Technical Documentation and Proposal Support** 




 • Own product‑specific technical content in proposals, RFP responses, and SOWs.
 



 • Document workflows, integration points, and acceptance criteria aligned to product implementation standards.
 



 • Collaborate with Product Management to ensure positioning, licensing details, and capabilities communicated to prospects are accurate and up‑to‑date
 



**Cross\-Functional Collaboration** 




 • Partner with Product Managers to stay updated on new releases, features, and roadmap items.
 



 • Coordinate with Delivery teams for feasibility checks, edge‑case discussions, and clean hand‑offs from pre‑sales to implementation.
 



 • Work with Marketing on product demo scripts, one‑pagers, competitive comparisons, and recorded walkthroughs.
 



**Continuous Learning \& Asset Creation** 




 • Develop reusable demo flows, configuration templates, discovery frameworks, and proposal boilerplates.
 



 • Track market trends in POS, WMS, and omnichannel commerce to strengthen Kensium’s competitive positioning.
 



 • Use AI‑assisted tools to speed up diagramming, documentation, and PoC content creation.
 



  





**Experience and Skills** 




  





**Technical Expertise** 




 • 2–4 years of experience in pre‑sales, product consulting, or solution engineering roles within RetailTech, Supply Chain, or related SaaS products.
 



 • Working knowledge of retail POS, inventory management, warehouse operations, or omnichannel commerce workflows.
 



 • Familiarity with ERP systems (Acumatica, NetSuite, Sage, Microsoft Dynamics, etc.) as they relate to order, inventory, and fulfillment processes.
 



 • Understanding of integration patterns, APIs, and data flows (REST, webhooks, JSON, Postman).
 



 • Ability to read data models, troubleshoot simple configuration issues, or demo functional flows (no heavy coding required).
 



  





**Pre\-Sales Excellence** 




 • S Strong discovery and scoping skills. Abilty to map operational challenges to product capabilities.
 



 • Confident presenter with strong demo and storytelling skills.
 



 • Proficiency in creating architecture diagrams (Lucidchart, Draw.io, Visio).
 



 • Ability to work with Sales on competitive positioning, objection handling, and ROI framing.
 



  





**Communication \& Relationship\-Building** 




 • Excellent verbal, written, and visual communication.
 



 • Ability to explain complex operational workflows simply.
 



 • Builds rapport quickly with retail leaders, warehouse managers, IT teams, and executives.
 



 • Calm, confident presence during live Q\&A and technical discussions.
 



  





  





**Minimum Qualifications** 




 ▪ Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, Supply Chain, Engineering, Business, or equivalent experience.
 



 ▪ 2–3\+ years in a pre‑sales or solutions role supporting POS, WMS, ERP, or related retail/supply‑chain technology.
 



 ▪ Ability to deliver tailored product demos and articulate technical concepts.
 



 ▪ Strong understanding of retail or warehouse operations. ▪ Excellent communication and stakeholder‑facing skills.
 



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 




 ▪ Experience supporting POS or WMS product implementations or pre‑sales cycles.
 



 ▪ Exposure to omnichannel platforms, mobile picking apps, or store‑fulfillment systems.
 



 ▪ Familiarity with retail hardware (scanners, terminals, mobile POS devices, printers).
 



 ▪ Experience with product‑focused playbooks, demo libraries, and reusable technical content.
 



 ▪ Ability to use AI or automation tools to accelerate pre‑sales work.
 



  





**Key Outcomes (First 6\-12 months)** 




 ▪ Increased win‑rate on POS/WMS/OmnifiCX opportunities.
 



 ▪ Delivery of ≥3 reusable demo/playbook assets to the pre‑sales team.
 



 ▪ Ability to independently run discovery \+ demo cycles for mid‑market prospects.
 



 ▪ Achieve ≥4\.5/5 average feedback on demos from customer stakeholders.
 



  





**What’s in it for you?** 




  





**Professional Growth \& Impact** 




**▪** 
 Become a specialist in unified commerce, retail operations, and supply‑chain technology.
 



 ▪ Influence Kensium’s product demo strategy and solution patterns.
 



  





**Learning \& Culture** 




 ▪ Work in a product‑driven environment with a team passionate about innovation and customer success.
 



 ▪ Access certifications, training programs, and cross‑functional mentorship.
 



  





**Rewards \& Recognition** 




 ▪ Competitive Compensation: Attractive salary package.
 



 ▪ Health \& Wellness: Medical insurance.
 



 ▪ Paid Time Off: Generous leave policy including vacation, and holidays.
 



 ▪ Retirement Benefits: PF, and Gratuity.
 



 ▪ Employee Engagement: Regular team events, recognition programs, and a collaborative culture that values your contributions.

2ed065eb.description:

 Req ID: 54451

**The Skills You’ll Need**
 Business Analysis
   

  

 Technology Strategy
   

  

 Market Analysis
   

  

 Presenting/Demonstrating
   

  

 Pre Sales
   

  

 Requirements Analysis

 Solution Selling

091d8032.title: Pre-Sales Architect
091d8032.description:
***hackajob** 
 is collaborating with
 **Presidio** 
 to connect them with exceptional professionals for this role.*
**Presidio, Where Teamwork and Innovation Shape the Future**
 At Presidio, we’re at the forefront of a global technology revolution, transforming industries through cutting\-edge digital solutions and next\-generation AI. We empower businesses—and their customers—to achieve more through innovation, automation, and intelligent insights.
 
**The Role**
 Presidio is hiring a Solutions Architect to work with top\-tier customers and promote Cloud Adoption and Application Modernization. As a Principal Solutions Architect, you will partner with customers, Presidio Sales, partners, and other Presidio teams to create solutions that address customer business problems and accelerate the adoption of Cloud services. In collaboration with sales, you will drive revenue growth across a broad set of customers.
   

  

**Roles And Responsibilities**
* In partnership with the sales team, formulate and execute a sales strategy to exceed revenue objectives through the adoption of Cloud and Cloud Native Strategies.
* As a key member of the sales cycle, ensure success in building, modernizing, and migrating applications, software, and services on Cloud platforms.
* Educate customers of all sizes on the value proposition of Cloud and participate in deep architectural discussions to ensure client strategies and solutions are designed for successful deployment in the cloud.
* Conduct one\-to\-few and one\-to\-many training sessions to transfer knowledge to customers considering or already operating in Cloud.
* Capture and share best\-practice knowledge amongst the solutions architect community.
* Build deep relationships with senior technical individuals and key stakeholders within customer organizations to enable them to be cloud advocates.
* Act as a technical liaison between customers, sales, service engineering teams, and partners.


**Experience And Skills**
* 7\+ years delivering consulting or advisory services.
* 10\+ years of systems engineering, software development and modernization, or application architecture experience.
* Experience designing, operating, or building AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform Solutions.
* Experience in presales or consulting roles working with large and complex customer environments.
* Working knowledge of modern, cloud\-native, and low\-code software development tools, frameworks, data services, and methodologies.
* Experience architecting and operating cloud\-based custom applications and integration solutions in complex enterprise or consumer\-focused environments.
* Experience architecting, building, and integrating AI/ML and GenAI solutions to enhance client experiences and augment enterprise applications.
* Presentation skills with a high degree of comfort speaking with executives, IT Management, and developers.
* Demonstrated thought leadership through publications and public speaking.
* Excellent communication skills with an ability to align conversations to the audience.
* Demonstrated ability to adapt to new technologies and learn quickly.
* Experience migrating or transforming legacy customer solutions to the cloud.
* Familiarity with Agile Frameworks (Scaled Agile, Kanban, Scrum) and architecture and service frameworks (ITIL, Zachman, TOGAF, etc.).
* Preferred: Familiarity with 3rd Party products for Process Automation (UiPath, Power Automate), Integration Services (e.g., Workato, MuleSoft), or Software as a Service platforms (e.g., ServiceNow, Oracle, SAP).
* Preferred: Industry\-specific experience (healthcare, financial, manufacturing, SLED, or media and entertainment)
* Preferred: Experience in DevOps automation including Infrastructure as Code.
* Preferred: Cloud Vendor Professional Certification (AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional, Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert, Google Cloud Architect)


**Shift time / Work location:**
* Expected to cover EST time zone and upto 12:30 AM
* Work location Bangalore /Chennai


- 

**Your future at Presidio**
 Joining Presidio means stepping into a culture of trailblazers—thinkers, builders, and collaborators—who push the boundaries of what’s possible. With our expertise in AI\-driven analytics, cloud solutions, cybersecurity, and next\-gen infrastructure, we enable businesses to stay ahead in an ever\-evolving digital world.
   

  

 Here, your impact is real. Whether you're harnessing the power of Generative AI, architecting resilient digital ecosystems, or driving data\-driven transformation, you’ll be part of a team that is shaping the future.
   

  

**Ready to innovate? Let’s redefine what’s next—together.**
**About Presidio**
 At Presidio, speed and quality meet technology and innovation. Presidio is a trusted ally for organizations across industries with a decades\-long history of building traditional IT foundations and deep expertise in AI and automation, security, networking, digital transformation, and cloud computing. Presidio fills gaps, removes hurdles, optimizes costs, and reduces risk. Presidio’s expert technical team develops custom applications, provides managed services, enables actionable data insights and builds forward\-thinking solutions that drive strategic outcomes for clients globally.
 **For more information, visit www.presidio.com** 
**.**
 Presidio is committed to hiring the most qualified candidates to join our amazing culture. We aim to attract and hire top talent from all backgrounds, including underrepresented and marginalized communities. We encourage women, people of color, people with disabilities, and veterans to apply for open roles at Presidio. Diversity of skills and thought is a key component to our business success.
   

  

***Recruitment Agencies, Please Note:***
 Presidio does not accept unsolicited agency resumes/CVs. Do not forward resumes/CVs to our careers email address, Presidio employees or any other means. Presidio is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes/CVs.

ba4b53a5.title: Solution Consultant-Presales PLM
ba4b53a5.description:
Our world is transforming, and PTC is leading the way. Our software brings the physical and digital worlds together, enabling companies to improve operations, create better products, and empower people in all aspects of their business.
   

  

 Our people make all the difference in our success. Today, we are a global team of nearly 7,000 and our main objective is to create opportunities for our team members to explore, learn, and grow – all while seeing their ideas come to life and celebrating the differences that make us who we are and the work we do possible.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 We are looking for a passionate
 **PLM Solutions Consultant (Presales)** 
 to join our India Solutions Consulting team. This role focuses on leveraging
 **Windchill PLM expertise** 
 to help customers unlock the value of the
 **Digital Thread** 
 and drive business transformation.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will combine
 **technical depth, business acumen, and presales experience** 
 to articulate and demonstrate the value of PLM solutions to customers.
   

  

**About The Team**
 You will be part of the
 **India Solutions Consulting team** 
 , within the
 **EMEAI Solution Organization** 
 .
   

  

 This team comprises
 **highly skilled Technical Sales Consultants** 
 who focus on:
   

  

* Understanding customer challenges
* Designing and demonstrating Windchill PLM solutions
* Supporting a diverse set of industries and use cases


**Key Responsibilities**
**Presales \& Customer Engagement**
* Act as a Windchill PLM technical expert across all presales activities
* Collaborate with Account Managers/Sales teams throughout the customer buying journey
* Engage with customers to understand requirements, processes, and pain points
* Qualify solution fit and alignment with customer needs


**Solution Design \& Demonstration**
* Architect and present end\-to\-end PLM solutions
* Deliver standard and customized product demonstrations
* Develop proof of concepts (POCs) and technical benchmarks
* Support customer value proposition development


**Sales Support Activities**
* Respond to RFI / RFP / RFQ requests
* Participate in process analysis and re\-engineering discussions
* Assist in closing new PLM opportunities


**Stakeholder \& Partner Collaboration**
* Work closely with internal teams and India\-wide sales organization
* Engage with partners, system integrators, and academic institutions


**Your Impact**
* Drive adoption and success of PTC Windchill PLM solutions
* Contribute to winning new business opportunities
* Help customers realize value from the Digital Thread
* Support long\-term customer success in a subscription\-based model


**Required Skills \& Experience**
**Education**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science, Informatics, or related field


**Experience**
* 5–10 years of experience in PLM solutions, preferably PTC Windchill
* Hands\-on experience in presales / technical consulting roles


**Technical \& Functional Skills**
* Strong understanding of Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) concepts
* Experience with solution design, demos, and customer presentations
* Ability to translate business requirements into technical solutions


**Professional Skills**
* Strong problem\-solving and analytical thinking
* Proven ability to manage timelines and deliver against milestones
* Excellent communication and presentation skills
* Willingness to travel within India


**About PTC**
 PTC delivers industry\-leading
 **digital transformation solutions** 
 , including
 **CAD, PLM, SLM, and ALM platforms** 
 .
   

  

 Our technology enables companies to connect the
 **physical and digital worlds** 
 , empowering them to:
   

  

* Innovate faster
* Optimize product development
* Enhance operational efficiency
* Unlock the full value of the Digital Thread


 Life at PTC is about more than working with today’s most cutting\-edge technologies to transform the physical world. It’s about showing up as you are and working alongside some of today’s most talented industry leaders to transform the world around you.
   

  

 If you share our passion for problem\-solving through innovation, you’ll likely become just as passionate about the PTC experience as we are. Are you ready to explore your next career move with us?
   

  

 We respect the privacy rights of individuals and are committed to handling Personal Information responsibly and in accordance with all applicable privacy and data protection laws. Review our Privacy Policy here."

2a5c36c7.title: Pre sales and post sales technical consultant
2a5c36c7.description:
**Company Description** 
 Corponizers is a corporate facilitator organization dedicated to connecting job seekers with roles that align with their skills and aspirations. The company focuses on being a trusted recruitment partner for businesses worldwide, offering exceptional service and innovative talent solutions. Corponizers promotes a culture of excellence, collaboration, and integrity, where team members are encouraged to grow and thrive. The organization is committed to supporting clients in achieving their goals through top talent acquisition, while contributing to a more equitable and diverse global workforce.
 



**Role Description** 
 This is a full\-time, on\-site role based in Bhubaneswar for a Pre\-Sales and Post\-Sales Technical Consultant. The consultant will collaborate with the sales team to understand client requirements, prepare technical presentations, and participate in product demonstrations. Day\-to\-day responsibilities include analyzing client needs, configuring solutions, supporting proposal development, and responding to technical queries during the pre\-sales phase. In the post\-sales phase, the consultant will assist with implementation support, troubleshoot technical issues, provide training to client teams, and ensure successful adoption of solutions. The role also involves maintaining accurate documentation, gathering client feedback, and working with internal teams to improve offerings and customer satisfaction.
 



**Qualifications** 







* Strong technical aptitude with the ability to understand, configure, and explain software or technology solutions to non\-technical stakeholders.
* Experience supporting sales processes, including requirements gathering, solution design, product demonstrations, and proposal or RFP response support.
* Background in post\-sales activities such as implementation support, user onboarding, basic troubleshooting, and customer success or account support.
* Solid communication and interpersonal skills, including clear written and verbal communication and the ability to build trust with clients and internal teams.
* Analytical and problem\-solving capabilities, with attention to detail and a structured approach to documenting requirements and solutions.
* Ability to work on\-site in Bhubaneswar, manage multiple client engagements, and collaborate effectively with sales, technical, and operations teams.
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Information Technology, Computer Science, Business, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* Prior experience in pre\-sales, post\-sales, technical consulting, or customer\-facing technical roles is preferred; experience in recruitment or HR solutions is an advantage.

593e9901.title: Presales Engineer
593e9901.description:
This role has been designed as ‘Hybrid’ with an expectation that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge\-to\-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Aruba** 
 is an HPE Company, and a leading provider of next\-generation network access solutions for the mobile enterprise. Helping some of the largest companies in the world modernize their networks to meet the demands of a digital future, Aruba is redefining the “Intelligent Edge” – and creating new customer experiences across intelligent spaces and digital workspaces. Join us redefine what’s next for you.
   

  

**Job Family Definition**
 Responsible for providing technical support and/or leadership in the creation and delivery of technology solutions designed to meet a customer’s business needs. Creates and maintains effective customer relationships to secure customer satisfaction. Provides the deepest level of product\- and technology\-specific expertise available to customers from anyone in the sales organization in deal pursuit situations. Aligned to specific products or product\-lines.
   

  

 The Consulting Systems Engineer is also a subject matter expert in their area of specialization (i.e., Mobility, Security, Branch, etc), responsible for consulting customers on end to end technical designs to meet their business need.
   

  

 These jobs focus on selling to customers, typically through work that occurs outside HPE offices.
   

  

**Management Level Definition**
 Contributions include applying intermediate level of subject matter expertise to solve common technical problems. Acts as an informed team member providing analysis of information and recommendations for appropriate action. Works independently within an established framework and with moderate supervision.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Provide technical guidance and leadership in designing networking solutions aligned to customer business needs.
* Act as a trusted technical advisor in deal pursuits, offering the deepest product and technology expertise within the sales organization.
* Design end\-to\-end network architectures across domains such as AIOps, Campus (Wired/Wireless), SASE, Data Center, or Routing.
* Deliver technical presentations, demos, and customer workshops to create value throughout the sales cycle.
* Partner with Account Managers and cross\-functional stakeholders to translate customer problem statements into impactful solutions.
* Influence long\-term customer network transformation aligned with business outcomes.
* Support RFP/RFI responses, solution positioning, competitive differentiation, and proof\-of\-concept engagements.
* Build and maintain strong customer relationships to drive technology thought leadership.
* Mentor junior team members and contribute to cross\-functional initiatives where required.


**What You Need To Bring**
* 9\+ years of experience in Networking, Presales, or Solution Consulting roles.
* Experience working with Government, BFSI and Enterprise customers is mandatory.
* Must have hands\-on experience in handling and managing tenders.
* Strong expertise in at least one or more networking domains:
+ AIOps
+ Campus Networking (Wired/Wireless)
+ SASE
+ Data Center Networking
+ Routing \& Switching

* Proven experience designing end\-to\-end enterprise network architectures.
* Strong customer\-facing experience with executive\-level communication skills.
* Ability to translate complex technical concepts into business outcomes.
* Experience supporting large enterprise deal pursuits and working alongside sales teams.
* Demonstrated ability to operate independently and exercise sound technical judgment.
* Strong problem\-solving skills with the ability to handle complex business scenarios.
* Preferred: Relevant industry certifications (Aruba, Cisco, SASE, Cloud, etc.).


**What We Can Offer You**
**Health \& Wellbeing**
 We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
   

  

**Personal \& Professional Development**
 We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
   

  

**Unconditional Inclusion**
 We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.
   

  

**Let's Stay Connected**
 Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.
   

  

 \#india
   

  

 \#sales
   

  

**Job**
 Sales
   

  

**Job Level**
 TCP\_03
   

  

 HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.
   

  

**Hewlett Packard Enterprise is EEO Protected Veteran/ Individual with Disabilities.**
 HPE will comply with all applicable laws related to employer use of arrest and conviction records, including laws requiring employers to consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories.
   

  

**Recruitment Fraud Alert**
 We have become aware of an increase in fraudulent recruitment activities in which individuals impersonate our company or authorized recruitment agencies to offer fake employment opportunities. These scams may occur through false websites, emails, social media, or chat\-based applications and often aim to obtain personal information or money. Please note that Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), its direct and indirect subsidiaries and affiliated companies, and its authorized recruitment agencies/vendors will never charge a candidate a registration fee, hiring fee, or any other fee in connection with its recruitment and hiring process. We also never request personal information such as back account details, Social Security numbers, or national IDs via social media or chat applications.
   

  

 All legitimate job opportunities will come through official company channels, and candidates are responsible for verifying the credentials of any third party claiming to represent the company. Any reliance on fraudulent communication is at the individual’s own risk, and HPE disclaims legal liability for any resulting damages. If you suspect recruitment fraud, do not share personal information or make any payments and report the incident to your local authorities immediately.

67674b07.title: Senior Solution Consultant - IND
67674b07.description:
**About Kinaxis**
 Elevate your career journey by embracing a new challenge with Kinaxis. We are experts in tech, but it’s really our people who give us passion to always seek ways to do things better. As such, we’re serious about your career growth and professional development, because People matter at Kinaxis.
   

  

 In 1984, we started out as a team of three engineers based in Ottawa, Canada. Today, we have grown to become a global organization with over 2000 employees around the world, and support 40,000\+ users in over 100 countries. As a global leader in end\-to\-end supply chain management, we enable supply chain excellence for all industries. We are expanding our team in Chennai and around the world as we continue to innovate and revolutionize how we support our customers.
   

  

 Our journey in India began in 2020 and we have been growing steadily since then! Building a high\-trust and high\-performance culture is important to us and we are proud to be Great Place to Work® Certified TM . Our state\-of\-the\-art office, located in the World Trade Centre in Chennai, offers our growing team space for expansion and collaboration.
   

  

**Location**
 Chennai (or) Bangalore \- Office Based
   

  

 As a member of our Consulting Team, you understand our customers’ most pressing business performance challenges and you are committed to helping our customers solve complex challenges in the distributed value chain that is prevalent in manufacturing today.
   

  

****What you will do****
* Participate in deep\-dive customer business requirements discovery sessions and develop requirements specifications documentation.
* Support Solution Architect in providing creative solutions to complex business problems while maintaining best practices.
* Guide and mentor junior consultants on the project team during project.
* Learn Maestro software and perform solution configuration.
* Perform training of customer end users on the configured solution.
* Understand supply chain industry trends and benchmark customer against the same.
* Ensure the customer is obtaining the business benefits as captured in the business case.
* Support the validation and testing of the solution and capture user feedback.
* Support data management and data integration related activities.
* Any other reasonable project related tasks as assigned by the Project Manager.


****Technologies we use****
* Excellent problem solving and critical thinking skills.
* Technical skills such as SQL, R, Java Script, Python, etc.
* Experience with manufacturing planning solutions such as Kinaxis, SAP, JDA, etc


****What we are looking for****
* A passion for working in customer facing roles and you have great interpersonal, communication, facilitation and presentation skills.
* 10 \-15 years of relevant experience understanding manufacturing, production planning and demand management in Supply chain domain with software consulting exposure..
* BS/MS/PhD in Industrial Engineering, Supply Chain, Operations Research, Computer Science, Statistics or a related field with an excellent academic record.
* Good background in Supply Chain engineering concepts and understanding of statistical forecasting, inventory management, MRP, scheduling, etc.
* Ability to learn a new application – Maestro.
* Self\-direction with ability to excel in a fast paced work environment.
* Work well in a team environment and have the ability to work effectively with people at all levels in an organization.
* Open to travel 75% on average and 100% occasionally and also can work effectively when working remotely from the client.
* Ability to communicate complex ideas effectively in English, both verbally and in writing.


 \#Intermediate \#Senior
   

  

**Work With Impact:** 
 Our platform directly helps companies power the world’s supply chains. We see the results of what we do out in the world every day—when we see store shelves stocked, when medications are available for our loved ones, and so much more.
   

  

**Work with Fortune 500 Brands:** 
 Companies across industries trust us to help them take control of their integrated business planning and digital supply chain. Some of our customers include Ford, Unilever, Yamaha, P\&G, Lockheed\-Martin, and more.
   

  

**Social Responsibility at Kinaxis:** 
 Our Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion Committee weighs in on hiring practices, talent assessment training materials, and mandatory training on unconscious bias and inclusion fundamentals. Sustainability is key to what we do and we’re committed to net\-zero operations strategy for the long term. We are involved in our communities and support causes where we can make the most impact.
   

  

 People matter at Kinaxis and these are some of the perks and benefits we created for our team:
   

  

* Flexible vacation and Kinaxis Days (company\-wide day off on the last Friday of every month)
* Flexible work options
* Physical and mental well\-being programs
* Regularly scheduled virtual fitness classes
* Mentorship programs and training and career development
* Recognition programs and referral rewards
* Hackathons


 For more information, visit the Kinaxis web site at www.kinaxis.com or the company’s blog at http://blog.kinaxis.com .
   

  

 Kinaxis strongly encourages diverse candidates to apply to our welcoming community. We strive to make our website and application process accessible to any and all users. If you would like to contact us regarding the accessibility of our website or need assistance completing the application process, please contact us at recruitmentprograms@kinaxis.com . This contact information is for accessibility requests only and cannot be used to inquire about the status of applications.

ccbfe191.title: Product Solution Engineer Apps, gTech Ads CX
ccbfe191.description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following:
 **Gurugram, Haryana, India; Hyderabad, Telangana, India** 
 .
 **Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor’s degree in Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics, or equivalent practical experience.
* 2 years of experience troubleshooting, advocating for customers' needs, and triaging technical issues (e.g., hardware, software, application, operational, process).
* Experience reading code in a general purpose coding language (e.g., Java, C, C\+\+, Python, Shell, Go, JavaScript) or in system design.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* 3 years of experience in a technical project management or a customer\-facing role.
* Experience developing customer\-focused solutions including: troubleshooting, finding new processes or product features.
* Experience in the online media landscape.


**About the job** 
 The Google Cloud Platform team helps customers transform and build what's next for their business — all with technology built in the cloud. Our products are developed for security, reliability and scalability, running the full stack from infrastructure to applications to devices and hardware. Our teams are dedicated to helping our customers — developers, small and large businesses, educational institutions and government agencies — see the benefits of our technology come to life. As part of an entrepreneurial team in this rapidly growing business, you will play a key role in understanding the needs of our customers and help shape the future of businesses of all sizes use technology to connect with customers, employees and partners.
   

  

 Google creates products and services that make the world a better place, and gTech’s role is to help bring them to life. Our teams of trusted advisors support customers globally. Our solutions are rooted in our technical skill, product expertise, and a thorough understanding of our customers’ complex needs. Whether the answer is a bespoke solution to solve a unique problem, or a new tool that can scale across Google, everything we do aims to ensure our customers benefit from the full potential of Google products.
   

  

 To learn more about gTech, check out our video .
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Prioritize and deliver outstanding customer service throughout the customer journey, troubleshooting and resolving issues with Google's advertisers and Sales teams, agencies and partners.
* Apply deep product expertise solving complex technical customer issues and escalations and carrying out strategic projects.
* Analyze data and insights to identify systemic improvement opportunities, own and execute projects to lead improvements in product, technology, operational process, policy and customer awareness.
* Engage with Google advertisers, product, engineering, policy and sales teams, agencies, and partners to build relationships and foster collaborative problem\-solving.
* Partner with our Sales, Agency, and other cross\-functional partner teams to own and continuously improve the journey of all clients across, resolve complex issues and understand customer pain points.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

bbe33419.title: Senior Terraform Architect
bbe33419.description:
**Job Description**

**About Persistent**

  

We are an AI\-led, platform\-driven Digital Engineering and Enterprise Modernization partner, combining deep technical expertise and industry experience to help our clients anticipate what’s next. Our offerings and proven solutions create a unique competitive advantage for our clients by giving them the power to see beyond and rise above. We work with many industry\-leading organizations across the world, including 20 Fortune 50 companies and 4 of the 5 top banks in both the US and India, and numerous innovators across the healthcare ecosystem.

  

Our disruptor’s mindset, commitment to client success, and agility to thrive in the dynamic environment have enabled us to sustain our growth momentum. Persistent has been recognized across top industry platforms for innovation, leadership, and inclusion. We reported $1,654\.4M FY26 revenue with 17\.4% Y\-o\-Y growth. We have delivered 24 sequential quarters of growth with $436\.0M in Q4 FY26 revenue, up 3\.2% Q\-o\-Q and 16\.2% Y\-o\-Y growth. Our 27,500\+ global team members, located in 18 countries, have been instrumental in helping the market leaders transform their industries. We have been recognized as the Fastest Growing IT Services Brand Globally in the 2026 Brand Finance IT Services 25 Report. We named a Leader in the Everest Group Private Equity (PE) Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2026 and Software Product Engineering PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2026\.

 **About Position:**

  

We are looking for a highly experienced Principal Terraform Architect to lead enterprise\-scale Infrastructure as Code (IaC) strategy on AWS. This role is pivotal in defining Terraform governance, establishing reusable cloud patterns, and enabling large\-scale cloud migration and modernization programs through automation and standardization.

* **Role: Senior Terraform Architect**
* **Location: All PSL (Pan India – Persistent locations)**
* **Experience: 16\+ years**
* **Job Type: Full Time Employment**

 **What You'll Do:**

  

* Define and govern enterprise\-wide Terraform module library strategy
* Design scalable, reusable, and secure infrastructure patterns across AWS services
* Establish standards for naming conventions, tagging frameworks, and module development
* Ensure compatibility with Terraform v1\.5\+ and AWS Provider v5\.x\+
* Lead implementation of GitOps\-driven Terraform delivery pipelines
* Define CI/CD standards including validation, linting, security scanning, and testing workflows
* Architect and manage Terraform state using S3 and DynamoDB
* Implement policy\-as\-code and governance controls for infrastructure provisioning
* Pattern Development \& Governance
* Develop reusable patterns across:
* Compute (EC2, ECS, EKS, Lambda)
* Networking (VPC, Transit Gateway, Route53, Load Balancers, CloudFront)
* Storage (S3, EBS, EFS, FSx)
* Databases (RDS, DynamoDB, Aurora, ElastiCache)
* Security (IAM, KMS, Security Groups, WAF)
* Drive consistency, scalability, and compliance across cloud environments
* Conduct architecture and code reviews to ensure best practices
* Mentor platform engineers and Terraform practitioners
* Drive architecture decisions and maintain Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)
* Ensure alignment with HashiCorp and enterprise governance standards
* Enable cloud migration teams with reusable Terraform modules and frameworks
* Provide hands\-on support for troubleshooting, customization, and PR reviews
* Collaborate with cloud, security, and platform engineering teams
* Continuous Improvement
* Optimize modules and infrastructure patterns for:
* Performance
* Security
* Cost efficiency
* Operational scalability

 **Expertise You'll Bring:**

  

* 15\+ years of IT and cloud engineering experience
* 6\+ years of enterprise\-scale Terraform architecture experience
* Proven experience building and managing large Terraform module libraries
* Strong experience in AWS multi\-account governance environments
* Terraform (HCL) and Terraform Cloud/Enterprise
* AWS services including EC2, VPC, IAM, EKS, Lambda, RDS, DynamoDB
* Deep understanding of AWS Control Tower and Account Factory for Terraform (AFT)
* Experience implementing scalable, reusable IaC patterns and frameworks
* Strong exposure to CI/CD, GitOps practices, and cloud automation
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
* AWS Solutions Architect – Professional
* HashiCorp Terraform Associate

 **Benefits:**

  

* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Culture focused on talent development with quarterly growth opportunities and company\-sponsored higher education and certifications
* Opportunity to work with cutting\-edge technologies
* Employee engagement initiatives such as project parties, flexible work hours, and Long Service awards
* Annual health check\-ups
