48f8e969.title: AVP – Sys Admin & AI Solution Architect (L10)
48f8e969.description:
**Overview**
------------


* Location: Hyderabad, India; Pune, India; Delhi, India; Bengaluru, India; Kolkata, India
* Salary: N/A
**About Us**
------------


Synchrony is more than a financial services company, we’re a team of passionate innovators committed to delivering best\-in\-class solutions that support millions of customers across the U.S. With a bold focus on technology, data, and digital innovation, we create meaningful experiences that simplify lives and enable financial wellness.


When you join Synchrony, you become part of an inclusive culture where your voice matters, your growth is championed, and your work drives impactful results.


**Job Description**
-------------------


Job ID
2601947
Category
Technology
Date posted
07/14/2026  

  

**Role Title:****AVP \- Sys Admin \& AI Solution Architect (L10\)**


**Company Overview:**


Synchrony (NYSE: SYF) is a leading consumer financing company that has been at the heart of American commerce and opportunity for nearly a century. Synchrony delivers credit and banking products that empower tens of millions of consumers to improve their financial lives and access what matters most. Leveraging innovative solutions that are shaping the future of retail commerce, Synchrony supports the growth and success of some of the nation’s most respected brands, alongside hundreds of thousands of small and midsize businesses, including health and wellness providers. Committed to excellence in service and culture, Synchrony is proud to be named as \#3 as a Great Place to Work® in India and is honored to be ranked the \#1 Best Company to Work For® in the U.S. by Fortune magazine and Great Place to Work®. For more information, visit www.synchrony.com.


**Organizational Overview**: This role is within Source to Pay (S2P) organization in Synchrony. The Source\-to\-pay is the entire end\-end\-end process involved in procurement. It spans every process, from spend management, strategic sourcing, and third\-party risk management to contract management, purchasing, performance management and accounts payable. Our goal is to source high value products, software, and services that accelerate our growth, our new way of working, speed our innovations to market, and make us even more responsive to partners and customers.


**Role Summary/Purpose**:


As AVP \- Sys Admin \& AI Solution Architect, you will be the Process Improvement Expert for AI within Source to Pay (S2P) organization. This includes building agents, launching preconfigured agents, and understanding where the best opportunities are to improve and connect processes in Synchrony. Also, you will have the opportunity to work closely with stakeholders and our AI working group to configure Procurement, Sourcing, Risk \& Contracts modules of Synchrony’s Coupa system as per Synchrony’s Source to Pay organizations requirements. You will also collaborate with IT teams and Coupa teams for ticketing processes and fixing any issues.


**Key Responsibilities:**

* Be a Process Improvement expert for AI within Source to Pay (S2P) organization in Synchrony and align with Coupa’s roadmap for AI Agents and collaborate with S2P cross functional teams and AI working group as part of enabling AI related functionalities in Coupa system as needed.
* Experience in implementing Gen AI features and creating AI agents in any other widely used procurement applications
* Coordinate with Coupa team to provide all the requirements for Source to Pay use cases if any of that need to be built within Coupa Agent Studio.
* Have hands\-on experience in configuring Procurement / Sourcing modules – CLMA, Sourcing, and Supplier Management, for new implementations and continuous improvement projects
* Develop and maintain configuration timelines, documentation
* Review release notes for Coupa releases and propose process efficiencies in the system
* Lead the process to sanity check and test E2E new configurations along with defect tracking matrix for documentation and resolution of defects
* Collaborate with Coupa support team for resolution of any product issues/defects while being active on Coupa Community to request new enhancements and to track the progress of new AI related features
* Assist in projects as required to support Source to Pay organization initiatives and mentor other team members to deepen understanding of AI concepts

**Required Skills/Knowledge:**


* Graduate or Post\-Graduate in any discipline with 5\+ years of overall work experience in IT industry, or in lieu of a degree 7\+ years of overall work experience in IT industry
* Minimum 5\+ years of business knowledge in Procurement, Supplier Management, Contracts (CLMA), Sourcing, Accounts Payable
* 3\+ years of experience in implementation of AI / Gen AI features, and Orchestration tools in any widely used procurement applications.
* High level of familiarity and understanding of AI/ML, Deep Learning and Gen AI concepts

**Desired Skills/Knowledge:**


* Enthusiasm to learn and keep oneself updated about happenings in the AI domain, especially in Procurement industry
* Ability to take responsible and ethical decisions while implementing AI features
* Ability to handle sensitive issues with uncompromising integrity and confidentiality
* Excellent Communication and Collaboration skills

**Eligibility Criteria:**


* Graduate or Post\-Graduate in any discipline with 5\+ years of overall work experience in IT industry, or in lieu of a degree 7\+ years of overall work experience in IT industry.

**Work Timings:** 5:30 AM EST – 2:30 PM EST (3PM IST \- 12 AM IST)


(WORK TIMINGS: This role qualifies for Enhanced Flexibility offered in Synchrony India and will require the incumbent to be available between 06:00 AM Eastern Time – 11:30 AM Eastern Time (timings are anchored to US Eastern hours and will adjust twice a year locally). This window is for meetings with India and US teams. The remaining hours will be flexible for the employee to choose. Exceptions may periodically due to business needs)We are proud to offer flexibility at Synchrony. Our way of working allows you the option to work from home or workspaces in our Regional Engagement Hubs—Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Pune, Kolkata, or Delhi/NCR. As directed by the management, you will be required to commute or travel to Hyderabad or one of the Regional Engagement Hubs for in\-person engagement activities such as business/ team meetings, trainings, and events


**For Internal Applicants:**


Understand the criteria or mandatory skills required for the role, before * ing

Inform your manager and HRM before * ing for any role on Workday
* Ensure that your professional profile is updated (fields such as education, prior experience, other skills) and it is mandatory to upload your updated resume (Word or PDF format)
* Must not be on any corrective action plan (First Formal/Final Formal, LPP)
* L9\+ Employees who have completed 18 months in the organization and 12 months in current role and level are only eligible.
* L9\+ Employees can

**Grade/Level****: 10**


Job Family Group:


Information Technology

c35ea331.title: Solution Architect (Upto 25 LPA)
c35ea331.description:
**Solution Architect**
**Location:** 
 Hybrid (Surat, Gujarat)
   

  

**Salary Range:** 
 ₹20,00,000 \- ₹25,00,000 per annum
   

  

**Experience:** 
 6\+ Years
   

  

**Job Overview**
 We are seeking a skilled and experienced
 **Solution Architect** 
 to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will design end\-to\-end scalable technology solutions, align technical strategies with business objectives, and guide engineering teams in implementing robust system architectures. This position requires a strong combination of technical expertise, solution design capabilities, and stakeholder collaboration skills to drive successful project execution across enterprise and product\-based environments.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Architecture Design: Define and design scalable, secure, and high\-performing system architectures that meet business requirements.
* Technical Strategy Alignment: Collaborate with stakeholders to align technical strategies with business objectives and ensure successful project execution.
* Team Guidance: Lead and guide engineering teams in the implementation of architectural standards and best practices.
* Technology Evaluation: Evaluate and recommend technology stacks that are future\-ready and aligned with industry trends.
* Documentation: Create and maintain comprehensive architecture documentation and standards.
* Stakeholder Collaboration: Work closely with product managers, developers, and other stakeholders to ensure alignment and understanding of architectural decisions.


**Required Skills \& ExperienceCore Technical Skills**
* Experience: 8\+ years of software engineering experience with at least 2\+ years in an Architecture role.
* Architecture Expertise: Strong experience in Solution Architecture, System Design, and Enterprise Architecture.
* System Understanding: Strong understanding of system architecture, solution design, and enterprise application integration.
* Cloud Platforms: Experience working with cloud platforms such as AWS or Azure cloud architecture.
* Caching Technologies: Experience with caching technologies such as Redis.
* Queue Systems: Experience with queue systems such as RabbitMQ, Kafka, SQS, or Service Bus.
* Microservices Knowledge: Strong knowledge of microservices architecture, REST APIs, and distributed systems.
* Database Familiarity: Familiarity with SQL and NoSQL databases and modern backend/application frameworks.
* Optimization Principles: Understanding scalability, security, reliability, and performance optimization principles.


 Functional Strengths
   

  

* Analytical Skills: Ability to analyze business problems and design practical, scalable technical solutions.
* Problem\-Solving: Strong problem\-solving and decision\-making capabilities.
* Security Knowledge: Strong understanding of security architecture, authentication, authorization, and OWASP best practices.
* Agile Experience: Experience working in Agile and cross\-functional development environments.
* Project Management: Ability to manage multiple projects and architecture initiatives simultaneously.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Certifications such as TOGAF, AWS, Azure, or Solution Architecture.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.


 What We Offer
   

  

* Competitive salary and benefits package.
* Opportunity to work in a hybrid environment.
* A collaborative and innovative work culture.
* Opportunities for professional growth and development.


 If you are passionate about technology and have a proven track record in solution architecture, we encourage you to apply and join our team in shaping the future of technology solutions.
   

  

 Skills: azure cloud architecture,architecture,togaf,solution architect,service bus,aws,rabbitmq,rest apis,sqs

3813ea8b.title: AWS Cloud Platform Specialist
3813ea8b.description:
**Who we are** 




 At Cerebrent, we design impactful experiences for our clients worldwide in various domains and emerging technologies. With an aggressive growth strategy, we are on our way to being a globally relevant, distributed, full\-service software solutions organization with our group companies Clarient, Millipixels, UX Insights, and Evantiv.
 



  





**Job Summary** 




 As an AWS Cloud Platform Specialist, you will ensure the security and stability of our clients' AWS infrastructure. You will work closely with DevOps and Platform teams to ensure that large\-scale production environments run smoothly and that our clients meet compliance requirements. You will also manage AWS storage solutions, monitoring and alerting, and backup and recovery processes.
 



 Proven experience in running production environments for high\-traffic web environments on AWS is an absolute requirement.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Mitigate security non\-compliances identified by Security Hub and other tools.
* Attend to AWS Request for Actions (RFAs) promptly and efficiently.
* Decommission infrastructure safely and ensure proper documentation and communication.
* Replace our current AWS “NAS” storage solution and provide ongoing support.
* Architect and implement monitoring, logging, and alerting across the new infrastructure.
* Improve our AWS backup and recovery processes to minimize downtime and data loss.
* Provide business\-as\-usual (BAU) support for AWS tasks.



  





**Qualifications** 



* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
* At least 5\-6 years of experience in AWS in a production setting.
* Experience with AWS tracing and analysis, including CloudTrail and X\-Ray.
* Hands\-on experience architecting solutions around AWS Storage, including S3, EBS, and Glacier.
* Strong understanding of AWS security best practices and compliance requirements.
* Experience with AWS monitoring and alerting tools, including CloudWatch and CloudTrail.
* Experience with backup and recovery processes in AWS.
* Familiarity with AWS networking and infrastructure components.
* Excellent problem\-solving and communication skills.
* AWS certification is a definite plus.



  





**Benefits** 



* Work in our FlexCampus model \- have the freedom to work from anywhere \- your home, our FlexCampus sites in Chandigarh, New Delhi, Mumbai, or Bangalore (more coming soon)
* Choose your own working times \- focus on delivering targets, not on time spent.
* Medical Health Insurance \- Company Paid Health insurance for ₹500,000 (with additional COVID hospitalization coverage). Option to extend to Spouse and/or other immediate dependents on cost.
* Company\-paid participation in Industry\-specific Seminars and Events
* Regular Financial, Tax\-Saving, and Healthcare Advice Sessions from Experts, as well as Tax\-saving Sodexo Meal Cards
* Technical Certification Reimbursements up to ₹1,00,000 (One Lac).
* Generous paid vacation (split over the course of the year, with tons of time off during Diwali and Christmas/New Year)



  





 If you are a highly skilled Senior AWS Cloud Architect with a passion for AWS and a desire to work with a dynamic team, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity.

2f07a6dc.title: Advisory Solution Consultant
2f07a6dc.description:
**Company Description**  

It all started when engineer Fred Luddy wrote code that automated a tedious task for his coworker, Phyllis. She cried tears of joy. That moment inspired Fred to build a company that could do that for everyone—freeing people from busywork so they could focus on meaningful work. Today, ServiceNow is the AI control tower for business reinvention. Our ServiceNow AI platform brings together any AI, any data, and any workflow— helping 85% of the Fortune 500® work smarter, faster, and better. We're building an AI\-native culture where technology and talent are unstoppable together. And we're just getting started.


Join us to put AI to work for people.

 **Job Description**  

As a member of our Solution Consulting team, you will have a major impact on our future success by supporting \[Employee Experience, Customer Workflow, ITX] Solution Sales. You will guide revenue for one of our products with the support and partnership of Sales, Product Management, and the executive team. This is a hands\-on technical consultant who can go wide and deep on solution delivery and solution positioning during sales cycles.

**What you get to do in this role:**


The Solution Consultant is a technical consultant with the advanced ability to develop, position and provide product\-specific solutions during sales cycles while achieving quarterly and annual sales goals for an assigned territory.

* Support product sales as a technical and domain expert of a client\-facing sales team
* Lead discovery workshops to determine customers' challenges and give product demonstrations to align our solution with customer needs
* Answer product feature and technical questions from customers, channel partners and ServiceNow colleagues
* Provide feedback to product management about product enhancements that can address customer needs and provide additional value
* Share and learn best practices and re\-usable assets with other Solution Consultants to enhance the quality and efficiency of the team
* Stay current on competitive analysis and market differentiation
* Support marketing events including executive briefings, conferences, user groups, and trade shows

  

**Qualifications** **To be successful in this role you have:**

* Experience in leveraging or critically thinking about how to integrate AI into work processes, decision\-making, or problem\-solving. This may include using AI\-powered tools, automating workflows, analyzing AI\-driven insights, or exploring AI's potential impact on the function or industry.
* 7\+ years of pre\-sales solution consulting or sales engineering experience
* Proficiency with the ServiceNow platform or technical expertise with cloud software solutions
* Experience working collaboratively with product management, product marketing, partners, and professional services
* Territory management skills, including pipeline building and working with Sales counterpart to guide execution excellence
* Travel, as necessary

  

FD21

 **Additional Information** **Work Personas**


We approach our distributed world of work with flexibility and trust. Work personas (flexible, remote, or required in office) are categories that are assigned to ServiceNow employees depending on the nature of their work and their assigned work location. Learn more here. To determine eligibility for a work persona, ServiceNow may confirm the distance between your primary residence and the closest ServiceNow office using a third\-party service.

**Equal Opportunity Employer**


ServiceNow is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, gender identity, veteran status, or any other category protected by law. In addition, all qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with legal requirements.

**Accommodations**


We strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are unable to use this online application and need an alternative method to apply, please contact globaltalentss@servicenow.com for assistance.

**Export Control Regulations**


For positions requiring access to controlled technology subject to export control regulations, including the U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR), ServiceNow may be required to obtain export control approval from government authorities for certain individuals. All employment is contingent upon ServiceNow obtaining any export license or other approval that may be required by relevant export control authorities.


From Fortune. ©2026 Fortune Media IP Limited. All rights reserved. Used under license.

9b1e2cdd.title: Cloud Engineer
9b1e2cdd.description:
**JOB RESPONSIBILITIES** 




  





 • Operate as the lead infrastructure engineer in close daily partnership with Omni’s Senior Security Infrastructure
 



 Engineer, who provides technical direction, conducts security review, and signs off on significant infrastructure
 



 decisions before they reach production.
 



 • Run and modernize Omni’s Azure environment, including compute, networking, identity, Azure App Services,
 



 Azure SQL, Microsoft WAF, Azure Virtual Desktop and Windows 365, and Azure Monitor.
 



 • Own the Windows Server fleet end\-to\-end: provisioning, patching cadence, Group Policy and Active Directory
 



 operations, lifecycle planning, and end\-of\-support migrations.
 



 • Own Microsoft 365 license allocation and Azure subscription management across Omni’s multi\-tenant
 



 environment, including license assignment and recovery, subscription and tenant governance, cost visibility, and
 



 ongoing right\-sizing.
 



 • Modernize the infrastructure\-as\-code practice. Propose tooling and patterns for joint review with the Senior
 



 Security Infrastructure Engineer, and incrementally bring infrastructure under code with security guardrails built
 



 in from the start.
 



 • Partner with the senior developer and broader development team to extend modern CI/CD patterns from
 



 application code into infrastructure deployment, and to design systems that scale securely as the business grows.
 



 • Work closely with Omni’s security team and managed SOC on hardening, vulnerability remediation, identity
 



 controls, endpoint protection through SentinelOne, and compliance evidence.
 



 • Cross\-train into the security workstreams the Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer manages day\-to\-day,
 



 including endpoint detection and response, SASE and ZTNA networking, SIEM, and the managed SOC’s tooling,
 



 so the two roles can back each other up across disciplines.
 



 • Manage observability across Datadog and Azure Monitor, including alerting, on\-call signal hygiene, and runbook development.
 



 • Maintain the homegrown line\-of\-business application infrastructure (Azure App Services, Azure SQL, and Microsoft WAF).
 



 • Run day\-to\-day business continuity and disaster recovery operations within Omni’s defined RPO and RTO targets. Maintain DR runbooks and run periodic failover and tabletop exercises.
 



 • Build and maintain runbooks, architecture diagrams, and change records so the environment can be supported by anyone on the team.
 



 • Partner with Omni’s co\-managed MSP as a shared delivery team across day\-to\-day operations and escalations,rather than treating the MSP as an outside vendor.
 



 • Provide escalation support to internal end users for infrastructure\-impacting tickets routed through the helpdeskand the co\-managed MSP.
 



 • Participate in an after\-hours rotation covering monthly maintenance windows and incident response, and co\-leadpost\-incident reviews. Formalizing the rotation is part of the role, in partnership with the Senior SecurityInfrastructure Engineer.
 



  





**KNOWLEDGE, SKILLS AND ABILITIES** 




 • 8\+ years of cloud engineering experience, with significant Azure depth.
 



 • 3\+ years operating Windows Server environments at production scale.
 



 • Hands\-on experience with hybrid identity, including Active Directory, Group Policy, and Entra ID, in a Windows\-centric environment.
 



 • Strong cloud and hybrid networking experience, including firewall change management, network segmentation,cross\-tenant routing, IPsec and SSL VPN, NSGs, and subnet design.
 



 • Experience operating to defined RPO and RTO targets, including DR runbook maintenance and failover testing.
 



 • Strong infrastructure\-as\-code experience. Terraform preferred, with openness to Azure\-native equivalents such as Bicep or ARM templates.
 



 • Demonstrated ability to modernize engineering practices in close collaboration with security counterparts,
 



 partnering on the final shape of the practice rather than dictating it.
 



 • Comfort operating in a role where a security peer reviews and signs off on significant infrastructure decisions, and
 



 where outcomes are defined jointly rather than independently.
 



 • Comfort cross\-training across infrastructure and security disciplines, holding a primary area of focus while
 



 providing secondary coverage of the other.
 



 • Track record of partnering closely with security and development teams to ship and operate software safely and at
 



 scale.

 **end\-to\-end lifecycle from strategy → operationalization → scaled adoption** 
 , ensuring enterprise\-wide value realization







**2\. Key Responsibilities** 




*a. Transformation Program Leadership* 



* Drive
 **end\-to\-end AI\-led digital/process transformation** 
 and define AI first Target Operating Models
* Deliver measurable outcomes across
 **cost, productivity, cycle time, and customer experience**







*b. GenAI \& Agentic AI Strategy* 



* Identify and prioritize
 **high\-value AI transformation use cases (copilots, agentic workflows, decisioning)**
* Enable evolution from
 **human\-in\-loop → semi\-autonomous → fully autonomous enterprise operations**







*c. Operationalizing AI with Delivery Teams* 



* Embed AI into
 **delivery workflows** 
 , integrating with enterprise systems and establishing
 **run models, SLAs, and continuous improvement loops**
* Drive
 **POC → pilot → industrialization → scale** 
 , with playbooks for repeatable deployment across delivery environments







*d. Adoption \& Change Management* 



* Navigate adoption challenges (resistance, skills gaps, integration complexity) and drive
 **enterprise\-wide adoption strategy**
* Track and optimize
 **adoption KPIs (usage, productivity, ROI)** 
 through governance, training, and stakeholder alignment







*e. Technical Program Management* 



* Lead execution across
 **architecture, engineering, deployment, and scaling** 
 for GenAI and agentic solutions
* Manage cross\-functional teams and ensure
 **Agile/product\-led delivery with quality, velocity, and risk control**







*f. Value Realization \& Governance* 



* Define and track
 **business KPIs and value realization (cost savings, productivity, automation levels)**
* Ensure
 **responsible AI governance** 
 (security, compliance, explainability, risk management)







*g. Go to Market \& Portfolio expansion* 



* Drive
 **opportunity mapping across portfolios/accounts** 
 and support pre\-sales, solutioning, and client engagement
* Scale solutions through
 **reusable assets, cross\-portfolio adoption, and repeatable transformation models**







*h. Stakeholder Engagement* 



* Act as
 **trusted advisor to client and delivery leadership** 
 , leading executive governance and steering forums
* Bridge business, technology, and operations to
 **align strategy with execution and adoption**







**3\. Qualifications** 









*a. Experience \& Technical* 



* 10\+ years in
 **process/digital transformation and program management** 
 , with proven experience in
 **scaling AI/automation initiatives in enterprise environments**
* 2\+ years of hands\-on understanding of
 **GenAI/LLMs, agent frameworks, cloud platforms, and enterprise integration architectures.**







*b. Leadership \& Delivery* 



* Expertise in
 **Agile/product\-led delivery** 
 with experience managing global, cross\-functional teams
* Strong stakeholder management, problem\-solving, and
 **executive communication skills**

91ed15bf.title: Technical Program Manager, Sports, Search Vertical
91ed15bf.description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree in a technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience in program management.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* 5 years of experience managing cross\-functional or cross\-team projects.
* Ability to drive technical projects from conception to completion.
* Ability to translate complex data into clear insights for both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
* Ability to whiteboard solutions, connect technical concepts, and build practical tools even when off\-the\-shelf options aren't available.

**About the job**
-----------------


A problem isn’t truly solved until it’s solved for all. That’s why Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you’ll use your technical expertise to lead complex, multi\-disciplinary projects from start to finish. You’ll work with stakeholders to plan requirements, identify risks, manage project schedules, and communicate clearly with cross\-functional partners across the company. You're equally comfortable explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical tradeoffs in product development with engineers.


As a Technical Program Manager, you will act as a key strategic leader driving complex, high\-impact initiatives. You will lead multiple horizontal programs across SVT Sports. You will be responsible for bringing structure to ambiguous, long\-term programs, starting from conceptual phase all the way to global launch.  

  

The Sports landscape at Google is highly horizontal, requiring deep coordination across an ecosystem of engineering, product, UX, and partnership teams. You will navigate cross\-functional and cross\-organization dependencies, manage downstream change management, and drive consensus among senior stakeholders across disparate groups globally.

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Drive strategy, planning, and execution of complex Sports initiatives from conception to global launch.
* Structure ambiguous, multi\-quarter programs into clear objectives and manageable engineering work streams.
* Build consensus and align senior leaders across disparate groups and global sites.
* Map horizontal dependencies, proactively mitigate program risks, and manage escalations to unblock delivery.
* Translate business goals to technical designs, representing program health and helping evaluate scale and design trade\-offs. Establish metrics and data\-driven feedback loops to identify and implement process improvements across the organization.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

8167db3b.description:

 Privy by IDfy.
   

  

 Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure seamless delivery of technical solutions.

 Own and manage the end\-to\-end product integration lifecycle, from requirement gathering to
   

  

 go\-live.
   

  

 Act as the single point of contact for product\-related queries and escalations during

 Collaborate with internal teams (product, engineering, sales) and external stakeholders to meet

 Build strong relationships with enterprise clients, ensuring alignment on project goals and
   

  

 timelines.
   

  

 Serve as the go\-to product specialist for all IDfy product suite.
   

  

 Provide in\-depth technical insights on how solutions can be configured to meet complex

 Facilitate and oversee all aspects of testing, including User Acceptance Testing (UAT), to
   

  

 ensure successful deployments.
   

  

 Proactively identify risks and troubleshoot issues during the integration process.

0bbad3fc.title: AI Architect - Cross Functional
0bbad3fc.description:
**Req ID:** 381433
  
  

NTT DATA strives to hire exceptional, innovative and passionate individuals who want to grow with us. If you want to be part of an inclusive, adaptable, and forward\-thinking organization, apply now.
  
  

We are currently seeking a AI Architect \- Cross Functional to join our team in Bangalore, Karnātaka (IN\-KA), India (IN).
  
  

AI Solution Architect
  
NTT DATA is a trusted global innovator of business and technology services, helping clients innovate, optimize, and transform for success. We strive to hire exceptional, innovative, and passionate individuals who want to grow with us. If you want to be part of an inclusive, adaptable, and forward\-thinking organization, apply now.
  
  

**Overview:**  

The AI Solution Architect designs fit\-for\-purpose AI solutions for qualified opportunities, aligned to client requirements, NTT DATA offering standards, commercial expectations, and delivery capabilities. This role owns the practical translation of client needs into solution blueprints, scope, work estimates, phasing, timelines, pricing inputs, SOW content, and delivery handoff materials. The AI Solution Architect partners closely with AI Consultants, Principal Architects, FDE, Delivery, Finance, Commercial, Sales, and ecosystem partners.
  
  

**Key Responsibilities:**  

* Design AI solutions aligned to client requirements, NTT DATA standards, and delivery capabilities.
* Define scope, approach, solution blueprints, technical architectures, assumptions, dependencies, risks, and success criteria.
* Build work estimates across roles, effort, skills, locations, tooling, platforms, and delivery dependencies.
* Define workplan timelines, delivery phases, milestones, and MVP\-to\-scale implementation paths.
* Partner with delivery, finance, and commercial teams to shape pricing inputs, deal economics, margin assumptions, and commercial options.
* Support SOW development by defining scope boundaries, deliverables, acceptance criteria, dependencies, and change\-control considerations.
* Validate feasibility, implementation approach, resourcing model, integration complexity, data readiness, security, governance, and operational support requirements.
* Incorporate partner platforms and models into solution designs where relevant.
* Support technical QA, client demos, solution walkthroughs, proposal defense, and transition from pursuit to delivery.
* Contribute reusable estimates, patterns, BOMs, workplans, solution artifacts, and lessons learned into the global AI GTM knowledge base.


**Success Measures:**  

* Pursuit deal volume, measured as total TCV value of AI deals where the AI Solution Architect supported.
* Pursuit win rate for AI deals where the AI Solution Architect supported.
* Utilization or billability against target.
* Estimate quality, solution feasibility, commercial accuracy, and successful handoff into delivery.


**Basic Qualifications:**  

* 5\+ years of experience in solution architecture, technology consulting, software engineering, data engineering, systems integration, presales, or delivery roles.
* 3\+ years of experience designing or delivering AI, data, analytics, ML, GenAI, agentic AI, or automation solutions.
* 1\+ year of hands\-on or solutioning experience with GenAI, LLMs, RAG, AI agents, or enterprise AI platforms.
* Experience producing solution blueprints, work estimates, delivery plans, staffing models, assumptions, dependencies, SOW inputs, and pricing or commercial inputs.
* Working knowledge of cloud, data, integration, application architecture, security, responsible AI, governance, and operational support considerations.
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent work experience.


**Preferred Skills:**  

* Experience with Azure, AWS, GCP, OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral, Google/Gemini, Databricks, Snowflake, vector databases, orchestration frameworks, and MLOps/LLMOps tooling.
* Experience supporting large pursuits, proposal development, pricing reviews, or delivery mobilization.
* AI/ML, cloud, data platform, architecture, or security certifications.
* Strong analytical thinking, commercial judgment, written communication, cross\-functional collaboration, and client\-facing presentation skills.
* Ability to travel as required for client and internal engagements.


About NTT DATA
  
  

NTT DATA is a $30 billion business and technology services leader, serving 75% of the Fortune Global 100\. We are committed to accelerating client success and positively impacting society through responsible innovation. We are one of the world's leading AI and digital infrastructure providers, with unmatched capabilities in enterprise\-scale AI, cloud, security, connectivity, data centers and application services. our consulting and Industry solutions help organizations and society move confidently and sustainably into the digital future. As a Global Top Employer, we have experts in more than 50 countries. We also offer clients access to a robust ecosystem of innovation centers as well as established and start\-up partners. NTT DATA is a part of NTT Group, which invests over $3 billion each year in RD.
  
  

Whenever possible, we hire locally to NTT DATA offices or client sites. This ensures we can provide timely and effective support tailored to each client’s needs. While many positions offer remote or hybrid work options, these arrangements are subject to change based on client requirements. For employees near an NTT DATA office or client site, in\-office attendance may be required for meetings or events, depending on business needs. At NTT DATA, we are committed to staying flexible and meeting the evolving needs of both our clients and employees. NTT DATA recruiters will never ask for payment or banking information and will only use @nttdata.com, @nttdatafed.com and @talent.nttdataservices.com email addresses. If you are requested to provide payment or disclose banking information, please submit a contact us form, https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact\-us.
  
  

NTT DATA endeavors to make https://us.nttdata.com accessible to any and all users. If you would like to contact us regarding the accessibility of our website or need assistance completing the application process, please contact us at https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact\-us. This contact information is for accommodation requests only and cannot be used to inquire about the status of applications. NTT DATA is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status. For our EEO Policy Statement, please click here. If you'd like more information on your EEO rights under the law, please click here. For Pay Transparency information, please click here.

9ba0443e.title: Solutions Director
9ba0443e.description:
Chennai, Tamil Nadu
  
Job Summary
  
Roles \& Responsibilities
  
Own end\-to\-end responses to large/strategic RFPs / RFIs / RFQs as the lead solution architect, taking accountability for the win theme across the deal.
  
Lead and review proposal documents, pricing strategy, effort estimation, and solution presentations for large or multi\-tower Oracle Cloud deals, mentoring junior presales consultants on quality and rigor.
  
Lead due diligence, discovery, and executive\-level workshops with customer CXOs/IT leadership to shape deal scope, win strategy, and commercial construct.
  
Architect and defend winning, enterprise\-grade techno\-commercial solutions spanning Oracle Cloud ERP (Financials, Procurement, Order Management), SCM, and EPM, including complex multi\-pillar and multi\-geography deployments.
  
Act as a trusted advisor on emerging Oracle Cloud capabilities, quarterly updates, and AI Agents/Redwood innovations, shaping how the practice positions and differentiates them in the market.
  
Own the narrative and delivery of executive\-level presentations and reference architectures, including client CXO briefings and orals defense for competitive pursuits.
  
Partner with delivery leadership, industry\-vertical, and alliance (Oracle) teams to align solution design with commercial strategy and delivery feasibility at an account/portfolio level.
  
Contribute to practice\-building activities — capability development, reusable assets/accelerators, competitive positioning, and mentoring of presales talent.
  
Be willing to travel as required to lead client engagements, orals, and presales activities, including in front of senior client stakeholders.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
Experience
  
Overall 15–20\+ years of IT experience, with a minimum of 8–10 years of experience in Oracle Cloud Applications (ERP/SCM/EPM), including a demonstrated track record of leading large, complex Oracle Cloud implementation or transformation programs.
  
6–10\+ years of experience in a presales/consulting/solution\-selling leadership role, with ownership of large deal pursuits, pricing strategy, and executive\-level client engagement.
  
Demonstrated experience leading or mentoring a presales team, and building/owning reusable solution assets, accelerators, or points of view for the practice.
  
**Certification:** Oracle Cloud certifications in Financials, SCM, or EPM (e.g., Oracle Financials Cloud: Payables/Receivables/GL Certified Implementation Specialist).
  
  

Experience
  
Overall 15–20\+ years of IT experience, with a minimum of 8–10 years of experience in Oracle Cloud Applications (ERP/SCM/EPM), including a demonstrated track record of leading large, complex Oracle Cloud implementation or transformation programs.
  
6–10\+ years of experience in a presales/consulting/solution\-selling leadership role, with ownership of large deal pursuits, pricing strategy, and executive\-level client engagement.
  
Demonstrated experience leading or mentoring a presales team, and building/owning reusable solution assets, accelerators, or points of view for the practice.
  
**Certification:** Oracle Cloud certifications in Financials, SCM, or EPM (e.g., Oracle Financials Cloud: Payables/Receivables/GL Certified Implementation Specialist).
  
Skill Requirements
  
Education
  
BE/B.Tech, or equivalent and MBA/PGDM or CA/ICWA
  
Technical Skills
  
Strong command of economic analysis — TCO, ROI \& feasibility assessments — and ability to structure commercial constructs (fixed price, T\&M, outcome\-based) for large deals.
  
Thought leadership on emerging technologies (Generative AI, Oracle AI Agents, cloud infrastructure) and their application to Oracle solution streams, including original points of view for client advisory.
  
Extensive experience in the presales function (techno\-commercial), with a track record of ownership across the full pursuit lifecycle from qualification through orals and negotiation.
  
Interpersonal Skills
  
Excellent written and oral communication skills, with the ability to engage confidently with Senior Client leaders
  
Strong executive presence, presentation, and negotiation skills.
  
Ability to translate complex technical solutions into business\-value narratives for senior, non\-technical stakeholders.
  
Ability to lead multiple concurrent pursuits and effectively prioritize under high\-pressure, deadline\-driven conditions.
  
Strong people leadership — able to mentor and develop junior presales talent, and build a collaborative, high\-performing pursuit team.
  
Confident and credible in handling escalations, defending the proposed solution, and negotiating commercial/technical trade\-offs directly with customers.

6a941cf1.title: SRE Architect
6a941cf1.description:
Make an impact with NTT DATA
  
Join a company that is pushing the boundaries of what is possible. We are renowned for our technical excellence and leading innovations, and for making a difference to our clients and society. Our workplace embraces diversity and inclusion – it’s a place where you can grow, belong and thrive.
  
  

Your day at NTT DATA
  
The Architecture Consultant is a seasoned level expert who is responsible for participating in the delivery of multi\-technology consulting services to clients by providing strategies and solutions on all aspects of infrastructure and related technology components.
  
  

This role collaborates with other stakeholders on the development of the architectural approach for one or more layer of a solution. This role has the primary objective is to work on strategic projects that ensure the optimal functioning of the client’s technology infrastructure.
  
  

**Key responsibilities:**  

* Brings subject matter expertise related multi\-technology infrastructure design best practice.
* Works in partnership with internal stakeholders on the development of the architectural approach for one or more layer of a solution.
* Participates in the investigation, planning, coordination, and preparation of feasibility studies relative to new computer\-based systems and modifications to existing systems.
* Works on strategies and solutions that define meta\-architectural designs for solutions, addressing the styles, mechanisms and principles that combine to formulate the architectural vision for a specific environment.
* Collaborates with stakeholders on the development of new services to take to market, information on relevant vertical markets and keep up to date on developments in specific technology domains.
* Participates in the pre\-sales process.
* Engages with clients directly and collaborates with sales on selling solutions and services.
* Participates in the delivery of business development processes including opportunity identification, presales, scoping, deal closing and driving delivery.
* Designs principal methodologies to perform a detailed analysis of the client requirements.
* Presents clients with solutions and convinces and persuades internal and external stakeholders of the right course of action.


**To thrive in this role, you need to have:**  

* Ability to focus on detail with an understanding of how it impacts the business strategically.
* Excellent client service orientation.
* Ability to work in high\-pressure situations.
* Ability to establish and manage processes and practices through collaboration and the understanding of business.
* Ability to create new and repeat business for the organization.
* Ability to contribute information on relevant vertical markets
* Ability to contribute to the improvement of internal effectiveness by contributing to the improvement of current methodologies, processes and tools.


**Academic qualifications and certifications:**  

* Bachelor's degree or equivalent in Information Technology and/or Business Management or a related field.
* Scaled Agile certification desirable.
* Relevant consulting and technical certifications preferred, for example TOGAF.


**Required experience:**  

* Seasoned demonstrable experience in a similar role within a large scale (preferably multi\- national) technology services environment.
* Seasoned multi\-technology infrastructure design experience.
* Seasoned demonstrable level of expertise coupled with consulting and client engagement experience, demonstrating good experience in client needs assessment and change management.


**Workplace type:** Hybrid Working
  
  

About NTT DATA
  
NTT DATA is a $30 billion business and technology services leader, serving 75% of the Fortune
  
  

Global 100\. We are committed to accelerating client success and positively impacting society through
  
  

responsible innovation. We are one of the world’s leading AI and digital infrastructure providers, with
  
  

unmatched capabilities in enterprise\-scale AI, cloud, security, connectivity, data centers and
  
  

application services. Our consulting and industry solutions help organizations and society move
  
  

confidently and sustainably into the digital future. As a Global Top Employer, we have experts in more
  
  

than 70 countries. We also offer clients access to a robust ecosystem of innovation centers as well as
  
  

established and start\-up partners. NTT DATA is part of NTT Group, which invests over $3 billion each
  
  

year in RD.
  
  

Equal Opportunity Employer
  
NTT DATA is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer with a global culture that embraces diversity. We are committed to providing an environment free of unfair discrimination and harassment. We do not discriminate based on age, race, colour, gender, sexual orientation, religion, nationality, disability, pregnancy, marital status, veteran status, or any other protected category. Join our growing global team and accelerate your career with us. Apply today.
  
  

Third parties fraudulently posing as NTT DATA recruiters
  
  

NTT DATA recruiters will never ask job seekers or candidates for payment or banking information during the recruitment process, for any reason. Please remain vigilant of third parties who may attempt to impersonate NTT DATA recruiters whether in writing or by phone in order to deceptively obtain personal data or money from you. All email communications from an NTT DATA recruiter will come from an nttdata.com email address. If you suspect any fraudulent activity, please contact us.

 engagement information

 team

 Head

4458e0db.title: Executive - Presales
4458e0db.description:
**Company Description** 
 Kumar Corp is a long\-established real estate and construction group with over 60 years of industry presence. The company has successfully delivered more than 140 projects, serving over 43,000 customers. With over 38 million square feet of built space, Kumar Corp has a strong track record in residential and commercial development. Applicants can expect to join a stable organization with established processes, diverse projects, and a large, growing customer base.
   

**Role Description** 
 The Executive – Presales role is a full\-time, on\-site position based in the Pune District. The role involves qualifying and nurturing leads, coordinating with the sales team, and supporting them with presales activities and documentation. Daily responsibilities include responding to customer queries, preparing and organizing information for RFPs or proposals, creating presentations, and ensuring prospective customers receive timely and accurate information about projects. The Executive – Presales will work closely with sales, marketing, and customer service teams to improve conversion rates and enhance the overall presales experience. The role also includes maintaining presales reports, updating CRM or lead management tools, and participating in site visits or client meetings as needed.
   

**Qualifications**
* Candidates should possess strong Lead Generation capabilities, including prospecting, qualifying leads, and managing lead pipelines.
* Candidates should possess effective Communication skills, including clear verbal and written communication and professional presentation abilities.
* Candidates should possess foundational Sales skills, such as understanding customer needs, supporting deal closures, and collaborating with the sales team.
* Candidates should possess experience with RFP and proposal support, including organizing data, preparing responses, and coordinating inputs from internal stakeholders.
* Candidates should possess solid Customer Service skills, including handling inquiries, providing accurate information, and maintaining a customer\-centric approach.
* Relevant qualifications such as a bachelor’s degree in business, marketing, or a related field are beneficial.
* Prior experience in real estate, construction, or a similar industry, and familiarity with CRM tools or lead management systems are an advantage.
* Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work on\-site in the Pune District are required.

a6b85784.title: Presales Manager (Hardware Only)
a6b85784.description:
**About us:** 




 We provide a single point of contact for all your traceability needs from technical consulting to implementation to support. We harness the power of Barcode, RFID, Vision, Cognitive Computing, IoT, Predictive Analysis and emerging technologies to enable our clients integrate their supply chains and facilitate end\-to\-end visibility and connectivity.
 



 We are currently seeking Sr. Pre\-sales Consultant, who will support the Government Business team in evaluating, and responding to government tenders and RFPs. The role involves preparing technical proposals, ensuring compliance with tender requirements, coordinating with internal teams, and assisting in bid strategy development.
 



 The candidate will work closely with sales, engineering, and Vendors teams to ensure accurate and timely bid submissions for government and public sector opportunities.
 



  





  





**Job Description :** 
 Manager Presales (Hardware products only)
 



  





**Location :** 
 Mumbai (Goregaon)
 



  





 Key responsibilities:
 



**Responsibilities** 




  




* **Solution Design \& Delivery:**
* Conduct site surveys, analyse customer requirements, and design customized solutions that meet business objectives.
* Develop Bill of Materials (BoM), plan solution architecture, and ensure alignment with best practices and industry standards.
* Create and deliver compelling proof of concept (PoC) demonstrations, addressing key client pain points.
* Ensure that proposed solutions adhere to the statement of work (SoW) and deliver maximum value to the customer.
* 
* **Technical \& Market Analysis:**
* Analyze Request for Information (RFI) and Request for Proposal (RFP) documents to understand client requirements and perform fit\-gap analysis with internal teams.
* Collaborate with software development teams to ensure alignment between the customer’s requirements and the technical capabilities of the proposed solution.
* Stay updated on market trends, competitive landscapes, and emerging technologies to refine solution approaches.
* 
* **Sales Collaboration \& Deal Closure:**
* Work closely with sales teams to ensure successful closure of deals by providing technical expertise, support, and addressing any concerns.
* Assist in drafting proposals and providing detailed technical input for client presentations.
* Support sales in responding to technical inquiries during the sales cycle.
* 
* **Client Feedback \& Product Development:**
* Act as a liaison between clients and product management teams to convey product feedback, feature requests, and pain points.
* Contribute to the product roadmap by aligning client needs with future product enhancements.
* 
* **Technical Expertise \& Leadership:**
* Maintain in\-depth knowledge of AIDC (Automatic Identification and Data Capture) hardware, cloud technologies, IT infrastructure, and enterprise software design principles.
* Provide technical guidance on Microsoft’s technology stack including Windows Server, .Net, SQL Server, and Microsoft Azure, ensuring solutions leverage modern IT frameworks.
* 
* **Continuous Improvement \& Market Awareness:**
* Keep abreast of technological advancements, emerging market trends, and competitor offerings to refine and adapt the solution design approach.
* Participate in industry conferences, product training, and market research initiatives to enhance expertise.



  





**Qualifications** 




  




* Proven experience in designing enterprise solutions involving hardware and IT infrastructure.
* Strong knowledge of cloud computing platforms, particularly Microsoft Azure.
* Should possess a Degree in Computer Science, Engineering or a related field.
* Should have prior experience within AIDC hardware \& software solutions.
* Experience working on RFI/RFP processes and conducting fit\-gap analysis.
* Excellent communication skills, capable of translating complex technical concepts into client\-friendly language.
* Ability to collaborate with cross\-functional teams and influence product direction based on client needs.
* Should have strong presentation skills.
* Strong problem\-solving and analytical skills with a client\-centric approach.



  





 CTC Offered \- 10 lpa

1efe3cdd.title: Principal Staff Software Engineer - Linkedin Sales Solutions
1efe3cdd.description:
LinkedIn is the worlds largest professional network, built to create economic opportunity for every member of the global workforce. Our products help people make powerful connections, discover exciting opportunities, build necessary skills, and gain valuable insights every day. Were also committed to providing transformational opportunities for our own employees by investing in their growth. We aspire to create a culture thats built on trust, care, inclusion, and fun where everyone can succeed.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 This role will be based in Bengaluru, India.
   

  





 At LinkedIn, our approach to flexible work is centered on trust and optimized for culture, connection, clarity, and the evolving needs of our business. The work location of this role is hybrid, meaning it will be performed both from home and from a LinkedIn office on select days, as determined by the business needs of the team.
   

  





 Key Responsibilities:
   

  




* You will build and ship software, drive architectural decisions and implementation across distributed applications, make architectural trade\-offs applying synchronous and asynchronous design patterns, write code, and deliver with speediness and quality.
* Develop multi\-tier scalable, high\-volume performing, and reliable user\-centric applications that operate 24x7\.
* Produce high quality software that is unit tested, code reviewed, and checked in regularly for continuous integration.
* You will actively improve the level of craftsmanship at LinkedIn by developing best practices and defining best strategies.
* You will lead cross team/cross\-functional discussions and drive alignment on product/technology strategy.
* You will define the bar for quality and efficiency of software systems while balancing business impact, operational impact and cost benefits of design and architectural choices.
* You will act as one of the primary domain experts to influence technology choices.
* You will lead by example to build a culture of craftsmanship and innovation.


**Qualifications**

 Basic Qualifications
   

  




* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering or equivalent experience.
* 18\+ years of experience in software design/development
* 18\+ years experience in/with programming skills in languages such as Python, Java, or C\+\+



 Preferred Qualifications
   

  




* Expert knowledge of computer science, with strong competencies in data structures, algorithms, and software design.
* Experience with object\-oriented design, coding, testing patterns, and programming languages (Java, C\+\+).
* Proven coding skills in a high level language with interest and ability to learn other coding languages as needed.
* Experience with large scale automation across key enterprise personas
* Proven track record of leading and delivering complex software projects.
* Excellent problem\-solving and analytical skills.
* Strong communication and collaboration skills and ability to work in a fast\-paced, dynamic environment.
* Experience building web applications and services with IDEs, ant, Junit, etc.
* Experience with relational databases (transactional and non\-transactional), database architecture, and distributed transaction management.



 Suggested Skills
   

  




* Technical Leadership
* Distributed Systems
* Software Design
* Technical Communication
* Cross\-organizational collaboration



 You will Benefit from our Culture
   

  





 We strongly believe in the well\-being of our employees and their families. That is why we offer generous health and wellness programs and time away for employees of all levels.
   

  

  

  




**Additional Information**

**India Disability Policy**




 LinkedIn is an equal employment opportunity employer offering opportunities to all job seekers, including individuals with disabilities. For more information on our equal opportunity policy, please visit https://legal.linkedin.com/content/dam/legal/Policy\_India\_EqualOppPWD\_9\-12\-2023\.pdf

8a4d7a7c.title: Solutions Assistant
8a4d7a7c.description:
**JOB DESCRIPTION**  

  

  

We have an opportunity to impact your career and contribute to an innovative digital wealth platform. J.P. Morgan Personal Investing (JPMPI) is a leading digital wealth manager focused on empowering clients with guidance and investment solutions. You will play a key role in supporting Wealth Services by enabling seamless client servicing and sales lifecycle execution. This role offers exposure to global teams and the ability to work closely with senior wealth professionals. Join a collaborative and fast\-paced environment focused on delivering high\-quality client outcomes.
As a Wealth Services – Senior Associate within J.P. Morgan Personal Investing, you will support the Wealth Services team by enabling operational, analytical, and client servicing activities across the sales lifecycle. You will act as an extension of the UK\-based team, partnering closely with Wealth Managers, Senior Wealth Managers, and Wealth Consultants. You will provide administrative and analytical support while ensuring accurate execution of processes and reporting. You will contribute to CRM management, campaign execution, and sales enablement initiatives. This role requires strong collaboration, attention to detail, and the ability to operate effectively in a dynamic environment.
J.P. Morgan Personal Investing (JPMPI) is the firm's digital wealth manager, providing clients with accessible investment guidance and solutions. The India team operates as an extension of the UK\-based Wealth Services team, supporting end\-to\-end sales lifecycle activities. Team members support advisors by delivering operational, analytical, and reporting capabilities while maintaining a strong focus on client service excellence.
Job Responsibilities:* Manage CRM activities by recording opportunities in Salesforce and maintaining accurate data
* Support financial administration, including funding processes and reconciliation activities
* Conduct competitor and market analysis to identify trends and opportunities
* Manage transfer processes, including follow\-ups with providers and clients
* Support client engagement activities, including documentation and administrative requirements
* Prepare presentations and materials for client meetings, including research and portfolio insights
* Produce business reports, including monthly and quarterly performance reviews
* Enhance CRM and sales processes by improving reporting, analytics, and operational efficiency
* Support development and execution of outbound campaigns and distribution channel activities
* Analyze data to support financial planning, campaign effectiveness, and performance tracking
* Deliver actionable insights to stakeholders based on data analysis and reporting

Required Qualifications, Capabilities, and Skills:* Experience in a similar role supporting financial services, wealth management, or sales operations
* Strong understanding of client servicing and sales lifecycle processes
* Ability to manage CRM systems and maintain data accuracy
* Strong analytical skills with ability to interpret and present data effectively
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills
* Strong stakeholder management and collaboration skills
* Ability to work independently in a fast\-paced and demanding environment
* High attention to detail and strong organizational skills
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools including Excel, PowerPoint, Word, and Teams
* Understanding of confidentiality and client data sensitivity




Preferred Qualifications, Capabilities, and Skills:* Advanced degree or relevant qualification such as MBA, CFA, CA, or FRM
* Experience with analytics and visualization tools such as Tableau or Alteryx
* Familiarity with digital wealth management platforms or financial advisory environments
* Strong problem\-solving and critical thinking capabilities
* Experience working with global teams across multiple regions
* Interest in financial markets and investment advisory processes
* Ability to adapt quickly to changing business needs and priorities

**ABOUT US**  

  

  

JPMorganChase, one of the oldest financial institutions, offers innovative financial solutions to millions of consumers, small businesses and many of the world's most prominent corporate, institutional and government clients under the J.P. Morgan and Chase brands. Our history spans over 200 years and today we are a leader in investment banking, consumer and small business banking, commercial banking, financial transaction processing and asset management.  

  

We recognize that our people are our strength and the diverse talents they bring to our global workforce are directly linked to our success. We are an equal opportunity employer and place a high value on diversity and inclusion at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of any protected attribute, including race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, marital or veteran status, pregnancy or disability, or any other basis protected under applicable law. We also make reasonable accommodations for applicants' and employees' religious practices and beliefs, as well as mental health or physical disability needs. Visit our FAQs for more information about requesting an accommodation.

  

  

  

**ABOUT THE TEAM**
  

  

Our professionals in our Corporate Functions cover a diverse range of areas from finance and risk to human resources and marketing. Our corporate teams are an essential part of our company, ensuring that we're setting our businesses, clients, customers and employees up for success.

918bbe9a.title: Presales Solutions Architect
918bbe9a.description:
**This role is for one of the Weekday's clients**
 Min Experience: 8\+ years
   

  

 Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India, Delhi, India
   

  

 JobType: full\-time
   

  

 We are seeking an experienced
 **Presales Solutions Architect** 
 to lead end\-to\-end customer engagements for cloud transformation initiatives. In this customer\-facing role, you will partner with enterprise clients to understand business challenges, design cloud solutions, develop compelling technical and commercial proposals, and support successful deal closures. You will collaborate closely with sales, solution architects, and partner ecosystems to deliver value\-driven cloud transformation strategies while building long\-term customer relationships.
   

  

**Requirements**
**Key Responsibilities**
* Own the complete presales lifecycle for cloud transformation opportunities, from lead qualification through proposal submission and technical closure.
* Conduct customer discovery workshops to understand business objectives, IT environments, current challenges, and modernization requirements.
* Present solution architectures, cloud strategies, and business value propositions to CIOs, CTOs, and senior business stakeholders.
* Prepare and manage responses to RFPs, RFIs, and RFQs in collaboration with technical and commercial teams.
* Develop comprehensive techno\-commercial proposals, including solution scope, pricing models, commercial structures, and implementation approaches.
* Work closely with solution architects to translate customer requirements into scalable, technically sound cloud solutions.
* Build and nurture relationships with enterprise customers to identify new business opportunities and expand existing engagements.
* Collaborate with cloud partners and technology vendors to create joint solutions and strengthen deal execution.
* Support customer presentations, solution demonstrations, commercial discussions, and contract negotiations.
* Maintain accurate presales pipeline information, CRM records, forecasts, and opportunity tracking.
* Represent the organization at customer events, webinars, conferences, and industry forums.
* Contribute to reusable proposal templates, solution playbooks, competitive positioning materials, and presales best practices.
* Stay informed about cloud pricing models, migration programs, incentive offerings, and commercial frameworks to optimize customer proposals.


**Required Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.
* Proven experience in cloud presales, solution consulting, or technical sales.
* Strong understanding of public cloud platforms, particularly AWS services and cloud transformation strategies.
* Hands\-on experience conducting customer discovery sessions and solution workshops.
* Experience preparing RFP, RFI, and RFQ responses for enterprise customers.
* Expertise in creating techno\-commercial proposals, solution documentation, and pricing models.
* Strong stakeholder management skills with the ability to engage senior business and technology leaders.
* Knowledge of cloud migration, modernization, hybrid cloud, managed services, and digital transformation initiatives.
* Excellent presentation, communication, negotiation, and relationship management skills.
* Experience working with CRM platforms and managing presales pipelines.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* AWS Cloud Practitioner or equivalent cloud certification.
* AWS Business Professional or AWS Solutions Architect Associate certification.
* Familiarity with the AWS Well\-Architected Framework and cloud migration best practices.
* Understanding of FinOps principles and cloud cost optimization.
* Knowledge of application modernization, microservices, containerization, and Kubernetes.
* Experience working across industries such as BFSI, Healthcare, Retail, or Digital\-native organizations.
* Exposure to enterprise architecture frameworks such as TOGAF.
* Familiarity with cloud migration incentive programs and commercial funding models.


**Must\-Have Skills**
* Technical Presales
* Cloud
* AWS


**Good\-to\-Have Skills**
* Cloud Migration
* Modernization
* Digital Transformation

05f25e4a.title: SFMC Architect
05f25e4a.description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.


**Your Role**
-------------


We are looking for a seasoned **Digital Marketing Architect / Salesforce Marketing Cloud (SFMC) Architect** with 15\+ years of overall experience, including 8\+ years in SFMC architecture and digital marketing transformation. The role involves leading enterprise\-scale marketing initiatives, designing agentic AI\-driven marketing strategies, and driving customer engagement transformation across industries.


**Your Profile**
----------------


* Expertise in **SFMC architecture** and end\-to\-end Martech ecosystems
* Strong in **Agentic AI\-driven marketing, automation, and data\-led transformation**
* Hands\-on across SFMC modules and **omnichannel personalization strategies**
* Experience in **enterprise integrations (CRM, CDP, APIs)** and scalable solution design
* Proven ability to **lead digital marketing initiatives, CoE setup, and governance**
* Strong stakeholder management, **pre\-sales consulting**, and client engagement skills
* Focus on **data privacy, compliance**, and measurable business outcomes
* **SFMC certifications preferred**
**What you'll love about working here**
---------------------------------------


* You can shape your career with us. We offer a range of career paths and internal opportunities within Capgemini group. You will also get personalized career guidance from our leaders.
* You will get comprehensive wellness benefits including health checks, telemedicine, insurance with top\-ups, elder care, partner coverage or new parent support via flexible work.
* At Capgemini, you can work on cutting\-edge projects in tech and engineering with industry leaders or create solutions to overcome societal and environmental challenges.
Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.
