5a1b9e29.title: Technical Architect
5a1b9e29.description:
**Job Description** 




**Position: Technical Architect – Java** 




**Company:** 
 Anoud Technologies
 



**Experience:** 
 10 – 15 Years
 



**Location:** 
 Chennai (Work from Office)
 



**Employment Type:** 
 Full\-Time
 



  





**About the Role** 




  





**Anoud Technologies** 
 is looking for an experienced
 **Technical Architect – Java** 
 to lead the architecture and design of enterprise applications.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Own
 **end\-to\-end architecture and solution design** 
 for enterprise applications.
* Stay actively involved in
 **coding, debugging, and critical production issue resolution** 
 — this is a hands\-on architecture role, not a purely advisory one.
* Design scalable application architecture, including
 **High\-Level Design (HLD) and Low\-Level Design (LLD)** 
 , using microservices, APIs, and event\-driven patterns.
* Drive
 **multi\-application and third\-party integrations** 
 , including APIs, payment systems, and external services.
* Lead
 **cloud transformation initiatives** 
 , including migration from on\-premise infrastructure to
 **AWS / Azure / Kubernetes** 
 .
* Ensure
 **high performance, scalability, availability, and security** 
 across all systems.
* Implement
 **performance optimization strategies** 
 such as caching, asynchronous processing, and database tuning.
* Drive
 **R\&D and innovation through POCs** 
 , including areas such as:
* Chatbots / Typebots
* Document management systems
* WhatsApp and API integrations
* Explore and integrate
 **AI / GenAI use cases** 
 into products and platforms.
* Translate business requirements into
 **scalable technical solutions** 
 (solution architecture).
* Lead
 **technical governance** 
 through code reviews, design reviews, and enforcement of best practices.
* **Mentor and guide engineering teams** 
 , and independently resolve complex technical challenges.
* Own
 **end\-to\-end delivery** 
 , including CI/CD pipelines, deployments, and release stability.
* Continuously evaluate and adopt
 **new technologies and architecture improvements** 
 .



**Technical Skills Required** 




**Core Language** 



* Strong hands\-on experience in
 **Java**
* **Java 21** 
 – basic working knowledge of newer language features (records, pattern matching, virtual threads, etc.) is expected



**Frameworks** 



* **Spring Framework** 
 – solid understanding of layered architecture and modules (Spring Core, Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Spring Data, Spring Security, Spring Cloud, etc.)



**Architecture \& Design** 



* Practical understanding of
 **Microservices architecture** 
 — knowing when and where to apply it (not just theoretical knowledge)
* Experience with
 **monolithic to microservices migration** 
 for legacy systems



**Messaging \& Streaming** 



* Working knowledge of
 **Apache Kafka** 
 and use\-case identification for messaging/event\-driven architecture
* Exposure to
 **Message Queues** 
 (Kafka / RabbitMQ / ActiveMQ or similar)



**Database** 



* Strong experience with
 **Oracle DB** 
 as the backend database
* Understanding of DB integration with messaging queues



**Caching** 



* Hands\-on experience with
 **Redis** 
 for caching implementation



**DevOps / Tools** 



* Proficiency with
 **Git** 
 for source control and branching strategies
* Experience with
 **Jenkins** 
 for CI/CD pipeline setup and management



**Cloud \& Integrations** 



* Experience with cloud platforms —
 **AWS / Azure** 
 — and containerization/orchestration using
 **Kubernetes**
* Experience leading
 **on\-premise to cloud migration** 
 initiatives
* Hands\-on experience with
 **API and third\-party integrations** 
 (payment gateways, external services, WhatsApp/API integrations, etc.)



**Good to Have** 



* **Basic knowledge of AI** 
 (AI\-assisted development tools, LLM integration basics, or applied AI/GenAI concepts) is an added advantage
* Exposure to building
 **chatbots/typebots** 
 or
 **document management systems**



**Ideal Candidate Profile** 



* Strong balance of
 **architecture ownership \+ hands\-on coding** 
 — comfortable owning HLD/LLD as well as writing code and fixing production issues.
* Comfortable working on
 **POCs, R\&D, and rapid prototyping** 
 to validate new ideas and technologies.
* Experience leading
 **cloud transformation** 
 (on\-premise to AWS/Azure/Kubernetes).
* Experience driving
 **legacy modernization** 
 initiatives (monolith → microservices).
* Curious and current on
 **AI/GenAI trends** 
 , with an interest in applying them to real products.
* A
 **go\-getter** 
 attitude — proactive, ownership\-driven, and comfortable navigating ambiguity.
* Strong problem\-solving, communication, and stakeholder management skills.



**Qualifications** 



* Bachelor's/master’s degree in computer science, Engineering, or related field.
* 10–15 years of relevant experience in Java application development, with proven experience in technical/solution architecture.

965808cc.title: Solution Architect
965808cc.description:
**About Punctuations** 




  





 Punctuations is a fast\-growing AI\-focused technology company specializing in chatbot development, AI vision, and content generation using Large Language Models (LLMs). Our mission is to empower clients through intelligent automation and data\-driven solutions. We are a team of 30\+ engineers and innovators who thrive on solving complex problems and delivering measurable impact.
 



  





**What You'll Do** 




  




* **Technical Representation:** 
 Lead technical discovery calls with global clients, translating business needs into robust technical requirements.
* **Architecture \& Design:** 
 Design end\-to\-end systems, from data ingestion and LLM orchestration to scalable cloud deployments.
* **Win the Room:** 
 Partner with leadership to create technical proposals, project roadmaps, and rate cards that demonstrate our expertise.
* **Lead the Build:** 
 Work closely with the development team to ensure the architectural vision is executed with precision.
* **The Final Go\-To:** 
 Serve as the ultimate technical escalation point, debugging complex issues and setting the standard for code quality.



  





**What We’re Looking For** 




  




* **Deep Technical Breadth:** 
 You have a background in full\-stack development and cloud architecture (AWS/Azure/GCP), with a proven track record in AI/ML solutioning.
* **The "Consultant" Mindset:** 
 You can explain "vector databases" or "latency trade\-offs" to a CEO just as easily as you can to a Senior Developer.
* **Experience in Services:** 
 You understand the fast\-paced nature of an agency/service environment and how to manage multiple client technical stacks simultaneously.
* **Leadership Presence:** 
 You’ve led teams before, not just by managing tasks, but by setting the technical standard.
* **Veteran Status:** 
 You have successfully taken an AI product from a prototype to a live, production environment.



  





**Why Join Punctuations?** 




  




* **Real Ownership:** 
 At a 30\-person company, your fingerprints are on everything. You define the standards; you don't just follow them.
* **The AI Frontier:** 
 Work at the absolute cutting edge of AI Vision and LLM orchestration. No legacy maintenance here—just building the future.
* **Impact Over Bureaucracy:** 
 We value speed and results. You’ll have a direct line to leadership and the autonomy to choose the best tools for the job.
* **The Vasai Advantage:** 
 Forget the 3\-hour Mumbai commute. Enjoy a high\-intensity, global tech career right here in Vasai, offering a significantly better quality of life.



  





**How to Apply** 




  





 If you are a technical visionary who still loves to get their hands dirty, we want to talk to you.
 



  





 If you prefer to email your CV, please send it to careers@punctuations.ai

bdf22cee.title: RPA Architect
bdf22cee.description:
We are seeking a
 **Solution Architect** 
 with strong expertise in Intelligent Automation, RPA, and Applied AI to define solution strategies and architecture for enterprise transformation initiatives.
 



 The ideal candidate will be responsible for translating business concepts into scalable technology solutions, developing technical roadmaps, and creating clear execution plans. This is an Individual Contributor role requiring strong technical depth, structured thinking, and exceptional documentation skills.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Partner with business and technology stakeholders to understand opportunities and challenges
* Translate business requirements and concepts into actionable solution architectures and implementation roadmaps
* Design scalable solutions leveraging Automation Anywhere, Applied AI, Generative AI, and Intelligent Automation technologies
* Define architecture patterns, standards, and best practices
* Create solution design documents, architecture diagrams, technical blueprints, and executive presentations

* Strong hands\-on experience with Automation Anywhere and enterprise automation solutions
* Experience designing Applied AI and Generative AI solutions

95f93b60.title: Solution Architect
95f93b60.description:
The purpose of this role is to create solution architectures for systems and platforms ensuring all relevant options are explored for time, cost and compliance to the company’s standards, policies and practices whilst meeting the business’ requirements. The role will oversee the work of other architects and delivery of the solution for clients both internal and external, shepherding it through the relevant governance.
   

  

 We are seeking an experienced Solution Architect to design and deliver enterprise\-grade cloud solutions with deep expertise in AWS, Qualtrics, and enterprise experience platforms. This role combines technical architecture, hands\-on development, and direct client engagement to build scalable, secure integration solutions across banking, telecom, automotive, healthcare and aviation sectors. The ideal candidate will drive end\-to\-end solutioning from requirements gathering through implementation and serve as a trusted advisor to global clients on platform customization, data flow automation, and cloud\-native transformation.
   

  

**Job Description:**
**Qualtrics Solution Architect**
 We are seeking an experienced Solution Architect to design and deliver enterprise\-grade cloud solutions with deep expertise in AWS, Qualtrics, and enterprise experience platforms. This role combines technical architecture, hands\-on development, and direct client engagement to build scalable, secure integration solutions across banking, telecom, automotive, healthcare and aviation sectors. The ideal candidate will drive end\-to\-end solutioning from requirements gathering through implementation and serve as a trusted advisor to global clients on platform customization, data flow automation, and cloud\-native transformation.
   

  

 Qualtrics Solution Architect We are seeking an experienced Solution Architect with 15\+ years of experience, to design and deliver enterprise\-grade cloud solutions with deep expertise in Qualtrics, AWS, and enterprise experience platforms. This role combines technical architecture, hands\-on development, and direct client engagement to build scalable, secure integration solutions across banking, telecom, automotive, healthcare and aviation sectors. The ideal candidate will drive end\-to\-end solutioning from requirements gathering through implementation and serve as a trusted advisor to global clients on platform customization, data flow automation, and cloud\-native transformation. Key Responsibilities a. Discovery – Requirements Ownership
   

  

* Support pre\-sales activities including proposal development, solution architecture, scoping, effort estimation, and client presentations
* Partner with business stakeholders to capture requirements and deliver technical solutions that prioritize performance, security, and scalability.
* Document requirements, decisions, and trade\-offs clearly to ensure alignment across client and delivery teams. b. Design – End\-to\-End Solution Design
* Architect end\-to\-end cloud\-native solutions using AWS services (Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, S3\) and integrate with platforms such as Qualtrics, CRM, and enterprise data warehouses
* Develop complete solution architectures covering applications, integrations, data flow, infrastructure, and APIs.
* Lead the design and architecture of Qualtrics XM solutions (CX, EX, PX, Brand Experience)
* Has exposure to all new AI functionalities, and is aware of Qualtrics AI features
* Conduct code reviews and guide teams on best practices and cloud\-native patterns
* Build integration solutions connecting survey platforms with CRM systems, ticketing tools, SMS/messaging gateways, data warehouses, and kiosk systems
* Support integration with BI tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI) (Would be a bonus) c. Strategy – Business Alignment \& Client Advisory
* Ensure solutions directly support client business goals, deliver immediate value, and remain scalable for future needs.
* Act as a trusted advisor, simplifying technical concepts, guiding client decisions, and driving best practices.
* Present insights and solution designs to leadership d. Program Governance – Standards \& Compliance
* Manage full project lifecycle: scoping, solutioning, design, implementation, and client enablement
* Enforce design standards, best practices, and compliance requirements across client engagements.
* Maintain consistency and quality in solution delivery across multiple projects. e. Scale – Scalability \& Future Readiness
* Build reusable and scalable solution frameworks to improve efficiency across client engagements.
* Design architectures that adapt to evolving client needs and technology updates.
* Lead development of serverless applications using Node.js, Python, and React Required Skills \& Experience:
* Proven experience as a Solution Architect in consulting or client\-facing roles.
* Platforms: Qualtrics certification is a must. Hands\-on expertise with Qualtrics CX/EX platforms (survey design, dashboards, workflows).
* Strong knowledge of API integrations, enterprise architecture, and cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, GCP).
* Has worked on AI / ML technologies, also is exposed to Qualtrics AI features
* Technical know\-how o Languages: Node.js, Python, SQL o Frontend: React, Angular, jQuery, HTML/CSS o DevOps: Jenkins, Docker, Git
* Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to balance technical depth with business advisory.


**Location:**
 DGS India \- Mumbai \- Thane Ashar IT Park
   

  

**Brand:**
 Merkle
   

  

**Time Type:**
 Full time
   

  

**Contract Type:**
 Permanent\#DGS

0218b7ba.title: Digital Solution Architect Lead Consultant
0218b7ba.description:
NTT DATA strives to hire exceptional, innovative and passionate individuals who want to grow with us. If you want to be part of an inclusive, adaptable, and forward\-thinking organization, apply now.
  
  

We are currently seeking a Digital Solution Architect Lead Consultant to join our team in Chennai, Tamil Nādu (IN\-TN), India (IN).
  
  

Solution Architect
  
Experienced in Integration architecture, platform engineering, or senior integration delivery roles with demonstrable enterprise\-scale projects.
  
Deep expertise in API design and management, REST, GraphQL, Webhooks, WebSockets.
  
Experience with event\-driven architectures and streaming platforms (Kafka, Event Hubs etc.) and design patterns for exactly\-once semantics and idempotency.
  
Experience with Integration platforms like APIGEE, SAP PI/PO, SAP BTP, Informatica: IICS, IDQ, Power Center etc.
  
**Strong knowledge of data integration techniques:** CDC , ETL/ELT, data lakes/lakehouses, and feature store integration patterns.
  
**Proficiency in authentication and authorization frameworks:** OAuth 2\.0 / OIDC, mTLS, SAML, RBAC/ABAC, token lifecycle, and secrets management (Vault, KeyVault, etc.).
  
**Practical experience designing secure network connectivity:** VPN, private link/private endpoints, dedicated transit/VPC peering, B2B/AS2/EDI connectivity, and DMZ gateway topologies.
  
Familiar with OT systems and protocols (MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus etc.) \- Good to Have
  
**Strong operational mindset:** monitoring, SLAs, runbooks, incident response for integration layers and event pipelines.
  
Experience with cloud\-native integration patterns and platform choices (iPaaS, managed messaging, serverless connectors) and trade\-offs between SaaS vs on prem deployments.
  
**Excellent stakeholder communication skills:** able to translate technical constraints into business impact and lead cross\-functional design sessions.
  
  

About NTT DATA
  
  

NTT DATA is a $30 billion business and technology services leader, serving 75% of the Fortune Global 100\. We are committed to accelerating client success and positively impacting society through responsible innovation. We are one of the world's leading AI and digital infrastructure providers, with unmatched capabilities in enterprise\-scale AI, cloud, security, connectivity, data centers and application services. our consulting and Industry solutions help organizations and society move confidently and sustainably into the digital future. As a Global Top Employer, we have experts in more than 50 countries. We also offer clients access to a robust ecosystem of innovation centers as well as established and start\-up partners. NTT DATA is a part of NTT Group, which invests over $3 billion each year in RD.
  
  

Whenever possible, we hire locally to NTT DATA offices or client sites. This ensures we can provide timely and effective support tailored to each client’s needs. While many positions offer remote or hybrid work options, these arrangements are subject to change based on client requirements. For employees near an NTT DATA office or client site, in\-office attendance may be required for meetings or events, depending on business needs. At NTT DATA, we are committed to staying flexible and meeting the evolving needs of both our clients and employees. NTT DATA recruiters will never ask for payment or banking information and will only use @nttdata.com, @nttdatafed.com and @talent.nttdataservices.com email addresses. If you are requested to provide payment or disclose banking information, please submit a contact us form, https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact\-us.
  
  

NTT DATA endeavors to make https://us.nttdata.com accessible to any and all users. If you would like to contact us regarding the accessibility of our website or need assistance completing the application process, please contact us at https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact\-us. This contact information is for accommodation requests only and cannot be used to inquire about the status of applications. NTT DATA is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status. For our EEO Policy Statement, please click here. If you'd like more information on your EEO rights under the law, please click here. For Pay Transparency information, please click here.

a8495a3a.title: Cloud Architect
a8495a3a.description:
**This role is for one of the Weekday's clients**
**Salary range: Rs 3200000 \- Rs 4500000 (ie INR 32\-45 LPA)**
 Min Experience: 8\+ years
   

  

 Location: Pune
   

  

 JobType: full\-time
   

  

 We are seeking an experienced
 **Cloud Architect** 
 with
 **8\-14 years of experience** 
 in designing, implementing, and optimizing scalable cloud infrastructure for enterprise\-grade applications. This role is ideal for a technology leader who possesses deep expertise in cloud architecture, infrastructure automation, and modern DevOps practices. The ideal candidate will play a key role in defining cloud strategy, designing secure and resilient architectures, and driving infrastructure standardization using Infrastructure as Code (IaC).
   

  

 As a Cloud Architect, you will collaborate with engineering, DevOps, security, and product teams to build cloud\-native solutions that are highly available, cost\-efficient, and scalable. You will also mentor engineering teams on cloud best practices and ensure that cloud environments align with organizational security, compliance, and operational standards.
   

  

**Requirements**
**Key Responsibilities**
* Design and implement scalable, secure, and highly available cloud architectures for modern applications
* Define cloud adoption strategies, reference architectures, and infrastructure standards across projects
* Develop and manage Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform to automate provisioning and lifecycle management
* Architect cloud networking, identity management, storage, compute, and monitoring solutions
* Collaborate with development teams to build cloud\-native applications and microservices\-based architectures
* Optimize cloud infrastructure for performance, scalability, reliability, and cost efficiency
* Establish disaster recovery, backup, and high\-availability strategies for mission\-critical workloads
* Implement cloud security best practices, including IAM, encryption, network segmentation, and compliance controls
* Drive infrastructure automation and CI/CD integration for faster and more reliable deployments
* Evaluate new cloud services and emerging technologies to improve platform capabilities
* Monitor cloud environments, troubleshoot architectural issues, and recommend performance improvements
* Provide technical leadership, conduct architecture reviews, and mentor engineering teams on cloud best practices


**Required Skills \& Qualifications**
* 8\-14 years of experience in software infrastructure, cloud engineering, or cloud architecture
* Strong expertise in designing enterprise\-scale cloud solutions on platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
* Hands\-on experience with Terraform for provisioning, managing, and automating cloud infrastructure
* Proven experience architecting highly available, fault\-tolerant, and secure cloud environments
* Strong understanding of cloud networking, virtual private clouds (VPCs), load balancing, DNS, storage, and compute services
* Experience with Kubernetes, Docker, and container orchestration platforms
* Strong knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure automation tools
* Experience implementing cloud security frameworks, IAM, governance, monitoring, and compliance best practices
* Strong understanding of distributed systems, microservices architecture, and cloud\-native design principles
* Experience with monitoring and observability tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, CloudWatch, Azure Monitor, or similar
* Excellent analytical, troubleshooting, and architectural decision\-making skills
* Strong communication and stakeholder management abilities with experience working across cross\-functional teams


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Professional cloud certifications such as AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Azure Solutions Architect Expert, or Google Professional Cloud Architect
* Experience with multi\-cloud or hybrid cloud environments
* Familiarity with scripting languages such as Python, Bash, or PowerShell
* Exposure to FinOps practices, cloud cost optimization, and governance frameworks
* Experience implementing enterprise security, compliance, and disaster recovery strategies

01dd98b5.title: Cloud Security Architect
01dd98b5.description:
Role Summary
   

  

 The Cloud Security Architect \& Lead will own the security architecture, governance, compliance, and operational security posture across Minfy's multi\-cloud environments spanning AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud Platform (GCP). This leadership role is responsible for establishing security standards, driving cloud security transformation initiatives, enabling DevSecOps practices, and ensuring secure, compliant, and resilient cloud operations for both Minfy\-managed and customer\-managed environments.
   

  

 The individual will work closely with SRE, Cloud Engineering, FinOps, Product Engineering, AI/ML teams, Customer Success, and Strategic Account teams to embed security into every aspect of cloud service delivery.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

 Multi\-Cloud Security Architecture
   

  

* 
+ Define and maintain enterprise cloud security architecture standards across AWS, Azure, and GCP.
+ Develop secure landing zones, reference architectures, and cloud security guardrails.
+ Establish architecture patterns for:
+ Multi\-cloud deployments
+ Hybrid cloud environments
+ SaaS platforms
+ AI/ML workloads
+ Kubernetes platforms
+ Review and approve security designs for new cloud initiatives and customer engagements.
+ Drive Zero Trust Architecture adoption across all cloud platforms.


 Cloud Security Engineering \& DevSecOps
   

  

* 
+ Embed security controls into CI/CD and Infrastructure\-as\-Code pipelines.
+ Implement Security\-as\-Code and Policy\-as\-Code frameworks.
+ Automate compliance validation and security posture assessments.
+ Establish secure software supply chain controls.
+ Drive secure container, Kubernetes, and serverless security practices.
+ Integrate automated vulnerability and misconfiguration detection into engineering workflows.


 Security Operations \& Threat Management
   

  

* 
+ Define and oversee cloud security monitoring, detection, and response capabilities.
+ Establish multi\-cloud threat detection strategies.
+ Lead security incident response and forensic investigations.
+ Drive vulnerability management programs across cloud platforms.
+ Implement cloud\-native threat intelligence and proactive threat hunting capabilities.
+ Develop operational runbooks and security response automation.


 Governance, Risk \& Compliance
   

  

* 
+ Develop cloud security governance frameworks and policies.
+ Establish cloud risk management and control assessment processes.
+ Lead compliance initiatives including:
+ ISO 27001
+ SOC 2
+ PCI DSS
+ GDPR
+ HIPAA
+ NIST CSF
+ CIS Benchmarks
+ Support customer security reviews and regulatory audits.
+ Build continuous compliance monitoring capabilities.


 Identity, Access \& Data Security
   

  

* 
+ Define enterprise IAM strategy across AWS, Azure, and GCP.
+ Implement Zero Trust and least\-privilege access models.
+ Standardize:
+ MFA
+ SSO
+ Federated Identity
+ Privileged Access Management
+ Lead secrets management and encryption strategy.
+ Define enterprise data classification and protection controls.


 AI \& Emerging Security
   

  

* 
+ Secure GenAI and AI/ML platforms deployed in cloud environments.
+ Establish governance controls for AI workloads.
+ Define security standards for LLM deployments and AI\-assisted operations.
+ Assess risks associated with AI services and third\-party integrations.
+ Collaborate with AI engineering teams to implement secure AI architectures.


 Leadership \& Organizational Responsibilities
   

  

* 
+ Build and lead a Cloud Security Center of Excellence within SRE.
+ Mentor Cloud Security Engineers and Security Analysts.
+ Partner with Strategic Account Directors, TAMs, Cloud Architects, and Delivery Leaders.
+ Provide executive\-level reporting on security posture, risks, and remediation plans.
+ Support customer\-facing security discussions and solution reviews.


**Required Qualifications**
* 
+ 12–15\+ years of experience in Infrastructure, Cloud, Security, or SRE domains.
+ Minimum 7\+ years of cloud security experience.
+ Minimum 3\+ years leading cloud security teams or programs.
+ Hands\-on expertise across AWS, Azure, and GCP.
+ Strong understanding of:
+ Cloud\-native architectures
+ Kubernetes
+ DevSecOps
+ Identity Security
+ Compliance frameworks
+ Security Operations
+ Experience supporting enterprise\-scale SaaS environments.
+ Strong customer\-facing and consulting capabilities.


**Preferred Certifications**
* 
+ AWS Certified Security – Specialty
+ AWS Solutions Architect Professional
+ Microsoft Certified: Cybersecurity Architect Expert
+ Google Professional Cloud Security Engineer
+ CISSP
+ CCSP
+ CISM
+ CKS (Certified Kubernetes Security Specialist)


 Success Metrics (KPIs)
   

  

* 
+ Reduction in critical cloud security findings.
+ Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) score improvement.
+ Compliance audit pass rates.
+ Security incident reduction.
+ MTTD and MTTR improvements.
+ Percentage of infrastructure compliant by default.
+ Vulnerability remediation SLA adherence.
+ Customer security audit success rate.
+ Security automation coverage across cloud platforms.


 Reporting Structure
   

  

 Reports To: Delivery Leader
   

  

**Manages:** 
 Cloud Security Engineers, Security Analysts, DevSecOps Engineers, Security Compliance Specialists
   

  

 This role becomes the
 **security pillar leader within the SRE organization** 
 , alongside leaders for Cloud Operations, FinOps, Platform Engineering, Observability, and Automation, ensuring secure and compliant operations across AWS, Azure, and GCP customer environments.

b76a013f.title: Cloud Architect
b76a013f.description:
**Cloud Architect** 




**Bengaluru** 




  





**Job Description** 




 At Mareana, we build Enterprise\-Scale AI/ML\-powered products for Manufacturing, Sustainability and Supply Chain. We are looking for a skilled and experienced
 **Cloud Architect** 
 with a solid background in
 **DevOps practices** 
 ,
 **Cloud Platform Management** 
 , and
 **IT infrastructure** 
 . You will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining secure, scalable, and highly available cloud architectures across AWS, Azure, or GCP. The ideal candidate brings hands\-on DevOps expertise, automation mindset, and strong cloud governance knowledge.
 



  





**What You’ll Do** 



* Design and implement robust cloud solutions aligned with business and security requirements.
* Define cloud architecture standards, patterns, and best practices.
* Lead cloud migration initiatives and modernization of legacy infrastructure.
* Develop and maintain CI/CD pipelines using tools like Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, Azure DevOps, etc.
* Automate infrastructure provisioning using IaC tools such as Terraform, CloudFormation, or Pulumi.
* Implement monitoring, alerting, and logging using Prometheus, ELK, CloudWatch, or equivalent.
* Collaborate with IT teams to integrate cloud with existing enterprise infrastructure.
* Oversee networking, DNS, VPNs, firewalls, and hybrid cloud setups.
* Participate in incident response and post\-mortem analysis for critical failures.
* Work closely with software development, QA, and security teams to align infrastructure with application needs.
* Provide technical leadership and mentoring to junior engineers.
* Act as a point of contact for cloud\-related decision\-making and problem resolution.



  





**Requirements \& Skills** 



* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field.
* 10–12 years of hands\-on experience in AWS / Azure / GCP architecture and services
* Expertise in DevOps tools: Docker, Kubernetes, Git, Jenkins, Ansible, Terraform.
* Deep understanding of networking, Linux/Windows servers, and IT operations.
* Strong knowledge of cloud security, identity management, and governance.
* Deep expertise in AWS and/or Azure platforms with extensive use of services like EC2, S3, RDS, IAM, VPC, Lambda, and Kubernetes.
* Proven experience in leading mission\-critical cloud projects, including hybrid/multi\-cloud environments.
* Strong grasp of cloud architecture principles, security best practices, and DevSecOps integration.
* Expertise in Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using tools like Terraform, CloudFormation
* Experience implementing and managing Kubernetes at scale (EKS, AKS, or self\-managed), including security and lifecycle management.
* Solid understanding of networking (VPC, firewalls, load balancing, DNS, VPN, etc.) within a cloud context.
* Deep experience with CI/CD tooling (Jenkins, ArgoCD, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD) and GitOps workflows (FluxCD/ArgoCD).
* Skilled in scripting and automation using Python, Bash, PowerShell, or Go.
* Proficiency in monitoring, alerting, and observability stacks (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, Datadog, etc.).
* Experience with config management tools like Ansible, Chef, or Puppet.
* Strong leadership in incident management, RCA, documentation, and knowledge sharing.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
* Passion for continuous learning, innovation, and keeping up with emerging trends in cloud\-native technologies.



  





**About Mareana** 




 Founded in 2015, Mareana is an AI\-powered software company with the mission of accelerating digital transformation in manufacturing, supply chain, and sustainability via our connected intelligence platform.
 



  





 Mareana’s platform uses AI/ML to rapidly connect disparate, siloed data across the entire business process, allowing our customers to shift their time and effort from data preparation to making complex business decisions intuitively, in real time.
 



  





 Our customers are market leaders in life sciences, chemicals, and general manufacturing who have realized over a billion dollars in business value by leveraging our platform.
 



  





 Our ethos of continuous innovation has been recognized by Gartner, who named us a “Cool Vendor in AI”. We have also been featured as a thought leader in Silicon Review and Manufacturing Insights magazine.

8211c774.title: AWS Database Migration Architect
8211c774.description:
We are seeking an experienced
 **AWS Database Migration Architect** 
 to lead complex, enterprise\-scale database migration initiatives. In this role, you will design and execute migration strategies, drive technical leadership across cross\-functional teams, and ensure the successful delivery of heterogeneous database migrations to AWS environments. You will play a pivotal role in shaping migration best practices while collaborating with enterprise customers and architecture stakeholders.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Lead end\-to\-end database migration initiatives, including assessment, planning, schema conversion, execution, and post\-migration validation
* Design, configure, and manage AWS DMS and SCT environments while ensuring migration quality, performance, and reliability
* Author comprehensive migration runbooks that define execution procedures, validation checkpoints, rollback plans, and operational readiness activities
* Architect and implement Aurora PostgreSQL environments using Infrastructure as Code practices and AWS\-native services
* Perform database migration assessments, dependency analysis, compatibility reviews, and migration strategy recommendations
* Collaborate with infrastructure, application, security, and platform teams to ensure successful migration outcomes
* Drive migration testing activities, including functional validation, performance testing, failover testing, and production readiness reviews
* Provide technical leadership and guidance to migration teams while ensuring adherence to AWS migration best practices and governance standards







**Requirements** 



* 13–20 years of professional experience in database architecture and migration delivery
* Hands\-on expertise in AWS Database Migration Service (DMS) and AWS Schema Conversion Tool (SCT) for enterprise\-scale database migrations
* Deep proficiency in SQL Server, PostgreSQL, and Aurora PostgreSQL environments, including migration planning, execution, and optimization
* Proven background in delivering heterogeneous database migrations across on\-premises, cloud, and AWS environments
* Knowledge of production database operations, including backup and restore strategies, parameter tuning, performance optimization, and failover testing
* Capability to design and provision database infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code tools such as Terraform and AWS CloudFormation
* Skills in authoring and executing migration runbooks, validation plans, cutover procedures, rollback strategies, and post\-migration stabilization activities
* Strong understanding of AWS database services, migration best practices, and integration with broader cloud migration programs
* Experience engaging directly with enterprise customers, architecture teams, and migration stakeholders to drive successful delivery outcomes
* Proficiency in English at an Upper\-Intermediate level (B2\) or higher







**Nice to have** 



* Familiarity with AWS Application Migration Service (MGN) and database modernization programs
* Background in Aurora migration accelerators and CI/CD automation
* Exposure to AWS Professional Services style migration delivery engagements

553f9c16.title: Senior Managed Services Consultant
553f9c16.description:
Sprinklr is the definitive, AI\-native platform for Unified Customer Experience Management (Unified\-CXM), empowering brands to deliver extraordinary experiences at scale — across every customer touchpoint.
   

  

 By combining human instinct with the speed and efficiency of AI, Sprinklr helps brands earn trust and loyalty through personalized, seamless, and efficient customer interactions. Sprinklr’s unified platform provides powerful solutions for every customer\-facing team — spanning social media management, marketing, advertising, customer feedback, and omnichannel contact center management — enabling enterprises to unify data, break down silos, and act on real\-time insights.
   

  

 Today, 1,900\+ enterprises and 60% of the Fortune 100 rely on Sprinklr to help them deliver consistent, trusted customer experiences worldwide.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Role Summary**
 Support managed services delivery for Sprinklr CCaaS customers by configuring, optimizing, and maintaining platform solutions across digital and voice channels. Focus on execution, operational stability, customer support, and ongoing platform adoption.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Support configuration and maintenance of Sprinklr CCaaS solutions across chat, messaging, email, social, and voice channels.
* Execute platform updates aligned to defined solution blueprints, best practices, and core configuration architecture.
* Assist in configuring and maintaining routing logic, queues, IVR flows, case workflows, SLA rules, and escalations.
* Support bot workflows, automation rules, and bot\-to\-agent handoff configurations to improve operational efficiency.
* Identify basic platform gaps, configuration issues, and optimization opportunities, and recommend improvements aligned to customer requirements.
* Help maintain platform adoption by supporting users in understanding and using configured features effectively.
* Provide day\-to\-day support for post go\-live enhancements, troubleshooting, and configuration changes.
* Assist in monitoring customer operations metrics such as SLA adherence, queue performance, response times, and agent productivity.
* Support basic API, CRM, and third\-party integration activities, including validation and workflow coordination.
* Help onboard and train new agents, admins, and users on workflows, platform usage, and best practices.
* Work closely with Lead consultants and customer stakeholders to ensure configurations remain aligned to business needs and solution design.
* Support Customer Success and Sales teams by sharing platform adoption updates and operational insights where relevant.
* Document configurations, update process guides, and contribute to reusable knowledge and best practices.


**What Makes You Qualified?**
**Must Have Qualifications**
* 3–5 years of experience in CCaaS, managed services, technical support, or platform operations.
* Working knowledge of Sprinklr CCaaS or similar platforms such as Genesys, Cisco, or other contact center technologies.
* Experience with queues, routing, workflows, dashboards, SLA setup, or case management.
* Foundational understanding of IVR, telephony concepts, chatbot workflows, and platform automation.
* Basic knowledge of API, CRM integration concepts, and cross\-system workflow dependencies.
* Strong troubleshooting, documentation, and configuration support skills.


**Good To Have Skills**
* Exposure to digital and social engagement channels.
* Understanding of customer support operations and service KPIs.
* Experience supporting user training and onboarding.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving capabilities.


**Who You Are**
* Detail\-oriented and hands\-on with a strong execution mindset.
* Comfortable working in customer\-facing, fast\-paced support environments.
* A collaborative team player with growing technical and consulting skills.
* Focused on quality, platform stability, and customer success.


**What Success Looks Like**
* Accurate and reliable platform configurations.
* Stable day\-to\-day CCaaS operations and timely issue resolution.
* Strong support for customer adoption and user onboarding.
* Consistent contribution to operational efficiency and customer outcomes.


**We focus on our mission** 
 : Sprinklr was founded in 2009 to solve a big problem: growing enterprise complexity that separated brands from their customers. Our vision was clear: to unify fragmented teams, tools and data — helping large organizations build deeper, more meaningful connections with the people they serve. Today, Sprinklr has a unified, AI\-native platform for four product suites: Sprinklr Service, Sprinklr Social, Sprinklr Marketing, and Sprinklr Insights. Sprinklr is here to do three things:
   

  

* Lead a new category of enterprise software that we call Unified\-CXM.
* Empower companies to deliver next generation, unified engagement journeys that reimagine the customer experience.
* Create a culture of customer obsession, with trust, teamwork, and accountability.


**We believe in our product** 
 : Customers who value exceptional customer experiences have what they need on our single unified platform, built with an operating system approach on a single codebase. That means that everything — and everyone — can work together to service, respond, sell, and market to customers on the channels they prefer. While Unified Customer Experience Management (Unified\-CXM) as a category is just getting started, we are well on our way to creating a no\-compromise, unified approach to better customer experiences for the world’s leading enterprise brands.
   

  

**We invest in our people** 
 : We offer a comprehensive suite of benefits designed to help each member of our team thrive. Sprinklr believes that you should be able to get the type of care you need for your personal well\-being when you need it. We offer you and your family voluntary healthcare coverage in countries where applicable. We believe it is important to take time off – it is essential for your mental and physical wellbeing. We provide Sprinklrites with paid time off to recharge and spend time with loved ones. We want to grow our talent with purpose. Our open Mentoring Program is designed to create meaningful connections that support growth and amplify our focus.
   

  

 To learn more about employee benefits by region, click here.
   

  

 To learn more about all\-things\-Sprinklr, visit our candidate resource hub here.
   

  

**EEO \- Our philosophy** 
 : Our goal is to ensure every employee feels like they belong and are operating in a collaborative environment. We fervently believe every employee matters and should be respected and heard. We believe we are stronger when we belong because collectively, we’re more innovative, creative, and successful.
   

  

 Sprinklr is proud to be an equal\-opportunity workplace and complies with all applicable federal, state, and local fair employment practices laws. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, religion, creed, national origin or ancestry, ethnicity, sex (including gender, pregnancy, sexual orientation, and gender identity), age, physical or mental disability, citizenship, past, current, or prospective service in the uniformed services, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected under applicable law.
   

  

 Reasonable accommodations are available upon request during the interview process. To request an accommodation, please work directly with your recruitment coordinator or recruiter.
   

  

**Warning about Recruiting Scams:** 
 Please be vigilant for recruiting scams impersonating Sprinklr. Sprinklr will never ask you for money, to pay for equipment, or for unnecessary personal information during the interview process. Sprinklr will also never pay in Bitcoin or send email communications from our executives. Please review the Federal Trade Commission's advice to avoid these types of scams.
   

  

 If you are contacted by someone whom you suspect may not be appropriately representing Sprinklr, please do not engage and block their email or phone number immediately.

d54a0dee.title: Service Delivery Manager (Global, Remote)
d54a0dee.description:
Service Delivery Manager (Global, Remote)

Tech Guru \| IT strategy, security \& support for accounting firms \| Full\-time, remote, US Central 9 AM to 5 PM with occasional after\-hours incident response

Who we are

Tech Guru has served accounting and CPA firms exclusively since 2004\. We handle technology strategy, security, and support for about 60 firms across the US and Canada, and our plan is 500 firms by 2030\. We run on EOS. We are a 20\-person global virtual team, profitable, growing, and serious about quality. Our promise to clients is simple: we care about your business as much as you do. Our guarantee is simpler: love it or you don't pay.

We live four values and we actually use them to hire, review, and part ways: Caring, Accountable, Responsive, Empathetic.

Why this role exists

We grew. Our delivery teams got busy. Quality slipped in ways that cost us money and, worse, cost us client trust. We fixed the immediate problems and built a change control system, but systems only work when someone owns them every single day. That someone is you.

This is a new seat. You will report directly to the CEO and take over daily leadership of our Support, Project Management, and Deployment teams. Your job is to make our delivery so consistent and so well\-measured that the CEO never learns about a problem from a client.

Mission

Lead Tech Guru's service delivery teams to deliver every ticket, project, and onboarding on time and to standard, with zero avoidable client\-impacting errors, while protecting our service margins as we grow.

Outcomes (what success looks like in your first 12 months)

* Change control compliance reaches 100% within 90 days and stays there. Every high\-risk change goes through the documented approval workflow in HaloPSA. Avoidable client\-impacting errors (data loss, misconfigured mail flow, unauthorized changes) drop to zero and stay there.
* Scheduled service delivery hits 95%\+ on\-time within 6 months. Tickets meet SLA, scheduled service calls happen when promised, and the schedule maintains 24/7 coverage without heroics.
* Projects deliver 90%\+ on time and on budget by month 9\. You own the project management function, including running it hands\-on until you hire or develop a project manager, and every project closes with a retrospective that feeds a process improvement.
* Client onboardings complete within our published timeline, every time. New client and new user onboarding becomes a repeatable, documented, delightful experience measured by client feedback scores.
* Escalations reaching the CEO drop below one per week by month 6\. You become the person who owns incidents end to end: containment, client communication, root cause, and the fix that prevents recurrence.
* Managed services contribution margin holds at 49%\+ while client count grows. You know your team's utilization, cost per ticket, and rework rate cold, and you report them on a scorecard weekly.
* Your team gets stronger. Every direct report has a scorecard, a weekly meeting rhythm, a documented career path, and honest quarterly conversations. Regrettable attrition on your teams: zero.

Competencies (how you work)

* You lead managers and technicians, and you love it. You have led service delivery, support, or NOC teams of 5\+ people, ideally at an MSP. You would rather build a team that solves problems than solve them all yourself.
* Process discipline is your native language. You have built or enforced change management, QA, or ITIL\-style processes and made them stick under pressure. You know that a process that erodes when things get busy is not a process.
* You run on data. PSA metrics, SLA reports, utilization, margin. You bring numbers to every conversation and you notice drift before it becomes a pattern.
* High emotional intelligence under pressure. When something breaks, you call the client before they call us, you say what happened plainly, and you rebuild trust. You coach your team to do the same.
* You root out ambiguity. You ask the second and third question. You confirm what you heard before acting. You push back respectfully when a request is not actually in the requester's best interest.
* Direct, kind, and honest. You give real feedback early. You own mistakes without drama and expect the same from your team.
* Bonus, not required: HaloPSA experience, EOS/Traction familiarity, exposure to the accounting industry or its applications (Lacerte, UltraTax, Drake, CCH), Microsoft 365 and Azure environments, experience leading distributed global teams.

Roles and Responsibilities

Team Leadership

* Directly manage the Support, Project Management, and Deployment team leads/managers, with full oversight of scheduling, workload distribution, and 24/7 coverage.
* Run a weekly meeting rhythm with each direct report, including a scorecard review and a Level 10\-style team meeting for the broader delivery org.

Change Management \& Quality

* Own and enforce the change control workflow in HaloPSA, ensuring every high\-risk change is documented, approved, and logged before execution.
* Conduct regular audits of completed changes and tickets to catch process drift before it becomes a pattern.
* Investigate any client\-impacting error to root cause and implement the fix that prevents recurrence, not just the immediate patch.

Service Delivery Operations

* Monitor SLA compliance, ticket aging, and scheduled service calls daily, intervening before targets are missed rather than after.
* Maintain and report a weekly scorecard covering utilization, rework rate, and contribution margin.
* Manage the on\-call/escalation rotation and serve as the point of ownership for any incident that would otherwise reach the CEO.

Project Management

* Provide direct oversight of the Project Management function, including the PM's workload, prioritization, and adherence to timelines and budgets.
* Partner with the PM to ensure every project has a defined scope, timeline, and budget, and closes with a retrospective that feeds into process improvement.
* Track project portfolio health across all active projects and flag at\-risk projects early to the CEO

Client Onboarding

* Own the new client and new user onboarding process end to end, ensuring it's documented, repeatable, and measured by client feedback.
* Continuously refine the onboarding experience based on feedback scores and internal retrospectives.

Client \& Incident Communication

* Serve as the escalation point for client\-impacting issues, communicating proactively (before the client has to reach out) and transparently.
* Rebuild client trust after incidents through clear post\-mortems and visible corrective action.

Cross\-Functional Reporting

* Report weekly to the CEO on delivery metrics, margin, escalations, and team health.
* Flag systemic risks (staffing gaps, recurring error patterns, margin erosion) before they become CEO\-level problems.

What this role is not

This is not a senior tech role with a manager title attached. If your favorite part of the week is closing tickets yourself, you will be frustrated here and this is not a caretaker role. We are growing fast and the bar is rising every quarter.

Compensation and setup

* Salary range: depends on location and experience
* Fully remote, work from anywhere with reliable internet
* A team that is genuinely kind, direct, and proud of the work

Pay: ₹230,000\.00 \- ₹290,000\.00 per month

Benefits:

* Work from home

Application Question(s):

* Describe a process you built or fixed that was still working after you stopped actively managing it. What was the before, the after, and the metric that proved it?
* What's your notice period?
* What's your salary expectation?
* What's your experience working with distributed, global teams across multiple time zones?

Experience:

* Service Delivery Manager: 5 years (Required)
* Leadership: 5 years (Required)
* MSP: 5 years (Required)
* SLA Management : 3 years (Required)

Work Location: Remote

fc5e741a.title: Delivery Leader
fc5e741a.description:
**Role Description**
***Who we are:***
 Born digital, UST transforms lives through the power of technology. We walk alongside our clients and partners, embedding innovation and agility into everything they do. We help them create transformative experiences and human\-centered solutions for a better world.
   

  

 UST is a mission\-driven group of over 30,000\+ practical problem solvers and creative thinkers in over 30\+ countries. Our entrepreneurial teams are empowered to innovate, act nimbly, and create a lasting and sustainable impact for our clients, their customers, and the communities in which we live.
   

  

 With us, you’ll create a boundless impact that transforms your career—and the lives of people across the world. Visit us at .
   

  

**Delivery Leader**
**You Are**
 A highly accomplished and strategic Software Delivery Leader to lead the successful execution of a portfolio of software development, product engineering, digital transformation, and managed services engagements. This role is responsible for driving delivery excellence across multiple programs and projects through a team of Delivery Managers, Program Managers, Project Managers, Engineering Managers, and cross\-functional leaders. The ideal candidate will possess exceptional leadership, customer\-facing communication, delivery governance, financial management, and organizational development capabilities. Beyond project execution, this role will focus on building high\-performing delivery organizations, coaching delivery leaders, establishing operational discipline, and ensuring predictable outcomes across strategic customer accounts.
   

  

 The Software Delivery Leader serves as the senior delivery executive responsible for customer confidence, delivery predictability, portfolio health, team effectiveness, and business growth.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
*Portfolio Delivery Leadership*
* Own and govern a portfolio of software delivery programs across multiple customers, business units, and technology domains.
* Lead delivery through Delivery Managers, Program Managers, and Project Managers rather than direct project execution.
* Ensure consistent delivery excellence across multiple concurrent engagements with varying complexity, scale, and delivery models.
* Establish and drive delivery governance frameworks, operational reviews, performance metrics, and escalation mechanisms.
* Ensure delivery commitments are achieved with respect to scope, quality, schedule, budget, and customer expectations.
* Drive a culture of accountability, ownership, predictability, and execution excellence across all delivery teams.


*Leadership, Coaching \& Delivery Organization Development*
* Coach, mentor, and develop Delivery Managers, Program Managers, Project Managers, and emerging delivery leaders.
* Build strong delivery leadership capabilities through regular reviews, guidance, feedback, and structured development plans.
* Conduct portfolio reviews focused on leadership effectiveness, delivery maturity, and execution quality.
* Create succession plans and leadership pipelines for future growth.
* Foster a high\-performance culture centered around collaboration, accountability, customer success, and continuous improvement.
* Serve as the escalation and decision\-making authority for critical delivery challenges.


*Customer Engagement \& Executive Communication*
* Act as the senior delivery representative and trusted advisor for strategic customer accounts.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with customer executives, business stakeholders, and technology leadership.
* Lead executive governance meetings, steering committee reviews, and business performance discussions.
* Ensure delivery status, risks, dependencies, and mitigation plans are communicated clearly, accurately, and proactively.
* Demonstrate exceptional articulation, presentation, negotiation, and stakeholder management capabilities.
* Drive customer confidence through transparency, responsiveness, and consistent delivery outcomes.


*Program \& Project Governance*
* Establish rigorous governance mechanisms across programs and projects.
* Ensure disciplined execution of project reviews, status reporting, risk management, issue tracking, dependency management, and change control processes.
* Drive operational rigor through delivery dashboards, trackers, action logs, and performance metrics.
* Ensure timely follow\-ups, closure of action items, and escalation management across all engagements.
* Conduct regular portfolio health assessments and corrective action reviews.
* Ensure adherence to Agile, Scrum, Hybrid, and Waterfall delivery methodologies as appropriate.


*Financial \& Commercial Management*
* Own portfolio\-level financial performance, delivery margins, utilization, forecasting, and profitability.
* Review project financials, burn rates, revenue recognition, and cost management across engagements.
* Support pre\-sales, solutioning, estimations, commercial reviews, and contract negotiations.
* Ensure strong scope management and change request governance, particularly for fixed\-price engagements.
* Identify opportunities for account growth, expansion, and increased customer value realization.
* Drive delivery efficiency and productivity improvements to improve commercial outcomes.


*Operational Excellence \& Delivery Discipline*
* Establish a culture of operational discipline across all delivery teams.
* Ensure consistent usage of delivery trackers, project dashboards, action registers, and governance artifacts.
* Monitor execution cadence through structured reviews, follow\-ups, and performance checkpoints.
* Drive compliance with organizational standards, quality frameworks, and delivery best practices.
* Implement continuous improvement initiatives focused on productivity, automation, quality, and delivery predictability.
* Ensure delivery metrics and KPIs are measured, reviewed, and acted upon consistently


*Cross\-Functional Collaboration*
* Collaborate closely with Engineering, Architecture, Product Management, Quality Engineering, DevOps/Infrastructure, Security, and Business / Sales teams.
* Ensure alignment between technology strategy, delivery objectives, and customer expectations.
* Facilitate effective coordination across geographically distributed teams and multiple delivery centers.
* Remove organizational impediments and enable successful execution across functions.


**What You Need**
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related discipline.
* Master's degree or relevant management qualification preferred.
* 15\+ years of experience in software engineering, technology delivery, or product development organizations.
* Minimum 8\+ years in delivery leadership roles managing multiple programs and delivery leaders.
* Proven experience leading portfolios consisting of multiple concurrent projects and programs across customers and business units.
* Demonstrated success managing Delivery Managers, Program Managers, and Project Managers in a matrixed delivery environment.
* Strong experience in customer\-facing leadership roles with executive stakeholder engagement.
* Experience managing software development, digital transformation, platform engineering, cloud, and enterprise product implementation programs.
* Proven track record of delivering large\-scale fixed\-price, managed services, and product engineering engagements.
* Experience managing geographically distributed and cross\-functional delivery teams


**What We Believe**
*We’re proud to embrace the same values that have shaped UST since the beginning. Since day one, we’ve been building enduring relationships and a culture of integrity. And today, it's those same values that are inspiring us to encourage innovation from everyone to champion diversity and inclusion, and to place people at the center of everything we do.*
**Humility**
*We will listen, learn, be empathetic and help selflessly in our interactions with everyone.*
**Humanity**
*Through business, we will better the lives of those less fortunate than ourselves.*
**Integrity**
*We honor our commitments and act with responsibility in all our relationships.*
***Equal Employment Opportunity Statement***
*UST is an Equal Opportunity Employer.*
*All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or status as a protected veteran.*
*UST reserves the right to periodically redefine your roles and responsibilities based on the requirements of the organization and/or your performance.*
**Skills**
 delivery management,project execution,customer accounting,project management,program management

ac1fa59c.title: Technical Program Manager : Data Services
ac1fa59c.description:
**Job Summary:** 
 We are hiring a Technical Program Manager to support the Data Services team. This role requires someone who can manage complex data\-related programs across data engineering, data platforms, analytics, reporting, integrations, migrations, data quality, and data governance.
 



 The candidate does not need to be a hands\-on data architect, but they should understand how data programs are planned, delivered, validated, and adopted by business and technical stakeholders.
 



 The ideal candidate can bring structure to ambiguity, manage dependencies across engineering/product/business teams, improve execution visibility, and ensure data work delivers reliable, accurate, and usable outcomes.
 



  





**Responsibilitie
 
 s:** 



* Managing data services, data platform, analytics, reporting, or data management programs
* Coordinating work across data engineering, product, analytics, operations, finance, compliance, and business teams
* Understanding data pipelines, integrations, migrations, source systems, downstream consumers, and reporting dependencies
* Managing data quality, validation, reconciliation, lineage, and controls
* Driving cross\-functional execution through milestones, RAID, dependency tracking, and escalation
* Using Jira and Confluence as a system of record for execution, documentation, decisions, and stakeholder visibility
* Using AI tools to improve productivity, summarize information, draft reports, identify gaps, and reduce manual effort
* Communicating clearly with both technical teams and executive/business stakeholders



  





  





**Your Impa
 
 ct:** 




 Project Delivery: Your ability to deliver projects on time and within scope will directly contribute to the company’s success.
 



 Stakeholder Collaboration: You will build trust and enhance communication, ensuring high levels of stakeholder satisfaction.
 



 Operational Improvement: By implementing structured processes, you will drive efficiency and consistency across all technical projects.
 



 Technical Alignment: Your work will support the broader program team by ensuring individual project success aligns with organizational objectives.
 



  





**Minimum Requirements :** 




 Experience: 5\+ years of experience in technical project management, preferably in the technology or financial services sectors.
 



 Education: A bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Project Management, or a related field; or equivalent practical experience.
 



 Skills: Proficiency in project management tools (e.g., Jira, Confluence), strong organizational skills, and excellent communication abilities.Knowledge: A basic understanding of system architecture, the software development lifecycle (SDLC), and cloud technologies. Adaptability: Proven ability to work in a remote, fast\-paced environment.
 



**Preferred Requirements :** 
 Experience in the financial services industry or a highly regulated environment.Familiarity with Agile methodologies and experience with Agile teams.Strong organizational, analytical, and problem\-solving skills.Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to influence stakeholders at all levels.Ability to work effectively in a remote environment, demonstrating leadership and adaptability.
