e2bb362d.title: Solutions Architect - ITSM [T500-27477]
e2bb362d.description:
**About McDonald’s:** 




 One of the world’s largest employers with locations in more than 100 countries, McDonald’s Corporation has corporate opportunities in Hyderabad. Our global offices serve as dynamic innovation and operations hubs, designed to expand McDonald's global talent base and in\-house expertise. Our new office in Hyderabad will bring together knowledge across business, technology, analytics, and AI, accelerating our ability to deliver impactful solutions for the business and our customers across the globe.
 



  





 This opportunity is part of the Global Technology Enterprise Products \& Platforms, focused on enabling enterprise\-wide services through McDonald’s global ServiceNow platform, where our vision is to “Always be a people led, product centric, future focused \& trusted technology partner of choice.”
 



  





**Responsibilities \& Accountabilities:** 




**Solution Design and Architecture:** 



* Work closely with stakeholders to understand business objectives, challenges, user needs, and functional requirements across products and workflows.
* Develop end\-to\-end solution designs for ServiceNow\-enabled products and workflow capabilities that meet business requirements and integrate effectively with existing McDonald’s systems and platforms.
* Define solution architecture across relevant ServiceNow capabilities, with deep expertise in ITSM, ITOM, HAM, and SAM, and preferred experience across additional modules such as HRSD, CSM, SPM, App Engine, portal experiences, workflow automation, and enterprise integrations based on product and business priorities.
* Ensure solutions are scalable, secure, usable, maintainable, and aligned with enterprise and platform standards, balancing business value, speed, user experience, and operational supportability.
* Create and maintain architectural documentation for assigned products and initiatives, including solution designs, process flows, architecture diagrams, integration patterns, data flows, and technical specifications.
* Define reusable solution patterns and design approaches across products and workflows, and ensure consistent implementation in partnership with product and engineering teams.
* Communicate solution architecture direction effectively to stakeholders, ensuring shared understanding of design decisions, tradeoffs, dependencies, and impacts.
* Provide solution architecture expertise across design and delivery phases for assigned products and initiatives, partnering with implementation teams to ensure solutions are delivered in alignment with intended business outcomes and approved architecture.
* Define architecture for boundary systems and integrations related to assigned products and workflows, including APIs, identity flows, data exchange, and orchestration patterns; partner with adjacent teams to resolve issues, mitigate risks, and escalate broader cross\-platform design decisions as needed.
* Own solution architecture for assigned products and initiatives, ensuring alignment of workflow design, business process enablement, data requirements, security controls, user experience, reporting needs, and support models.



  





**Technology Strategy and Roadmap:** 



* Contribute to roadmap planning for ServiceNow\-enabled products and workflows by identifying architecture needs, dependencies, technical options, and sequencing considerations in alignment with business priorities and platform direction.
* Identify opportunities to improve product capabilities, workflow effectiveness, automation, and end\-user experience by leveraging ServiceNow features and adjacent enterprise technologies.
* Contribute architectural evaluations and recommendations for new ServiceNow capabilities, module enhancements, integrations, and vendor solutions, including business value, technical fit, delivery implications, and long\-term maintainability.



  





**Collaborate with Cross\-Functional Teams:** 



* Foster collaboration with product managers, engineering teams, operations, cybersecurity, enterprise architecture, data teams, and business units to ensure alignment between architectural vision, delivery plans, and measurable business outcomes.
* Partner effectively with other architects, product managers, engineering teams, operations, and business stakeholders to promote consistent patterns, architectural rigor, and scalable solution outcomes across assigned products and initiatives.
* Participate in architecture reviews, alignment sessions, and decision forums to support consistency, resolve tradeoffs within assigned scope, and raise broader portfolio issues to the appropriate architecture and product leaders.



  





**Implementation and Support:** 



* Partner with engineering and delivery teams to implement approved solution designs and provide architecture guidance on complex product, workflow, and integration challenges within assigned scope.
* Provide architectural support across assigned initiatives, ensuring timely engagement on complex design topics, effective issue escalation, and practical resolution of architecture\-related delivery risks.
* Support solution delivery through design reviews, issue resolution, dependency management, and transition planning to ensure solutions are supportable and aligned with business intent.



  





**Governance and Compliance:** 



* Ensure solution designs comply with enterprise architecture principles, security requirements, regulatory expectations, and McDonald’s policies.
* Identify solution\-level risks, design gaps, and technical dependencies, and define mitigation strategies that improve delivery quality, maintainability, and business continuity.
* Partner with platform architecture, cybersecurity, and risk teams to ensure product and workflow solutions align with approved standards, controls, and architectural guardrails.
* Support adherence to approved architecture standards, governance processes, and design guardrails across assigned initiatives, and raise exceptions or risks requiring broader review.



  





**Qualifications:** 




**Basic Qualifications:** 



* 8\+ years of experience in solution architecture, enterprise applications, platform engineering, or related technology roles within large\-scale, global environments
* 5\+ years of experience architecting and delivering ServiceNow\-based solutions, including deep hands\-on expertise in ITSM, ITOM, HAM, and SAM
* Experience providing technical leadership, architectural guidance, and design review support across cross\-functional teams and implementation partners
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field
* Strong understanding of ServiceNow solution architecture, workflow design, CMDB and asset data concepts, security considerations, integration patterns, and enterprise application architecture principles, especially across ITSM, ITOM, HAM, and SAM.
* Demonstrated knowledge of business solution design and workflow orchestration in a QSR, retail, enterprise applications, or back\-office systems environment
* Knowledge of software engineering and delivery practices across the full software development life cycle, including requirements, design, testing, release management, and operational support
* Strong knowledge of APIs, integration frameworks, identity and access patterns, data architecture principles, and enterprise application interoperability
* Experience applying product and agile ways of working, including best practices and lessons learned to standardize and refine delivery approaches
* Highly experienced in working collaboratively with business partners, product teams, architects, and engineering teams to drive outcomes and solve complex business and technical challenges across a global matrixed organization
* Demonstrated ability to influence solution design decisions and provide technical leadership across internal teams, suppliers, and implementation partners
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to articulate complex technical concepts, solution tradeoffs, and business impacts to non\-technical and executive stakeholders
* Strong problem\-solving and innovation skills to identify, develop, and improve techniques, procedures, services, or products
* Demonstrated ability to contribute to a collaborative environment that encourages learning, constructive challenge, thoughtful risk\-taking, and continuous improvement
* Relevant ServiceNow and industry certifications are a plus.
* Experience partnering with platform architects, cybersecurity experts, and delivery teams to ensure solutions align with broader technical strategy and standards is desirable



  





**Preferred Qualifications:** 



* ServiceNow Expertise: Strong experience architecting enterprise solutions across ITSM, ITOM, HAM, and SAM, with exposure to HRSD, CSM, SPM, IRM/SecOps, and App Engine.
* Enterprise Integrations: Hands\-on experience integrating ServiceNow with HR, ERP, Finance, Identity, and collaboration platforms using REST, SOAP, Integration Hub, and middleware.
* Architecture \& Governance: Expertise in solution architecture, platform standards, security, compliance, governance, and SaaS architecture best practices.
* ServiceNow Certifications: Relevant certifications such as CSA, CAD, CIS (ITSM/HAM/SAM/Discovery/Service Mapping), or CTA preferred.
* Delivery \& Process Excellence: Strong knowledge of ITIL, Agile, Jira, Confluence, solution documentation, workflow design, and product\-centric delivery.
* Technical Leadership: Ability to drive architecture decisions, evaluate risks and trade\-offs, recommend scalable solutions, and lead business process transformation and solution adoption.

f32627d8.title: AWS Database Migration Architect
f32627d8.description:
We are seeking an experienced
 **AWS Database Migration Architect** 
 to lead complex, enterprise\-scale database migration initiatives. In this role, you will design and execute migration strategies, drive technical leadership across cross\-functional teams, and ensure the successful delivery of heterogeneous database migrations to AWS environments. You will play a pivotal role in shaping migration best practices while collaborating with enterprise customers and architecture stakeholders.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Lead end\-to\-end database migration initiatives, including assessment, planning, schema conversion, execution, and post\-migration validation
* Design, configure, and manage AWS DMS and SCT environments while ensuring migration quality, performance, and reliability
* Author comprehensive migration runbooks that define execution procedures, validation checkpoints, rollback plans, and operational readiness activities
* Architect and implement Aurora PostgreSQL environments using Infrastructure as Code practices and AWS\-native services
* Perform database migration assessments, dependency analysis, compatibility reviews, and migration strategy recommendations
* Collaborate with infrastructure, application, security, and platform teams to ensure successful migration outcomes
* Drive migration testing activities, including functional validation, performance testing, failover testing, and production readiness reviews
* Provide technical leadership and guidance to migration teams while ensuring adherence to AWS migration best practices and governance standards







**Requirements** 



* 13–20 years of professional experience in database architecture and migration delivery
* Hands\-on expertise in AWS Database Migration Service (DMS) and AWS Schema Conversion Tool (SCT) for enterprise\-scale database migrations
* Deep proficiency in SQL Server, PostgreSQL, and Aurora PostgreSQL environments, including migration planning, execution, and optimization
* Proven background in delivering heterogeneous database migrations across on\-premises, cloud, and AWS environments
* Knowledge of production database operations, including backup and restore strategies, parameter tuning, performance optimization, and failover testing
* Capability to design and provision database infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code tools such as Terraform and AWS CloudFormation
* Skills in authoring and executing migration runbooks, validation plans, cutover procedures, rollback strategies, and post\-migration stabilization activities
* Strong understanding of AWS database services, migration best practices, and integration with broader cloud migration programs
* Experience engaging directly with enterprise customers, architecture teams, and migration stakeholders to drive successful delivery outcomes
* Proficiency in English at an Upper\-Intermediate level (B2\) or higher







**Nice to have** 



* Familiarity with AWS Application Migration Service (MGN) and database modernization programs
* Background in Aurora migration accelerators and CI/CD automation
* Exposure to AWS Professional Services style migration delivery engagements

c8162e17.title: Lead Full Stack Architect (Founding Engineering Team)
c8162e17.description:
Lead Full Stack Architect (Founding Engineering Team)

**Company:** Business Sarthi

**Location:** Gurugram, Haryana (Hybrid)

**Experience:** 7–10 Years

**Employment Type:** Full\-Time

**Compensation:** As per Industry best practices \& standards

About Business Sarthi

Business Sarthi is building **India's first AI\-powered Business Operating System**—a new category of enterprise technology designed to transform how businesses discover opportunities, make decisions, and execute operations.

Our vision is to build an intelligent operating system that connects AI, business intelligence, enterprise workflows, automation, and digital ecosystems into a single unified experience.

We're looking for passionate engineers who want to build a category\-defining product from the ground up and become part of our founding engineering leadership team.

The Opportunity

As the **Lead Full Stack Architect**, you will own the product engineering architecture and lead the design, development, and delivery of Business Sarthi.

This is a hands\-on technical leadership role where you'll shape the engineering foundation of our platform while mentoring developers, establishing engineering standards, and driving product quality.

You'll work closely with the founders, product teams, and platform engineers to deliver scalable, secure, and high\-performing enterprise applications.

Key Responsibilities

Product Architecture

* Design scalable enterprise\-grade application architecture.
* Define technology standards, coding guidelines, and development best practices.
* Design modular, reusable, and maintainable software components.
* Drive architectural decisions for new products and features.

Full Stack Development

* Build high\-performance web applications using modern frontend frameworks.
* Develop scalable backend services and RESTful APIs.
* Design and implement microservices\-based architecture.
* Integrate external APIs, enterprise systems, and third\-party services.

Engineering Excellence

* Lead code reviews and enforce coding standards.
* Improve application performance, scalability, and reliability.
* Optimize application security and maintainability.
* Drive technical debt reduction initiatives.

Product Delivery

* Translate business requirements into technical solutions.
* Estimate effort, plan releases, and deliver high\-quality software.
* Collaborate with Product Managers, UX Designers, QA, and DevOps teams.
* Ensure timely and predictable project delivery.

Database \& Integration

* Design PostgreSQL schemas and optimize queries.
* Build secure APIs and integration services.
* Work with messaging systems and asynchronous processing where required.

Leadership \& Mentoring

* Mentor developers and conduct technical coaching sessions.
* Drive engineering culture focused on quality, ownership, and continuous improvement.
* Participate in hiring, technical interviews, and engineering planning.

Required Technical SkillsFrontend

* React.js
* Next.js
* TypeScript
* JavaScript (ES6\+)
* HTML5
* CSS3
* Tailwind CSS

Backend

* Node.js (NestJS/Express) **or**
* Java (Spring Boot)
* REST APIs
* GraphQL (Good to Have)
* Microservices Architecture

Database

* PostgreSQL
* SQL Optimization
* Database Design
* JSONB
* Indexing
* Performance Tuning

Architecture

* Microservices
* API\-First Design
* Domain\-Driven Design (DDD)
* Event\-Driven Architecture (Preferred)
* Design Patterns
* Scalable System Design

Cloud \& DevOps

* Docker
* Kubernetes (Basic Working Knowledge)
* Git
* CI/CD
* Linux
* NGINX

Security

* OAuth2
* JWT
* RBAC
* API Security
* Secure Coding Practices

Preferred Skills

* AI/LLM Integration (Gemini, OpenAI, Claude, etc.)
* OpenSearch / Elasticsearch
* Vector Databases (pgvector)
* Redis
* Kafka / RabbitMQ
* ERPNext / Frappe Framework
* SaaS Multi\-Tenant Architecture
* Government API Integrations
* Performance Engineering

Required Experience

* 7–10 years of Full Stack Software Development experience.
* Strong experience designing enterprise\-scale applications.
* Hands\-on experience with React/Next.js and Node.js or Java Spring Boot.
* Proven experience building scalable SaaS or enterprise platforms.
* Strong understanding of modern software architecture patterns.
* Experience leading development teams and mentoring engineers.

Who Should Apply

You'll thrive in this role if you:

* Think like an architect, not just a developer.
* Enjoy solving complex business and engineering challenges.
* Can balance speed with engineering quality.
* Have experience building products from concept to production.
* Take ownership beyond your immediate responsibilities.
* Want to build technology that creates long\-term impact.

Why Join Business Sarthi?

* Build India's next\-generation AI\-powered Business Operating System.
* Join the founding engineering leadership team.
* Work directly with experienced founders.
* Influence product architecture and technology strategy.
* Build a platform that serves enterprises at national scale.
* Opportunity to grow into **Principal Architect**, **Engineering Manager**, or **VP Engineering**.

Salary \& Benefits

**CTC:** As per Industry best practices \& standards

Additional Benefits:

* Annual Performance Bonus
* Hybrid Work Model
* Learning \& Certification Sponsorship
* Premium Development assets
* Opportunity to build and lead engineering teams

Preferred Candidate Profile

* **Notice Period:** Immediate to 60 days preferred
* **Location:** Delhi NCR preferred (or willing to relocate to Gurugram)
* **Education:** B.E./B.Tech/M.Tech in Computer Science, IT, or related discipline

Pay: ₹1,800,000\.00 \- ₹2,700,000\.00 per year

Benefits:

* Flexible schedule
* Health insurance
* Paid sick time
* Paid time off
* Provident Fund
* Work from home

Application Question(s):

* Please share your current CTC and expected salary along with notice period

Work Location: Hybrid remote in Gurgaon, Haryana

e575bc84.title: Senior Service Delivery Manager
e575bc84.description:
We are seeking an experienced Service Delivery Manager to oversee the end\-to\-end delivery of IT services, ensuring alignment with project objectives and client expectations. The ideal candidate will have hands\-on experience in at least one of the following engagements: BI/DW, DWH, Data Warehousing, Data Analytics, Business Intelligence, Data Projects, Data Management, or Data Governance.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Oversee end\-to\-end delivery of IT services, ensuring alignment with project objectives and client expectations
* Act as the primary point of contact for clients, addressing escalations, service issues, and improvement initiatives
* Manage project delivery within defined scope, timelines, and budget, ensuring adherence to SLAs and KPIs
* Monitor service delivery costs and budgets, ensuring resources are allocated efficiently and expenses remain within budget constraints
* Identify opportunities for cost optimization and value creation for both the client and the organization
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams including engineering, QA, and operations to deliver high\-quality solutions
* Monitor and report on service performance metrics, identifying areas for improvement and implementing corrective actions
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance efficiency, quality, and client satisfaction
* Identify and mitigate risks to service delivery, implementing proactive measures to ensure smooth operations
* Lead regular status reviews with stakeholders, providing clear and concise updates on project progress
* Ensure compliance with organizational standards, policies, and ITIL best practices
* Build and maintain strong relationships with clients to foster trust and long\-term partnerships
* Stay updated with industry trends and best practices in service delivery management; attend conferences, workshops, and training sessions

3456022f.title: Delivery Lead
3456022f.description:
We are seeking an
 **AVP / SAVP of Analytics Delivery \& Operations** 
 to act as the "Chief Operating Officer" of our analytics organization. In this highly enterprising, executive role, you will have master oversight of global analytics delivery across all client PODs. You will utilize a balanced and data\-driven approach to intervene in operations, providing critical mitigation strategies to ensure revenue goals and fiscal forecasts are met. You will partner closely with POD account managers and analytics teams to engineer tactical solutions that evolve into enterprise\-grade strategic frameworks.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**1\. Analytics Delivery Oversight \& Revenue Realization** 



* **Master Delivery Management:** 
 Oversee end\-to\-end analytics delivery across multiple client PODs, ensuring operational excellence, strict quality control, and the seamless execution of data\-driven solutions.
* **Crisis Mitigation \& Revenue Remediation:** 
 Act as the ultimate escalation point for operational variances. Design and execute objective, data\-driven revenue remediation plans to overcome complex fiscal shortfalls and ensure precise forecast accuracy across major healthcare accounts.
* **Enterprising Partnership:** 
 Partner aggressively with POD Account Managers and commercial leaders to align analytics delivery directly with client P\&L objectives, ensuring all commissioned revenue goals are achieved or exceeded.



**2\. Tactical Interventions \& Strategic Framework Architecture** 



* **Tactical Problem Solving:** 
 Dive deep into specific POD challenges to devise immediate, tactical analytics solutions (e.g., targeted SQL rules, rapid hospital profiling, or data deep\-dives) that course\-correct performance gaps.
* **Framework Evolution:** 
 Systematically harvest successful tactical interventions from individual PODs and architect them into scalable, strategic analytics frameworks that can be deployed across the broader enterprise portfolio.



**3\. Operational Excellence \& Automation** 



* **Drive Automation:** 
 Spearhead the continuous automation of delivery pipelines and operational reporting across all POD analytics teams to maximize efficiency and reduce manual overhead.
* **Next\-Gen Integration:** 
 Champion the integration of advanced technologies, including the deployment of Agentic AI frameworks and automated decision engines, to accelerate pattern mining and shift\-left capabilities within the delivery lifecycle.
* **Resource \& Capacity Management:** 
 Optimize resource allocation, talent deployment, and cross\-pollination of skills across various PODs to maintain a high\-performing, agile organizational structure.



  





**Summary of Qualifications** 




 The ideal candidate is a seasoned, operational powerhouse with
 **15\+ years** 
 of overall experience in analytics delivery, operations management, and enterprise consulting.
 


* **Leadership Experience:** 
 10\+ years of experience leading large\-scale analytics delivery organizations, acting in a COO or senior delivery oversight capacity.
* **Consulting \& Operations Pedigree:** 
 Deep expertise in managing complex operational matrices, mitigating delivery risks, and partnering with account management to drive revenue.
* **Domain Expertise:** 
 Profound understanding of the US Healthcare value chain, specifically Payment Integrity, Payers, and Providers. Proven track record of managing multi\-million dollar revenue portfolios in an outcome\-driven environment.
* **Education:** 
 MBA from a Top Tier B\-school is strongly preferred, or an advanced degree in Engineering, Mathematics, Operations Research, or Business Administration.



  





**Core Skillsets \& Competencies** 



* **Operational Command:** 
 Exceptional capability to oversee massive, concurrent data operations and step in with objective, unbiased, and data\-driven mitigation strategies when targets are at risk.
* **Advanced Analytics Foundation:** 
 Deep understanding of the analytics lifecycle (SQL, Python, Databricks, AI/ML pipelines) to effectively guide technical teams and evaluate tactical solutions.
* **Commercial \& P\&L Acumen:** 
 Enterprising mindset with a strong grasp of business optimization, financial forecasting, and ROI realization within commission\-based revenue models.
* **Framework Development:** 
 Unique ability to bridge the gap between "in\-the\-weeds" tactical execution and high\-level strategic framework development.
* **Executive Communication:** 
 Excellent written and verbal communication, capable of driving consensus among internal POD leaders, account managers, and executive stakeholders.
