1a30d55f.title: Solution Architect – Application Modernization Practice
1a30d55f.description:
**Job Description: Solution Architect – Application Modernization Practice** 




**Company:** 
 Teceze Ltd
 



**Position:** 
 Solution Architect (SA) – Application Modernization
 



**Practice Area:** 
 Digital Engineering \& Enterprise Transformation
 



**Location:** 
 Chennai \& Bangalore
 



**Employment Type:** 
 Full\-time
 



  





**About Teceze** 




 Teceze is a global technology partner focused on operational resilience, digital transformation, and scalable growth. We simplify architectural complexity and accelerate business velocity by uniting next\-generation innovation under a highly accountable delivery model.
 



 Our
 **Application Modernization Practice** 
 helps enterprise clients break free from legacy technical debt. We specialize in transforming monolithic systems, outdated mainframes, and legacy software stacks into agile, cloud\-native SaaS/PaaS platforms. By reimagining application architectures, we enable organizations to unlock continuous innovation, maximize operational velocity, and lower total cost of ownership.
 



  





**Position Overview** 




 We are seeking an expert
 **Solution Architect for our Application Modernization Practice** 
 . In this role, you will be the technical visionary and strategist responsible for analyzing complex, legacy software landscapes and mapping out their evolution into modern, distributed, cloud\-native systems.
 



 You will operate as a trusted advisor to client CXOs and technology leaders, evaluating their "as\-is" systems and defining the optimal migration and modernization strategies (Re\-platforming, Refactoring, Re\-architecting). You will lead technical discovery, design high\- and low\-level software architectures, and guide our engineering teams through the flawless execution of these transformation roadmaps.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* **Legacy Discovery \& Assessment:** 
 Lead comprehensive technical assessments of clients' legacy application portfolios. Evaluate codebase quality, architectural bottlenecks, database dependencies, and business logic to determine modernization feasibility and risk profiles.
* **Architectural Strategy \& Refactoring:** 
 Design future\-state, cloud\-native architectures. Lead the structural migration of heavy monolithic applications into distributed, microservices\-led patterns, utilizing domain\-driven design (DDD) methodologies.
* **Cloud\-Native \& API\-First Design:** 
 Blueprint highly resilient systems leveraging containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), serverless functions, event\-driven patterns (Kafka, RabbitMQ), and robust API management/orchestration layers.
* **Database Modernization:** 
 Guide the transformation of legacy, tightly coupled relational databases into modern data architectures, including polyglot persistence strategies (combining SQL, NoSQL, and caching layers effectively).
* **Pre\-Sales \& Value Engineering:** 
 Partner with business development teams during early\-stage client consultations. Lead technical discovery workshops, draft formal Statements of Work (SOWs), estimate engineering efforts, and articulate the ROI of modernization to client leadership.
* **Technical Governance \& Mentorship:** 
 Establish coding standards, migration patterns, and modern software design principles for development squads. Provide hands\-on guidance to engineering leads to ensure structural integrity throughout the execution lifecycle.



  





**Requirements \& Qualifications** 




**Experience \& Education** 



* **8 to 12\+ years** 
 of professional experience in software engineering and enterprise software architecture, with at least
 **3 to 5 years** 
 focused explicitly on application modernization or refactoring initiatives.
* Proven track record of migrating legacy enterprise applications (e.g., .NET Framework, Java EE, or older web/mainframe systems) into public or hybrid cloud environments.
* Solid experience implementing DDD (Domain\-Driven Design) and various migration strategies (e.g., Strangler Fig pattern).



**Technical Domain Expertise** 



* **Application Development:** 
 Mastery in modern programming frameworks, particularly modern .NET (.NET Core/8\), Java (Spring Boot), or Node.js.
* **Architectural Patterns:** 
 Deep command over microservices architectures, event\-driven design, RESTful APIs, gRPC, and cloud\-native integration strategies.
* **Containers \& Orchestration:** 
 Strong implementation experience with Docker and Kubernetes (EKS, AKS, or GKE).
* **Hyperscaler Tooling:** 
 Deep understanding of application services within AWS, Azure, or GCP (such as App Services, Lambda/Functions, API Gateways, and managed databases).

1e32173d.description:

* Own the complete product architecture lifecycle, from conceptual design through delivery and optimization
* Design and integrate microservices\-based architectures, ensuring modular, scalable, and maintainable systems
* Seamlessly “wire together” multiple technologies, platforms, and services into a cohesive ecosystem
* Ensure non\-functional requirements such as scalability, availability, performance, and security are built into all solutions
* Drive continuous modernization initiatives, reducing technical debt and improving system efficiency
* Establish and execute the technology roadmap in alignment with evolving business priorities
* Embed product thinking into architecture decisions, focusing on customer experience and business value

**Technology Landscape**
* Core backend stack includes Java, Spring Boot, and Microservices architecture
* Strong exposure to event\-driven systems using Kafka and caching mechanisms like Redis
* Experience integrating Python and AI/GenAI/Agentic AI capabilities into enterprise systems
* Familiarity with cloud ecosystems (Azure/GCP preferred), including migration and hybrid setups
* Current platform operates in a large\-scale global insurance ecosystem, with ongoing evolution toward cloud\-native architecture
* Strong experience in architecting and designing a large scale global distributed product/system
* Swift/Kotlin/Flutter/React and strong experience in architecting Mobile and Web applications


**Leadership \& Stakeholder Management**
* Lead the overall product architecture function, setting direction and governance standards

**Technical \& Functional Expectations**
* Deep expertise in backend and frontend architecture \& design with a strong focus on mobile\-first design principles with a strong focus on mobile\-first design principles

* Proven experience in designing and scaling distributed systems in high\-transaction environments

d64250fa.title: Technology & Transformation - Engineering - Senior Consultant - Azure Data Engineer (AI Solutions)
d64250fa.description:
Job requisition ID :: 108378
Date: Jul 16, 2026
Location: Bengaluru
Designation: Senior Consultant
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**Technology \& Transformation \- Engineering \- Senior Consultant \- Azure Data Engineer (AI Solutions)**
  

* **Job requisition ID** : 108378
* **Location**: Bengaluru
* **Entity**: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP

**The Team**

  



Deloitte’s Technology \& Transformation practice can help you uncover and unlock the value buried deep inside vast amounts of data. Our global network provides strategic guidance and implementation services to help companies manage data from disparate sources and convert it into accurate, actionable information that can support fact\-driven decision\-making and generate an insight\-driven advantage. Our practice addresses the continuum of opportunities in business intelligence \& visualization, data management, performance management and next\-generation analytics and technologies, including big data, cloud, cognitive and machine learning.

  


**Your work profile:**

  



As a **Senior Consultant** in our Technology \& Transformation Team you’ll build and nurture positive working relationships with teams and clients with the intention to exceed client expectations: \-


* Design, develop and deploy solutions using different tools, design principles and conventions.
* Configure robotics processes and objects using core workflow principles in an efficient way; ensure they are easily maintainable and easy to understand.
* Understand existing processes and facilitate change requirements as part of a structured change control process.
* Solve day to day issues arising while running robotics processes and provide timely resolutions.
* Maintain proper documentation for the solutions, test procedures and scenarios during UAT and Production phase.
* Coordinate with process owners and business to understand the as\-is process and design the automation process flow.

  


**Key skills required:**

  


* **4\+ years of experience** designing and deploying scalable data pipelines in cloud environments.
* Proficiency in **Python**, **SQL**, and data manipulation tools and frameworks (e.g., Apache Airflow, Spark, dbt, Pandas).
* Practical experience with **data lakes**, **data warehouses** (e.g., Redshift, Snowflake, BigQuery), and **streaming platforms** (e.g., Kafka, Kinesis).
* Strong understanding of **data modelling**, **schema design**, and **data transformation patterns**.
* Experience working with **Azure (Data Factory, AzureML Studio, Azure Storage)**.
* Proven experience in handling **Semi and Unstructured data**.
* Familiarity with CI/CD for data pipelines and infrastructure\-as\-code (e.g., Terraform,CloudFormation).
* Design, build, and maintain **data pipelines** that serve the needs of multiple stakeholders including software developers, data scientists, analysts, and business teams.
* Ensure data pipelines are **modular**, **resilient**, and optimized for **performance** and **low maintenance**.
* Collaborate with AI/ML teams to support **training**, **inference**, and **monitoring** needs through structured data delivery.
* Implement **ETL/ELT workflows** for structured, semi\-structured, and unstructured data using cloud\-native tools.
* Work with large\-scale **data lakes**, **streaming platforms**, and **batch processing systems** to ingest and transform data.
* Establish robust data validation, logging, and monitoring strategies to maintain data quality and lineage.
* Optimize data infrastructure for **scalability**, **cost\-efficiency**, and **observability** in cloud\-based environments.
* Ensure compliance with governance policies and data access controls across projects.

  



**Qualifications**

  


* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.

8150ad49.title: Solutions Engineer
8150ad49.description:
**Solutions Engineer — AI \& Data Engineering** 




 Brio Technologies · Solutions Engineering Team
 



 Hyderabad, India (pan\-India customer engagement) \| Full\-time \| 3\+ years' experience
 



**1\. About Brio Technologies \& The Role** 




 Every enterprise in India is asking the same question right now: how do we actually put AI and data to work? Our answer is people like you.
 



 Founded in 2004 and headquartered in Hyderabad, Brio Technologies is one of India's leading cloud and AI consulting firms. We are a long\-standing Google Cloud partner — named Google Cloud Sales Partner of the Year for India in 2024 — with a footprint spanning India, the US, and the Middle East, and thousands of customers who trust us to modernise their infrastructure, build modern data platforms, and turn AI from a headline into a business advantage.
 



 The Solutions Engineering team is where that promise gets delivered. You will join an agile team of builder\-consultants driving IT consulting initiatives across the pan\-India market — owning the journey from “here's our business problem” to “here's a working solution.” Twelve months in, you'll have led discovery with CXOs at some of India's most ambitious companies, designed data and AI architectures that won deals, and shipped MVPs that customers run their business on.
 



 As a Solutions Engineer, you are expected to switch between being a technical expert, a trusted advisor, and a strategic partner throughout the week.
 



**2\. What You'll Do** 



* **Lead discovery.** 
 Run discovery sessions and requirement workshops with business and technical stakeholders, ask the questions that surface the real problem, and scope complex business requirements into clear, buildable solution designs.
* **Advise at the top.** 
 Engage directly with C\-suite executives and senior business leaders — presenting solution architectures, live demos, and business cases in language that connects technology to outcomes and ROI.
* **Design solutions that win.** 
 Architect end\-to\-end solutions across AI and data engineering: modern data pipelines and cloud warehouses, analytics and BI, GenAI and LLM\-powered applications, and agentic workflows.
* **Own MVPs end\-to\-end.** 
 Take full ownership of Minimum Viable Products — from architecture and development through demo, iteration, and handover. You don't just design the solution; you prove it works.
* **Power the pre\-sales engine.** 
 Partner with sales and leadership on deal strategy, build proofs\-of\-concept and demos, and shape winning responses to RFPs and proposals.
* **Raise the bar.** 
 Track a fast\-moving AI and data landscape, build reusable solution accelerators, and share what you learn so the whole team gets sharper.



**3\. What We're Looking For (Required Skills \& Qualifications)** 



* 3\+ years of experience in solutions engineering, pre\-sales, data engineering, AI/ML engineering, or a similar customer\-facing technical role.
* Strong data engineering fundamentals — SQL, Python, ETL/ELT design, and data modelling — with hands\-on experience on a modern cloud data warehouse (BigQuery, Snowflake, or Databricks).
* Practical AI experience: building with LLM APIs, RAG pipelines, or GenAI application frameworks, and a working grasp of the modern AI stack.
* Hands\-on experience with at least one major cloud platform; Google Cloud Platform strongly preferred.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills — you can command a boardroom, simplify without dumbing down, and hold your own in deep technical discussions.
* A consultative, discovery\-first mindset: you listen before you architect, and you scope and estimate with rigour.
* A track record of end\-to\-end ownership — you've taken projects from idea to shipped, not just contributed to a slice.
* A bachelor's degree in computer science or engineering, or equivalent practical experience.
* Willingness to travel across India for customer engagements.



**4\. Bonus Points (Preferred Skills)** 



* Google Cloud certifications: Professional Data Engineer, Professional Machine Learning Engineer, or Professional Cloud Architect.
* Hands\-on experience with Vertex AI, Gemini models, BigQuery, Looker, or Dataflow.
* Familiarity with agentic AI frameworks (LangChain, LangGraph, Google ADK, CrewAI) and LLM observability tooling (Langfuse, LangSmith, Arize).
* Experience with modern data integration tooling (Fivetran, dbt) or SAP\-to\-cloud data programmes such as Google Cloud Cortex Framework.
* Prior experience at an IT consulting firm or systems integrator, including proposals, SoWs, or RFP responses.
* A public technical footprint — open\-source contributions, technical writing, or community talks.



**5\. Why Join Us (Perks \& Culture)** 



* **Impact you can see.** 
 Eight people, zero bureaucracy. Your architecture decisions and your code reach real customers in weeks, not quarters.
* **A seat at the big table.** 
 Direct, regular exposure to CXOs and decision\-makers — the kind of experience most engineers wait a decade for.
* **Frontier technology, real stakes.** 
 GenAI, agentic AI, and the modern data stack, applied to production problems across industries — from manufacturing and logistics to edtech and healthcare.
* **An award\-winning ecosystem.** 
 Work at the heart of one of Google Cloud's most recognised partnerships in India, with deep access to partner engineering, enablement, and certification paths.
* **Accelerated growth.** 
 Sponsored certifications, mentorship from senior architects, and a clear runway toward Solution Architect and practice\-leadership roles.
* **A culture that backs you.** 
 Competitive compensation, health insurance, and a flexible, outcome\-driven way of working.



*Brio Technologies is an equal\-opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to building an inclusive team — a commitment recognised by Google Cloud's 2023 DEI Partner of the Year award for APAC.*

eb988124.title: Graph Database Architect
eb988124.description:
Does working for **150\+ million children of Bharat** excite you?
Then this opportunity is for you!  

  

**About us:**ConveGenius is an AI\-native education infrastructure company transforming how governments, enterprises, and social institutions deliver learning and governance outcomes at population scale. Operating across B2G and B2B segments, the company partners with state governments, CSR funders, philanthropies, and social enterprises to build intelligent education ecosystems that are both impactful and commercially sustainable.
At its core, ConveGenius runs two synergistic business lines:* **SwiftAI** – the intelligence and automation layer that powers citizen engagement, governance efficiency, and real\-time decision\-making for governments and institutions.
* **SwiftSchool** – the learning infrastructure layer that integrates adaptive learning, digital classrooms, and analytics to drive measurable student and system outcomes.


This dual\-engine model enables ConveGenius to serve as the technology backbone for education reform — connecting classrooms, communities, and command centres through a unified AI\-powered framework. Unlike traditional edtech companies that deliver content, ConveGenius builds infrastructure — platforms that integrate deeply into public delivery systems while enabling private and philanthropic partners to scale their missions with measurable results.  

With operations across 22\+ Indian states and partnerships with multilaterals, CSR alliances, and government departments, ConveGenius has established itself as a partner\-friendly enterprise trusted for aligning policy priorities with social and financial returns. Supported by institutional investors and guided by a double bottom line philosophy, the company consistently delivers impact at scale and profitability with purpose.  

As ConveGenius enters its next phase of growth, it is shaping the future of AI\-led public education infrastructure — where technology, partnerships, and governance intelligence converge to redefine how nations learn and thrive. **Learn more about us:** https://linktr.ee/convegenius11  

  

**Role Overview:** As the Graph Database Architect at ConveGenius, you will design and own the knowledge graph platform that enables connected data reasoning, semantic search, curriculum intelligence, and AI\-driven insights across the platform. You will define how knowledge is represented, linked, and retrieved to power personalised learning at scale. This role is part of a 0\-to\-1 vertical build. The person joining should be comfortable with ambiguity, high ownership, rapid iteration, hands\-on execution, team building, and periods of high\-intensity work during the early setup phase.**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

* Design and build the production knowledge graph platform: data models, ontology standards, and infrastructure.
* Build knowledge graphs representing educational content, skills taxonomies, learner models, and curriculum structures.
* Enable GraphRAG architectures integrating knowledge graphs with LLM retrieval pipelines for contextual AI responses.
* Define ontology governance standards, schema versioning, and knowledge base quality assurance processes.
* Optimise graph database performance: query tuning, index design, partitioning, and scaling strategies.
* Build entity resolution and knowledge base construction pipelines from heterogeneous data sources.
* Design semantic search capabilities combining graph\-native and vector\-based hybrid retrieval approaches.
* Collaborate with ML teams on graph\-native features: recommendation, adaptive learning paths, and gap detection.
* Evaluate and evolve the graph technology stack as platform and data complexity scales.
* Define and enforce data quality standards for the knowledge graph: completeness checks, consistency validation, and remediation workflows.
* Drive graph\-based data integration across heterogeneous sources and establish reasoning pipelines for semantic AI applications.

**Must\-Have Skills**
---------------------

* Strong experience in designing and managing Graph Database solutions in production environments
* Deep understanding of Knowledge Graphs, Ontologies, and Graph Data Modeling
* Hands\-on experience with Neo4j, JanusGraph, Apache Jena, or similar graph databases
* Strong knowledge of RDF, Property Graphs, SPARQL, and Cypher query languages
* Experience building and maintaining large\-scale domain ontologies and knowledge graphs
* Understanding of ontology governance, versioning, and data quality standards
* Experience with graph\-based data integration, reasoning, and semantic technologies
* Strong problem\-solving skills and ability to design scalable graph data architectures

 **What We Offer and Why You Should Join ConveGenius****At ConveGenius, we create an environment where purpose meets growth. You will be part of a mission driven organization that is transforming how learning reaches children across India, especially at scale and where it matters most.*** Work with a diverse and passionate team spread across India, bringing together people from different backgrounds, perspectives, and expertise.
* Be part of an organization with a strong on ground presence across more than two thirds of India, giving you exposure to large scale, real world impact.
* Play a meaningful role in strengthening the education ecosystem and contributing directly to learning outcomes for millions of children.
* Gain experience working at the intersection of education, technology, and public systems, building skills that are highly relevant and future focused.
* Work in a culture that values ownership, learning, and collaboration, with space to take initiative and grow professionally.
* Enjoy stability and peace of mind with employee friendly benefits, including health insurance coverage and other supportive policies.
* If you are driven by purpose, enjoy solving complex problems, and want your work to create visible impact, ConveGenius offers a place to grow while making a difference.

c8ccbdeb.title: Solution Architect – Cloud & DevOps Practice
c8ccbdeb.description:
**Company:** 
 Teceze Ltd
 



**Position:** 
 Solution Architect (SA) – Cloud \& DevOps
 



**Practice Area:** 
 Digital Engineering \& Cloud Governance
 



**Location:** 
 Chennai \& Bangalore
 



**Employment Type:** 
 Full\-time
 



  





**About Teceze** 




 Teceze is a global technology partner focused on operational resilience, digital transformation, and scalable growth. We simplify architectural complexity and accelerate business velocity by uniting next\-generation innovation under a highly accountable delivery model.
 



 Our
 **Digital Engineering Engine** 
 specializes in building, migrating, and optimizing enterprise applications across public, private, and hybrid cloud infrastructures. By embedding continuous delivery, rigorous automation, and proactive security into every tier of our solutions, we help organizations transform legacy systems into agile, highly resilient cloud\-native platforms.
 



**Position Overview** 




 We are seeking a highly technical, forward\-thinking
 **Solution Architect for our Cloud \& DevOps Practice** 
 . In this role, you will lead the architectural strategy, design, and execution of complex cloud infrastructure and automated software delivery systems for our enterprise and mid\-market clients.
 



 You will operate at the intersection of enterprise business strategy and deeply technical implementation. This requires collaborating with client CXOs to define multi\-cloud strategies, while simultaneously writing structural blueprints for our engineering squads. You will ensure that every solution we deploy is secure, highly available, scalable, and fully optimized for cloud economics.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* **Architectural Strategy \& Design:** 
 Lead the discovery, structural scoping, and high/low\-level design (HLD/LLD) of secure, resilient multi\-cloud and hybrid environments across major hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP).
* **Modern DevOps Orchestration:** 
 Blueprint automated software delivery ecosystems, encompassing comprehensive continuous integration/continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipelines, automated testing integrations, and immutable infrastructure environments.
* **Containerization \& Microservices:** 
 Design and optimize orchestration platforms using Kubernetes (EKS, AKS, GKE) and Docker to decouple monolithic business applications into scalable, containerized architectures.
* **Infrastructure as Code (IaC):** 
 Champion automated provisioning frameworks by developing scalable, reusable IaC configurations using Terraform, OpenTofu, Ansible, or CloudFormation.
* **Pre\-Sales \& Enterprise Advisory:** 
 Partner with our account executives during early discovery stages. Lead technical workshops, evaluate legacy architectures, write formal Statements of Work (SOWs), and convincingly demonstrate the technical and economic value of our designs to client stakeholders.
* **FinOps \& Security Governance:** 
 Embed DevSecOps principles directly into infrastructure designs (IAM controls, secrets management, encryption at rest/in transit). Implement robust cloud financial management (FinOps) strategies to continuously optimize resource allocation and client expenditures.



**Requirements \& Qualifications** 




**Experience \& Certifications** 



* **8 to 12\+ years** 
 of professional experience in IT infrastructure, software engineering, or cloud engineering, with a minimum of
 **3 to 5 years** 
 spent serving directly in an architectural role.
* Proven track record of successfully guiding complex, large\-scale migration paths from legacy on\-premises data centers to public or hybrid cloud environments.
* **Required Certifications:** 
 Professional\-level or Expert\-level certifications in at least one major hyperscaler platform (e.g.,
 *AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional* 
 ,
 *Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert* 
 , or
 *Google Cloud Certified Professional Cloud Architect* 
 ).



**Technical Domain Expertise** 



* **Hyperscalers:** 
 Deep, hands\-on architectural command over core compute, storage, networking, database, and security features within AWS, Azure, or GCP.
* **DevOps Ecosystem:** 
 Practical mastery of CI/CD tools (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, Azure DevOps) and container orchestration tools (Kubernetes, Helm).
* **Infrastructure Automation:** 
 Strong capability with declarative IaC tools, particularly Terraform.
* **System Environments:** 
 Proficient in Linux systems administration, enterprise networking configurations (VPCs, VPNs, Direct Connect, SD\-WAN), and modern microservices routing.

d6501b26.title: Software Solutions Architect
d6501b26.description:
**Summary:** 




 The Software Solutions Architect role is to lead customer\-facing software development teams using C\#, .NET, WPF, and C\+\+. Beyond individual project ownership, you'll guide multiple engineering leads, drive AI adoption, and deliver scalable, long\-term software solutions while working directly with customers and stakeholders.
 



  





**Position Overview:** 




 We are hiring a Solutions Architect to lead large, customer\-facing software programs built on C\#, .NET, WPF, C\+\+, and Windows desktop technologies. This is a senior technical leadership role for someone who has grown beyond individual project ownership and can now guide multiple leads and engineering teams across complex workstreams.
 



  





 The role requires strong architecture depth, hands\-on engineering credibility, delivery ownership, and the confidence to work directly with customers and stakeholders. You will drive AI adoption across the team, make sound technical decisions, challenge weak requirements, resolve ambiguity, and deliver software solutions that are scalable, maintainable, reliable, and built for long\-term use.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Lead architecture, technical direction, and delivery execution across workstreams, owning design reviews, key decisions, and release sign\-off.
* Define and drive engineering standards, design patterns, coding practices, clean architecture, SOLID principles, and reusable approaches.
* Review system designs, interface contracts, data flows, integration points, and technical risks across complex, multi\-module environments.
* Provide technical leadership for WPF/XAML (MVVM, data binding, threading, performance) and C\#/C\+\+ development including native components, legacy modules, hardware integration, low\-level interfaces, and performance\-sensitive logic.
* Troubleshoot complex issues across multi\-process, multi\-threaded environments using logs, dumps, traces, profilers, and memory analysis tools.
* Own technical delivery planning, estimation, dependency management, risk tracking, and delivery readiness.
* Partner with customers, product, QA, DevOps, hardware, and business stakeholders to translate needs into practical, sustainable software solutions.
* Challenge requirements or approaches that introduce technical debt, delivery risk, or poor customer outcomes.
* Mentor senior engineers and technical leads, raising the bar on architecture thinking, debugging depth, ownership, and delivery discipline.
* Build alignment across local and global teams, supporting customer and cross\-site engagements as needed.



  





**Qualifications:** 



* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Electronics, Electrical Engineering, or a related discipline.
* 12\+ years of software engineering experience with proven delivery of complex software systems, including 4\+ years in technical leadership, architecture, or large\-scale delivery ownership.
* Experience leading large engineering teams, multiple workstreams, or Senior Technical Leads.
* Strong hands\-on background in C\#, .NET / .NET Core / .NET Framework, WPF, XAML, C\+\+, and Windows desktop application development, with deep knowledge of MVVM, object\-oriented design, SOLID principles, design patterns, clean code, and modular architecture.
* Strong understanding of multi\-threading, asynchronous programming, memory management, inter\-process communication, native\-managed code interaction, and application performance in Windows environments.
* Strong debugging and troubleshooting skills across complex, multi\-module, multi\-process Windows\-based software environments.
* Working knowledge of SDLC, Agile delivery, release planning, estimation, CI/CD pipelines, version control, code reviews, and software configuration management.
* Strong communication, stakeholder management, and customer\-facing skills, with the ability to influence architecture and solution direction while balancing delivery commitments and long\-term product quality.



  





**Good to have:** 



* Experience modernizing legacy C\#/.NET/WPF/C\+\+ applications or large Windows desktop platforms.
* Experience with performance profiling, memory analysis, UI responsiveness improvements, and reliability engineering.
* Exposure to backend services, APIs, databases, distributed systems, Windows services, Win32, native integrations, automated testing frameworks, DevOps, Linux, HPC, or high\-performance computing environments.
* Experience with software connected to hardware, instruments, automation systems, manufacturing systems, inspection systems, or other complex engineering platforms.
* Experience working with customers, field teams, service teams, application teams, and globally distributed engineering teams.



  





**What Sets You Apart:** 



* You identify customer pain points and take ownership without waiting to be asked.
* You can lead senior engineers, influence architecture across teams, and make balanced decisions that protect both customer value and long\-term product quality — even in ambiguous, high\-dependency situations.
* You are equally comfortable in architecture discussions, delivery conversations, and direct customer engagement.



  





**Benefits:** 



* We want every Soliton member to grow to their highest potential. Our work environment helps individuals explore their interests and potential and reach out to the resources and people available at Soliton to realize them. Read more about what it's like to work at Soliton: Soliton Employee Value Proposition .
* Solitons choose their work hours as long as it takes into account the requirements of the job. We take special care to support mothers to excel at work while they handle their responsibilities at home.
* At Soliton, we believe that every team member contributes to our success and revenue, directly or indirectly. To recognize this, we share a portion of our profits with all Solitons. Starting from your second year with us, you'll be eligible to receive a share of the company's profits.
* Health insurance for employees and families, gym and cycle allowance – your health is a priority!



  





**About Soliton:** 




 Soliton Technologies Pvt. Ltd., a high\-technology software company headquartered in Bangalore, India.
 



  





 Soliton works with global companies, from startups to Fortune 500, across industries including Semiconductors, Medical Devices, Automotive, Industry 4\.0, and Robotics to help them increase their competitiveness and release great products through Software Engineering Services. Since 1997, we have been growing over 25% annually because we especially focus on raising our standards constantly, to deliver an excellent experience to both our customers and our employees.
 



 Soliton Technologies is a certified Great Place to Work® in the Midsized Organizations Category, recognized and issued by the Great Place to Work® Institute. This certification is a testament to our focus on our values of Respect, Integrity, Excellence and Innovation.
 



 With a team of over 400 employees across the world, we forge ahead as engineers working to our heart's content, moving humanity forward.
 



  





**Additional Details:** 



* Work Location – Chennai.
* For more information, visit https://www.solitontech.com/ and do read the Impact Report to get a glimpse of the first 25 years of our truly meaningful journey.

58b66701.title: Architect - Home IOT Solution
58b66701.description:
**Smart Home IoT Solution Architect** 




**Location :\-** 
 Bengaluru
 



**Experience :\-** 
 14\+ Years
 



 Choosing Capgemini means choosing a place where you'll be empowered to shape your career, supported by a collaborative global community, and inspired to reimagine what's possible. Join us in helping clients build next\-generation smart home ecosystems through innovative IoT technologies, connected devices, and secure cloud\-enabled platforms.
 



**Your Role** 




 As a Smart Home IoT Solution Architect, you will play a key role in defining and delivering connected home solutions across embedded devices, gateways, cloud platforms, and mobile applications. You will work closely with customers, product teams, and engineering organizations to design scalable, secure, and interoperable smart home ecosystems leveraging industry\-standard IoT protocols and technologies.
 



**In this role, you will:** 



* Lead solution architecture and technical strategy for Smart Home and Connected Device platforms.
* Drive architecture decisions across IoT devices, connectivity layers, cloud services, and mobile applications.
* Analyze market trends, competitive offerings, and emerging smart home technologies to influence product direction.
* Design interoperable solutions utilizing industry protocols such as Matter, Thread, Zigbee, Bluetooth, Wi\-Fi, and other LPWAN/LRWPAN technologies.
* Collaborate with embedded, firmware, cloud, and application development teams to ensure end\-to\-end solution integration.
* Define device onboarding, provisioning, monitoring, and lifecycle management strategies.
* Architect device\-to\-cloud communication frameworks using MQTT, CoAP, REST APIs, and related IoT protocols.
* Leverage cloud IoT platforms such as AWS IoT, Azure IoT, or equivalent services to build scalable connected solutions.
* Establish security architectures covering device identity, credential management, secure boot, encryption, authentication, and compliance requirements.
* Support customer discussions, technical workshops, solution proposals, and pre\-sales activities.
* Mentor engineering teams and contribute to organizational IoT best practices and technology roadmaps.



**Your Profile** 



* 14\+ years of experience in Embedded Systems, IoT, or Connected Device engineering.
* Strong domain expertise in Smart Home technologies and industry ecosystems.
* Deep understanding of IoT communication protocols including Matter, Thread, Zigbee, Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE), Wi\-Fi, and LRWPAN technologies.
* Good understanding of embedded platforms, device firmware architecture, and edge computing concepts.
* Experience with device\-to\-cloud protocols and cloud IoT platforms such as AWS IoT, Azure IoT, or similar solutions.
* Strong knowledge of IoT security standards, secure device implementation, and cybersecurity best practices.
* Proven experience in defining scalable and interoperable IoT architectures.
* Excellent stakeholder management, communication, and leadership skills.
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Electronics, Telecommunications, or a related engineering discipline.



**What You'll Love About Working Here** 




 We value flexibility and support our employees with remote work options and adaptable schedules to maintain a healthy work\-life balance.
 



 Our inclusive culture brings together diverse professionals committed to growth, innovation, and excellence.
 



 You'll have access to continuous learning opportunities and certifications in emerging technologies including IoT, Cloud, AI, and Digital Engineering
 



**About Us** 




 At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world's most innovative companies unleash their potential. From connected products and smart homes to intelligent platforms, our engineering experts provide unique R\&D and engineering services across industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities where you can make a difference and help shape the future of connected living.

cf2efc01.title: Cloud Administrator
cf2efc01.description:
**Job Description:**
**Job Summary:**
 We are looking for a proactive and detail\-oriented
 **Server/Azure Specialist** 
 with mid\-to high level expertise to support and maintain our on\-premises servers and Microsoft Azure cloud environments. The role will focus on day\-to\-day operations, troubleshooting, and supporting ongoing cloud and server initiatives under the guidance of senior team members.
   

  

 Additionally support performing the monthly/quarterly/yearly SOX reviews to agreed standards.
   

  

**What do we need:**
* Perform routine administration of Windows Server environments, including Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, and Group Policy.
* Monitor server health, applying updates, patches, and resolving issues as needed.
* Support basic virtualization tasks using Hyper\-V or VMware.
* Assist in the deployment, configuration, and monitoring of Azure resources, such as Virtual Machines, Azure Storage, and Virtual Networks.
* Manage user accounts and permissions in Azure Active Directory.
* Perform basic troubleshooting of Azure services and escalate complex issues.
* Support hybrid cloud configurations, ensuring synchronization between on\-premises systems and Azure.
* Perform data migrations under supervision and monitor cloud workloads.
* Monitor and ensure the success of scheduled backups for both on\-premises and cloud systems.
* Identify and report potential security risks.
* Provide Level 2 support for server and cloud\-related issues, escalating to senior staff when required.
* Assist in troubleshooting connectivity issues and performance bottlenecks.
* Maintain documentation for system configurations, changes, and standard procedures.
* Update ticketing systems with resolution details and progress reports.
* Perform the monthly/quarterly/yearly SOX reviews to agreed standards.


**Required Skills and Qualifications:**
* Education \& Certification:
+ Bachelors Degree in related field
+ Azure Fundamentals (AZ\-900\) or Azure Administrator Associate (preferred but not mandatory).
+ Basic Windows Server certifications (e.g., MTA, MCP).

* Experience:
+ 4\-6 years of experience in IT infrastructure, with exposure to both Windows Server and Azure environments. Esxi, Vsphere, Vmware licensing knowledge and experience is required.
+ Hands\-on experience with basic server administration tasks.
+ Familiarity with Azure services and administration tools.
+ Experience with patching Dev/prod servers protocols

* Skills:
+ Basic troubleshooting of server and cloud\-related issues.
+ Familiarity with PowerShell for scripting and automation.
+ Understanding of network protocols (e.g., TCP/IP, DNS, VPN, DHCP).


**Preferred Qualifications:**
* Experience with backup solutions, such as Azure Backup and Veeam.
* Basic knowledge of monitoring tools like Azure Monitor or System Center.
* Exposure to automation tools like ARM templates or Infrastructure as Code (IaC).

e04c973f.description:

* Review solutions during key milestones of development, ensuring the deliverables and documents produced are traceable and adhere to specifications.
* Consult with other engineers to identify current operating procedures and clarify design and implementation objectives
* Formulate plans using industry\-standard techniques to outline tasks required to deliver committed user stories.

9218fe29.title: Senior Varicent Consultant, Managed Services
9218fe29.description:
**Position Summary**


The Senior Consultant working in a Varicent focused practice is responsible for the implementation of the Varicent suite of products to meet the client’s business and technical requirements. This position requires a self\-starter with good communication skills who can manage their deliverables independently while working well with other project team members.


Responsibilities in this role include consulting throughout the full software implementation lifecycle, from requirements gathering, design, build, testing and go\-live. Senior Consultants will help in leading client discovery and review sessions, perform configuration and development tasks and support clients through their testing process. An ideal candidate will have experience implementing a complex software solution within a defined project timeline.


This position with OpenSymmetry is an outstanding opportunity as our client base offers an incredible insight into a wide variety of industries with opportunities to work with individuals with a wide range of experiences. Additionally, you’ll have the opportunity to work with OpenSymmetry’s own experts as we strive to share content knowledge and build each other up to create the strongest team of experts possible.

**Job Objectives**  

**The ideal candidate should be able to:**

* Configure complex business scenarios within the Varicent platform
* Develop technical solutions to new or highly complex problems that cannot be solved using existing methods or approaches
* Easily navigate complex customer models and provide guidance to customers and OS consultants
* Provide accurate effort hour estimates for defect remediation
* Collaborate with delivery teams to define project scope, identify requirements, and estimate implementation efforts for new initiatives
* Develop requirements \& design documentation
* Perform data validation, testing, troubleshooting, and performance tuning
* Provide mentoring and technical guidance to colleague / team members
* Approach a complex task or problem by breaking it down into its component parts and consider each part in detail, inclusive of identifying upstream and downstream impacts
* Direct others on operational support tasks
* Create operational process documentation in support of SOW
* Understand when and how to switch to a different strategy when an initially selected one is unsuccessful
* Monitor progress and put effort in where is most needed
* Assist with creation of project work plan including sequencing of tasks, migration and implementation documentation

  

**Requirements** **Nice to Have Skills**

* 5\+ years of configuration experience within the Varicent Platform
* Hands\-on experience with Varicent Calculations, Composer, Presenter, Workflow, and Reporting modules
* Experience with data integration, ETL processes, and data validation
* Experience designing complex incentive compensation plans
* Strong SQL and database skills
* Advanced skillsets in Excel / Spreadsheet software
* Experience working in a client\-facing consulting environment
* Expert level communication skills including writing, listening and speaking

  

**Benefits** **Why You’ll Love Working Here**

* Comprehensive Employee benefits package
* Access to indoor games \& fully equipped gym
* Focused on Work\-life Balance
* Career Growth Opportunities
* Recognition and Reward Programs
* Employee Engagement Activities
* Supportive Leadership Team

d352be48.title: DELIVERY & SOLUTIONS LEAD
d352be48.description:
🚀 WE'RE HIRING: DELIVERY \& SOLUTIONS LEAD
 



 📍 Location: Ahmedabad (On\-site)
 



 🕐 Type: Full\-time \| Early\-stage Startup
 



 ───────────────────────────
 



 🌟 WHO WE ARE
 



 ───────────────────────────
 



 LumiByte Technologies is a small, fast\-moving AI and data company building infrastructure for India's largest media publishers. Helping them decode audiences, power content, and activate with AI.
 



 We're a tiny team doing work that matters at real scale. There are no big committees here. If something needs to get done, you figure it out and you do it.
 



 We're now looking for someone to own delivery end\-to\-end — not just track it.
 



 ───────────────────────────
 



 🎯 WHAT YOU'LL DO
 



 ───────────────────────────
 



 ▸ Own end\-to\-end delivery of client and product projects — from kickoff to go\-live — across business and engineering teams
 



 ▸ Sit at the intersection of functional and technical — translate what a client or product needs into what the tech team should build, and translate technical constraints back into terms the business side understands
 



 ▸ Bring your own point of view on the solution — question assumptions, propose better approaches, and shape scope rather than just tracking it
 



 ▸ Think beyond the immediate deliverable — every solution should be built to last, not just to ship. Prioritize sustainable, scalable approaches over quick fixes
 



 ▸ Coordinate across teams, unblock dependencies, and keep multiple parallel projects on track
 



 ───────────────────────────
 



 🧠 WHAT YOU'LL LEARN
 



 ───────────────────────────
 



 ▸ How delivery works for real enterprise AI/data products — not just software checklists
 



 ▸ How to think like a consultant — solutioning first, scheduling second
 



 ▸ How AI\-native products actually get built and shipped, working directly alongside founders
 



 ───────────────────────────
 



 🙋 WHO YOU ARE
 



 ───────────────────────────
 



 ▸ 3–6 years of experience, with time actually spent working on AI\-based solution projects — not just managed timelines for one
 



 ▸ You're not a typical IT\-industry PM — you've been close enough to the build to have real opinions on it
 



 ▸ You can hold your own in a technical conversation about data, models, or architecture
 



 ▸ Equally comfortable in a room with engineers and a room with business stakeholders
 



 ───────────────────────────
 



 ✅ MUST\-HAVES
 



 ───────────────────────────
 



 ▸ Prior hands\-on exposure to AI/ML or data product delivery — not purely conventional software/IT project management
 



 ▸ Ability to think in terms of solutions and architecture, not just tasks and timelines
 



 ▸ Comfort evaluating and interpreting data to inform decisions
 



 ▸ Strong stakeholder management — internal teams and external clients
 



 ───────────────────────────
 



 💡 NICE TO HAVES
 



 ───────────────────────────
 



 ▸ Experience in AI/data products, media\-tech, or ad\-tech
 



 ▸ Working familiarity with SQL or basic data analysis
 



 ▸ Exposure to enterprise delivery artifacts — SOWs, sprint plans, solution documents
 



 ▸ Comfort with AI tools in day\-to\-day work
 



 ───────────────────────────
 



 🎁 WHY JOIN US
 



 ───────────────────────────
 



 🚀 Real ownership — you'll run delivery for products live with some of India's most recognised media brands
 



 🧠 A role that blends PM, consulting, and product thinking — rare to find all three in one seat
 



 🤝 Direct access to founders every single day
 



 📍 Ahmedabad\-based, in\-office team that moves fast and keeps things real

* Lead the TD\&O division aligned to a major business area, driving performance, innovation, and transformation while serving as the single point of accountability across technology, data, cyber, operations, and client services.

d512a573.title: Service Delivery Manager-Enterprise Business
d512a573.description:
**Job Description**
 Service Delivery Manager – Enterprise Business (4038086\)
   

  

**Job Description Section**
 Agilent inspires and supports discoveries that advance the quality of life. We provide life science, diagnostics and applied market laboratories worldwide with instruments, software, services, consumables and expertise. Agilent enables customers to gain the answers and insights they seek — so they can do what they do best: improve the world around us.Information about Agilent is available at www.agilent.com
   

  

***This is an exciting opportunity for you to join Agilent’s Enterprise Business team as a Service Delivery Manager. In this leadership role, you will oversee service delivery operations across India, ensuring customer satisfaction, operational excellence, and effective management of service teams.
   

  

 The Enterprise Business division at Agilent focuses on delivering high quality service programs and enterprise solutions that help laboratories and organizations achieve efficiency, compliance, and business continuity. As part of this team, you will play a critical role in managing service delivery processes, leading field engineers and service technicians, and driving customer engagement at a national level.***
***About the role:***
 The Enterprise Service Delivery Manager is responsible for ensuring that the service organization is equipped to deliver complex business solutions and support growth initiatives including Productivity enhancement of Agilent customer and help them achieve success, Create and execute plan to improve overall lab enhancement by supporting Lab wide asset support. Establish Agilent as leader for analytical relocation support provider for India and create awareness across geography. Ensure customer success by executing complex programs and enable growth. The role focuses on driving profitable growth of the customer service business by aligning with regional strategies and translating them into actionable country\-level plans.
   

  

 This position plays a critical leadership role in strengthening organizational capability, enhancing customer experience, and enabling efficient service delivery through proactive planning and cross\-functional collaboration with Sales, Service, and Enterprise team. The incumbent is also responsible for driving strategic initiatives, improving operational efficiency, and ensuring the organization remains future\-ready to meet evolving customers and market demands.
   

  

***Your responsibilities will include:***
**Strategy \& Execution**
* Translate regional and global strategies into clear country\-level priorities and execution plans
* Drive innovation, change initiatives, and strategic programs to support business growth
* Identify gaps and implement improvement actions to strengthen service delivery
* Establish Agilent as a leading analytical laboratory relocation services provider in India while creating awareness across geographies


**Customer Success \& Enterprise Programs**
* Deliver complex customer programs that improve laboratory productivity and operational performance.
* Develop and execute laboratory\-wide asset support strategies to maximize uptime and efficiency.
* Drive customer success initiatives through proactive planning and execution.
* Act as a trusted advisor to customers by understanding their business challenges and identifying opportunities to improve productivity and utilization.
* Build strong customer relationships through regular engagement and feedback
* Lead customer\-centric programs that promote service excellence and enhance overall customer experience.


**Capability Building \& Talent Development**
* Build, mentor, and develop high\-performing, future\-ready team
* Ensure readiness to support complex products, technologies, and workflows
* Drive succession planning, resource mapping, and continuous learning initiatives
* Foster a culture of innovation, collaboration, and continuous improvement


**Cross\-Functional Collaboration**
* Partner closely with Sales, Service, and Solution units to ensure aligned execution
* Establish strong communication channels and collaboration frameworks
* Act as a bridge between customers and internal stakeholders to ensure seamless delivery
* Ensure best practices from different regions can be adapted and timely execution of it.


**Business Delivery \& Performance**
* Drive service revenue growth, operational efficiency, and cost optimization
* Expand value\-added service offerings and improve market penetration
* Delivery on key performance metrics such as revenue, cost of service (COS), and customer experience (ACX)
* Develop and implement programs to support sustainable business growth


***Additional Details:***
* This full time role is based in Manesar and follows a regular shift schedule (8 AM to 4:30 PM IST).
* The work model is hybrid, with flexibility depending on business needs.
* Candidates may be based anywhere in India; relocation assistance will be provided for outstation candidates.
* Diversity candidates will be considered.
* This role involves 80% travel PAN India.


**Qualifications**
***Qualification Section:***
 Bachelor’s/Master’s Degree in Chemistry, Pharma, Engineering, or related field
   

  

* 8\+ years of relevant service or team management experience
* Strong understanding of customer environment and there business need, service delivery, and various levers of lab productivity improvement initiatives
* Proven leadership during program handling, problem\-solving, and cross\-functional collaboration
* Good knowledge of service business metrics, operational efficiency, and customer experience
* Effective communication and stakeholder management skills


**Additional Details**
 This job has a full time weekly schedule.
   

  

 Our pay ranges are determined by role, level, and location. Within the range, individual pay is determined by work location and additional factors, including job\-related skills, experience, and relevant education or training. During the hiring process, a recruiter can share more about the specific pay range for a preferred location. Pay and benefit information by country are available at: https://careers.agilent.com/locations
   

  

 Agilent Technologies Inc. is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, protected veteran status, disability or any other protected categories under all applicable laws.
   

  

**Travel Required:**
 50% of the Time
   

  

**Shift:**
 Day
   

  

**Duration:**
 No End Date
   

  

**Job Function:**
 Services \& Support

4107dec7.title: Transport Program Manager - India Operations
4107dec7.description:
**Job Title**


Transport Program Manager \- India Operations**Job Description Summary**

**Job Description**

**Role Summary**


The Transport Program Manager will be responsible for the end\-to\-end management, strategic development, and operational oversight of all employee and corporate transportation services across India. This role requires a strong blend of strategic thinking, robust data analytics, vendor management, and hands\-on operational execution to ensure a safe, efficient, and cost\-effective transport program.

 **Core Responsibilities**

* End\-to\-End Program Management: Manage and oversee the entire employee transportation services program (shuttle services, cab pooling, etc.) across India, ensuring high standards of safety, compliance, and employee satisfaction.
* Ad\-hoc Car Rental Program: Manage the corporate car rental program for executive and business travel requirements, ensuring timely service and cost control.
* Policy \& Documentation: Prepare, review, and maintain comprehensive transport policies and procedures relevant to Indian regulations and internal best practices. Advise the client/leadership with best practices and innovative solutions for the region.
* Strategic Development: Develop and implement strategies for the continuous improvement of the transport program across India, focusing on efficiency, cost optimization, safety, and technology adoption.
* Cross\-Functional Collaboration: Collaborate effectively with multiple stakeholders (Security, HR, Finance, Facility Management, Leadership) to drive efficiencies and alignment across transport\-related initiatives.
* Feedback \& Resolution: Establish a formal process to review employee feedback and swiftly provide resolution on transportation\-related issues.
* Vendor Analysis: Conduct rigorous and continuous analysis of vendor performance based on contractual SLAs, key metrics (on\-time performance, safety records, incident rates), and cost efficiency.
* Contract Management: Assist in contract negotiation and manage day\-to\-day vendor relationships to ensure compliance, quality of service, and accountability.
* Financial Management: Oversee the transport budget, including budget preparation, tracking, and managing the monthly invoicing process with high accuracy.
* Reporting: Prepare detailed operational weekly reports, as well as materials for Monthly Business Reviews (MBR) and Quarterly Business Reviews (QBR) for leadership.
* Data Profi ciency: Be well\-versed with data management and possess hands\-on experience of data analytics tools such as Tableau, G Suite (Google Sheets), Microsoft Excel, and Smartsheet to derive actionable insights from large datasets.
* Training: Develop content and train Security Operations Center (SOC) operators on managing and addressing transport\-related queries, incident reporting, and capturing employee feedback effectively.
* Compliance: Ensure all transportation operations and vendor practices adhere to local, state, and PAN India legal and safety regulations.


Key Qualifi cations  

* 5\+ years in corporate transportation/logistics program management, preferably in a PAN India capacity.
* Communication: Profi cient communication skills (written and verbal) are essential for managing vendors, engaging employees, and presenting to senior leadership.
* Location/Operations: Must be based in Pune and be aware of PAN India operations and the diverse transportation challenges across different Indian cities.
* Technical Skills: Advanced profi ciency in Microsoft Excel (pivot tables, complex formulas), Google Sheets, and dashboard creation using tools like Tableau or similar BI platforms.
* Mindset: A strong problem\-solver with an analytical and process\-driven approach to operational management.
* Own the entire fi nancial lifecycle, including detailed budget preparation and diligent tracking of expenses against budget forecasts.
* Manage and audit the monthly vendor invoicing process, ensuring absolute accuracy, reconciling service logs with vendor claims, and highlighting cost variances.
* Develop and maintain real\-time operational dashboards to provide immediate visibility into program health.
  


INCO: “Cushman \& Wakefield”

f3c76fb5.title: Technical Program Manager (TPM) – Enterprise Integrations / SaaS
f3c76fb5.description:
**Role Overview**
 At IDfy, we turn “it can’t be done” into“wow,that was fast.
   

  

 As our Program Delivery Manager, you’ll be the maestro who cues every instrument—from pre‐sales hype to post‐go‐live high‐fives. If juggling timelines, decoding tech‐speak, and delighting customers sounds like an epic Tuesday, keep reading.
   

  

**We are the perfect match if you...**
* Have 6\+ years of experience in Project/Program Management with a focus on technical integrations or transformations.
* Have a proven track record of leading projects for enterprise clients, especially in the SaaS, APIs, or SDK domains.
* Are hands\-on with Cloud, REST APIs, JSON, XML, and integration workflows.
* Have a strong understanding of software development lifecycles, system design, and architecture principles.
* Possess exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to navigate complex conversations.
* Have strong problem\-solving and analytical abilities to address unique customer challenges.
* Demonstrate a proactive, customer\-focused mindset with an emphasis on delivering value.
* Are adept at mentoring and guiding junior team members.
* Have strong collaboration skills to foster teamwork and achieve project goals.


**Good To Have**
 Hold PMP, PRINCE2, or equivalent project management certification. Possess technical certifications in APIs, cloud platforms, or related areas, as these are a plus.
   

  

**Here’s What Your Day Will Look Like...**
* Lead and oversee technical integration and transformation projects for enterprise customers for Privy by IDfy.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure seamless delivery of technical solutions.
* Understand customer use cases to design solutions leveraging product suite.
* Provide technical guidance and solution configurations tailored to customer requirements.
* Own and manage the end\-to\-end product integration lifecycle, from requirement gathering to go\-live.
* Act as the single point of contact for product\-related queries and escalations during integrations.
* Collaborate with internal teams (product, engineering, sales) and external stakeholders to meet critical deadlines.
* Build strong relationships with enterprise clients, ensuring alignment on project goals and timelines.
* Serve as the go\-to product specialist for all IDfy product suite.
* Provide in\-depth technical insights on how solutions can be configured to meet complex enterprise needs.
* Facilitate and oversee all aspects of testing, including User Acceptance Testing (UAT), to ensure successful deployments.
* Proactively identify risks and troubleshoot issues during the integration process.

ffa6abce.title: Sr. Program Manager | Hardware NPI & Manufacturing - Consumer Healthtech
ffa6abce.description:
About the Role
 



  





 We are looking for a
 **Senior Program Manager – Hardware NPI \& Manufacturing** 
 to lead the end\-to\-end execution of hardware product development, from engineering and supplier readiness through pilot builds, production ramp\-up, and mass manufacturing.
 



 This role requires close collaboration with engineering, operations, sourcing, quality, and manufacturing teams to ensure products are delivered on time, within cost, and at the highest quality standards.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



  




* Drive end\-to\-end program execution across hardware product development and manufacturing.
* Own New Product Introduction (NPI) milestones, including
 **EVT, DVT, PVT** 
 , and production readiness.
* Coordinate cross\-functional teams including Mechanical, Electronics, Firmware, Software, Supply Chain, Quality, and Manufacturing.
* Manage suppliers, contract manufacturers (EMS), and external partners to ensure timely execution.
* Oversee tooling, BOM readiness, production documentation, testing processes, and manufacturing readiness.
* Identify and mitigate program risks related to quality, cost, timelines, and production capacity.
* Lead pilot builds, production ramp\-up, and monitor key manufacturing metrics such as yield, defects, and first\-pass quality.
* Drive cost optimization and value engineering initiatives while maintaining product quality and reliability.
* Establish project governance through regular reviews, dashboards, change management, and stakeholder communication.
* Support post\-launch manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives.



  





 Ideal Candidate
 



  




* **5–8\+ years** 
 of experience in Hardware Program Management, NPI, Manufacturing Engineering, or Product Industrialization.
* Experience taking
 **electromechanical hardware products** 
 from development through production.
* Strong understanding of
 **EMS/PCBA** 
 , plastics, sheet metal, machining, tooling, and assembly processes.
* Experience working with suppliers, contract manufacturers, and cross\-functional engineering teams.
* Hands\-on experience with manufacturing processes, quality systems, and production readiness.
* Familiarity with
 **FMEA, RCA, CAPA/8D, ECO/ECN, change management** 
 , and risk management.
* Excellent project management, stakeholder management, and communication skills.
* Bachelor's degree in Mechanical, Electronics, Manufacturing, Industrial Engineering, or a related field.



  





 Preferred Experience
 



  




* Consumer Electronics, IoT, Medical Devices, HealthTech, or other hardware product companies.
* Exposure to embedded systems, sensors, thermal products, or reliability\-critical hardware.
* Experience working with manufacturing partners across India or international locations.
* PMP, Six Sigma, or other project/quality certifications are an advantage.



  





 Success in this Role
 



  




* Quickly establish visibility into product development, supplier readiness, and project risks.
* Successfully drive cross\-functional execution through pilot builds and production launch.
* Improve manufacturing quality, production efficiency, and scalability while building robust NPI processes for future products.

c26e5bcc.title: Technical Program Manager
c26e5bcc.description:
About the Company
 



  





 The tech space is crowded, but most solutions feel like they’re cut from the same cloth — missing the mark on what businesses truly need. Organizations are chasing innovation, but too often, it comes at the expense of flexibility, independence, and real technological depth. At Dawn Technologies is a niche company laser\-focused on delivering specialized tech solutions in Gen AI, Data Engineering, and Backend Systems. What sets us apart is our commitment to the technologists — the creators, problem\-solvers, and innovators who bring true value to transformation. We believe that teamwork plus talent equals exceptional results. We are looking for teammates who are great problem solvers and enjoy collaborating within a team to achieve big outcomes.
 



  





 Job Summary:
 



  





 We are seeking a high\-caliber Technical Program Manager (TPM) to lead the execution and delivery of next\-generation digital solutions for a major client in the pharmaceutical domain. In this role, you will be the strategic anchor bridging the gap between deep technical engineering and business outcomes.
 



 You will oversee complex, cross\-functional programs centered around modern backend architectures, Agentic AI solutions(e.g., autonomous LLM workflows, digital agents), and machine learning frameworks. Rather than being hands\-on with code, your value lies in technical governance, delivery excellence, and exceptional client relationship management. As the primary customer\-facing leader, you will manage senior stakeholders, translate business visions into technical delivery roadmaps, and ensure flawless execution.
 



  





**Technical \& Domain Expertise:** 




  





 Pharma Domain Context: Proven track record of managing technical programs or digital initiatives within the Pharmaceutical, Life Sciences, or Healthcarespace, with a solid grasp of the domain's unique constraints.
 



**AI \& Agentic Solution Delivery:** 
 Experience successfully driving the delivery of programs involving Generative AI, specifically Agentic workflows
 **(multi\-agent orchestration, LLM applications, digital agents)** 
 . You know how to track AI delivery milestones, manage non\-deterministic outcomes, and align AI capabilities with business goals.
 



**Backend Project Governance:** 
 Solid technical literacy in modern backend landscapes
 **(Microservices, RESTful APIs, cloud infrastructure)** 
 . Proven ability to interface deeply with architects, challenge engineering estimates, and unblock cross\-functional dependencies.
 



**Machine Learning Delivery (Big Plus)** 
 :Experience overseeing projects that successfully moved Machine Learning models or data engineering pipelines from experimental stages into production environments.
 



 Leadership \& Management:
 



 Experience Level:
 **7–10 Years** 




**Domain:Pharmaceuticals / Life Sciences** 




 Core Focus:Delivery Management of Agentic AI \& Backend Systems, Client Leadership
 



**Client\-Facing Prowess:** 
 Minimum 3\+ years in an extremely customer\-facing role, successfully managing enterprise\-grade clients, handling expectations, and anchoring delivery status.
 



**Agile Master:** 
 Expert\-level knowledge of Agile/Scrum methodologies, Jira/Confluence, and modern project tracking frameworks to run high\-velocity sprints.
 



 Communication:Exceptional written and verbal communication skills; a natural storyteller who can command a room of senior executives and technical teams alike.

2ccb9f5c.title: Presales Consultant (Remote)
2ccb9f5c.description:
Muller's Solutions is looking for a motivated **Presales Consultant** to support our sales team by engaging with clients, understanding business requirements, and positioning the right technology solutions.

**Job Summary**
The Presales Consultant will work closely with the sales and delivery teams to understand customer needs, prepare technical and commercial proposals, conduct solution demonstrations, and support the sales cycle from qualification through proposal submission.

You will engage with prospective customers, understand their HR / people‑ops challenges, map those to Keka’s product/features, conduct demos or proofs of concept, and enable the sales team to close deals. * Skills \& Qualification


 sBachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Systems, or equivalent technical / business degree.3‑6 years of experience in pre‑sales / solution consulting / technical sales roles, ideally within SaaS / HRMS / HR technology domain.Strong understanding of APIs, integrations, data flows, security \& compliance requirements.Excellent communication, storytelling, and presentation skills; ability to deliver product demos convincingly.Able to explain complex technical or HR systems in simple business value terms.Customer‑facing experience; stakeholder management skills.Analytical mindset; ability to think through both functionality \& technical constraints.Ability to multi‑task, work under deadlines, respond to RFPs etc.Prior experience working cross‑functionally with Product / Engineering / Sales teams
   

  

**Preferred / Nice‑to‑Ha**
 veExperience with HRMS / HR tech platforms, marketplace/integration ecosystems.Prior exposure to enterprise customers (medium to large) with complex HR landscapes.Knowledge of data regulations/privacy (for example, GDPR / local data protection laws).Experience with technical demos, POCs.Certifications relevant to SaaS / integrations / cloud infrastructur
   

  

 e.
   

  

 What Success Looks L
   

  

 ikeConversion rate of presales engagements → closed deals.Reduction in sales cycle time by providing clear \& early clarifications during presales.Quality and timeliness of responses to RFIs/RFPs.High stakeholder / customer satisfaction during presales.Effective knowledge sharing: capturing recurring requirements, feature‑gap feedback to produ
   

  

 ct.
   

  

 Why Join
   

  

 KekaOpportunity to work in a fast‑growing HR tech SaaS company, where your presales contributions will directly impact revenue.Strong ownership and visibility across product, customer, and sales functions.Collaborative \& learning environment; your feedback and insights help shape the product roadmap.

d80881c4.title: Solutions Architect
d80881c4.description:
At Black Box, the mission of the
 **Multi\-Site Rollout Solution Architect** 
 is to lead the architecture of services for the physical deployment of complex enterprise solutions across multiple international sites. This role requires a strategic thinker and hands\-on expert who can design scalable, repeatable, and robust solutions to support global initiatives. You will partner closely with business stakeholders, regional teams, technology practices, and technical leads to ensure seamless rollout and adoption of solutions in diverse environments. This role has fantastic growth opportunities!
 



  





**Preferred locations** 
 : Bangalore, Mumbai
 



  





 RESPONSIBILITIES
 


* Manage opportunities and assist sales teams in the preparation, delivery, presentation and negotiation of multi\-site rollout and managed services proposals, contracts and pricing.
* Respond to RFPs, RFQ s and proactive bids while working closely with all teams to develop the win strategy, competitor evaluation and creating differentiated value propositions.
* Develop a deep understanding of Blackbox services capabilities.
* Lead the design and partner with delivery to develop execution strategy for multi\-site rollout services and managed services, ensuring seamless deployment and standardized configurations across diverse geographic locations.
* Lead collaboration with SMEs from other pre\-sales engineering groups to provide technical input where needed.
* Engineer deployment solutions for network refresh projects, working closely with clients to modernize legacy infrastructure, while minimizing downtime and business disruption.
* Drive infrastructure refresh initiatives, including server, storage, and network hardware upgrades, aligned with evolving business and technology requirements.
* Define support models and resource planning for Smart Hands services, enabling on\-site technical assistance across various customer environments.
* Design scalable and flexible frameworks for on\-demand support, including SLA\-based engagements to handle ad\-hoc technical requirements across IT infrastructure domains.
* Collaborate with Structured Cabling SMEs to engineer solutions that are compliant with standards and optimal network performance.
* Coordinate and deliver detailed Wi\-Fi site surveys, including predictive and physical surveys, to ensure optimal coverage, capacity, and performance for enterprise wireless networks.
* Plan and manage deployment solutions for Wireless Access Point replacement and refresh projects, ensuring minimal user impact and improved wireless experience across all business\-critical areas.



  





  





  





**KNOWLEDGE, SKILLS \& ABILITIES** 



* Strong business acumen and understanding of clients IT related business goals and challenges to ensure proper translation of the client’s needs into solutions.
* Understanding various pricing models such as per port, resource based, ticket based, onsite, remote or Hybrid.
* Experience of solutioning on deals involving multi\-site rollouts, managed services, network refresh projects, Smart Hands services, on\-demand support, structured cabling projects (both copper and fiber), Wi\-Fi site surveys and Access Point (AP) replacement and refresh projects, etc.
* Strong understanding of Pre\-sales/Solutions process and activities with hands\-on experience good bid/project management skills ability to manage multiple bids simultaneously.
* Ability to develop and deliver technical presentations with customers and tailor content to audience as appropriate.
* Display sustained energy and determination to meet challenging deliverables within stringent timelines.
* Ability to work independently with diverse \& global teams and interact confidently with customers and internal stakeholders at all levels.
* Fluent English written and verbal communication skills.
* Experience running support teams and/or operations a plus.
* Experience with Enterprise Networking and Unified Communications technologies.
* Strong Microsoft office skillset with specific emphasis on Word, Excel and Power Point.



  





  





  





**EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE** 



* Degree in a computer Science and Engineering or equivalent role relevant experience.
* 4\+ years in a customer/client facing technical role (Pre/Post Sales, Sales Engineering, Consulting, Solutions Architecture, Service Delivery, etc.) with a strong knowledge of various network architectures, virtualization, Cloud, Unified Communications and mobility solutions.
* 4\+ years of pre\-sale experience developing multi\-site rollout solutions or managed services solutions.
* ITSM training and certifications (ITIL,COBIT, etc.) is a plus.
* Extensive consulting experience, providing large, global customers with strategic and tactical planning for technology solutions.
* Demonstrated and verifiable track record of prior successful customer engagements (Examples of solution designs, statements of work and/or technical project plans are required).
* Experience with enterprise OEMs with a specific emphasis on Cisco.



  





  





  





**CERTIFICATIONS** 




 Industry certifications on technology partners, processes in one or more of the following preferred:
 


* ITIL



  





  





**KEY TECHNOLOGIES** 



* Enterprise Networking
* Structured Cabling
* Unified Communications
* Network Architecture
* Wireless Networking
