**About Comviva:** 




 Comviva empowers organizations to drive transformative growth with measurable business impact. Our AI\-driven digital solutions and intelligent platforms enable our customers to unlock new revenue opportunities, enhance customer experiences, and simplify operational complexities to achieve exponential success.
 



 From maximizing customer lifetime value to enabling large\-scale digital transformation, Comviva is trusted by 200\+ global communication service providers and enterprises to solve complex challenges and prepare for the future. With our solutions deployed across 100\+ countries, Comviva has brought the benefits of digital innovation and mobility to billions worldwide. As a Tech Mahindra Company and a member of the Mahindra Group, Comviva is committed to driving growth, efficiency, and transformation for tomorrow. Backed by a strong R\&D foundation, 70\+ patents, and recognition from Gartner, Forrester, IDC, and Juniper Research, we are trusted for our innovation, technology excellence, and the impact we create for our customers, communities, and the industry.

 At Comviva, you get the best of both worlds — the agility and innovation of a startup, powered by the scale and stability of a global enterprise. We foster a people\-first, inclusive, and empowering culture where ideas thrive, and individuals grow. Join us to create meaningful impact, collaborate with high\-performing teams, and advance your career with one of the world's most trusted brands — the Mahindra Group.

b081191c.title: Solutions Architect
b081191c.description:
**Job Summary** 




 We are looking for a highly skilled and customer\-focused Snowflake \& Databricks Solution Architect to support Data \& AI solutioning initiatives for enterprise customers. The role will be responsible for creating differentiated, scalable, secure, and business\-aligned solution responses for RFPs, RFIs, RFQs, proactive proposals, client workshops, Snowflake modernization programs, Databricks Lakehouse transformation engagements, cloud data platform modernization, AI/ML enablement programs, and strategic deal pursuits.
 



 The ideal candidate should have strong experience in Snowflake architecture, Databricks architecture, cloud data platforms, data warehouse modernization, data lake and Lakehouse modernization, ETL/ELT modernization, data engineering, data governance, DataOps, MLOps, , AI\-ready data platforms, Snowpark, Snowflake Cortex AI, Databricks Unity Catalog, Delta Lake, and managed platform operations.
 



 This is an individual contributor role requiring strong solutioning, consulting, technical architecture, and stakeholder management capabilities across modern Data \& AI ecosystems on Snowflake and Databricks deployed across AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud Platform.
 



  





**Section Title: Key Responsibilities** 




**Key Responsibilities** 




 Key Responsibilities
 


* Lead and expand the Data, Analytics, and AI Solutioning practice, with accountability for converting customer opportunities to wins – through innovative solution responses and demonstration
* Lead presales activities for Data \& AI opportunities \- including the preparation of proposal responses, solution presentation \& demonstrations, and propose suitable operating models etc.
* Stay abreast of emerging trends and innovations in the Data, Analytics, and AI landscape, integrating cutting\-edge practices into client solutions.
* Develop playbooks, frameworks, and repeatable solutions to drive Data, Analytics \& AI solution excellence and alignment to industry best practices
* Ability to lead / promote Data \& AI offerings in customer presentations, client visit presentations etc and work with pre\-sales/marketing team for development of collateral, and active thought leadership.
* The Snowflake \& Databricks Solution Architect will work closely with sales, presales, delivery, consulting, Snowflake partner teams, Databricks partner teams, hyperscale teams, and client stakeholders to define end\-to\-end cloud data platforms, Lakehouse, data engineering, analytics, and AI\-ready data solutions.
* The role will support business growth by shaping high\-quality proposal responses, solution blueprints, modernization strategies, migration approaches, Lakehouse and cloud data platform architecture diagrams, delivery models, reusable solution assets, managed operations models, and transformation roadmaps aligned to client business outcomes.



  





**Principal KPIs for the Role** 




 \- Strategic deal win rate (%)
 



 \- Revenue influenced ($)
 



 \- Margin uplift in strategic deals (%)
 



 \- Number of practice\-building initiatives contributed
 



  





**Section Title: Skill Requirements** 




**Skill Requirements** 




  





**Section Title: Must Have Skills** 




**Must Have Skills** 




 Data Bricks
 



 Snowflake

 Solutioning

**Location:** 




 Chennai
 



 Hyderabad
 



 Noida
 



 Bangalore
 



 Pune
 



  





  





**About US** 




 HCL Technologies is a next\-generation global technology company that helps enterprises reimagine their businesses for the digital age. Our technology products and services are built on four decades of innovation, with a world\-renowned management philosophy, a strong culture of invention and risk\-taking, and a relentless focus on customer relationships.
 



  





**How You’ll Grow** 




 At HCLTech, we offer continuous opportunities for you to find your spark and grow with us. We want you to be happy and satisfied with your role and to really learn what type of work sparks your brilliance the best. Throughout your time with us, we offer transparent communication with senior\-level employees, learning and career development programs at every level, and opportunities to experiment in different roles or even pivot industries. We believe that you should be in control of your career with unlimited opportunities to find the role that fits you best.
 



  





**Why Us** 




 · We are one of the fastest\-growing large tech companies in the world, with offices in 60\+ countries across the globe and 222,000 employees.
 



 · Our company is extremely diverse with 165 nationalities represented.
 



 · We offer the opportunity to work with colleagues across the globe.
 



 · We offer a virtual\-first work environment, promoting a good work\-life integration and real flexibility.
 



 · We are invested in your growth, offering learning and career development opportunities at every level to help you find your own unique spark.
 



 · We offer comprehensive benefits for all employees.
 



 · We are a certified great place to work and a top employer in 17 countries, offering a positive work environment that values employee recognition and respect.

087cdb1f.title: Senior Solutions Engineer - Public Sector (Delhi Based)
087cdb1f.description:
**About Neo4j**
 Neo4j is the graph intelligence platform that transforms data into knowledge to power the next generation of intelligent applications and AI systems. It includes enterprise\-ready knowledge graphs for accurate, explainable, and governed AI; the most comprehensive, trusted, and easy\-to\-deploy graph capabilities across any environment and data source; and an unmatched ecosystem trusted by 84 of the Fortune 100 and supported by the world’s largest graph community. Intelligence that works. Results that matter.
   

  

 Built to work everywhere and integrate with everything across every cloud for dynamic, personalized, and autonomous AI systems. We deliver quicker results, contextual knowledge, and solutions that impact customers and employees across the business.
   

  

**Our Vision**
 At Neo4j, we have always strived to help the world make sense of data.
   

  

 As business, society and knowledge become increasingly connected, our technology promotes innovation by helping organizations to find and understand data relationships. We created, drive and lead the graph database category, and we’re disrupting how organizations leverage their data to innovate and stay competitive.
   

  

 Role Overview
   

  

 As a Senior Solutions Engineer, you will be a key driver of Neo4j’s growth across India, with a primary focus on Public Sector customers including Government Ministries, Public Sector Undertakings (PSUs), Defence, Smart Cities, Law Enforcement, and other strategic government agencies. Based in Delhi (preferred), you will partner closely with Enterprise Account Executives, customers, and ecosystem partners to articulate business value, shape technical solutions, and accelerate the adoption of graph technology across some of the country's most complex and mission\-critical initiatives.
   

  

 This role requires a combination of technical expertise, consultative solution selling, and an understanding of the Public Sector procurement landscape, stakeholder ecosystem, and regulatory requirements. You will engage in deep technical and business discovery, support the sales process through value\-based selling, and collaborate with key partners, including hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP), strategic ISVs, and System Integrators to drive joint go\-to\-market initiatives.
   

  

**Additional Responsibilities (Public Sector Focus)**
**Sales Process \& Customer Engagement**
* Serve as the primary technical advisor for Public Sector opportunities across India.
* Engage with senior government stakeholders, technical teams, and procurement organizations to understand strategic initiatives and align Neo4j solutions to mission outcomes.
* Support complex RFP, RFI, and tender responses, ensuring Neo4j's value proposition is clearly articulated.
* Develop solution architectures that address government requirements around security, scalability, compliance, and data sovereignty.


**Partner \& Ecosystem Collaboration**
* Build strong relationships with leading Public Sector\-focused System Integrators and consulting partners including TCS, Infosys, LTIMindtree, Wipro, HCLTech, Tech Mahindra, and EY.
* Collaborate with hyperscaler Public Sector teams to identify and execute joint opportunities.
* Support partner enablement activities focused on government use cases and solution offerings.


**Additional Skills \& Experience**
* Experience supporting Public Sector, Government, Defence, Homeland Security, Smart Cities, or regulated industry customers.
* Strong understanding of government procurement processes, tendering frameworks, and large\-scale digital transformation initiatives.
* Experience working with major System Integrators supporting Public Sector accounts.
* Ability to engage credibly with both technical practitioners and senior government decision\-makers.


 Location
   

  

**Preferred Location:** 
 Delhi NCR, India
   

  

 Given the concentration of key government ministries, public sector agencies, defence organizations, and strategic partners in the region, candidates based in or willing to relocate to Delhi NCR will be strongly preferred. Regular travel within India may be required to support customer and partner engagements.

3d4b88a5.title: Pre-Sales Technical Specialist, ACI Growth
3d4b88a5.description:
Job Title
   

  

 Pre\-Sales Technical Specialist, ACI Growth
   

  

**Job Description**
 In this position, you will provide pre\-sales technical leadership for the Philips Capsule Medical Device Information (MDI), IntelliBridge Enterprise (IBE), IntelliSpace Critical Care and Anesthesia (ICCA), eCareManager (eCM), and Clinical Insight Manager (CIM) product lines, supporting growth across India, APAC, and META.
   

  

**Minimum Required Education**
 Bachelor's/master’s degree in computer science or a health science, or equivalent.
   

  

**Minimum Required Experience**
 Minimum of 4 years of experience working within a commercial capacity in the Healthcare Technology, Healthcare Analytics, or Information Technology area.
   

  

**Your Role**
* Act as the primary technical expert for ACI products, with a focus on Capsule MDI, in assigned regions during presales engagements and supporting the sales team with any technical support.
* Own solution architecture design, sizing, assumptions and technical risk identification for opportunities.
* Actively participate in documentation during the pre\-sales process, such as Solution Design Documents (SDD), Solution Architectures, and Statements of Work.
* Take ownership and provide feedback on pre\-sales artifacts, including document repositories, demonstrations, proof\-of\-concept (POC) environments and bundles.
* Maintain knowledge of market trends, healthcare interoperability standards, competitive offerings and industry best practices.
* Support competitive analysis activities and provide technical differentiation against competitor solutions.
* Lead technical discovery, architecture workshops, solution walkthroughs, site assessments and demonstrations with customers and partners.
* Define end\-to\-end data flows from bedside devices via the Capsule MDIP to third\-party solutions, such as CIS and EMR systems.
* Provide pre\-sales expertise across:
+ Capsule MDI platform, including device integrations
+ IBE/Interoperability (HL7, ADT/ORU, downstream systems)
+ IntelliSpace Critical Care and Anesthesia (ICCA)
+ eCare Manager (eCM)
+ Clinical Insights Manager (CIM)
+ While also supporting other products within the ACI portfolio

* Conduct detailed workflow assessments, device connectivity assessments and technical site surveys to validate solution feasibility and implementation assumptions.
* Ensure alignment with hospital IT organisations across security, networking, infrastructure and availability requirements.
* Participate in handover to delivery (HTD) to ensure clarity and solution intent, including assisting implementation and delivery when necessary.
* Contribute to deal governance, risk reviews, and internal approvals for any sales opportunities.
* Be the subject matter expert (SME) for Capsule MDI across META and India.
* Additional responsibilities for providing pre\-sales expertise for the IntelliBridge Enterprise and Clinical Insight Manager.
* Ability and willingness to travel across India, META and APAC markets as required to support customer engagements, workshops and demonstrations.


**You’re the right fit if**
* You have hands\-on experience supporting, designing, implementing, or selling healthcare software solutions such as Clinical Information Systems (CIS), Electronic Medical Records (EMR/EHR), Medical Device Integration platforms, interoperability solutions, or clinical analytics platforms.
* You have experience presenting, designing, influencing and advising customers on complex technical solutions throughout the sales lifecycle, from discovery and qualification through solution design, proposal development and technical validation.
* You have a strong understanding of enterprise infrastructure, networking, cloud platforms, cybersecurity principles, healthcare interoperability and integration technologies, including HL7, FHIR, APIs, SQL, XML/JSON, ADT/ORM/ORU workflows.
* You are an effective communicator who can clearly articulate both technical concepts and business value to clinical, technical, and executive stakeholders.
* You are self\-motivated, adaptable and collaborative, with a willingness to learn, embrace new challenges, work across multiple cultures and geographies, and contribute to a high\-performing regional team.


**How We Work Together**
 We believe that we are better together than apart. For our office\-based teams, this means working in\-person at least 3 days per week.
   

  

 Onsite roles require full\-time presence in the company’s facilities.
   

  

 Field roles are most effectively done outside of the company’s main facilities, generally at the customers’ or suppliers’ locations.
   

  

 Indicate if this role is an office/field/onsite role.
   

  

**About Philips**
 We are a health technology company. We built our entire company around the belief that every human matters, and we won't stop until everybody everywhere has access to the quality healthcare that we all deserve. Do the work of your life to help the lives of others.
   

  

* Learn more about our business.
* Discover our rich and exciting history.
* Learn more about our purpose.


 If you’re interested in this role and have many, but not all, of the experiences needed, we encourage you to apply. You may still be the right candidate for this or other opportunities at Philips. Learn more about our culture of impact with care here.
   

  

 \#connectedcare

e4ad253e.title: Lead Solutions Engineer
e4ad253e.description:
**Your role at Dynatrace**
**What’s the role?**
 As a Dynatrace Solution Engineer, you will be a key member of the Dynatrace sales engine and will be responsible for providing excellent technical support to the sales team. You will be the expert on Dynatrace and all facets of Advanced Observability. Within this exciting role, you will be responsible for executing great demos which demonstrate the Dynatrace unique approach in solving the customer’s pain, executing and managing POCs onsite and remote, building key relationships with Dynatrace’s customers and completing RFIs \& RFPs. You will also work across teams including Dynatrace’s innovation labs, Dynatrace’s Expert Services consultants, CSMs and marketing.
   

  

**About You**
 To ensure your success as a Solution Engineer at Dynatrace, you need to be an ambitious, confident and self\-motivated individual, with previous SE experience or another technical customer facing role. You need to be passionate about innovative technology, technical sales and articulating value to customers and prospects. In addition, we are also looking for:
   

  

* An excellent team player, with the ability to work across all disciplines.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to communicate technical value into business value.
* Previous 3 – 5 years of experience with observability or application performance management technologies and techniques.
* Ability to troubleshoot technical issues to produce a working outcome and be able to manage this process.
* Ability to manage a number of projects simultaneously, work with a number of different sales people and support other SEs where needed.
* Must have a strong desire to grow professionally, adapt to an ever\-changing environment and are coachable.
* Must be able to travel up to 30% of the time


**Responsibilities**
* Evangelize Dynatrace’s product offerings during international trade shows and at key customer account meetings to promote new and expanded business.
* Partner with sales representatives to identify new sales opportunities as well as incremental sales opportunities within existing accounts.
* As part of the solution engineering team participate in proof of concept (PoC) creation and cloud architecture discussions, leading the technical solution evaluation portion in support of sales opportunities either directly or through channel partners for multiple POCs.
* Present Dynatrace’s vision to our customers C\-suite executives.
* Provide technical guidance in the Discovery, Solution Evaluation, and Solution Proposal stages of the opportunity sales cycle.
* Present on\-stage demonstrations providing insight and context to our customers during key marketing events. Either at Dynatrace sponsored industry events or partner sponsored events, ensure key demonstrations are delivered by you or a team member at demonstration booths.
* Gather, qualify and provide feedback from customers to Product Management to improve Dynatrace’s market share and meet the market needs.
* Not only work with internal sales team, but also with partners, supporting their team in the customers and being a technical point of contact for them (trusted advisor/technical coach).
* Position might be filled at a higher level based on candidate experience.


**What Will Help You Succeed**
**Minimum Requirements:**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or equivalent education or experience required.
* 3 years of experience within the observability space.


**Preferred Requirements**
* Experience with web technologies such as HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
* Experience with programming / scripting side technologies such as Java, .NET, PHP, Go, Node.js and database.
* Advance knowledge of Operating Systems (OS) including Windows and Linux.
* Experience with DevOps or Site Reliability Engineering practices Knowledge with cloud platforms, including AWS, Azure or GCP.
* Experience with modern technologies like containers, Kubernetes / OpenShift, Serverless functions, and CI/CD pipelines.
* Experience with automation like Ansible, Puppet, Terraform, etc.


**Why you will love being a Dynatracer**
* Dynatrace is a leader in unified observability and security.
* We provide a culture of excellence with competitive compensation packages designed to recognize and reward performance.
* Our employees work with the largest cloud providers, including AWS, Microsoft, and Google Cloud, and other leading partners worldwide to create strategic alliances.
* You'll get to work at the forefront of innovation with Dynatrace Intelligence—the industry's first agentic operations system. Bringing together deterministic and agentic AI, it helps teams understand what's happening, why it matters, and what to do next— automatically
* Over 50% of the Fortune 100 companies are current customers of Dynatrace.

Collaborative Growth

Take charge

Embrace the true you


Embrace your inner trailblazer and unleash your creativity. We foster an environment encouraging bold ideas, out\-of\-the\-box thinking, and relentless innovation.

874a2e9a.title: Senior Solutions Consultant
874a2e9a.description:
**Job Summary**
 We are seeking a skilled
 **Senior Consultant \- Databricks** 
 to design, develop, and implement modern data engineering solutions using the Databricks platform. The ideal candidate will work closely with customers and internal teams to understand business requirements, build scalable data pipelines, and deliver high\-quality data solutions leveraging cloud\-based Lakehouse architecture.
   

  

 The role requires strong hands\-on experience in Databricks, Apache Spark, Python, and SQL, along with the ability to collaborate with stakeholders and contribute to end\-to\-end data platform implementations.
   

  

**Experience**
* 6\+ years of overall experience in Information Technology
* 3\+ years of hands\-on experience with Databricks
* Experience in developing and implementing enterprise data engineering solutions


**Key Responsibilities**
* Collaborate with customers and business stakeholders to understand data and analytics requirements
* Design, develop, and maintain scalable data pipelines using Databricks and Apache Spark
* Build and optimize ETL/ELT workflows for batch and near real\-time data processing
* Implement Data Lakehouse solutions following the Medallion Architecture (Bronze, Silver, Gold)
* Develop data transformation logic using Python, PySpark, and SQL
* Ensure data quality, reliability, and performance through testing and optimization
* Troubleshoot and resolve data processing and performance issues
* Work closely with Solution Architects, Data Engineers, and DevOps teams to deliver end\-to\-end solutions
* Participate in code reviews and follow development best practices
* Create technical documentation and provide support during deployment and production activities


**Required Technical Skills**
* Strong hands\-on experience with Databricks
* Proficiency in Python, SQL, and Apache Spark (PySpark)
* Good understanding of Data Lake and Lakehouse architecture
* Experience implementing Bronze, Silver, and Gold data layers
* Experience designing and developing ETL/ELT pipelines
* Knowledge of Delta Lake and Spark performance optimization
* Understanding of data modeling and data integration concepts
* Experience working with structured and semi\-structured data


**Preferred Skills**
* Experience with cloud platforms such as Microsoft Azure, AWS, or Google Cloud Platform
* Familiarity with Delta Live Tables, Unity Catalog, Databricks Workflows, and MLflow
* Experience with orchestration tools such as Azure Data Factory, Apache Airflow, or similar
* Knowledge of Git, CI/CD pipelines, and Agile development methodologies
* Databricks or cloud platform certifications are an added advantage


**Soft Skills**
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills
* Good communication and customer interaction skills
* Ability to gather and analyze business requirements
* Strong collaboration and teamwork skills
* Ability to manage multiple tasks and deliver within project timelines
* Willingness to learn new technologies and adapt to evolving project requirements


**What You'll Bring**
* Hands\-on expertise in Databricks and modern data engineering practices
* A customer\-focused approach with the ability to translate business requirements into technical solutions
* A passion for building scalable, reliable, and high\-performance data platforms
* The ability to work independently as well as collaboratively in cross\-functional teams

4a47b342.title: Solution Architect -Vendavo
4a47b342.description:
Experience:10 \+yrs
 



  





 NP: Immediate \-15 days
 



  





 Location : PAN India
 



  





  





**Overview:** 




 As an
 **Automotive Aftersales Parts Pricing Consultant** 
 , you will drive innovative pricing and revenue management solutions for global automotive clients across
 **Sales, Marketing, and Aftersales** 
 . Leveraging hands\-on expertise in
 **Vendavo, Syncron, or Pricefx** 
 , you will design and implement data\-driven pricing solutions to improve margins and price realization.
 



 You will collaborate closely with
 **sales and delivery teams** 
 to shape solutions, support deal pursuits, and lead implementations, while engaging directly with OEMs and aftermarket stakeholders. The role emphasizes leveraging
 **AI/ML, analytics, GenAI, and cloud** 
 to enable intelligent, scalable pricing transformation.
 



  





**Role: Automotive Aftersales Parts Pricing Consultant (Vendavo / Syncron / Pricefx)** 




**Key Responsibilities** 




**1\. Customer Engagement \& Advisory** 



* Partner with sales teams to identify opportunities and understand client pain points across automotive aftersales (parts pricing, rebates, discounting, margins).
* Engage OEMs, dealers, and distributors to capture business goals, pricing challenges, and transformation needs.
* Act as a trusted advisor, driving consultative discussions on pricing strategy, profitability improvement, and digital pricing transformation.
* Lead solution envisioning workshops and define high\-level architecture for pricing platforms (Vendavo, Syncron, Pricefx).



  





**2\. Solution Design, Implementation \& Value Demonstration** 



* Design end\-to\-end pricing solutions covering
 **price management, price optimization, discount/rebate management, and CPQ integration** 
 .
* Drive
 **hands\-on implementation** 
 of pricing platforms (configuration, integration, data models, workflows, and rule setup).
* Develop compelling proposals, solution decks, and demos showcasing business impact (margin uplift, revenue growth, price realization).
* Conduct client workshops, roadshows, and PoCs to accelerate deal closure and solution adoption.
* Stay current with evolving pricing technologies, AI\-led pricing models, and automotive aftersales trends.



  





**3\. Domain Expertise \& Thought Leadership** 



* Build thought leadership in
 **automotive parts pricing, revenue management, and aftermarket digitization** 
 .
* Publish POVs, whitepapers, and case studies on pricing transformation and AI\-driven pricing strategies.
* Provide industry insights and competitive benchmarking to support sales and client decision\-making.
* Contribute to internal capability building around pricing platforms and accelerators.



  





**4\. Stakeholder \& Relationship Management** 



* Build strong relationships with client stakeholders across
 **business (aftersales, pricing, finance) and IT teams** 
 .
* Collaborate with delivery, product vendors (Vendavo/Syncron/Pricefx), and partners to ensure successful implementations.
* Position the organization as a credible
 **pricing transformation partner** 
 through domain expertise and execution excellence.
* Drive alignment across global teams and ensure high customer satisfaction and value realization.



  





**Required Skills \& Competencies** 



* Strong understanding of
 **Automotive Aftersales value chain** 
 , especially parts pricing, demand patterns, and dealer ecosystem.
* Deep expertise in at least one pricing platform:
 **Vendavo / Syncron / Pricefx** 
 (implementation, configuration, integration).
* Knowledge of
 **pricing processes** 
 : price waterfalls, discount structures, segmentation, elasticity, and margin optimization.
* Experience in
 **solution architecture and system integration** 
 (ERP, CRM, DMS, CPQ).
* Strong communication and executive presentation skills.
* Solid understanding of
 **SDLC, Agile delivery, and program management** 
 .
* Excellent analytical, problem\-solving, and stakeholder management capabilities.
* Awareness of emerging trends like
 **AI\-driven pricing, dynamic pricing, and connected aftersales** 
 .



  





**Experience Requirements** 



* 12–15 years of experience in
 **automotive digital transformation** 
 , with strong focus on aftersales and pricing.
* Proven
 **hands\-on implementation experience** 
 in Vendavo, Syncron, or Pricefx.
* Experience working with
 **automotive OEMs, Tier\-1 suppliers, or aftermarket players** 
 .
* Background in consulting, product companies, or IT services delivering pricing transformations.
* Strong client\-facing experience, including workshops, solutioning, and stakeholder management.
* Experience supporting
 **pre\-sales activities** 
 : proposals, demos, and business development initiatives.
* Exposure to
 **global programs and cross\-region stakeholder engagement** 
 .



  





**Value Proposition of the Role** 



* Drive
 **margin expansion and revenue growth** 
 for automotive clients through pricing transformation.
* Lead
 **next\-gen pricing platform implementations** 
 powered by AI and analytics.
* Shape
 **pricing strategy for OEM aftersales ecosystem** 
 including dealer networks and parts lifecycle.

97ed141d.title: Solution Architect, SASE
97ed141d.description:
At Check Point, what you do matters. Every day, we protect over 100,000 organizations worldwide from increasingly sophisticated cyber and AI\-driven threats, securing their AI transformation.
   

  

 Our prevention\-first approach safeguards hybrid networks, cloud environments, digital workspaces, and AI systems, stopping attacks before they happen.
   

  

 This is where innovation meets real\-world impact. You’ll help customers across industries operate with confidence in a rapidly changing digital world, working alongside smart, curious people who take ownership, challenge assumptions, and solve complex problems.
   

  

 We’re proud to be recognized by TIME, Newsweek, and Forbes for excellence and workplace culture.
   

  

 What really sets Check Point apart is the opportunity to grow, contribute, and help companies navigate their AI transformation securely.
   

  

 If you’re excited to work at the forefront of AI\-driven security on a global scale, this is the place to do it.
   

  

**Job Description**
 We are looking for an experienced Solutions Architect to join our rapidly expanding Secure Service Edge business. This role involves overseeing all technical Proof of Concepts (POCs) within the Secure Service Edge domain and offering customers both technical expertise and strategic guidance.
   

  

* Provide guidance on technical and strategic aspects of customer engagements.
* Provide POC and Eval guidance, support and strategic thinking in designing and improving new or existing processes.
* Lead and manage different sales engineering opportunities, ensuring alignment with company objectives and sales targets.
* Collaborate with sales teams to identify customer requirements and tailor solutions that address their needs.
* Provide technical expertise and support during the sales process.
* Develop and maintain strong relationships with key customers and partners.
* Work closely with product management and engineering teams to relay customer feedback and influence product development.
* Stay up to date with industry trends, competitor products, and market intelligence
* Conduct technical presentations and demonstrations to showcase the value of our products and conduct C\-level meetings.
* Act as a liaison between the sales and product teams, providing valuable insights for product enhancements.


**Qualifications**
* Proven experience in leading and managing a sales process.
* Experience in a customer\-facing role, preferably in a sales engineering capacity.
* International experience is requested.
* Strong technical acumen with the ability to understand and communicate complex technical concepts.
* Proven experience in presenting products and solutions at National and International events, and local events.
* 5\+ years of a strong technical background with a deep understanding of cybersecurity, and network security.
* Good understanding of Secure Service Edge and SASE solutions.
* Extensive Salesforce experience.
* Outstanding interpersonal, communication and presentation skills.
* Demonstrated success in collaborating with cross\-functional teams.
* Strategic thinking and problem\-solving abilities.
* Ability to travel as required.
* Must be eligible to work in the US without sponsorship from an employer now or in the future

753268e7.title: Solution Consultant - Manufacturing & Operations
753268e7.description:

 📍

 Bangalore
 



 🕒

 6–12 Years

 Full\-Time

e9456b55.title: Enterprise Product Solutions Consultant
e9456b55.description:
**Role Overview**
 As a Senior Product Solutions Consultant, you will serve as the primary technical bridge between our Sales, Product, and Engineering teams. You will be responsible for translating complex global logistics challenges—such as customs compliance, multi\-modal routing, and international tax regulations—into scalable software solutions. You will lead high\-stakes discovery sessions and deliver compelling, value\-driven demonstrations to C\-suite stakeholders at global enterprises.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Solution Architecture:** 
 Design end\-to\-end global logistics workflows that leverage our SaaS platform to solve complex cross\-border pain points (e.g., automated duties/taxes, landed cost calculations, and carrier integrations).
   

  

**Product Evangelism:** 
 Lead technical product demonstrations that move beyond features to focus on business outcomes, ROI, and operational efficiency.
   

  

**Discovery \& Scoping:** 
 Conduct deep\-dive discovery sessions to understand prospective clients' current "as\-is" shipping processes and define the "to\-be" state using our TMS.
   

  

**Cross\-Functional Collaboration:** 
 Act as the "voice of the customer" for the Product team, providing feedback on market trends and specific localized requirements (e.g., Brexit\-related compliance or IOSS/OSS changes).
   

  

**RFP/RFI Ownership:** 
 Lead the technical response for Requests for Proposals, ensuring all security, integration (API/EDI), and functional requirements are met.
   

  

**Implementation Hand\-off:** 
 Ensure a seamless transition from the pre\-sales phase to the Professional Services/Implementation teams by providing detailed solution blueprints.
   

  

**Required Qualifications**
**Experience:** 
 5\+ years in Pre\-Sales, Solutions Consulting, or Sales Engineering within the
 **SaaS Supply Chain** 
 or
 **Logistics** 
 sector.
   

  

**Domain Expertise:** 
 Deep understanding of
 **Cross\-Border logistics** 
 , including Incoterms, HS Codes, Customs Brokerage, and Freight Forwarding.
   

  

**Technical Proficiency:** 
 Strong grasp of API integrations, EDI standards, and how TMS platforms interact with ERPs (like SAP, Oracle, or NetSuite).
   

  

**Communication:** 
 Proven ability to explain complex technical or regulatory concepts to non\-technical audiences.
   

  

**Education:** 
 Bachelor’s degree or Masters Degree in relevant field.

1a034b3b.title: Lead Cloud Ops Engineer I
1a034b3b.description:
**Bring more to life.**


Are you ready to accelerate your potential and make a real difference within life sciences, diagnostics and biotechnology?


At Cepheid, one of Danaher’s 15\+ operating companies, our work saves lives—and we’re all united by a shared commitment to innovate for tangible impact.


You’ll thrive in a culture of belonging where you and your unique viewpoint matter. And by harnessing Danaher’s system of continuous improvement, you help turn ideas into impact – innovating at the speed of life.


At Cepheid, we are passionate about improving health care through fast, accurate, molecular diagnostic systems and tests. As a member of our team, you’ll get to make an immediate, measurable impact on a global scale, within an environment that fosters career growth and development. Our mission drives us to develop groundbreaking solutions for the world’s most complex health challenges. Together, we bring MORE change to the world.


Learn about the Danaher Business System which makes everything possible.


As a **Lead Cloud Ops Engineer** **I**, you will be responsible for leading CloudOps initiatives, designing, implementing and, automating CloudOps processes, managing cloud infrastructure, ensuring system reliability through monitoring, and building operational excellence in Cloud software operations.


In this hands\-on role, you will collaborate closely with our Software, Hardware, Research, Quality and Regulatory and Operations teams—as well as other cross\-functional partners—to design and develop the Cloud infrastructure to achieve operational excellence and improve the Cloud software operations. You will partner with Cepheid IDC and Cepheid Sunnyvale leadership to build technical capability at Cepheid.


This position is part of the R\&D Department and will be located in Bangalore, IDC, India . Our vision is to continuously drive innovation and efficiency in our development processes, leveraging the latest in software and hardware technologies to meet the needs of our global customers.

**In this role, you will have the opportunity to:**

* **Cloud Operations Management\-** Lead cloud operations implementation, maintenance, and monitoring to improve efficiency, reliability, and scalability of software operations infrastructure; deliver scalable cloud operations infrastructure to streamline processes and automate operational tasks
* **Infrastructure Automation Engineering\-** Implement automation for infrastructure provisioning, configuration, deployment, and lifecycle management using Chef, Ansible, Docker, and related automation frameworks
* **AWS Cloud Infrastructure Administration\-** Oversee and manage AWS cloud environments using infrastructure‑as‑code (IaC) practices, ensuring consistent deployment, configuration, and environment governance
* **Monitoring, Performance, Security, and Compliance\-** Implement and enhance monitoring systems to ensure high availability and performance; enforce CloudOps security controls and compliance standards across cloud environments
* **Technical Documentation and Cross‑Functional Integration\-** Produce technical documentation including IQ protocols, reports, backup and recovery policies, support and maintenance plans, and upgrade plans; interface with SQA, Marketing, Service, Support, and project/program management during product development and delivery

**The essential requirements of the job include:**

* Engineering degree in computer science or equivalent with 8\+ years of related work experience as a Cloud Operations engineer
* Experience leading and managing Cloud Operations teams with responsibility for operational execution and service reliability
* Hands‑on proficiency with AWS cloud services and containerization/orchestration using Docker and Kubernetes
* Proficiency with CI/CD tooling including Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, or GitHub Actions, and Infrastructure as Code development using Terraform, Puppet, or Chef
* Experience with scripting languages such as Python, Bash, or PowerShell, and monitoring tools including Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, or Datadog

**It would be a plus if you also possess previous experience in:**

* A background in leveraging AI to improve operational performance.
* Experience working with distributed teams in a global setting.
* Comfortable in using a wide variety of open source technologies and tools.
* Experience with systems administration and IT operations (networks, cyber security, etc.)
* Experience with regulated environments – tool validation and validated processes.


Cepheid, a Danaher operating company, offers a broad array of comprehensive, competitive benefit programs that add value to our lives. Whether it’s a health care program or paid time off, our programs contribute to life beyond the job.


Join our winning team today. Together, we’ll accelerate the real\-life impact of tomorrow’s science and technology. We partner with customers across the globe to help them solve their most complex challenges, architecting solutions that bring the power of science to life.


For more information, visit www.danaher.com.

93d1423c.title: AI Solution Engineer
93d1423c.description:
At Consilium Safety Group, we don’t just develop technology, we create solutions that protect people, assets, and the planet. As a global leader in fire and gas safety technology, we serve critical industries such as marine, energy, rolling stock, and critical infrastructure.


With more than 100 years of expertise, we combine deep industry knowledge with cutting\-edge innovation to shape the future of Safety Tech. Headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden, we operate in more than 55 offices worldwide.


We are a fast\-evolving global organisation backed by leading private equity investor Antin Infrastructure Partners, continuing an ambitious journey of growth and transformation. With strong financial backing and a clear strategic direction, we are investing in innovation, operational excellence, and talent, the key drivers of our next phase of development.


A truly exciting time to join us.

**Your Role**


As part of our digital transformation strategy, we are accelerating the adoption of Artificial Intelligence across our business to improve decision\-making, automate processes, and create smarter digital experiences. We are building scalable AI capabilities that empower our people, enhance operational efficiency, and drive innovation across the organization.


We are looking for a passionate and forward\-thinking **AI Solution Engineer** to join our Shared Service Center in Kochi, India. You will design, develop, and implement AI\-powered business solutions that solve real business challenges and create measurable value.


In this role, you will work closely with business stakeholders, Data Engineers, Power Platform Engineers, software developers, and technology partners to identify opportunities, build scalable AI solutions, and integrate AI capabilities into enterprise applications and business processes. You'll play a key role in shaping our enterprise AI platform and helping transform innovative ideas into production\-ready solutions.

**What You'll Do**


As an AI Solutions Engineer, you will:

* Design, develop, and implement AI and Generative AI solutions that improve business processes, automate workflows, and enhance decision\-making.
* Build scalable AI applications using cloud AI services, Large Language Models (LLMs), enterprise data platforms, and Microsoft AI technologies.
* Develop AI\-powered assistants, copilots, intelligent search solutions, and knowledge management applications.
* Design and implement Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures, prompt engineering strategies, semantic search capabilities, and vector database solutions.
* Build AI agents and agentic workflows that automate business tasks and improve operational efficiency.
* Develop secure APIs and integration patterns connecting AI solutions with ERP, CRM, Microsoft 365, Power Platform, and other enterprise systems.
* Collaborate with business stakeholders to identify, prioritize, and deliver high\-value AI use cases.
* Create reusable AI components, frameworks, and development standards that accelerate enterprise AI adoption.
* Monitor, evaluate, and optimize AI solution performance, quality, security, and cost.
* Stay current with emerging AI technologies and recommend innovative opportunities that support Consilium's digital transformation.

**About You**


We're looking for someone who combines technical expertise with curiosity, creativity, and a passion for building practical AI solutions that deliver business value.


You have:

* A Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field.
* 2–4 years of experience in software engineering, AI engineering, solution development, data engineering, or similar technology roles.
* Experience with one or more programming languages such as Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, or Power Fx.
* Hands\-on experience designing, developing, and deploying AI or Generative AI solutions in enterprise environments.
* Experience working with Large Language Models (LLMs) and enterprise AI platforms such as Azure AI Foundry, Azure OpenAI Service, OpenAI Platform, Microsoft Copilot Studio, or similar technologies.
* Practical experience with prompt engineering, Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG), semantic search, vector databases, embeddings, and AI orchestration frameworks.
* Experience building AI\-powered applications, copilots, intelligent automation solutions, chatbots, or knowledge assistants.
* Familiarity with Azure services, REST APIs, cloud\-native application development, and modern software engineering practices.
* Understanding of AI governance, responsible AI principles, security, and data privacy considerations.
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving, and communication skills.
* Experience working in Agile delivery environments.

**Why Join Consilium?**


At Consilium, you'll help define how AI is used across a global organization and work with some of Microsoft's most advanced AI technologies to solve meaningful business challenges.


We offer:

* A competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package.
* The opportunity to build and shape enterprise AI capabilities from the ground up.
* Exposure to cutting\-edge AI technologies, including Azure AI, Microsoft Copilot, Azure OpenAI, and modern cloud platforms.
* Challenging projects with real business impact across a global organization.
* A collaborative, innovative, and supportive workplace culture.
* Opportunities for continuous learning, professional development, and career growth in one of the fastest\-growing technology domains.

**Ready to Shape the Future with AI?**


If you're passionate about Artificial Intelligence, enjoy solving complex business challenges, and want to build innovative solutions that make a real difference, we'd love to hear from you.

**Apply today and become part of our global journey.**

Approves contingent worker timesheets/costs.

Assignee / Regular

No

Build and integrate RESTful APIs, microservices, and serverless components using .NET Core and Azure Functions. Develop responsive and user\-friendly front\-end applications using React JS, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and related frameworks/libraries. Participate in technical design discussions, architecture reviews, code reviews, and performance optimization activities. Collaborate with product owners, business analysts, architects, QA teams, DevOps teams, and other stakeholders. 3f76268a.title: Sr Architect
3f76268a.description:
Area(s) of responsibility
   

  

 Lead pre\-sales pursuits (RFPs, RFIs, proactive proposals) across AIOps, Service Assurance, Infra \& Application Monitoring, Event Management, and Automation/Orchestration — including multi\-tower and managed\-services deals.
   

  

* Architect end\-to\-end AIOps and observability solutions that ingest, normalize, and correlate high\-volume telemetry (metrics, logs, traces, events) across cloud, on\-prem, and hybrid estates to reduce client MTTD/MTTR.
* Design and embed Agentic AI solutions — autonomous/multi\-agent frameworks, LLM\-powered and function\-calling agents — into enterprise ITSM and IT/Cloud Operations workflows.
* Conduct technical discovery and value\-discovery workshops; convert client SLAs and reliability objectives into measurable SLIs/SLOs.
* Create solution designs, architecture blueprints, effort estimates, scope of work (SoW), and pricing inputs in partnership with sales, bid, finance, and delivery teams.
* Lead OEM/tool evaluations and POCs, balancing features, scale, cost, and integration complexity; leverage OEM partnerships (Aisera, ServiceNow, Dynatrace, Splunk, etc.) for joint pursuits.
* Contribute to order\-booking and revenue targets for the pursuit pipeline; review pricing benchmarks and effort\-estimation models
* Act as the technical SME and trusted advisor in client orals, solution defense, and stakeholder discussions; own objection handling and win\-theme alignment.
* Map client requirements into platform capabilities and a clear implementation roadmap.
* Define, build, and present compelling demos and Proof\-of\-Value (PoV) engagements; maintain reusable demo assets and reference architectures.
* Ensure a clean solution\-to\-delivery handover — transitioning architecture, scope, and assumptions to project/delivery teams for successful execution.
* Build the practice: develop reusable solution accelerators, estimation models, capability decks, and reference documentation; mentor solution and delivery engineers on AIOps patterns and Agentic AI adoption.
* 12–15 years in IT across design, engineering, implementation, and pre\-sales — with 3\+ years in pre\-sales/solutioning of AIOps use cases for enterprise/global clients.
* Strong understanding of IT operations, infrastructure management, and application performance monitoring; sound ITIL foundations.
* Hands\-on experience with ITSM tooling (ServiceNow preferred) and across enterprise AIOps platforms — Aisera, Moogsoft, BigPanda, ServiceNow ITOM/AIOps, HPE OpsRamp, ScienceLogic.
* Scripting (JavaScript or similar), low\-code/no\-code platforms, and hands\-on REST API integration and automation workflow experience.
* Expertise integrating and leveraging data from monitoring/logging/alerting tools — Datadog, Prometheus, Grafana, ELK (Elasticsearch/Logstash/Kibana), Splunk, Nagios, Dynatrace, AppDynamics, New Relic, OpenTelemetry.
* Extensive hands\-on experience with at least one major cloud — AWS, Azure, or GCP; working knowledge of containers (Docker, Kubernetes).
* DevOps \& SRE practices and tooling — Ansible, Terraform, Jenkins, Helm, CI/CD pipelines.
* Understanding of ML for IT Operations — anomaly detection, predictive analytics, event correlation, and automated root\-cause analysis.
* Generative \& Agentic AI fluency: LLMs, embeddings, RAG, prompt engineering, multi\-agent/agent\-orchestration, and LLM\-powered automation (AI workflows / function\-calling).
* Knowledge of RPA/Intelligent Automation (UiPath, Automation Anywhere, Blue Prism) is a plus.

1b01604f.title: Enterprise Architect
1b01604f.description:
**Join our Team**
**About this opportunity:**
 Join our team at Ericsson as a Solution Architect, a critical role that drives our end\-to\-end technical solutions based on customer specifications and burgeoning business needs. As part of our dynamic team, you will facilitate profitable business growth by bridging customer needs and technical opportunities into robust offerings and proposals. You will support the Consultants during the requirement analysis and high\-level design phases while having the chance to assume responsibilities in Customer Support, sales, and service delivery.
   

  

**What you will do:**
 Be part of SD Architecture Board to define and maintain the enterprise roadmap and architectural guidelines.
   

  

 Analyse the existing Service Delivery Application and tools landscape, its processes and support enabling a common backlog for all development initiatives. Identify opportunities for process improvement and optimization within the SD IT ecosystem
   

  

 Provide technical guidance and oversight to development teams to ensure alignment with Software Technology areas.
   

  

 Evaluate emerging technologies and trends to make recommendations for their adoption and integration into the organization's technology stack.
   

  

 Lead the design and implementation of scalable and innovative technology solutions.
   

  

 Contribute to the development and maintenance of enterprise architecture standards and frameworks.
   

  

 Assess and mitigate technical risks and challenges across projects and initiatives.
   

  

 Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business requirements and translate them into effective technology solutions.
   

  

**The skills you bring:**
 In\-depth knowledge of Enterprise Architecture, Software architecture, design patterns, and Agile methodologies.
   

  

 Hands\-on experience with wide range of technologies, including but not limited to Java, J2EE, Python, Ansible, Microservices, API design patterns, Webservices, DevOps, Kubernetes, Docker, JIRA, Messaging, security, Elastic search, Enterprise Architect, Software architect, Business Process Modelling and non\-functional aspects of application development.
   

  

 Zeal for continuous evaluation of new technology stacks and able to execute PoC’s for last mile analysis. Experience in guiding and mentoring technical teams and driving architectural decisions in a collaborative environment.
   

  

 Exposure to Marketplace development platform and community building initiatives.
   

  

 Comprehensive understanding of multi\-cloud architectures, technologies, and services across major cloud providers such as AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud Platform.
   

  

 Certifications: CKAD, CKA, Architect/professional certifications in any HCP (AWS, GCP, Azure), TOGAF, are a plus.
   

  

**Why join Ericsson?** 
 At Ericsson, you´ll have an outstanding opportunity. The chance to use your skills and imagination to push the boundaries of what´s possible. To build solutions never seen before to some of the world’s toughest problems. You´ll be challenged, but you won’t be alone. You´ll be joining a team of diverse innovators, all driven to go beyond the status quo to craft what comes next.
   

  

**What happens once you apply?** 
 Click Here to find all you need to know about what our typical hiring process looks like.Encouraging a diverse and inclusive organization is core to our values at Ericsson, that's why we champion it in everything we do. We truly believe that by collaborating with people with different experiences we drive innovation, which is essential for our future growth. We encourage people from all backgrounds to apply and realize their full potential as part of our Ericsson team. Ericsson is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. learn more.

2598bf4c.title: Technical Lead/Architect
2598bf4c.description:
**Job Title:** 
 AVP – Regional Technical Architect
   

  

**Department** 
 : ITG Cardif
   

  

**About Business line/Function:** 
 BNP Paribas Cardif is the insurance subsidiary of BNP Paribas. We are a worldwide leader of the Credit Protection Insurance market with strong positions in savings and protection insurance in more than 30 countries in Europe, Asia and Latin America.
   

  

 In Asia, Cardif regional IT team provides services to our business entities in Japan, South Korea , Taiwan and our regional office in Hong Kong.
   

  

**Position Purpose:** 
 The regional Tech lead / Architect works for Cardif Asia regional IT.
   

  

 You will be responsible for defining, co\-building, communicating, or validating a technical architecture (covering both application software architecture and infrastructure architecture) description to ensure the new IT solution under development fits for its intended purpose.
   

  

 You will predominantly focus on technologies or solutions implementation by providing a technical leadership for development / integration teams and defining standards and practices to stick to.
   

  

 You will have the responsibility for technical architecture and associated documentation (guidelines, specifications, etc.) and will ensure that the Information System (at both IT System and Application software levels) is consistent and sustainable.
   

  

 The regional Architect works in close collaboration with the other architects at central or local level and with Subject Matter Experts.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Direct Responsibilities
   

  

**Design Solution**
* Contribute to impact analysis and studies about business needs and architecture enhancements / evolutions
* Help define non\-functional requirements for the designed solution
* Support project / product teams to design IT solutions and new technical architectures
* Make recommendations about technologies to use (IT System, application software, etc.)
* Identify the interfaces between components and collaborations between them
* Realize exploratory studies or prototypes to investigate the feasibility of a new IT solution and whether they fit in with existing architecture
* Assess technical risks related to the solution to implement


**Govern And Control Architecture**
* Organize and contribute to architecture and security committees
* Contribute to project identification / selection (portfolio), assessment, and validation in a collaborative way
* Monitor technical architecture requirements within project activities
* Ensure the company’s systems are secure and reliable Draft technical specifications defining the functionalities and capabilities to be implemented


**Solution Implementation And Support**
* Provide support to implement IT solutions and new technical architectures and incorporate it on existing IS
* Draft and update procedures and instructions regarding operations
* Lead the analysis of the current technology environment to detect critical deficiencies and
* recommend solutions for improvement
* Contribute to identify and resolve the root cause of incidents


 Contributing Responsibilities
   

  

**Define The Architecture Vision And IS Master Plan**
* Identify the emerging technologies and contribute to technology watch studies in his/her area of expertise
* Contribute to the definition of target information system architecture in the 5\-year Master plan


**Design Reference Architectures**
* Contribute to architecture frameworks definition and maintenance
* Promote the architecture frameworks
* Contribute and validate technical architecture documentation (e.g. technical patterns)


**Technical \& Behavioral Competencies**
**Specific Qualifications**
 Minimum 10 years of experience in IT development, or system integration.
   

  

 Experience in software architecture design.
   

  

**Technical Skills**
**Skills Referential** 
**(** 
**Required knowledge, skills and abilities)**
* 
+ Architecture modeling tool (BizDesign, Archi, Abacus, Mega)
+ Architecture modeling language (Archimate, UML)
+ Architecture framework (TOGAF, Open Group)


**Behavioral Skills**
* 
+ Analytical Ability
+ Ability to understand, explain and support change
+ Ability to manage / facilitate a meeting, seminar, committee, training…


**Education Level:** 
 Bachelor degree or equivalent
   

  

**Location:** 
 Chennai
   

  

**About BNP Paribas Group**
 BNP Paribas is the European Union’s leading bank and key player in international banking. It operates in 65 countries and has nearly 185,000 employees, including more than 145,000 in Europe. The Group has key positions in its three main fields of activity: Commercial, Personal Banking \& Services for the Group’s commercial \& personal banking and several specialized businesses including BNP Paribas Personal Finance and Arval; Investment \& Protection Services for savings, investment, and protection solutions; and Corporate \& Institutional Banking, focused on corporate and institutional clients. Based on its strong diversified and integrated model, the Group helps all its clients (individuals, community associations, entrepreneurs, SMEs, corporates and institutional clients) to realize their projects through solutions spanning financing, investment, savings and protection insurance. In Europe, BNP Paribas has four domestic markets: Belgium, France, Italy, and Luxembourg. The Group is rolling out its integrated commercial \& personal banking model across several Mediterranean countries, Turkey, and Eastern Europe. As a key player in international banking, the Group has leading platforms and business lines in Europe, a strong presence in the Americas as well as a solid and fast\-growing business in Asia\-Pacific. BNP Paribas has implemented a Corporate Social Responsibility approach in all its activities, enabling it to contribute to the construction of a sustainable future, while ensuring the Group's performance and stability.
   

  

**About BNP Paribas India Solutions**
 Established in 2005, BNP Paribas India Solutions is a wholly owned subsidiary of BNP Paribas SA, European Union’s leading bank with an international reach. With delivery centers located in Bengaluru, Chennai and Mumbai, we are a 24x7 global delivery center. India Solutions services three business lines: Corporate and Institutional Banking, Investment Solutions and Retail Banking for BNP Paribas across the Group. Driving innovation and growth, we are harnessing the potential of over 10000 employees, to provide support and develop best\-in\-class solutions.
   

  

**Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**
 At BNP Paribas, we passionately embrace diversity and are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace where all employees are valued, respected and can bring their authentic selves to work. We prohibit Discrimination and Harassment of any kind and our policies promote equal employment opportunity for all employees and applicants, irrespective of, but not limited to their gender, gender identity, sex, sexual orientation, ethnicity, race, colour, national origin, age, religion, social status, mental or physical disabilities, veteran status etc. As a global Bank, we truly believe that inclusion and diversity of our teams is key to our success in serving our clients and the communities we operate in. As a global Bank, we truly believe that inclusion and diversity of our teams is key to our success in serving our clients and the communities we operate in.

b2a0c76b.title: Software Architect
b2a0c76b.description:
**About the Role** 




 Responsive is looking for a
 **Software Architect** 
 who combines deep technical expertise with strategic leadership to design and evolve scalable, reliable, and secure SaaS architectures. In this role, you will collaborate with engineering, product, and security teams to define architectures, drive technical decision\-making, and ensure solutions align with business goals. You will play a critical role in building trust with stakeholders, mentoring engineering teams, and driving innovation across the organization.
 



 We welcome candidates who thrive at the intersection of
 **architecture, technology strategy, and hands\-on problem\-solving** 
 , and who are eager to make an impact in a fast\-paced SaaS environment.
 



  





**What You’ll Be Doing** 



* **Architecting Solutions at Scale:** 
 Design, document, and evolve large\-scale distributed systems that balance performance, reliability, scalability, and cost efficiency.
* **Cross\-Functional Collaboration:** 
 Partner with product, security, and engineering teams to shape and continually refine Responsive’s technology stack and architecture.
* **Technical Leadership:** 
 Embed with engineering teams for large projects, providing architectural guidance, and act as a consultant for smaller initiatives.
* **Hands\-On Contribution:** 
 Lead by doing—coding, optimizing, and troubleshooting across the stack
 **(Java, Spring Boot, React, MongoDB)** 
 —while partnering with feature development teams.
* **Performance \& Reliability:** 
 Investigate, analyze, and resolve bottlenecks to optimize system performance, maintain high uptime SLAs, and ensure efficient resource utilization.
* **Cloud\-Native Expertise:** 
 Design architectures leveraging
 **AWS, Azure, or GCP** 
 , containerization (
 **Kubernetes, Docker** 
 ), and Infrastructure\-as\-Code.
* **Innovation \& Adoption:** 
 Evaluate emerging tools, frameworks, and approaches; drive adoption where beneficial to improve developer productivity, performance, or customer experience.
* **Mentorship \& Enablement:** 
 Mentor engineers, foster best practices in solution design, and participate in technical roundtables and architectural reviews across the organization.
* **Incident Leadership:** 
 Participate in architectural governance and, over time, join on\-call rotations for high\-severity incidents to support system reliability.
* **Emerging Tech:** 
 Evaluate emerging tech (databases, LLM APIs, orchestration tools) and translating hype into grounded engineering choices.



  





**What We’re Looking For** 




  





**Education** 



* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.



  





**Experience** 



* **12\+ years** 
 of overall software development experience, with
 **at least 5 years focused on architecting** 
 and designing large\-scale, cloud\-based distributed systems.
* Proven track record leading architectural initiatives in
 **SaaS or enterprise\-scale environments** 
 .



  





**Skills, Qualifications \& Ability** 



* Strong expertise in designing
 **API\-driven applications** 
 and microservices architectures.
* Mastery in
 **Java and Spring Boot** 
 for backend development, with working knowledge of
 **React** 
 for frontend integration.
* Hands\-on experience with data layer technologies, including databases (
 **MongoDB, SQL/NoSQL** 
 ), caching systems, and messaging/event\-driven architectures.
* Expertise in
 **search and retrieval technologies** 
 such as ElasticSearch or Apache Solr.
* Strong knowledge of
 **application and cloud security best practices** 
 .
* Deep understanding of
 **cloud\-native architecture** 
 , container orchestration (
 **Kubernetes, Docker** 
 ), and CI/CD pipelines.
* Proficiency in performance optimization, monitoring, and troubleshooting using modern observability tools.
* Excellence in written and verbal communication, with the ability to tailor complex technical concepts for executives, engineers, and customers alike.
* Demonstrated ability to facilitate and resolve organization\-wide technical discussions, aligning stakeholders while driving to decisions.
* Experience in Agile environments, with tools like JIRA.
* Experience in designing and implementing AI\-powered applications, including LLMs, RAG architectures, AI agents, and workflow automation solutions
* Experience with
 **event\-driven architectures** 
 and real\-time data processing frameworks
* Familiarity with modern
 **observability stacks** 
 (Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry).



  





**Why Join Us?** 



* **Impact\-Driven Work:** 
 Build innovative solutions that redefine strategic response management.
* **Collaborative Environment:** 
 Work with a passionate team of technologists, designers, and product leaders.
* **Career Growth:** 
 Be part of a company that values learning and professional development.
* **Competitive Benefits:** 
 We offer comprehensive compensation and benefits to support our employees.
* **Trusted by Industry Leaders:** 
 Be part of a product that is trusted by world\-leading organizations.
* **Cutting\-Edge Technology:** 
 Work on AI\-driven solutions, cloud\-native architectures, and large\-scale data processing.
* **Diverse and Inclusive Workplace:** 
 Collaborate with a global team that values different perspectives and ideas.



  





**About Responsive** 




 Responsive (formerly RFPIO) is the global leader in strategic response management software, transforming how organizations share and exchange critical information. The AI\-powered Responsive Platform is purpose\-built to manage responses at scale, empowering companies across the world to accelerate growth, mitigate risk and improve employee experiences. Nearly 2,000 customers have standardized on Responsive to respond to RFPs, RFIs, DDQs, ESGs, security questionnaires, ad hoc information requests and more. Learn more at responsive.io.

46e82658.title: Solutions Architect
46e82658.description:
**Company Description** 
 Digiprima Technologies is a next\-generation AI software development company that turns advanced technologies into practical business value. The team builds scalable, intelligent web and mobile applications for enterprises across the USA, UK, Europe, South Africa, the Middle East, and Australia. With over 10 years of experience, 2,000\+ successful projects, and clients in 40\+ countries, Digiprima focuses on measurable business growth and high client satisfaction. The company delivers a wide range of AI and digital solutions, including generative AI, NLP, predictive analytics, computer vision, IoT, big data, and enterprise software. Digiprima serves diverse industries such as fintech, healthcare, smart manufacturing, retail, edtech, real estate, automotive, supply chain, and more.
   

**Role Description** 
 This is a full\-time, on\-site Solutions Architect role based in Indore. The Solutions Architect will design end\-to\-end technical architectures for AI\-driven and enterprise software solutions, ensuring scalability, security, and performance. Day\-to\-day responsibilities include collaborating with stakeholders to understand business requirements, translating them into technical designs, and guiding development teams through implementation and integration. The role involves evaluating technologies and platforms, creating architectural diagrams and documentation, and conducting technical reviews to maintain quality and best practices. The Solutions Architect will also provide consultative guidance to clients, contribute to proposal and pre\-sales activities, and support continuous improvement of architecture standards and processes.
   

**Qualifications**
* Strong Solution Architecture skills, including designing scalable, secure, and maintainable systems.
* Experience in Consulting and stakeholder management to translate business needs into technical solutions.
* Hands\-on background in Software Development with modern frameworks, cloud platforms, and APIs.
* Proficiency in system Integration, including microservices, third\-party APIs, and data pipelines.
* Understanding of Business Process analysis and optimization to align solutions with organizational goals.
* Relevant bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field.
* Experience with AI/ML, data engineering, or enterprise applications is highly beneficial.
* Knowledge of cloud platforms (e.g., Azure, AWS, or GCP) and architectural patterns such as microservices and event\-driven design.
* Ability to produce clear technical documentation and communicate complex concepts to technical and non\-technical audiences.
* Proven experience working in fast\-paced product or consulting environments, preferably in global projects.

678d4529.title: Customer Solutions Architect
678d4529.description:
**Job Description**
 The Solution Architect will work closely with customer technical teams to understand requirements and deliver E2E enterprise solutions (4G/5G), including high\-level and low\-level design, test planning, integration, deployment, and configuration. The role demands deep expertise in EPC and 5GC core elements across OpenStack and Kubernetes environments, with strong debugging and problem\-solving capabilities. Knowledge of networking protocols and telecom standards is essential. Excellent communication skills and ability to adapt quickly in learning\-as\-you\-work settings are critical for success.
   

  

**How You Will Contribute And What You Will Learn**
* Gathering customer requirement and should be able to deliver high level design, low level design, preparing test plan, integration, deployment, configuration of EPC \& 5GC packet core components for cloud\-based environment and appliance deliveries.
* Lead design, integration, deployment, and testing of Packet Core elements (EPC \& 5GC) for enterprise solutions.
* Collaborate with customer technical teams to support E2E solution for enterprise customers.
* Produce high\-level and low\-level designs, test plans, and configuration artifacts.
* Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues during deployment and operations.
* Ensure alignment with 4G/5G standards and best practices across customer environments.
* Provide technical guidance on cloud platforms (OpenStack/Kubernetes) and core telecom technologies.


**Key Skills And Experience**
 Must Have:
   

  

* 12\+ years in telecom network delivery (4G/5G) experience.
* Knowledge of 4G and 5G call flows, and overall knowledge of the latest technologies in the Telecom space including EPC, 5GC, VoLTE, IoT etc.
* Knowledge of 3GPP specs (e.g., 23\.401, 23\.501, 23\.502\).
* Experience in deployment of EPC \& 5GC network functions on OpenStack and containerized cloud environments.
* Knowledge of networking concepts such as TCP/IP, routes, eBGP, OSPF and IP subnetting, switching stack.
* Knowledge of tools such as Wireshark, iPerf, putty, FileZilla, MobaXterm, etc.
* Experience in Nokia products like CMM, CMG, CMU or APC shall be preferred.


 Good to have:
   

  

* Knowledge on Radio, Routers, NMS from overall network perspective.
* Experience in IMS/VoLTE, RAN, HSS and UDM is an added advantage.


**About Us**
**Advancing connectivity to secure a brighter world.**
 Nokia is a global leader in connectivity for the AI era. With expertise across fixed, mobile and transport networks, powered by the innovation of Nokia Bell Labs, we’re advancing connectivity to secure a brighter world.
   

  

 Learn more about life at Nokia .
   

  

**Our recruitment process**
 We act inclusively and respect the uniqueness of people. Our employment decisions are made regardless of race, color, national or ethnic origin, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, marital status, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law. We are committed to a culture of inclusion built upon our core value of respect.
   

  

 If you’re interested in this role but don’t meet every listed requirement, we still encourage you to apply. Unique backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences enrich our teams, and you may be just the right candidate for this or another opportunity.
   

  

 The length of the recruitment process may vary depending on the specific role's requirements. We strive to ensure a smooth and inclusive experience for all candidates. Discover more about the recruitment process at Nokia .

7f25b665.title: Oracle Cloud EPM Lead consultant
7f25b665.description:
Chennai, Tamil Nadu
  
Job Summary
  
The Lead Consultant for Oracle EPM Cloud PBCS is responsible for overseeing and managing the implementation, customization, and maintenance of Oracle EPM Cloud Planning and Budgeting Cloud Service for clients. They will collaborate with key stakeholders to understand business requirements, provide expert guidance on EPM solutions, and ensure successful project delivery.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
1\. Lead the implementation of oracle epm cloud pbcs projects, from requirements gathering to deployment.
  
2\. Customize oracle epm cloud pbcs applications to meet specific client needs and ensure optimal performance.
  
3\. Provide technical expertise and guidance on oracle epm cloud pbcs functionalities to clients and internal teams.
  
4\. Troubleshoot and resolve any issues or challenges faced during the oracle epm cloud pbcs implementation process.
  
5\. Conduct training sessions for end\-users to ensure proper utilization of oracle epm cloud pbcs applications.
  
6\. Stay updated on the latest oracle epm cloud pbcs features and functionalities to continuously enhance service delivery.
  
Skill Requirements
  
1\. In\-depth knowledge of oracle epm cloud planning and budgeting cloud service (pbcs), including configuration, customization, and administration.
  
2\. Proficient in epm business processes such as financial planning, budgeting, forecasting, and reporting.
  
3\. Strong understanding of oracle hyperion planning and essbase.
  
4\. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to effectively engage with stakeholders at all levels.
  
5\. Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a team environment to deliver high\-quality solutions.
  
6\. Analytical mindset with problem\-solving capabilities to address complex epm challenges efficiently.
  
Other Requirements
  
1\.Oracle Planning and Budgeting Cloud Service Specialist Certification is preferred.
