 Avalara strongly supports diversity, equity, and inclusion, and is committed to integrating them into our business practices and our organizational culture. We also have a total of 8 employee\-run resource groups, each with senior leadership and exec sponsorship.
   

  

**What You Need To Know About Avalara**
 We’re defining the relationship between tax and tech.
   

  

 We’ve already built an industry\-leading cloud compliance platform, processing over 54 billion customer API calls and over 6\.6 million tax returns a year. Our growth is real \- we're a billion dollar business \- and we’re not slowing down until we’ve achieved our mission \- to be part of every transaction in the world.
   

  

 We’re bright, innovative, and disruptive, like the orange we love to wear. It captures our quirky spirit and optimistic mindset. It shows off the culture we’ve designed, that empowers our people to win. We’ve been different from day one. Join us, and your career will be too.
   

  

**We’re An Equal Opportunity Employer**
 Supporting diversity and inclusion is a cornerstone of our company — we don’t want people to fit into our culture, but to enrich it. All qualified candidates will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, age, gender, national orientation, disability, sexual orientation, US Veteran status, or any other factor protected by law. If you require any reasonable adjustments during the recruitment process, please let us know.

360c05a4.title: Technical Program Manager, Anti Financial Crime
360c05a4.description:
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree in a technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience in program management.
* Experience leading technical discussions and plans.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Strong technical judgment and experience guiding technical decisions and discussions.
* Demonstrated ability to own and deliver complex, cross\-functional technical programs end\-to\-end.
* Excellent ability to influence without authority and drive consensus across engineering, product, and UX.
* Exceptional communication skills, articulating complex topics to technical and non\-technical audiences.


**About The Job**
 A problem isn’t truly solved until it’s solved for all. That’s why Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you’ll use your technical expertise to lead complex, multi\-disciplinary projects from start to finish. You’ll work with stakeholders to plan requirements, identify risks, manage project schedules, and communicate clearly with cross\-functional partners across the company. You're equally comfortable explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical tradeoffs in product development with engineers.
   

  

 In this critical portfolio level role, you will take lead on execution and delivery governance across multiple workstreams. This portfolio is in the process of building cross\-functional operating model maturity, with a focus on effective and efficient delivery at scale. You will have the opportunity to drive process improvements across cross\-functional teams and work with stakeholders across different business units on their top compliance priorities, on some of the top priorities. To be successful in the role in addition to program management skills, you will need to have excellent stakeholder management and communication skills, with the ability to influence and gain buy\-in across various stakeholder groups of technical and non\-technical teams across Google. You will be involved in all phases of the projects, including requirements gathering, planning, design, and deployment, through full integration.
   

  

 You will be part of a Global Payments Platform team and community working at global scale, with the opportunity to collaborate and drive impact not just within your program but also across the Payments community.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Collaborate with team members and stakeholders to understand or identify defined work problems and program goals, obtain prioritized deliverables, and discuss program impact.
* Prioritize program goals, understand and translate other stakeholders needs into program goals and prioritized deliverables with minimal assistance, and contribute to decisions on prioritizing goals and deliverables.
* Define the scope of projects and develop, execute, or manage project plans for supported programs.
* Review key metrics pertaining to a program, monitor potential metric deviations, and define corrective actions for critical deviations.
* Identify, communicate, and collaborate with relevant stakeholders within one or more teams to drive impact and work toward mutual goals. Build, maintain and enhance business, operational, and management dashboards.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

f252ceb0.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
f252ceb0.description:
**Senior Technical Program Manager** 




  





 Shell Recharge Solutions is a leader in delivering the new electric mobility future through innovative software, infrastructure, and professional services that empower utilities, cities, fleets, transit agencies, and automakers to deploy EV charging infrastructure at scale. Our technology is connecting EV infrastructure solutions with public and private charging needs in a safer, cleaner, and smarter way. Headquartered in Offshore India the company’s global footprint spans across three continents with deployments in 13 different countries.
 



  





 At Shell Recharge Solutions, we are looking for candidates who want to be a part of something bigger than themselves – passionate, purpose\-driven individuals who believe having a career means making a meaningful impact on our business and the world. We believe in creating and doing ‘the right thing’ through responsible and sustainable EV deployment. We are looking for the innovative, driven to find a solution in a complex and dynamically evolving marketplace and look at “no” as just a challenge to find the next “yes”.
 



  





 Shell Recharge Solutions is seeking a
 **Senior Technical Program Manager** 
 !
 



  





 Shell Recharge Solutions is looking for a Senior Technical Program Manager to lead our Run and Maintain (R\&M) portfolio, overseeing the stability and performance of our production platforms including the Charge Point Management System (CPMS), Mobile App, and MSP integrations. You will drive global coordination across Engineering, QA, SRE, DevOps, Support, and Product teams to ensure that issues are resolved quickly, incidents are prevented, and performance improves with each release.
 



 You’ll play a key role in operational strategy, change management, and the measurement of production success using DevOps and DORA metrics like MTTR, change failure rate, and deployment frequency.
 



  










**What you’ll do:**



* Lead program execution across multiple regions and systems, coordinating sprint cycles focused on feature delivery and production stability
* Define, track, and drive improvement across project delivery metrics: OnTime delivery, quality, cost control, planning effectiveness, stakeholder satisfaction
* Serve as a primary escalation point for quality issues and align stakeholders on prioritizing and delivering functionalities.
* Oversee entire lifecyle of requirement from discovery through development to handover to the support team with effective planning, risk management and stakeholder management.
* Build and maintain dashboards and reporting tools to provide visibility into plan, progress, system health, regression quality, and delivery velocity.
* Drive delivery excellence through process improvements, retrospectives, and proactive risk management
* Partner with Product managers, Engineering leadership to define scope, resource plan, assess technical debt, prioritize feature, and balance maintenance with new feature delivery
* Coach and mentor other program managers
* Represent the TPM function in cross\-organizational planning and quarterly release readiness forums



  










**What We’re Looking For:**




**Basic Qualifications**



* 8\+ years of experience in program or technical project management, with at least 3 in a product development
* Proven track record of managing large\-scale programs working with product managers, engineering team, quality team, operations team
* Strong understanding of Agile delivery and production\-readiness best practices
* Excellent communication, collaboration, and leadership skills, especially in high\-pressure situations
* Bachelor’s or Master’s in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related discipline



  





**Preferred Qualifications**



* Experience with EV charging platforms (CPMS, OCPP), mobile/backend app ecosystems, or other distributed systems
* Experience operationalizing DORA metrics
* Familiarity with incident management platforms, observability tooling, and CI/CD pipelines
* Comfortable leading in a global, matrixed environment with stakeholders across time zones



  





**What We Offer:**



* A work environment that allows you to work with and learn from some of the best and brightest in this emerging industry
* The ability to make a difference in a world that needs our technology to help reduce carbon emissions and enable a more sustainable energy future through the use of electric vehicle charging software, services and infrastructure
* The freedom to learn, suggest, and implement innovative new ideas applied to our systems, processes, programs and technologies
* Daily ownership of your role in a challenging, high\-growth environment.
* A casual work environment and culture that support work life ‘fit’, enabling you to fit life into your work and work into your life, i.e. flexible scheduling, virtualization options, and a generous holiday package
* Competitive pay and benefits programs designed to enable you to thrive inside and outside of work
* Participation in Shell Recharge Solutions’ performance and rewards bonus program
* Health benefits for employees
* Innovative Paid Time Off Program

847ddc2e.title: Technical Program Manager
847ddc2e.description:
At eBay, we're more than a global ecommerce leader — we’re changing the way the world shops and sells. Our platform empowers millions of buyers and sellers in more than 190 markets around the world. We’re committed to pushing boundaries and leaving our mark as we reinvent the future of ecommerce for enthusiasts.
   

  

 Our customers are our compass, authenticity thrives, bold ideas are welcome, and everyone can bring their unique selves to work — every day. We're in this together, sustaining the future of our customers, our company, and our planet.
   

  

 Join a team of passionate thinkers, innovators, and dreamers — and help us connect people and build communities to create economic opportunity for all.
   

  

**Position Summary**
**eBay is seeking a Technical Program Manager to support our Global technology organization. They will work closely with other internal corporate services, Information Security, Product Development \& Engineering and Quality Engineering to ensure successful coordination and planning for these functions. This role is ideal for candidates who can also lead projects at all stages, from concept to development, testing and beyond.**
****Key Responsibilities****
* Partner with internal teams and external technical (Product and Engineering) and non\-technical (Business and Policy) groups to ensure all designs, requirements and implementations are assessed, sized, tested and implemented.
* Lead program management activities and create program management artifacts (Example: project plans, milestone tracking and execution) for end\-to\-end delivery in close collaboration with the product, Engineering, vendor and other business units.
* Be a key technical decision maker for the respective Portfolio that you will be engaged in including holding others accountable for deliverables and removing roadblocks
* Support Roadmap planning and estimations with the respective Program teams
* Effectively communicate status to various stakeholders including key senior leadership
* Design, facilitate and lead various workshops with various stakeholders
* Enjoy operational precision and detailed program management, but understands the broader strategic context of the business


****Candidate Requirements****
* 3\+ years in project management throughout the product life cycle \& business systems analysis (preferably with customer support organizations) .
* Ability to quickly and independently identify technology dependencies and potential impacts
* Ability to communicate verbally and in writing clearly and succinctly, complex design and technical issues, as well as business and product specifications
* BS / BA in computer science, business, engineering and/or significant experience working for organizations that build/manage technology


**Additional Details**
 eBay is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran status, and disability, or other legally protected status. If you have a need that requires accommodation, please contact us at talent@ebay.com. We will make every effort to respond to your request for accommodation as soon as possible. View our accessibility statement to learn more about eBay's commitment to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities.
   

  

 We use cookies to enhance your experience and may use AI tools for administrative tasks in the hiring process. To learn how we handle your personal data and use AI responsibly, please visit our Talent Privacy Notice, Privacy Center, and AI Hiring Guidelines.

6356eeac.title: Technical Program Manager
6356eeac.description:
**Job Title:** 
 Technical Program Manager (TPM)
 



**Industry:** 
 Electric Vehicle (EV) / Automotive
 



  





 Job Summary
 



 We are seeking an experienced
 **Technical Program Manager (TPM)** 
 to lead the execution of complex, cross\-functional engineering programs in the Electric Vehicle (EV) domain. The ideal candidate will drive end\-to\-end technical program delivery across hardware, embedded software, cloud, and manufacturing teams using a hybrid delivery model that combines Waterfall and Agile methodologies.
 



  





 The TPM will serve as the bridge between engineering, product management, manufacturing, suppliers, and business stakeholders to ensure timely delivery of high\-quality, scalable, and compliant EV products.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



 Technical Program Management
 


* Lead end\-to\-end execution of complex EV programs involving hardware, embedded software, cloud, and connected vehicle technologies.
* Define program scope, technical roadmaps, work breakdown structures (WBS), milestones, dependencies, budgets, and delivery plans.
* Coordinate technical execution across Mechanical, Electrical, Firmware, Embedded Software, Battery Management Systems (BMS), Powertrain, Connectivity, Manufacturing, and Quality teams.
* Drive engineering planning from concept through design, validation, production, and product launch (SOP).



  





 Hybrid Program Delivery (Waterfall \+ Agile)
 


* Manage hardware development through Waterfall stage\-gate processes, including design reviews, prototype builds, validation, regulatory approvals, and production readiness.
* Govern Agile software execution for embedded systems, infotainment, telematics, OTA, cloud, and mobile applications.
* Align sprint deliverables, release planning, and software milestones with hardware integration and manufacturing timelines.
* Coordinate Program Increment (PI) Planning, sprint planning, release management, and cross\-team dependency tracking.



  





 Technical Leadership
 


* Collaborate with Engineering Managers, Architects, Product Managers, and Technical Leads to define technical strategies and execution plans.
* Identify technical risks, architectural dependencies, and integration challenges early in the development lifecycle.
* Drive engineering trade\-off discussions balancing performance, cost, quality, and delivery timelines.
* Ensure successful integration of hardware, firmware, software, and cloud platforms.



  





 Cross\-Functional Collaboration
 


* Lead collaboration across Engineering, Product, Manufacturing, Supply Chain, Procurement, Validation, Quality, Regulatory, and Customer Support teams.
* Coordinate activities with OEM customers, Tier\-1 suppliers, and external engineering partners.
* Remove blockers and resolve cross\-functional issues impacting program execution.



  





 Risk, Quality \& Compliance
 


* Identify and mitigate technical, program, supply chain, cybersecurity, and manufacturing risks.
* Ensure compliance with automotive quality and safety standards including:
* ASPICE
* ISO 26262
* APQP
* PPAP
* Functional Safety
* Cybersecurity (ISO/SAE 21434\)
* Automotive SPICE processes
* Track engineering KPIs, quality metrics, defect trends, and validation readiness.



  





 Stakeholder Management
 


* Prepare executive dashboards, program reviews, and engineering status reports.
* Present technical progress, risks, mitigation plans, and milestone health to senior leadership.
* Manage stakeholder expectations across engineering leadership, product teams, customers, and vendors.



  





 Continuous Improvement
 


* Improve engineering execution processes, governance, and delivery frameworks.
* Drive adoption of Agile best practices and hybrid delivery models.
* Standardize program metrics, reporting, and engineering operating mechanisms.
* Mentor engineering teams on program execution excellence.



  





 Required Skills \& Qualifications
 



 Must\-Have
 


* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Electronics, Electrical, Mechanical, Automotive Engineering, or a related field.
* 8–12\+ years of experience in Technical Program Management, Engineering Program Management, or Technical Project Management.
* Experience managing large\-scale automotive or EV engineering programs.
* Strong understanding of hardware–software co\-development.
* Hands\-on experience managing cross\-functional engineering teams.
* Experience with Agile, Scrum, Waterfall, and Hybrid delivery methodologies.
* Strong technical understanding of:
* Excellent communication, leadership, stakeholder management, and problem\-solving skills.



  





 Good to Have
 


* PMP Certification.
* SAFe Agilist (SA), SAFe Program Consultant (SPC), Scrum Master, or Agile certifications.
* Experience working with global OEMs or Tier\-1 automotive suppliers.
* Experience in EV startups or high\-growth automotive organizations.
* Exposure to autonomous driving, ADAS, digital cockpit, or connected mobility platforms.
* Knowledge of DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, and software release m

ca554068.title: SAP Platform Solution Architect
ca554068.description:
At Westernacher Consulting, we are looking for an experienced **SAP Platform Solution Architect** to join our global Platform Engineering CoE. This role is ideal for a hands\-on architect with strong expertise across SAP BASIS, Security, BTP, integration, and AI\-enabled platform solutions.
### **Your Responsibilities**

* Target architectures: on\-prem / RISE / GROW, S/4HANA, BTP subaccounts, destinations, connectivity.
* Network topology \& secure landscape: SAP Web Dispatcher, Cloud Connector, reverse proxy, firewall zones / DMZ, load balancing, SNC / TLS, port mapping.
* Identity \& access: IAS, IPS, XSUAA, IAG, corporate IdP federation, role governance.
* SAP Security: Understand and estimate efforts required security subjects and address
* SAP Business AI platform: AI Core, AI Launchpad, Generative AI Hub, Joule / Joule Studio, AI Agent Hub; agent identity \& zero\-trust.
* Presales: qualify opportunities, shape solutions, size effort (LoE / BoM), respond to RFI / RFP, deliver technical demos.
* Integration architecture: SAP\-to\-SAP and SAP\-to\-third\-party; sync / async, API / event / file, protocol \& auth selection (OAuth2 / SAML / mTLS / PrincipalPropagation).

Migrations: NEO* CF, system conversion, SUM / DMO.
* Reusable CoE assets: reference architectures, accelerators, PoVs.
### **Your Experience and Skills**

#### **Must\-Have**


* 8\+ yrs SAP BASIS \+ SAP Security, hands\-on architecture.
* RISE / GROW with SAP, S/4HANA conversion.
* Must have experience working on brownfield \- greenfield conversion
* Network topology: Web Dispatcher, Cloud Connector, reverse proxy, DMZ / firewall design, SNC, TLS.
* SAP BTP: subaccounts, destinations, XSUAA, Cloud Foundry.
* Identity: IAS / IPS, SAML / OIDC federation.
* Core BASIS: SUM, STMS, system copy / refresh, HANA admin.
* Authorization design (roles, profiles, SoD).
* Integration requirements analysis: SAP\-to\-SAP, SAP\-to\-third\-party; interface patterns, Cloud Connector, Integration Suite / Edge Integration Cell.
* SAP Business AI familiarity: AI Core / Gen AI Hub / Joule / Agent Hub.
* Presales exposure: RFP responses, solution sizing, or technical demos.
* Client\-facing English; global time\-zone flexibility.

#### **Nice\-to\-Have**


* Cloud ALM, SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance (IAG), Enterprise Threat Detection (ETD), vulnerability management.
* Hyperscaler (AWS / Azure / GCP) SAP workloads, security groups.
* RAG / prompt patterns, Document Information Extraction on BTP.
* SAP certifications (BTP, Security, HANA).
### **Why Westernacher?**


* Opportunity to work on large\-scale SAP RISE transformation programs.
* Exposure to global clients and modern SAP cloud technologies.
* Collaborative and innovation\-driven work environment.
* Continuous learning and professional development opportunities.
**This is WE:**
Committed to innovation, since 1969 Westernacher Consulting has operated worldwide, with more than 1200 consultants in Europe, Asia, and the Americas. Headquartered in Heidelberg, Germany, Westernacher Consulting is the global leader in business process and technology innovation.

Living, working, and operating in partnership. We are inquisitive, creative thinkers with a strong entrepreneurial spirit. We question new ways of working, think differently, and are willing to try out new approaches to create value and innovation for our customers. All of this makes us pioneers in our field and keeps us responsive, quality\-focused, and results\-oriented.

Westernacher is a diverse work environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status. Westernacher is also committed to compliance with all fair employment practices regarding citizenship and immigration status.

Life@Westernacher

\#LI\-TW1
We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

a9b1c90b.title: Pre-Sales Solutions Architect
a9b1c90b.description:
Miratech helps visionaries change the world. We are a global IT services and consulting company that brings together enterprise and start\-up innovation. Today, we support digital transformation for some of the world's largest enterprises. By partnering with both large and small players, we stay at the leading edge of technology, remain nimble even as a global leader, and create technology that helps our clients further enhance their business. We are a values\-driven organization, and our culture of Relentless Performance has enabled over 99% of Miratech's engagements to succeed by meeting or exceeding our scope, schedule, and/or budget objectives since our inception in 1989\.
   

  

 Miratech has coverage across 5 continents and operates in over 25 countries around the world. Miratech retains nearly 1000 full\-time professionals, and our annual growth rate exceeds 25%.
   

  

**Job Description**
 As a Solution Architect, you will play a key pre\-sales role in designing scalable, secure, and modern software solutions for enterprise clients, with a strong focus on modern software engineering practices, cloud\-native architecture, and customer experience (CX) enablement. You will collaborate with sales and delivery teams to shape technical proposals across a range of solution areas, including team extension engagements, scope\-based delivery models, and managed services. We also expect a strong willingness to expand into broader technical presales domains, including emerging areas such as artificial intelligence (AI), automation, cloud hyperscalers, and data\-driven solutions.
   

  

**Responsibilities:**
 Identify the value proposition for our enterprise clients, develop value propositions, solution proposals,
   

  

 and statement of works, including:
   

  

* Analyzing and gathering business requirements from large and complex client environments and performing required research and investigation to identify and create thorough, accurate technical solution proposals based on client requirements.
* Preparing effort and cost estimations for custom engineering and modernization projects, CX solutions implementations, customizations, integrations, and support services.
* Developing overall solutions, including high\-level designs, technical blueprints, statements of work, and service design for both CX and non\-CX domains.
* Contributing to sales engineering effectiveness by identifying short\-term and long\-range issues that must be addressed; providing information and commentary pertinent to deliberations; recommending options and courses of action; implementing directives.
* Supporting marketing and delivery organizations with knowledge transfer and technical requests as and when appropriate.


**Qualifications**
* University degree in mathematics, computer science, software development, or information technology preferred.
* 10\+ years of experience in software engineering, professional services, technical consulting, or solution architecture roles.
* Proficiency with modern architecture patterns, such as microservices, event\-driven systems, API\-first design, and containerization.
* Exposure to Customer Experience (CX) technologies or enterprise customer engagement platforms (e.g. Genesys, NICE, or similar) is highly desirable, but the primary expertise should be in modern software engineering and enterprise solution architecture.


 General Requirements:
   

  

* Strong communication and collaboration skills with the ability to interface directly with both technical and business stakeholders.
* Demonstrated experience in client interactions, pre\-sales engagements, customer workshops, and solution development processes.
* Ability to thrive in fast\-paced environments and deliver under tight deadlines


**Additional Information**
**We offer:**
* Culture of Relentless Performance: join an unstoppable technology development team with a 99% project success rate and more than 30% year\-over\-year revenue growth.
* Competitive Pay and Benefits: enjoy a comprehensive compensation and benefits package, including health insurance, and a relocation program.
* Work From Anywhere Culture: make the most of the flexibility that comes with remote work.
* Growth Mindset: reap the benefits of a range of professional development opportunities, including certification programs, mentorship and talent investment programs, internal mobility and internship opportunities.
* Global Impact: collaborate on impactful projects for top global clients and shape the future of industries.
* Welcoming Multicultural Environment: be a part of a dynamic, global team and thrive in an inclusive and supportive work environment with open communication and regular team\-building company social events.
* Social Sustainability Values: join our sustainable business practices focused on five pillars, including IT education, community empowerment, fair operating practices, environmental sustainability, and gender equality.
* Miratech is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity, or any other protected status under applicable law.

f8303383.title: Assistant Manager - PreSales
f8303383.description:
**Proximus Global** 
 , combining the strengths of
 **Telesign, BICS, and Route Mobile** 
 , is transforming the future of communications and digital identity. Together, our solutions fuel innovation across the world’s largest companies and emerging brands. Our unrivaled global reach empowers businesses to create engaging experiences with built\-in fraud protection across the entire customer lifecycle.
   

  

 Our comprehensive suite of solutions – from our super network for voice, messaging, and data, to 5G and IoT; and from verification and intelligence to CPaaS for personalized omnichannel engagement – enables businesses and communities to thrive. Reaching over 5 billion subscribers, securing more than 180 billion transactions annually, and connecting 1,000\+ destinations, we honor our commitment to connect, protect and engage everyone, everywhere.
   

  

**Key Highlights**
* Powering over 13 billion digital communications each month.
* Supporting 3,500\+ active customers — including enterprises, OTTs, and mobile operators — through a presence in 50\+ global offices across 100\+ countries.
* Managing 50% of the world’s roaming data traffic and connecting 150 million IoT devices.
* Driving innovation in 5G, private networks, and IoT enablement, positioning Proximus Global as a leader in next\-generation communication technologies.
* Committed to a unified vision, Proximus Global is unlocking new opportunities and enabling seamless global communications for businesses worldwide.


 Presales Engineer (CPaaS \& Digital Identity GTM)
   

  

 Department: Enterprise GTM – Product Organization
   

  

 Location: Mumbai
   

  

**About Us**
 Route Mobile is a leading Cloud Communication Platform (CPaaS) provider serving enterprises, OTT players, and mobile network operators globally. Our portfolio includes Messaging (SMS, WhatsApp, RCS), Voice, Email, Conversational AI, Analytics, Monetization, and Digital Identity solutions. We enable enterprises to deliver secure, scalable, and intelligent customer engagement experiences.
   

  

 Role Overview
   

  

 We are seeking a commercially driven Presales professional to support Enterprise GTM initiatives across CPaaS, Email, and Digital Identity portfolios. This role involves enterprise solutioning, competitive positioning, POCs, RFP responses, and cross\-functional coordination.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

 Design scalable enterprise solutions across Messaging (SMS, WhatsApp, RCS), Voice, Email, Chatbots, and Digital Identity use cases.
   

  

 Translate complex business requirements into technically feasible and commercially viable solutions.
   

  

 Lead discovery workshops and technical consultations with enterprise customers.
   

  

 Support Digital Identity use cases including OTP authentication, fraud prevention, number intelligence, and identity verification.
   

  

 Drive Email solutioning including deliverability best practices, SPF/DKIM/DMARC, IP warm\-up, and sender reputation management.
   

  

 Partner with Sales teams to improve win ratios and accelerate deal closures.
   

  

 Lead technical\-commercial responses for RFP/RFQ opportunities.
   

  

 Collaborate with Product and Engineering teams to provide structured market feedback and feature enhancement inputs.
   

  

 Benchmark against CPaaS and Digital Identity competitors and contribute to positioning strategies.
   

  

**Key Requirements**
 The successful candidate should have hands\-on experience with:
   

  

 SMTP and Email APIs
   

  

 Email Deliverability Best Practices
   

  

 SPF, DKIM, and DMARC
   

  

 Dedicated and Shared IP Management
   

  

 IP Warming Strategies
   

  

 Sender Reputation Management
   

  

 Inbox Placement Optimization
   

  

 Bounce and Complaint Handling
   

  

 Email Authentication and Security
   

  

 Domain Reputation Monitoring
   

  

 Transactional and Marketing Email Workflows
   

  

 Omnichannel Messaging Experience
   

  

**Experience In One Or More Of The Following Channels**
 WhatsApp Business Platform
   

  

 RCS Business Messaging
   

  

 SMS Messaging
   

  

 Voice Solutions
   

  

 Push Notifications
   

  

 Customer Engagement Platforms
   

  

 Technical Skills
   

  

 REST APIs
   

  

 JSON
   

  

 Webhooks
   

  

 Postman
   

  

 OAuth / Authentication Concepts
   

  

 Basic Cloud Knowledge (AWS, Azure, GCP)
   

  

 CRM and Marketing Automation Platforms
   

  

**Why PXS Global?**
* 🌍 Global \& Inclusive – Work with diverse teams across 100\+ countries, embracing a truly international culture.
* 📈 Growth\-Focused – Develop your career through tailored learning, leadership programmes, and internal mobility.
* 💡 Innovation\-Driven – Contribute to cutting\-edge projects in 5G, IoT, and next\-gen communication technologies.
* 🏠 Flexible Workstyle – Enjoy hybrid working with the option to work remotely and even from abroad for up to 10 days a year.
* 🚀 Efficient \& Scalable – Be part of a company that values simplicity, operational excellence, and smart growth.
* 🎁 Comprehensive Benefits – Enjoy a competitive and thoughtfully designed salary package, with a wide range of benefits.


**Skills \& Qualifications**
 2–4 years of experience in Presales / Solution Consulting within CPaaS, SaaS, Telecom, or Digital Identity domains.
   

  

 Strong exposure to enterprise customers across BFSI, E\-commerce, Travel, Fintech, or Digital sectors.
   

  

 Experience working with Messaging APIs, WhatsApp Business API, RCS, Voice, Email platforms, and Digital Identity solutions.
   

  

 Strong understanding of API integrations and cloud\-based architectures.
   

  

 Excellent presentation, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
   

  

 Ability to handle ambiguity and work in fast\-paced environments.
   

  

 Engineering background preferred; MBA is an added advantage.

076788db.title: Presales Solutions Architect - Media Operations
076788db.description:
**Role :** 
 DMO Solutions Architect
 



**Exp:** 
 8 \-10 Yrs
 



**Location:** 
 Bangalore
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 We are looking for a DMO Solutions Architect to partner with sales, account, and delivery teams to design, shape, and articulate transformation\-led digital marketing solutions for both new client pursuits and existing account expansion.
 



 This role will play a critical part in consulting with clients, defining future\-state marketing operating models, shaping commercials, and ensuring solutions are scalable, execution\-ready, and value\-driven. This role will report to the SVP – DMO.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**Client Consulting \& Solution Design** 



* Consult clients and prospects to assess current\-state digital marketing operations across channels such as paid media, SEO, social media, content, and marketing automation.
* Identify optimization and transformation opportunities across people, process, technology, and marketing operating models.
* Conduct discovery and solutioning workshops with client stakeholders, including marketing, CX, analytics, IT, and business leaders.
* Design end\-to\-end DMO transformation solutions to improve campaign performance, customer engagement, and ROI.
* Act as a key solutioning partner to the SVP – DMO, supporting strategic pursuits, complex deals, and account expansion initiatives.



**New Deal \& Presales Solutioning** 



* Partner with sales and presales teams on new deal pursuits, RFPs, and proactive proposals.
* Shape solution narratives, win themes, and value propositions aligned with client marketing and growth objectives.
* Support commercial solutioning, including effort estimation, channel mix strategy, operating model design, and alignment with pricing and margin expectations.
* Lead solution presentations and client discussions through proposal and deal closure stages.



**Existing Account Growth \& Expansion** 



* Work closely with delivery and account teams to identify growth opportunities within existing digital marketing engagements.
* Design expansion, transformation, and performance\-driven solutions to drive incremental revenue and improved campaign outcomes.
* Support account planning by providing digital transformation roadmaps and marketing innovation ideas.



**Transformation, Automation \& GenAI** 



* Leverage marketing automation, analytics, AI tools, and generative AI to improve campaign effectiveness, personalization, and efficiency.
* Translate GenAI and automation capabilities into practical use cases such as content generation, campaign optimization, audience segmentation, and performance insights.
* Ensure solutions balance innovation with execution feasibility, brand governance, and compliance.



**Delivery Alignment \& Execution Readiness** 



* Act as a key solutioning partner to the SVP – DMO on strategic initiatives and complex engagements.
* Collaborate with delivery, transition, and capability teams to ensure solutions are executable and scalable.
* Define high\-level transition approaches, governance models, KPIs, and success metrics (e.g., CAC, ROI, conversion rates).
* Ensure proposed solutions align with delivery capabilities, tools, and long\-term growth strategy.



  





**Required Qualifications** 



* Strong experience in digital marketing, with exposure to channels such as paid media, SEO, social media, content marketing, and marketing automation.
* 8–10 years of overall experience, with 5\+ years in solutioning, presales, consulting, or digital marketing strategy roles.
* Proven ability to engage and communicate with senior client stakeholders.
* Experience translating business and marketing challenges into clear, value\-driven digital solutions.
* Working knowledge of marketing tech stacks (e.g., CRM, CDP, automation platforms), analytics tools, and generative AI in a marketing context.
* Strong presentation, storytelling, and solution articulation skills.

00ef87ef.title: Senior Solutions Consultant
00ef87ef.description:
Senior Solutions Consultant – BFSI Deals
 



**Location:** 
 Mumbai
 



**Experience:** 
 6–10 years
 



**Deal Size:** 
 $50K–$100K ARR
 



 Drive BFSI Growth with Netcore
 



 Are you a consultative presales expert who understands the complexity of BFSI customer journeys and can translate enterprise challenges into compelling solution narratives? At Netcore, the opportunity is to partner with leading banks, NBFCs, insurers, fintechs, and financial institutions to solve high\-impact customer engagement, onboarding, cross\-sell, retention, and personalization use cases using an AI\-powered customer engagement platform.netcorecloud\+1
 



 Netcore helps brands unify data, personalize interactions, and orchestrate engagement across multiple channels including email, SMS, WhatsApp, app, and web, making it highly relevant for BFSI organizations focused on customer lifecycle growth and digital experience transformation. In this role, the focus will be on supporting enterprise BFSI opportunities across India, shaping winning solutions for strategic accounts, and helping drive $50K–$100K ARR deals from discovery to closure.netcorecloud\+1
 



 What You’ll Do
 


* Lead presales conversations for BFSI enterprise accounts across India, partnering closely with sales teams on qualified opportunities, strategic pursuits, RFPs, solutioning, and deal closure.
* Run deep discovery sessions with banks, insurers, NBFCs, and fintech customers to understand business goals, current engagement stack, customer journey gaps, data challenges, and regulatory or integration considerations.
* Design tailored solution narratives that align Netcore’s customer engagement, personalization, journey orchestration, and customer data capabilities to BFSI use cases such as onboarding, loan journeys, policy renewals, customer retention, upsell, collections engagement, service communications, and lifecycle marketing.netcorecloud\+1
* Deliver strong product demonstrations, workshops, and executive presentations that connect platform capabilities to measurable business outcomes such as engagement, conversion, retention, and lifetime value improvement.netcorecloud
* Support RFP and RFI responses with clear, structured, value\-led articulation of functional fit, solution architecture, integrations, and differentiation.
* Collaborate with product, customer success, and implementation teams to build relevant solution approaches, PoCs, and account\-specific proposals for complex BFSI buying environments.
* Act as a trusted advisor to both internal stakeholders and prospective clients by bringing market context, consultative problem\-solving, and strong commercial awareness into every deal cycle.
* Help strengthen Netcore’s positioning in BFSI by identifying recurring industry themes, objection patterns, and opportunity areas that can improve future pitches and win rates.



 What We’re Looking For
 


* 6–10 years of experience in presales, solutions consulting, or solution engineering within enterprise SaaS.
* Strong exposure to
 **BFSI** 
 clients, with experience supporting sales cycles for banks, financial institutions, insurance firms, fintechs, or NBFCs.
* Proven ability to manage complex enterprise deal cycles and influence multiple stakeholders across business, marketing, digital, product, and technology teams.
* Strong skills in discovery, consultative selling, storytelling, solution mapping, proposal support, and live product demonstrations.
* Good understanding of customer engagement platforms, marketing automation, customer data platforms, omnichannel communication, personalization, or adjacent digital experience technologies.netcorecloud\+1
* Ability to translate technical capabilities such as integrations, APIs, data flows, and platform architecture into business\-relevant value for customer\-facing and technical stakeholders.
* Experience handling RFP\-driven opportunities and enterprise evaluation processes with structured follow\-through and attention to detail.
* Based in Mumbai or open to working closely with PAN\-India enterprise accounts and client\-facing travel requirements.



 Preferred Background
 


* Experience working with MarTech, CX, CRM, CDP, engagement cloud, or digital communication platforms.
* Prior exposure to BFSI use cases such as onboarding journeys, customer activation, cross\-sell, service alerts, collections communication, renewal journeys, or retention programs.
* Familiarity with enterprise sales environments involving multiple buying committees, InfoSec or compliance reviews, and integration\-led evaluations.
* Exposure to competitors or adjacent ecosystems in customer engagement, marketing automation, or customer data platforms.



 Why Netcore
 



 Netcore offers an AI\-powered customer engagement platform designed to help brands bring data together, personalize every touchpoint, and engage customers across multiple digital channels at scale. Its positioning around customer engagement, journey orchestration, and data\-led personalization makes it well suited for enterprise BFSI organizations looking to improve customer communication, activation, retention, and digital journey effectiveness.

088fc25b.title: Solution Engineer (Post Sales)
088fc25b.description:
**Hevo Data** 




**Solution Engineer (Post\-sales)** 




**About Hevo** 




 DoorDash, Footlocker, Arhaus, Santander, and thousands of other data\-driven companies have one thing in common. They all use Hevo Data’s fully managed Automated Pipelines to consolidate their data from multiple sources like Databases, Marketing Applications, Cloud Storage, SDKs, Streaming Services, etc.
 



 We are a San Francisco, Bangalore, and Pune\-based company with 2000\+ customers spread across 45\+ countries in e\-commerce, financial technology, and healthcare. Strongly backed by marquee investors like Sequoia Capital, we have raised $42 Million to date and are looking forward to our next phase of hyper\-growth!
 



**Why do we exist?** 




 At Hevo, our mission is to enable every company to be data\-driven. We started on this journey 9 years back, and as the first step in this direction, we built our first product – “Data Pipeline” or simply “Pipeline”.
 



 Hevo Pipeline is a no\-code platform that helps companies connect all their sources of data within the company to get a unified view of their business. The platform offers integrations with 150\+ data sources such as Databases, SaaS applications, Advertising Channels, etc.
 



 Today, we enable close to 2000 companies across more than 40\+ countries to be more data\-driven. Our aim is to make the technology so simple that anyone should be able to solve their data problems and not be limited due to their lack of technical skills.
 



**The Role** 




 We are growing into mid\-market and enterprise accounts where the technical bar \- and the stakes \- are higher. To win and retain these customers, we are building the technical depth in our post\-sale motion to match.
 



 Enterprise buyers are not just buying a product. They are making architectural decisions. The CTOs, data architects, and engineering leads we work with at this level need a technical counterpart.
 



 As a Solution Engineer, you are that person. You are not the first point of contact, and you are not handling tickets.
 



 You are the expert our Account Managers bring in when a customer conversation goes beyond relationship management \- a quarterly architecture review, a complex integration challenge, a strategic expansion decision, or simply when a CTO wants to talk to someone who really knows data.
 



**What You Will Do** 



* Be the senior technical specialist that Account Managers call on for complex customer conversations \- architecture reviews, expansion discussions, and senior\-level technical engagements.
* Engage credibly with CTOs, senior engineers, and data architects as a genuine thought partner: understand their architecture, challenge assumptions, co\-design pipelines, and offer a credible point of view.
* Lead technical discovery and solution design for enterprise customers evaluating new use cases, migrations, or architectural changes involving Hevo.
* Translate complex customer requirements into actionable guidance \- both for the customer and, where needed, and for Hevo's internal engineering team.
* Build and maintain deep expertise in the modern data stack: cloud data warehouses, orchestration, transformation, and the broader ecosystem Hevo operates within.
* Identify expansion opportunities through technical engagement and hand them off to the AM with enough context to move the conversation forward commercially.
* Contribute to internal knowledge \- documenting patterns, building reference architectures, and raising the technical bar across the post\-sales team.



  





**What We Are Looking For** 




**Required** 



* 6\+ years of experience in a technical, customer\-facing role \- Solutions Engineering, Data Engineering, or a technical post\-sale or consulting function.
* Deep, broad knowledge of data engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, cloud data warehouses (Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Databricks), orchestration, and the modern data stack.
* Hands\-on experience with data integration tools, CDC, event streaming, or warehouse\-native transformation (dbt, etc.).
* Demonstrable ability to engage at the architectural level \- not just explain a product, but understand and speak to a customer's data infrastructure.
* Strong communication skills: you can make complex technical ideas clear to both engineers and executives, and you are confident pushing back when a customer's approach is suboptimal.
* Comfort working in an ambiguous, fast\-moving environment with a small team and high autonomy.



**Nice to Have** 



* Experience in a pre\-sales or post\-sales SE role at a data infrastructure or SaaS company.
* Exposure to enterprise data governance, compliance, or security requirements (SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA).
* Prior experience in a startup or high\-growth B2B SaaS environment.



  





**What You Will Not Be Doing** 




 This is not a support role, a ticket\-handling role, or a general customer success role. You will not be measured on ticket volume or response SLAs. You will be measured on whether enterprise customers trust Hevo at the technical level \- and whether that trust translates into deeper, longer, larger relationships.
 



**What We Offer** 



* Competitive compensation and/or equity.
* Direct access to leadership and real influence on how the post\-sale function is built.
* A collaborative, high\-trust environment where technical depth is valued and rewarded.

61f40515.title: OSS Architect
61f40515.description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.


**Job Description**
-------------------


* **Lead presales engagements — RFP/RFI response, solution architecture, effort estimation and commercial shaping — and present win themes to CxO/VP\-level telco stakeholders.**
* **Own end\-to\-end solution design across inventory management, service assurance, fault/performance management, order fulfillment and orchestration.**
* **Architect greenfield OSS stacks aligned to TM Forum ODA/eTOM/SID, including vendor and tooling selection and reference architecture creation.**
* **Define the roadmap toward autonomous networks — closed\-loop automation, intent\-based orchestration and zero\-touch operations — across OSS and network layers.**
* **Lead brownfield OSS modernization and legacy\-to\-target platform migrations with minimal service disruption across multi\-vendor networks.**
* **Own inventory reconciliation, data migration and cutover strategy across RAN, Core, Transport and IP/Optical domains, including rollback planning.**
* **Own delivery governance for multi\-year, multi\-workstream programs — scope, schedule, risk, quality and financials.**
* **Act as single technical point of accountability across design, build, test and operate phases, coordinating L1/L2/L3 delivery teams.**
* **Establish and track program KPIs/SLAs, steering committee reporting and executive dashboards.**
* **Mentor solution/delivery leads and build reusable accelerators, frameworks and playbooks across engagements**
Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55\-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end\-to\-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

310efdec.title: Solution Architect / Functional Architect - Cloud
310efdec.description:
**Job Title:** 
 Solution Architect / Functional Architect \- Cloud
   

  

**Department** 
 : IT
   

  

**About Business line/Function:** 
 Wealth Management (WM) \- Strategy and Architecture
   

  

**Position Purpose:** 
 As a member of the IS Architecture team, you will be in charge of helping projects define their Solution Architecture while migrating the Information System of Wealth Management into BNPP group Cloud platform. You will review their proposals with Enterprise Architects as well as Engineering/Production teams and Security teams to ensure that solutions proposed are aligned and compliant with BNPP policies and BNPP Cloud offering.
   

  

 You will be assigned to a fixed set of IT Divisions/Departments (2 or 3\) for which you will manage the solutioning for Cloud migration and BAU evolutions of the applications under their management. In addition, you may be assigned to specific transversal projects for which you will do the solutioning end\-to\-end.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Direct Responsibilities
   

  

* Maintain the Division/Department architecture reference documentation all along the changes brought by projects:
* IT system diagrams (Division level, or per sub\-block)
* Application referential (with the help of Application Owners)
* Division level principles and related non\-conformities and remediation plans
* Obsolescence KPIs
* Lead the Cloud solution architecture on the projects they are assigned to:
* Supporting the Project Manager/Business Analysts during solution ideation, design, and implementation
* Collaborating with application teams and Business Analysts/Tech leads of impacted applications to design solutions consistent from a functional and technical point of view
* Ensuring the alignment of projects with our architecture principles and IT standards
* Ensuring the solution is optimized for running on our IBM Private Cloud
* Support project managers, Business analysts and technical leads along the architecture validation process by:
* Leading the build of a consistent architecture documentation
* Presenting their projects in architecture validation committee
* Being the reference point on a set of applications for support/evolution activities
* Supporting the architecture process till the go\-live
* Bringing Cloud and architecture awareness to application teams
* Being the reference architect on a set of applications for support/evolution activities (having low architecture impacts), before and after they are migrated into the Cloud platform.
* Collaborate with following roles:
* Project managers/Business analyst of major transversal projects they are assigned to
* Tech leads/Developers, to understand the architecture of the applications/screens and analyze potential issues
* Application owner, to update the referential information on applications
* Engineering and Production team, to check the availability/compatibility with infrastructure/Cloud services
* Enterprise Architects, to facilitate the review and validation process.
* Division heads to align domain objectives and roadmaps
* Business analysts to understand the business needs and design solution that are functionally consistent
* Ensure the reference documentation is updated all along the changes brought by projects:
* Application referential
* IT architecture diagrams and documents
* Application non\-conformities and remediation plans
* Architecture principles, checklist, guidelines


 Contributing Responsibilities
   

  

* Provide and share specific expertise on our Cloud capabilities and in selected technical areas
* Participate to studies and proof\-of\-concepts with the business before a project is launched


**Technical \& Behavioral Competencies**
**Mandatory**
* Experience on designing and developing Cloud\-native solutions
* Experience on Cloud migration, integration patterns, high availability patterns, etc. (e.g. REST APIs, Container platforms, Event\-driven architecture, etc)
* Broad technical knowledge and experience across application, development frameworks and technologies
* Experience with Java/Spring/Angular, Oracle/PostgreSQL DB, Linux, API, Kafka etc.
* Functional/Business knowledge (current/past companies), ideally on core banking or portfolio management systems. Interest in Financial \& Banking industry
* Experience working on a project or in an architecture team covering a large ecosystem of applications (30\+)
* Experience in modeling activities (application maps, software design models, data modeling, infrastructure diagrams, etc.)
* Strong analysis skills with problem solving attitude
* Ability to communicate effectively in written documents and oral presentations, explaining concepts clearly to audiences at various levels of technical knowledge
* Effective leadership, planning and organization skills


**Plus**
* Experience of Enterprise Architecture discipline, processes, concepts, and best practices
* Experience in Wealth Management, or Financial and Banking Industry
* Knowledge of a Wealth Management Core Banking System such as Temenos Transact, ERI Olympic or Avaloq
* SCRUM/Agile experience
* Experience running Request for Proposal and assessing solutions


**Specific Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science or Engineering
* 3\+ years of experience architecting or developing solutions in a Cloud environment
* 5\+ years of experience in IT either as an Enterprise Architect or Solution Architect
* Architecture certification (TOGAF) or Cloud Architect certification (AWS, IBM Cloud)


**Technical Skills**
**Skills Referential** 
**(Required knowledge, skills and abilities)**
* 
+ Software Architecture / Cloud Architecture \- architecting or designing solutions in a Cloud environment (AWS, IBM Cloud)
+ Architecture patterns / Design principles / Problem solving / Solutioning
+ Architecture certification (TOGAF) or Cloud Architect certification (AWS, IBM Cloud)


**Behavioral Skills**
* Ability to collaborate / Teamwork
* 
+ Communication skills \- oral \& written

* Ability to synthetize / simplify
* 
+ Organizational skills


**Education Level:** 
 Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science or Engineering
   

  

**Location:** 
 Chennai
   

  

**About BNP Paribas Group**
 BNP Paribas is the European Union’s leading bank and key player in international banking. It operates in 65 countries and has nearly 185,000 employees, including more than 145,000 in Europe. The Group has key positions in its three main fields of activity: Commercial, Personal Banking \& Services for the Group’s commercial \& personal banking and several specialized businesses including BNP Paribas Personal Finance and Arval; Investment \& Protection Services for savings, investment, and protection solutions; and Corporate \& Institutional Banking, focused on corporate and institutional clients. Based on its strong diversified and integrated model, the Group helps all its clients (individuals, community associations, entrepreneurs, SMEs, corporates and institutional clients) to realize their projects through solutions spanning financing, investment, savings and protection insurance. In Europe, BNP Paribas has four domestic markets: Belgium, France, Italy, and Luxembourg. The Group is rolling out its integrated commercial \& personal banking model across several Mediterranean countries, Turkey, and Eastern Europe. As a key player in international banking, the Group has leading platforms and business lines in Europe, a strong presence in the Americas as well as a solid and fast\-growing business in Asia\-Pacific. BNP Paribas has implemented a Corporate Social Responsibility approach in all its activities, enabling it to contribute to the construction of a sustainable future, while ensuring the Group's performance and stability.
   

  

**About BNP Paribas India Solutions**
 Established in 2005, BNP Paribas India Solutions is a wholly owned subsidiary of BNP Paribas SA, European Union’s leading bank with an international reach. With delivery centers located in Bengaluru, Chennai and Mumbai, we are a 24x7 global delivery center. India Solutions services three business lines: Corporate and Institutional Banking, Investment Solutions and Retail Banking for BNP Paribas across the Group. Driving innovation and growth, we are harnessing the potential of over 10000 employees, to provide support and develop best\-in\-class solutions.
   

  

**Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**
 At BNP Paribas, we passionately embrace diversity and are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace where all employees are valued, respected and can bring their authentic selves to work. We prohibit Discrimination and Harassment of any kind and our policies promote equal employment opportunity for all employees and applicants, irrespective of, but not limited to their gender, gender identity, sex, sexual orientation, ethnicity, race, colour, national origin, age, religion, social status, mental or physical disabilities, veteran status etc. As a global Bank, we truly believe that inclusion and diversity of our teams is key to our success in serving our clients and the communities we operate in. As a global Bank, we truly believe that inclusion and diversity of our teams is key to our success in serving our clients and the communities we operate in.

961eaf31.title: Sr Architect
961eaf31.description:
Area(s) of responsibility
   

  

**Role Summary**
 As Senior Solution Architect for AIOps, Observability, and Agentic AI, you will be the technical anchor for client pursuits across our IT Operations transformation portfolio. You will partner with sales, bid management, and delivery teams to translate client pain points into outcome\-driven solutions — architecting AIOps and observability landscapes, embedding Agentic AI into IT operations, and owning the technical solution from RFP response through to delivery handover.
   

  

**Required Skills \& Experience**
**ITSM, ITOps \& Platforms (mandatory)**
* 12–15 years in IT across design, engineering, implementation, and pre\-sales — with 3\+ years in pre\-sales/solutioning of AIOps use cases for enterprise/global clients.
* Strong understanding of IT operations, infrastructure management, and application performance monitoring; sound ITIL foundations.
* Hands\-on experience with ITSM tooling (ServiceNow preferred) and across enterprise AIOps platforms — Aisera, Moogsoft, BigPanda, ServiceNow ITOM/AIOps, HPE OpsRamp, ScienceLogic.
* Scripting (JavaScript or similar), low\-code/no\-code platforms, and hands\-on REST API integration and automation workflow experience.


**Observability, Cloud \& DevOps**
* Expertise integrating and leveraging data from monitoring/logging/alerting tools — Datadog, Prometheus, Grafana, ELK (Elasticsearch/Logstash/Kibana), Splunk, Nagios, Dynatrace, AppDynamics, New Relic, OpenTelemetry.
* Extensive hands\-on experience with at least one major cloud — AWS, Azure, or GCP; working knowledge of containers (Docker, Kubernetes).
* DevOps \& SRE practices and tooling — Ansible, Terraform, Jenkins, Helm, CI/CD pipelines.


**AI / ML / Agentic AI**
* Understanding of ML for IT Operations — anomaly detection, predictive analytics, event correlation, and automated root\-cause analysis.
* Generative \& Agentic AI fluency: LLMs, embeddings, RAG, prompt engineering, multi\-agent/agent\-orchestration, and LLM\-powered automation (AI workflows / function\-calling).
* Knowledge of RPA/Intelligent Automation (UiPath, Automation Anywhere, Blue Prism) is a plus.


**Pre\-Sales \& Consulting Skills (high Weightage)**
* Proven RFP/proposal ownership, effort estimation, and pricing/benchmarking for large global deals in IT sourcing.
* Ability to drive client and multi\-stakeholder discussions, handle objections, and propose workaround solutions.

c742bc4d.title: VP- Solution Architect
c742bc4d.description:
Join us as a VP \- Solution Architect at Barclays, responsible for supporting the successful delivery of Location Strategy projects to plan, budget, agreed quality and governance standards. You'll spearhead the evolution of our digital landscape, driving innovation and excellence. You will harness cutting\-edge technology to revolutionize our digital offerings, ensuring unparalleled customer experiences.
   

  

 To be successful VP \- Solution Architect you should have experience with:
   

  

  

* Experience of shaping and defining reusable solutions and architecture across disparate technologies that resolve complex business issues with simple and cost effective technology based solutions.
* Experience of software and solution design across distributed and integrated architectures.
* Experience of API \& integration strategies both for internal and external consumption.
* Hands on technical experience building and implementing software.


**Desirable Skills/Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience of working with investment products or in an investment/asset management environment.
* Knowledge of technologies that are used by financial service providers.
* Experience of working with cloud technologies.


 You may be assessed on the key critical skills relevant for success in role, such as risk and controls, change and transformation, business acumen strategic thinking and digital and technology, as well as job\-specific technical skills.
   

  

 This role is based in Pune.
   

  

**Purpose of the role**
 To design, develop, and implement solutions to complex business problems, collaborating with stakeholders to understand their needs and requirements, and design and implement solutions that meet those needs and create solutions that balance technology risks against business delivery, driving consistency.
   

  

**Accountabilities**
* Design and development of solutions as products that can evolve, meeting business requirements that align with modern software engineering practices and automated delivery tooling. This includes identification and implementation of the technologies and platforms.
* Targeted design activities that apply an appropriate workload placement strategy and maximise the benefit of cloud capabilities such as elasticity, serverless, containerisation etc.
* Best practice designs incorporating security principles (such as defence in depth and reduction of blast radius) that meet the Bank’s resiliency expectations.
* Solutions that appropriately balance risks and controls to deliver the agreed business and technology value.
* Adoption of standardised solutions where they fit. If no standard solutions fit, feed into their ongoing evolution where appropriate.
* Fault finding and performance issues support to operational support teams, leveraging available tooling.
* Solution design impact assessment in terms of risk, capacity and cost impact, inc. estimation of project change and ongoing run costs.
* Development of the requisite architecture inputs required to comply with the banks governance processes, including design artefacts required for architecture, privacy, security and records management governance processes.


**Vice President Expectations**
* To contribute or set strategy, drive requirements and make recommendations for change. Plan resources, budgets, and policies; manage and maintain policies/ processes; deliver continuous improvements and escalate breaches of policies/procedures..
* If managing a team, they define jobs and responsibilities, planning for the department’s future needs and operations, counselling employees on performance and contributing to employee pay decisions/changes. They may also lead a number of specialists to influence the operations of a department, in alignment with strategic as well as tactical priorities, while balancing short and long term goals and ensuring that budgets and schedules meet corporate requirements..
* If the position has leadership responsibilities, People Leaders are expected to demonstrate a clear set of leadership behaviours to create an environment for colleagues to thrive and deliver to a consistently excellent standard. The four LEAD behaviours are: L – Listen and be authentic, E – Energise and inspire, A – Align across the enterprise, D – Develop others..
* OR for an individual contributor, they will be a subject matter expert within own discipline and will guide technical direction. They will lead collaborative, multi\-year assignments and guide team members through structured assignments, identify the need for the inclusion of other areas of specialisation to complete assignments. They will train, guide and coach less experienced specialists and provide information affecting long term profits, organisational risks and strategic decisions..
* Advise key stakeholders, including functional leadership teams and senior management on functional and cross functional areas of impact and alignment.
* Manage and mitigate risks through assessment, in support of the control and governance agenda.
* Demonstrate leadership and accountability for managing risk and strengthening controls in relation to the work your team does.
* Demonstrate comprehensive understanding of the organisation functions to contribute to achieving the goals of the business.
* Collaborate with other areas of work, for business aligned support areas to keep up to speed with business activity and the business strategies.
* Create solutions based on sophisticated analytical thought comparing and selecting complex alternatives. In\-depth analysis with interpretative thinking will be required to define problems and develop innovative solutions.
* Adopt and include the outcomes of extensive research in problem solving processes.
* Seek out, build and maintain trusting relationships and partnerships with internal and external stakeholders in order to accomplish key business objectives, using influencing and negotiating skills to achieve outcomes.


 All colleagues will be expected to demonstrate the Barclays Values of Respect, Integrity, Service, Excellence and Stewardship – our moral compass, helping us do what we believe is right. They will also be expected to demonstrate the Barclays Mindset – to Empower, Challenge and Drive – the operating manual for how we behave.

4c8831cb.title: Solution Architect
4c8831cb.description:
**Role Summary**
 We are looking for a highly experienced Architect with strong expertise in Application Architecture, System Design, Cloud Architecture, and Modern Engineering Practices. The role involves working closely with clients, delivery teams, and business stakeholders to define solution architectures, support pre\-sales engagements, conduct architecture assessments, and drive digital transformation initiatives.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead solution architecture and system design for enterprise applications.
* Engage directly with clients to understand business requirements and define technology solutions.
* Support pre\-sales activities including solutioning, effort estimation, proposal reviews, and technical presentations.
* Conduct architecture assessments and provide modernization recommendations.
* Design cloud\-native and distributed systems leveraging AWS, Azure, or GCP.
* Define architecture standards, design patterns, and engineering best practices.
* Collaborate with delivery teams to ensure successful implementation of architectural solutions.


**Required Skills**
* 10\+ years of experience in software engineering and architecture.
* Strong expertise in Application Architecture and Distributed Systems Design.
* Hands\-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP).
* Deep understanding of microservices, APIs, event\-driven architectures, integration patterns, and modern application platforms.
* AI fluency with a working understanding of Agentic AI concepts, multi\-agent architectures, MCP, tool orchestration, and AI\-assisted engineering workflows
* Familiarity with DevOps, CI/CD, observability, and platform engineering concepts.
* Strong stakeholder management and client\-facing communication skills.
* Ability to lead technical discussions, workshops, and architecture reviews.
* Experience in BFSI, Retail, or Enterprise Digital Transformation programs is a plus.
* TOGAF or architecture certifications are a plus.


**Key Success Factors**
* Strong communication and presentation skills.
* Ability to influence client stakeholders and engineering teams.
* Excellent problem\-solving and consulting mindset.
* Ability to balance technical depth with business outcomes.

1fde13cf.title: Solution Architect
1fde13cf.description:
**Job Description**
**Ciklum** 
 is looking for a
 **Solution Architect** 
 to join our team full\-time in India.
   

  

 We are a custom product engineering company that supports both multinational organizations and scaling startups to solve their most complex business challenges. With a global team of over 4,000 highly skilled developers, consultants, analysts and product owners, we engineer technology that redefines industries and shapes the way people live.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Solution Architect, become a part of a cross\-functional development team engineering experiences of tomorrow. The Solution Architect will play a critical role in defining the architecture, ensuring scalability, security, performance, and successful delivery of the platform. The architect will work closely with engineering, product, and business stakeholders to establish architecture standards and drive implementation across multiple teams.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Define and own the end\-to\-end solution architecture for the HiTrix platform
* Design scalable, secure, and high\-performance enterprise applications aligned with business objectives
* Lead architecture reviews, technical design discussions, and technology decisions
* Define application, integration, data, and infrastructure architecture
* Establish architecture standards, design patterns, and engineering best practices
* Guide development teams on implementation approaches and technical solutions
* Design cloud\-native, microservices\-based solutions with high availability and resilience
* Ensure compliance with security, governance, and regulatory requirements
* Drive performance optimization, scalability, and operational excellence initiatives
* Define integration strategies with internal and external systems
* Collaborate with product, engineering, DevOps, and business stakeholders throughout the delivery lifecycle
* Provide technical leadership, mentoring, and governance across engineering teams
* Support CI/CD strategy, release management, and deployment architecture
* Mandatory Technical Skills
* Frontend
* ReactJS
* Next.js
* Responsive Web Application Development
* Microservices\-based Frontend Architecture
* Multi\-Zone Deployment Architecture
* Backend
* Python
* Django
* Database
* PostgreSQL
* Cloud \& Infrastructure
* AWS Cloud Platform
* Redis (ElastiCache)
* DevOps
* CI/CD Pipelines
* Architecture \& Enterprise Solutions
* Microservices Architecture
* Distributed Systems
* Solution Design
* System Integration
* API Architecture
* Security \& Compliance
* Enterprise Application Architecture
* External System Integrations
* High Availability \& Scalability


**Requirements**
* 12\+ years of software engineering experience with significant experience in Solution Architecture roles
* Proven experience architecting and delivering large\-scale enterprise applications
* Strong expertise in designing cloud\-native applications on AWS
* Hands\-on experience with ReactJS, Next.js, Python, and Django\-based ecosystems
* Extensive experience in microservices architecture and distributed systems
* Strong understanding of security, compliance, governance, and architecture best practices
* Experience designing and implementing integrations with third\-party and enterprise systems
* Strong knowledge of CI/CD practices and DevOps methodologies
* Experience with high\-volume transactional platforms and workflow\-driven systems
* Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills
* Ability to drive technical decisions across multiple teams and workstreams


**Desirable**
* Marketplace Platform experience
* Workflow Engine or BPM platform experience
* Event\-Driven Architecture
* Redis caching strategies and performance optimization
* Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/CloudFormation)
* AWS Certifications
* TOGAF or equivalent Architecture certifications


**What’s in it for you?**
* Strong community: Work alongside top professionals in a friendly, open\-door environment
* Growth focus: Take on large\-scale projects with a global impact and expand your expertise
* Tailored learning: Boost your skills with internal events (meetups, conferences, workshops), Udemy access, language courses, and company\-paid certifications
* Endless opportunities: Explore diverse domains through internal mobility, finding the best fit to gain hands\-on experience with cutting\-edge technologies
* Care: We’ve got you covered with company\-paid medical insurance, mental health support, and financial \& legal consultations


**About Us**
 At Ciklum, we are always exploring innovations, empowering each other to achieve more, and engineering solutions that matter. With us, you’ll work with cutting\-edge technologies, contribute to impactful projects, and be part of a One Team culture that values collaboration and progress.
   

  

 India is a strategic innovation hub for Ciklum, with growing teams in Chennai and Pune leading advancements in EdgeTech, AR/VR, IoT, and beyond. Join us to collaborate on game\-changing solutions and take your career to the next level.
   

  

**Explore, empower, engineer with Ciklum!**
 Interested already? We would love to get to know you! Submit your application. We can’t wait to see you at Ciklum.

738a8569.title: Solution Architect – Product & Technology | Power BI |  Acterys
738a8569.description:
**Department:** 
 Product Development
   

  

**Location:** 
 India \- Resident (0008\)
   

  

**Compensation:** 
 ₹3,825,000 \- ₹5,175,000 / year
   

  

**Description**
**This role will be working out of our Pune or Indore office 5 days a week.**
 Vena Solutions is hiring a Solution Architect, Product \& Technology (Acterys), to help shape and evolve the architecture of the Acterys application within Vena’s growing SaaS platform. In this role, you’ll take ownership of the solution architecture for new and existing capabilities, working closely with product and engineering partners to turn business needs into secure, scalable, resilient, and high‑quality solutions.
